### 150. 超写实自画像，带 Q 版人物和 UI 叠加提示

**作者**: [simeon-sanai](https://x.com/Naiknelofar788/status/2029341752382091418)  **日期**: 2026-03-04  **语言**: en

> 一个复杂的提示，用于生成一张超现实主义全身照片，照片中包含用户的肖像和他们自己的 Q 版动漫形象，并叠加 Apple Music 播放器 UI 界面，强调高对比度、特定服装以及图形元素的干净整合。

![超写实自画像，带 Q 版人物和 UI 叠加提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772692202777_5oqkbi_HCmrkYmawAI_23l.jpg)
![超写实自画像，带 Q 版人物和 UI 叠加提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772692202787_b8bmcr_HCmrkYQbAAAVLRE.jpg)

```
Create an Ultra-detailed, ratio 4:5, hyperrealistic full-body photograph of a stylish me posing on a modern city sidewalk under bright, direct midday sun. The composition is a vertical medium-full shot from an eye-level perspective. The me leans casually against a dark grey metal street pole that creates a strong vertical line just right of center. He wears a striking, slightly glossy crimson red faux leather jacket zipped halfway over a crisp white collared shirt. His trousers are wide-leg, cream-colored corduroy with visible texture. He wears polished black leather loafers. His pose is relaxed, with one leg crossed over the other, and his left hand is tucked into his pocket. He has curly black hair and wears modern black-framed glasses, looking off to his right with a neutral, cool expression. To his right, a cute chibi anime character version of himself, with a large head and big eyes, perfectly mirrors his pose and outfit, rendered with clean black line art and simple cell shading. On the left side of the frame, a large, semi-transparent, dark grey, rounded rectangle overlay mimicking an Apple Music player Ul is professionally superimposed, featuring album art of a red canoe on water and playback controls; this Ul has a subtle 'glassmorphism' frosted glass effect. The lighting is hard sunlight from the top-right, casting sharp, defined shadows on the light grey tiled pavement. The background consists of a modern building with large, greenish-tinted glass panels. Shot with a 35mm lens, f/5.6 aperture, creating sharp focus on the subject and graphics with a slightly soft background. The color science emphasizes high contrast between the crimson red, cream, and cool tones of the environment. Avoid any motion blur, unnatural skin textures, or distorted proportions. The integration of the graphic elements must be seamless and clean, without pixelation or rough edges.
```

### 152. 运动后镜子自拍肖像提示（萨迪·辛克）

### 166. 超现实主义编辑肖像：墨水挽歌

**作者**: [timedoctor.eth](https://x.com/timedoctor_nft/status/2028199352997392450)  **日期**: 2026-03-01  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细、结构化的提示，用于生成超现实主义的、超现实的编辑肖像。该提示指定了电影构图（三分法）、高对比度的明暗对照法照明，以及一种超现实的视觉呈现，其中主体的脸部被粘稠的黑色印度墨水和古董书法笔尖覆盖，模拟了实际效果。它针对特定的设备配置文件（哈苏 H6D-100c）和胶片模拟（柯达 Portra 800），以实现最大的真实感和氛围。

![超现实主义编辑肖像：墨水挽歌](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772433494495_drmcij_HCWcj4LXwAA2eXS.jpg)
![超现实主义编辑肖像：墨水挽歌](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772433494508_uig922_HCWcj8qXAAAXiw7.jpg)

```
{
  "vibe_title_en": "The Ink Lament",
  "master_prompt": "A hyper-realistic, surreal editorial portrait of The Melancholic Prodigy, captured in a dimly lit, dust-filled antique letterpress workshop. The protagonist is framed strictly according to the Cinematic Rule of Thirds, positioned on the far right, leaving vast, moody negative space to the left. The subject exhibits a 'sorrowful focus,' staring past the lens. SURREAL VISUAL TRANSLATION: mirroring the dense, swarming geometry of the reference image, the subject's face and neck are not covered in spiders, but in viscous, anti-gravity droplets of black India ink and broken, antique calligraphy nibs that cling to the skin like organic parasites. These elements cast realistic, micro-shadows on the pores, treating the surrealism as a practical effect. The lighting is a high-contrast Chiaroscuro: a single, warm shaft of light cuts through the airborne dust particles, illuminating the glossy texture of the ink against the matte skin, while the rest falls into deep shadow. Shot on a Hasselblad H6D-100c with an HC 100mm f/2.2 lens to achieve a razor-thin depth of field, focusing intensely on the eyes and the tactile ink texture. Film simulation: Kodak Portra 800, rich grain, desaturated slightly to emphasize the melancholic atmosphere. No neon, no digital gloss.",
  "meta": {
    "intent": "Editorial Surrealism",
    "priorities": "Texture, Mood, Narrative Conflict",
    "device_profile": "Hasselblad H6D-100c"
  },
  "frame": {

    "composition": "Rule of Thirds",

    "tilt_roll_degrees": "0"

**作者**: [Pinodi](https://x.com/PinodiArt/status/2028167565772575141)  **日期**: 2026-03-01  **语言**: en

> 一个极其详细、结构化的提示词，专注于生成 Sabrina Carpenter（数字孪生重建）的超逼真镜面自拍。该提示词详细说明了生物特征细节、服装（蜘蛛侠紧身衣、黑色透明丝袜）、姿势（坐在沙发上）、灯光（混合自然光和霓虹灯光），并包含严格的负面约束，以确保原始、未经美化的外观。

![Sabrina Carpenter 蜘蛛侠镜面自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772433507053_2ilpsf_HCV_b3KXQAALTh8.jpg)
![Sabrina Carpenter 蜘蛛侠镜面自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772433507038_uvd8mf_HCV_eMnWcAAqjzj.jpg)

{
  "subject": {
    "identity": {
      "biometric_reference": "Sabrina Carpenter",
      "analysis": "Exact digital twin reconstruction with high fidelity to facial structure and defined jawline."
    },
    "facial_details": {
      "eyes": "Almond-shaped, iris color hex #9CB4BF (muted blue-grey), gaze directed at the smartphone screen reflection.",
      "mouth": "Closed, neutral expression, strictly no smiling, natural lip morphology without cosmetics.",
      "skin": "Fitzpatrick Scale Type II, visible natural pore texture, no makeup, no lipstick, subsurface scattering depth 2.0mm.",
      "hair": "Voluminous blonde ponytail, hex #E5D5B0, messy texture with soft curtain bangs framing the face."
    },

### 171. 草莓连体衣镜面自拍，使用 ControlNet

**作者**: [Bethany](https://x.com/JustBethanyai/status/2028086666670260628)  **日期**: 2026-03-01  **语言**: en

> 一个高度技术性的提示，使用 ControlNet 参数（OpenPose 和 Depth）生成一张年轻女性（麦迪逊·比尔 Madison Beer 肖像）身穿深森林绿草莓图案连体衣的逼真镜面自拍。该提示严格控制姿势、深度和解剖比例，以确保真实感并避免扭曲，场景设定在浴室环境中。

![草莓连体衣镜面自拍，使用 ControlNet](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772433508949_xqc314_HCU1MmOWcAAlTYS.jpg)
![草莓连体衣镜面自拍，使用 ControlNet](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772433508890_yenndg_HCU1MmYX0AAp9pU.jpg)
![草莓连体衣镜面自拍，使用 ControlNet](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772433509105_619old_HCU1Mmwb0AA5EN9.jpg)
![草莓连体衣镜面自拍，使用 ControlNet](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772433509568_qdmgrs_HCU1MmaWUAA2bC7.jpg)

```
{
  "subject": "young woman with long natural black hair and fair skin, wearing a form-fitting, long-sleeved, short-legged deep forest green onesie patterned with small strawberries.",
  "pose": "Standing in profile, facing left, torso slightly turned to glance back at the mirror. Right hand holds a black smartphone to take a selfie. Natural standing posture with relaxed shoulders and a soft, subtle smile.",
  "environment": "Bathroom setting. A white paneled door with silver hardware is directly behind. A white sink basin and chrome faucet occupy the bottom foreground. A white light switch is visible on the left wall.",
  "camera": "Mirror selfie perspective. Shot from chest height, cropping the subject from mid-thigh to just above the head.",
  "lighting": "Standard indoor artificial overhead lighting, casting soft shadows on the door panels and bright reflections on the metallic faucet.",
  "mood_and_expression": "Casual, relaxed selfie posture with a calm and natural expression.",
  "style_and_realism": "Unedited, realistic smartphone photograph.",
  "colors_and_tone": "Warm overall tone dominated by whites, fair skin hues, deep green fabric tones, soft red strawberry accents, and metallic silver/chrome.",
  "quality_and_technical_details": "Typical modern smartphone camera resolution with slight indoor grain and realistic fabric texture.",
  "aspect_ratio_and_output": "3:4",
  "controlnet": {
    "pose_control": {
      "model_type": "openpose_full",
      "purpose": "Preserve exact skeletal alignment, torso orientation, and anatomical proportions without altering mass distribution",
      "constraints": "No limb length change, no torso compression, no posture exaggeration, no anatomical distortion",
      "recommended_weight": 1.1
    },
    "depth_control": {
      "model_type": "depth_midas",
      "purpose": "Preserve accurate 3D spatial depth, volumetric projection, and foreground-background separation",
      "constraints": "No depth flattening, no volumetric distortion, no perspective alteration",
      "recommended_weight": 1.15
    }
  },
  "negative_prompt": "stylization, body reshaping, anatomical distortion, exaggerated curves, volume compression, proportion changes, depth flattening, beautification filters, symmetry correction, perspective alteration, explicit content"
}
```

```
{
  "title": "Golden Hour Fitness Muse",
  "description": "A stunning young woman capturing a mirror selfie inside a modern gym during golden hour. She is dressed in a beige sports bra paired with olive green high-waisted fitted workout shorts that highlight her athletic physique. Black over-ear headphones rest comfortably on her head while her long, flowing red hair cascades down her back. Warm sunlight streams through large floor-to-ceiling windows, casting a soft golden glow across the gym equipment, dumbbell racks, and benches in the background.   "outfit_details": {
    "top": "Beige sports bra",
    "bottom": "Olive green high-waisted workout shorts",
    "accessory": "Black over-ear headphones"
  },
  "mood": "Confident, Strong, Aesthetic, Fitness Inspiration",
  "pose": "Side mirror selfie pose highlighting athletic physique",

}

{
  “subject”: {
    “description”: “A candid vertical mirror selfie photograph of a young woman with long, wavy brown hair, taken in a cluttered bedroom.”,
    “body”: {
      “physique”: “She has a highly exaggerated, curvy hourglass figure with an extremely narrow, cinched waist and significantly large, wide, and round fitness-style glutes and hips. Her thighs are thick and toned. The pose emphasizes this dramatic waist-to-hip ratio.”,
      “pose”: “Standing in front of a large round mirror, holding a smartphone with a patterned case up to take a mirror selfie, partially covering her face. One arm is crossed over her midriff. She is looking at the phone screen.”,
      “features”: “Long, wavy brown hair cascading over her shoulders. The phone case has a colorful cartoon pattern.”
    }
  },
“wardrobe”: {
    “top”: “A simple, tight-fitting black strapless tube top (bandeau) that shows her midriff.”,
    “bottom”: “High-waisted, vibrant green booty shorts featuring a large, smiling cartoon face of the Pokemon character Bulbasaur printed across the front.”,
    “accessories”: “A silver necklace with a small pendant.”
  },
  “pose_action”: “Taking a mirror selfie in a messy bedroom to showcase her outfit and physique.”,
  “scene”: {
    “environment”: “A cluttered, personalized bedroom reflected in a large round mirror.”,
    “elements”: “To the left is a bed with a pink and white patterned duvet and a pink metal locker-style cabinet covered in stickers. The wall behind the bed is decorated with several framed anime posters. The floor is messy with clothes, boxes, boots, and other items. A doorway is visible in the background reflection on the right.”,
“composition”: “Vertical 9:16 aspect ratio mirror selfie. The circular frame of the mirror is visible, reflecting the woman and the entire messy room.”
  },
  “lighting”: {
    “setup”: “Natural ambient room lighting mixed with indoor lights.”,
    “details”: “The light is bright enough to show all the details of the room and the subject, reflecting off the mirror surface.”
  },
  “camera”: {
    “technical”: “Shot on a smartphone. The photo has a candid, unedited aesthetic typical of a mirror selfie, with realistic colors and textures.”,
    “constraints”: [
      “Aspect Ratio 9:16”,
      “Physique MUST have an extremely narrow waist and SIGNIFICANTLY LARGE, wide fitness glutes and hips”,
      “Bottoms MUST be green high-waisted shorts with a BULBASAUR Pokemon face”,
      “Replicate the messy bedroom background with anime posters and pink furniture”,
      “The image must be a vertical mirror selfie”
    ]
  }
}

}

### 182. iPhone 美学提示词生成器框架

**作者**: [Machina](https://x.com/EXM7777/status/2027768767263224214)  **日期**: 2026-02-28  **语言**: en

> 这是一个元提示或系统指令，旨在引导大型语言模型（如 Nano Banana 2）生成高度具体、结构化的 JSON 提示，用于创建超逼真的 AI 影响者，模拟 iPhone Pro Max 摄像头的光学特性和美学（例如，24mm 焦距、深度融合、计算散景）。用户必须提供场景描述才能触发 JSON 输出。

![iPhone 美学提示词生成器框架](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772346659160_chqwxf_HCQU8qpa0AAod9b.jpg)

```
<role>
You're specialized in computational photography, specifically the optical characteristics of the iPhone 16/17 Pro Max sensor system. You translate human concepts into mathematically precise image generation prompts.
</role>

<cognitive_framework>
<principle name="Context Hunger">
If the user provides a vague concept (e.g., "girl at a cafe"), you must explicitly invent the missing environmental, lighting, and styling details to ensure a complete image.
</principle>
<principle name="The iPhone Aesthetic">
All outputs must strictly simulate high-end mobile photography.
- Focal Lengths: 24mm (Main), 13mm (Ultra Wide), or 77mm (Telephoto).
- Characteristics: "Apple ProRAW" color science, sharp details (Deep Fusion), computational bokeh (Portrait Mode), and Smart HDR dynamic range.
- Avoid: Anamorphic lens flares, exaggerated "cinema" bokeh, or vintage film grain (unless specified as a filter).
</principle>
<principle name="Imperfection is Realism">
To achieve "ultra-realism," you must inject terms describing unpolished reality: digital noise (not film grain), skin texture, slightly blown-out highlights (common in mobile), and natural "snapshot" framing.
</principle>
<principle name="JSON Precision">
Your output is a strict JSON object designed for programmatic use.
</principle>
</cognitive_framework>

<visual_analysis_reference>
The "Influencer Aesthetic" is defined by:
- Vibe: "Plandid" (planned candid), effortlessness, aspirational lifestyle.
- Lighting: Natural window light, golden hour, or "flash photography" (hard flash) for night shots.
- Framing: Vertical (9:16) native mobile aspect ratio, often selfies or point-of-view (POV).
</visual_analysis_reference>

<instructions>
1. Analyze the user's request for subject and mood.
2. Enrich the request using "iPhone Photography" constraints.
3. Format the output strictly as a JSON object with the following schema.
</instructions>

<json_schema>
{
  "meta_data": {
    "style": "iPhone Pro Max Photography",
    "aspect_ratio": "9:16"
  },
  "prompt_components": {
    "subject": "Detailed description of person, styling, pose (mirror selfie, 0.5x angle, etc.)",
    "environment": "Detailed background, location, social setting",
    "lighting": "Smart HDR lighting, natural source, or direct flash",
    "camera_gear": "iPhone 16 Pro Max, Main Camera 24mm f/1.78, or Ultra Wide 13mm",
    "processing": "Apple ProRAW, Deep Fusion, Shot on iPhone",
    "imperfections": "Digital noise, motion blur, authentic skin texture, screen reflection (if mirror)"
  },
  "full_prompt_string": "The combined, comma-separated string optimized for realistic mobile generation",
  "negative_prompt": "Standard negatives + 'professional camera, DSLR, bokeh balls, anamorphic, cinema lighting, studio lighting'"
}
</json_schema>

<task>
Await user description of the scene. Generate the JSON output immediately.
</task>
```

**Related**: [[奇幻世界]]、[[超现实]]、[[综合生活]]

### 205. 超清晰镜面自拍提示词（碧梨身份锁定）

**作者**: [Danna R.](https://x.com/daaaaanc/status/2027088806080651354)  **日期**: 2026-02-26  **语言**: en

> 一个极其详细的提示，用于生成一张 Billie Eilish 的超写实镜面自拍，重点在于精修骨骼结构、高光泽秀发、蕾丝礼服的精细纺织物理效果，以及特定解剖体积的夸张呈现。

![超清晰镜面自拍提示词（碧梨身份锁定）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772174118026_iqjp8r_HCGqgjfaYAE1D7U.jpg)

```
(9:16). Raw iPhone 17 Pro, 35mm, f/5.6 total depth, sharp focus, authentic digital grain.

[Subject & Identity Locking]
* Identity Lock: Absolute inheritance of core facial geometry from Image A + Glow-Up Protocol. 
* Bio-Fidelity: Clear porcelain epidermal canvas, zero acne/blemishes/dark circles, undereye brightness, micro-pores. 
* Facial Refinement: Architectural bone structure—20% increased definition to the jawline and cheekbone coordinates for a hyper-slimmed, contoured facial silhouette.
* Hair Architecture: High-gloss salon-finish long brunette hair with high-definition strand separation and silk-weave texture.

[Outfit & Physicality]
* Technical Description: Technical off-the-white floral-lace architectural gown, long sleeves with 5mm eyelash-lace scalloped cuffs, square neckline.
* Textile Architecture: High-tensile corset-style bodice with horizontal bandage-wrap structural seaming; layered lace-on-nude-base textile physics.
* Anatomical Volume: Hyper-defined S-curve silhouette, 20% over-described emphasis on anatomical bust volume, waist-to-hip ratio, and lateral hip geometry.

[Pose & Interaction]
* Geometry: Mirror-selfie geometry, right hand holding a high-fidelity pink smartphone simulation; head tilted slightly downward; face partially obscured by device.
* Articulation: Left hand resting flat against the superior chest margin with realistic finger-joint articulation and light skin-on-skin compression.

[Environment & Lighting]
* Atmosphere: Soft indoor ambient illumination with a neutral white balance and realistic ray-traced reflections.
* Shadow Ray-Tracing: Natural ambient occlusion within the intricate lace textures and sharp shadows cast by the subject onto the background masonry.
* Background Integrity: Pixel-perfect inventory of an interior staircase setting: light multi-tonal beige brick masonry wall, horizontal dark wood banister, and vertical white-painted wooden balusters.

Subject: Billie Eilish
```

### 214. 使用 ControlNet 约束的详细镜面自拍提示

**作者**: [Lore](https://x.com/l_w_lorenzen/status/2026540915960197549)  **日期**: 2026-02-25  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细、结构化的图像生成提示，指定了主体（穿着特定服装、摆出特定姿势的年轻女性）、环境（卧室镜子自拍）、相机视角、光线、情绪和风格（抓拍、高物理真实感）。至关重要的是，它包含了广泛的 ControlNet 参数（OpenPose 和 Depth），并带有严格的约束条件，以锁定骨骼对齐、解剖比例和体积投影，同时使用长负面提示来避免风格化和人工增强。

![使用 ControlNet 约束的详细镜面自拍提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772087653917_mlsfoh_HB-4LAoaMAE68xx.jpg)

```
{
"subject": "Young woman, long blonde hair with face-framing highlights. Wearing tight white tank top showing distinct chest volume and fabric tension, grey flared trousers, black belt with silver buckle, and black strappy high heels. Gold bracelet on left wrist. Holding a dark green smartphone with three lenses.",
"pose": "Crouching sideways, back arched. Torso twisted towards camera mirror. Right hand holds phone at face level. Left arm rests lightly on left thigh. Full body weight distributed on toes and heels.",
"environment": "Bedroom interior. White unmade bed with pillows behind subject. White textured rug on dark wood floor. White walls. Vertical window blinds visible on the left.",
"camera": "Mirror selfie perspective. Standard smartphone wide lens. Eye-level framing capturing full crouching figure.",
"lighting": "Soft natural daylight from left window. Natural soft shadows cast to the right. High-key overall illumination.",
"mood_and_expression": "Neutral expression, relaxed demeanor, direct gaze into phone mirror.",
"style_and_realism": "Candid mirror selfie photograph. High physical realism, unmodified amateur style.",
"colors_and_tone": "Neutral high-key palette. Dominant whites, greys, and blacks. Natural skin tones and blonde hair. Dark green accent from phone.",
"quality_and_technical_details": "Sharp focus smartphone image. Visible natural textures on bed sheets, ribbed tank top, and rug.",
"aspect_ratio_and_output": "3:4",
"controlnet": {
"pose_control": {
"model_type": "openpose_full",
"purpose": "Strictly lock skeletal alignment, anatomical proportions, torso orientation, and prevent structural or volumetric alteration",
"constraints": "No limb length adjustment, no torso compression, no chest volume reduction, no posture change, no symmetry correction, no ribcage narrowing",
"recommended_weight": 1.2
},
"depth_control": {
"model_type": "depth_midas",
"purpose": "Enforce exact volumetric projection, silhouette area equivalence, curvature depth integrity, and spatial layering",
"constraints": "No depth flattening, no volumetric shrinkage, no perspective reinterpretation, no shadow softening, no foreground-background collapse, no artificial depth of field",
"recommended_weight": 1.25
}
},
"negative_prompt": "stylization, cinematic look, cinematic lighting, cinematic color grading, film look, film simulation, dramatic lighting, HDR effect, tonal remapping, teal and orange grading, DSLR simulation, portrait mode effect, bokeh, background blur, depth of field, lens blur, gaussian blur, soft focus, motion blur, atmospheric haze, volumetric light beams, glow effect, bloom, post-processing effects, AI enhancement, detail enhancement filters, artificial sharpening, oversharpening, skin smoothing, retouching, face enhancement, aesthetic correction, body normalization, shape refinement, geometric reinterpretation, anatomical distortion, breast reduction, volume compression, torso slimming, ribcage narrowing, sym"
```

### 215. 室内化妆间镜子自拍

![坦率的镜子自拍，配以夸张的体格和小火龙短裤](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772001545184_6s538z_HBzCNGsXUAE_gbC.jpg)

    }

The wall behind the bed is decorated with several framed anime posters. The floor is messy with clothes, boxes, boots, and other items. Pose: Seated on a technical leg press machine, lateral torso torsion, right hand articulated in a V-gesture with realistic finger physics. Lighting: Industrial overhead gym fluorescent lighting, sharp ray-traced highlights on muscular topography. > 一个高度详细的提示，用于生成一张垂直、抓拍的镜子自拍照。它描述了一位身材极其夸张的沙漏型美国女性，身穿黑色抹胸和印有妙蛙种子图案的亮绿色热裤，置身于一个杂乱、个性化的卧室中，镜面反射清晰可见。

```
A vertical 2:3 candid mirror selfie of American Woman [uploaded image], Full Bust, Rambut Hitam panjang bergelombang, standing in front of a large round mirror inside a cluttered, personalized bedroom. She holds a smartphone with a colorful cartoon-patterned case up to take the photo, partially covering her face while looking at the screen. One arm crosses lightly over her midriff, subtly emphasizing her dramatically defined hourglass silhouette with an extremely narrow cinched waist and significantly wide, rounded fitness-style hips and glutes, along with thick toned thighs. She wears a tight black strapless tube top that reveals her midriff and high-waisted vibrant green booty shorts featuring a large smiling Bulbasaur cartoon face printed across the front. A delicate silver necklace with a small pendant rests at her collarbone. The mirror’s circular frame is visible, reflecting the entire messy room: a bed with a pink and white patterned duvet, a pink metal locker-style cabinet covered in stickers, several framed anime posters on the wall, and a floor scattered with clothes, boxes, boots, and miscellaneous items. A doorway appears in the right-side reflection. Natural ambient light mixed with indoor lighting brightens the room evenly, showing realistic colors and textures. Shot on a smartphone with an unedited, spontaneous mirror-selfie aesthetic.
```

### 252. 2x2 网格电影感夜景情侣肖像，带身份锁定

**作者**: [Özge Döner](https://x.com/astronomerozge1/status/2023826325358719030)  **日期**: 2026-02-17  **语言**: en

> 一个复杂的 JSON 提示，用于生成一对情侣在电影般的夜晚场景中的 2x2 网格拼贴画，要求在四张不同的浪漫照片中，对两位主体进行高保真度的身份保留，并使用特定的服装、灯光和电影般的色彩分级。

![2x2 网格电影感夜景情侣肖像，带身份锁定](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1771396582307_es4r2m_HBYTRI_bwAAXwFn.jpg)

```
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "task_type": "cinematic_night_couple_2x2_grid_identity_lock",
      "language": "en",
      "priority": "highest",
      "version": "v1.0_DUSK_COUPLE_LIFT_ROMANCE_2X2_IDLOCK"
    },
    "input": {
      "mode": "image_to_image",
      "reference_image_usage": "very_high",
      "preserve_identity": true,
      "preserve_facial_features": true,
      "preserve_skin_tone": true,
      "preserve_pose": false,
      "preserve_hand_structure": true,
      "notes": "IMPORTANT: There are TWO people. Use TWO separate reference images: one for the woman and one for the man. The output MUST preserve both identities and facial proportions as close as possible to the references. Create a single 2x2 grid collage (four different shots) with the same couple, same wardrobe styling, same nighttime mood. No text, no logos, no watermark."
    },
    "output": {
      "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
      "resolution": "ultra_high",
      "num_images": 1,
      "layout": {
        "type": "grid",
        "rows": 2,
        "cols": 2,
        "gutter": "thin"
      },
      "sharpness": "filmic_crisp",
      "grain": "subtle_analog"
    },
    "scene": {
      "environment": "outdoor night / dusk setting with deep blue sky and a faint warm horizon line, minimal city lights far away",
      "mood": "romantic cinematic night portrait, intimate but natural, film still feel"
    },
    "wardrobe": {
      "man": "white sleeveless tank top, athletic casual",

### 260. 性感红色网纱连衣裙镜面自拍

> 一个高度详细的提示，用于生成一张超逼真的 iPhone 风格自拍照，画面中一位年轻女性身处风景优美的高山湖畔，强调真实的皮肤纹理、自然日光，以及包含山脉、水面倒影和前景芦苇的复杂背景。

![超逼真的高地湖泊自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1771050456223_et7n7w_HBBpqtJacAENRPp.jpg)

```
Ultra-detailed photorealistic selfie of a beautiful young woman with delicate feminine features, long straight light brown hair flowing smoothly over her shoulders, and clear blue eyes softly reflecting natural daylight. She has subtle, natural makeup — light foundation with visible realistic skin texture, soft peach blush, lightly glossed lips, gently defined brows, and a natural glow. A soft, relaxed smile enhances her warm and approachable expression.

She is holding the camera at arm’s length in true iPhone-style selfie perspective, creating a slightly close, intimate framing with mild wide-angle lens distortion typical of a smartphone front camera. Her posture is casual yet elegant, shoulders relaxed, head slightly tilted toward the light. One arm is extended toward the camera while the other rests naturally near her waist.

She wears an elegant sleeveless white V-neck jumpsuit/dress featuring a deep plunge neckline and refined button details running vertically down the front. The fabric appears lightweight yet structured, softly contouring her silhouette. A matching belt cinches at the waist, emphasizing her figure. The material catches the sunlight with gentle highlights and subtle shadows, revealing realistic folds and texture.

Accessories include statement crystal drop earrings that sparkle in the sunlight, a delicate gold necklace with a small pendant resting just above her neckline, multiple thin bracelets layered on her wrist, and a fine chain bracelet adding a subtle shimmer. The jewelry reflects natural light with crisp, high-detail clarity.

The setting is a scenic highland lake during a warm sunny day. A wooden railing appears along the side of the frame, adding depth and context to the composition. In the foreground, lush green reeds and marsh grasses frame the bottom edge of the image. Behind her, calm reflective lake water mirrors the sky, while distant reddish-brown mountains and rolling hills stretch across the horizon. The sky is partly cloudy with soft white clouds drifting across a vibrant blue background.

Natural outdoor portrait photography style with cinematic lighting, balanced exposure, vibrant yet realistic colors, sharp focus on the subject’s face, softly blurred background (subtle depth of field), high dynamic range, ultra-high resolution 8k detail, crisp skin texture, realistic hair strands, natural shadows, and warm sunny atmosphere. Professional mobile photography aesthetic, hyper-realistic, immersive, detailed environmental storytelling.
```

> 一个详细的提示，用于生成一张超逼真的镜面自拍，画面中有三位年轻女性（米莉·芭比·布朗、娜塔莉亚·戴尔和艾玛·沃特森的肖像），她们身处现代健身房，强调“运动后光泽”的美学效果，皮肤因汗水而闪亮，并采用高亮度荧光照明。

![超逼真健身房镜子自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1771050454945_iiuu5g_HBBhvumbsAUPQm9.jpg)
![超逼真健身房镜子自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1771050454934_ujz8d2_HBBhvj_bcAAP2q-.jpg)

```
Subject & Composition:

A high-quality mirror selfie of three fit young women standing close together in a modern gym. The woman on the left is holding a sleek black smartphone to take the photo. They are posed playfully, huddled together with a post-workout glow. The woman on the left has her hair in a messy ponytail with bangs; the middle woman has soft fringe bangs and a ponytail; the woman on the right has a sleek, pulled-back ponytail.

Clothing & Style:

Left: A light pastel blue spandex athletic set consisting of a racerback sports bra and matching biker shorts.

Middle: A soft dusty pink athletic set with thin straps and matching biker shorts.
 
Right: A neutral tan or beige high-waisted leggings set with a matching sports bra.
 
Details: Small minimalist athletic logos are visible on the chest of each sports bra.
Atmosphere & Lighting:
The scene is set in a brightly lit professional gym with white walls and bright overhead rectangular fluorescent lights. The background features wall-to-wall mirrors, rows of black dumbbells on racks, and workout benches. The floor is a dark, textured gym mat.

Skin & Texture:
Ultra-realistic skin textures featuring a heavy "sweat-glistening" effect and "glass skin" aesthetic. Their complexions are dewy and flushed from exercise. The image has a sharp focus, high-definition quality, and the naturalistic look of a high-end smartphone camera.

Key Elements for AI Generation
 
Vibe: "Athletic realism," "Post-workout glow," "Gym aesthetic."
 
Technical: "8k resolution," "Photorealistic," "Depth of field," "Shot on iPhone 15 Pro."
 
Lighting: "High-key lighting," "Fluorescent gym lights," "Reflective surfaces."
```

> 一个写实风格的提示词，详细描述了一位年轻女性的全身镜面自拍，包括具体的发型、服装（露脐连帽衫、宽松粉色运动裤、泡沫洞洞鞋）、姿势（眨眼、拿着猫耳手机壳），以及一个细节丰富的 Y2K 风格卧室背景。

```
{
  "prompt_structure": {
    "subject": {
      "description": "Young woman with long dark hair and distinctive blonde face-framing highlights (money piece style) and bangs.",
      "pose": "Standing full-body mirror selfie, holding a phone with a black cat-ear shaped case, one hand touching cheek, playful expression winking one eye."
    },
    "outfit": {
      "top": "Grey long-sleeved cropped zip-up hoodie showing midriff.",
      "bottom": "Oversized baggy pink sweatpants with dark pink vertical side stripes and drawstrings.",
      "footwear": "White foam clogs (Crocs)."
    },
    "environment": {
      "setting": "Indoor bedroom or dressing area.",
      "flooring": "Dark hardwood floors.",
      "background_elements": [
        "White vanity desk with Hollywood-style mirror lights",
        "Wall art including a painting of cherries",
        "Pink aesthetic posters/mood board",
        "Open doorway",
        "White shelving unit with books"
      ]
    },
    "lighting_and_style": {
      "lighting": "Soft indoor ambient lighting.",
      "aesthetic": "Casual, soft girl, Y2K influenced, cute, photorealistic, high quality."
      "aspect_ratio":"5:6",
    }
  },
  "full_prompt_text": "A photorealistic full-body mirror selfie of a young woman with long dark hair and blonde face-framing highlights. She is wearing a grey cropped zip-up hoodie and oversized baggy pink sweatpants with side stripes, paired with white foam clogs. She is holding a phone with a black cat-ear case, winking and touching her cheek playfully. The background is a bedroom with dark wood floors, featuring a white vanity with mirror lights, a painting of cherries on the wall, and cute pink aesthetic decor."
}
```

> 一个高度详细、结构化的提示，用于生成一张“元镜头”图像：一张 iPhone 拍摄 MacBook Pro 屏幕上显示 Photo Booth 自拍的照片。该提示侧重于超逼真的女性主体渲染，具有逼真的身体曲线和瑕疵（妊娠纹、皮肤褶皱），身着休闲家居服，强调原始、未经编辑、真实的日常生活摄影。

> 一个复杂、结构化的提示，旨在生成一张超现实的社交媒体风格旅行自拍。它详细描述了拍摄对象（一位有蝴蝶纹身、湿发和雀斑的年轻女性）、环境（热带水疗中心内铺有红色花瓣的水磨石浴缸）、光线（柔和、漫射的日光）和相机规格（高角度、广角、3:4 宽高比），以实现高保真纹理渲染。

> 一个高度受限的提示，用于生成一张白金发色双胞胎在昏暗健身房里的垂直镜面自拍，特别强调她们“纤细而丰腴”的健美身材，拥有极其纤细的腰肢和硕大的臀部，并由紧身无缝打底裤凸显。

![超曲线健身房自拍双胞胎](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770964549999_u3ob7n_HA7qQPDbsAAApMR.jpg)

```
{
  “subject”: {
    “description”: “A vertical mirror selfie photograph taken in a dimly lit gym, featuring two female twins with long platinum blonde hair posing closely together.”,
    “body”: {
      “physique”: “Both women possess extremely exaggerated, hyper-curvaceous ‘slim-thick’ fitness physiques. They have very small, defined waists that transition sharply into massively accentuated, round, and prominent glutes and shapely thighs. This dramatic hourglass shape is the central focus of the image, highlighted by the tight clothing and pose.”,
      “pose”: “The woman on the right holds a silver smartphone (with stickers) in her right hand to take the mirror selfie, angling her body slightly and looking at the phone. The woman on the left stands in a sharp side-profile next to her, aggressively arching her lower back to maximize the projection of her glutes towards the mirror, looking back over her left shoulder.”,
“features”: “Both twins have long, platinum blonde, straight hair falling over their shoulders/backs. Their facial features are similar.”
    }
  },
  “wardrobe”: {
    “outfit”: “The woman on the left wears a black sports bra and tight, dark grey seamless ‘scrunch-butt’ gym leggings. The woman on the right wears a black sports bra with cleavage strap details and tight, solid black seamless ‘scrunch-butt’ gym leggings.”
  },
  “pose_action”: “Taking a double mirror selfie in a gym, specifically posing to highlight their glutes.”,
  “scene”: {
    “environment”: “A modern commercial gym environment, likely at night.”,
    “elements”: “The background is filled with various gym equipment with grey metal frames, large mirrors reflecting other areas of the gym, and distinct warm yellow LED strip lighting on the ceiling. Other blurred gym patrons are visible in the background reflections.”,
“composition”: “Vertical 9:16 aspect ratio full-body mirror selfie.”
  },
  “lighting”: {
    “setup”: “Mix of functional artificial gym lighting and warm ceiling accent strips.”,
    “details”: “The lighting creates highlights on the tight fabric of the seamless leggings, emphasizing the contours of their bodies.”
  },
  “camera”: {
    “technical”: “High-resolution smartphone mirror selfie photograph. Sharp focus on the two women’s reflection. Realistic textures of spandex and gym equipment.”,
    “aspect_ratio”: “9:16”,
    “constraints”: [
      “CRITICAL: The subjects MUST have the exact exaggerated, hyper-curvy gym physique with tiny waists and massive glutes as explicitly described.”,
      “CRITICAL: The specific poses (one holding phone, one arching side-profile) and outfits (grey vs. black leggings) must be replicated exactly.”,
      “The final image must be a photorealistic vertical 9:16 photograph.”
    ]
  }
}
```

### 291. 都市时尚拼贴画，保留西德尼·斯威尼的身份特质

**作者**: [sammy](https://x.com/sumiturkude007/status/2021475354515501103)  **日期**: 2026-02-11  **语言**: en

> 一个高度具体的提示，用于生成一张垂直分割的都市时尚拼贴画，其中包含三张 Sydney Sweeney 的街拍风格照片。该提示严格要求从参考图像中 100% 保留面部特征，并详细说明了构图、光线（自然光、编辑调色）以及音乐播放器界面等叠加元素。

![都市时尚拼贴画，保留西德尼·斯威尼的身份特质](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770878344094_iikisk_HA25HBpaAAQ4nWU.jpg)

```
Create a high-resolution (64K, DSLR style) fashion collage using the submitted image as the sole identity reference, preserving 100% of the facial identity exactly as it is—same facial structure, proportions, skin tone, age, expression, eyes, nose, mouth, jawline, and overall identity, without any embellishment, stylization, regeneration, reinterpretation, or modification of the face.
The final image is a vertically divided urban fashion collage with three candid street-style photos on a contemporary European city street, featuring cobblestone sidewalks, historic architecture, neutral facades, and a modern, artistic, and vibrant atmosphere.
The subject appears confident, playful, and slightly rebellious, wearing modern bold female fashion consisting of a statement crop top or corset top, a sleek high-waisted mini skirt or tailored bold trousers, a striking oversized blazer or leather jacket, fashionable heeled boots or bold sneakers, stylish accessories, a small shoulder bag, and visible white wireless headphones in some frames.
The left panel shows a reflection in a mirror through glass, with the model holding a smartphone, superimposed on subtle urban reflections.
The upper right panel is a photo taken from above, looking down, as she leans toward the camera with a playful pout and natural perspective distortion.
The lower right panel is a close-up selfie where she looks directly at the camera while holding an iced coffee in a clear plastic cup, with her headphones visible, illuminated by soft natural light.
Overlay a minimalist, semi-transparent music player interface floating in the center of the collage, displaying a Linkin Park track with title, progress bar, and play/pause controls, harmoniously integrated into a lifestyle aesthetic depicting a day in the life, focusing on music.
Use only natural light, soft shadows, realistic highlights, a discreet earthy palette (shades of brown, gray, and warm yellow), subtle grain, and a slightly desaturated editorial color gradation, resulting in a modern and realistic editorial style typical of Instagram.
```

### 292. 三个雀斑女孩的卧室自拍

**作者**: [Aylin](https://x.com/Ai_aylinfc/status/2021461821111271896)  **日期**: 2026-02-11  **语言**: en

> 生成一张超逼真、自然的智能手机自拍的详细提示，画面中三位雀斑欧洲女孩身处舒适的卧室，强调真实的皮肤纹理、清晰可见的雀斑、低角度视角和温暖的室内光线。

![三个雀斑女孩的卧室自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770878355986_1n0gfz_HA2szmKbAAA3HT8.jpg)

```
three freckled European girls in an intimate close-up selfie, low-angle perspective with their faces very close together, heads gently touching as they lean toward the smartphone camera, creating a natural slight wide-angle lens distortion that softly exaggerates their features in a playful, candid way. All three have long flowing hair in different shades—golden blonde, light chestnut brown, and soft dark blonde—falling naturally around their shoulders with a few loose strands catching the warm indoor light. Their skin shows realistic texture with visible freckles scattered across their cheeks and noses, subtle pores, soft blush tones, and a healthy natural glow without heavy makeup.

They wear simple casual tank tops in soft neutral tones like white, beige, and pastel pink, paired with delicate minimal jewelry—thin gold chains, tiny pendant necklaces, small hoop earrings, and subtle rings that reflect the ambient light. Their expressions are relaxed and genuine, cute natural smiles with slightly squinted eyes, conveying a friendly, spontaneous bedroom selfie moment.

The background shows a cozy bedroom setting slightly out of focus—soft bedding, light-colored walls, maybe a blurred mirror or fairy lights—enhanced by warm indoor lighting that creates gentle shadows and depth. The image feels like it was shot on a modern smartphone, ultra-detailed yet natural, realistic skin texture with freckles and pores clearly visible, candid friendly mood, soft shadows, warm color grading, high-resolution, authentic lifestyle photography style.
```

      "face": "Close-up selfie perspective; natural face with a slight pout and piercing green eyes. Forehead and upper lip are covered in realistic, fine sweat droplets from the intense heat.",
      "skin_texture": "Hyper-realistic skin detail with visible pores, micro-textures, and a glistening sun-kissed sheen. ABSOLUTELY NO TATTOOS (asla dövme yok).",

      "camera": "Direct front-facing smartphone selfie (not a mirror selfie); 24mm wide-angle lens aesthetic.",
      "composition": "Close-up portrait framing, arm extended for a natural handheld selfie look. Depth of field isolates Luna from the beach background.",
      "visual_style": "Ultra-photorealistic, 8k resolution, RAW photo quality. Natural skin flushing (redness) from the heat.",
      "negative_prompt": "mirror, reflection, holding phone, tattoos, ink, body art, blonde hair, brown hair, black hair, thick legs, muscular build, heavy build, airbrushed, plastic skin, 3d render, cartoon."

}

    }
  },
  "combined_prompt_string": "RAW photo, 8k resolution, uncompressed. A photorealistic portrait of a woman leaning on the hood of a red car in a desert landscape. She has long brown hair and is wearing a cropped beige sheriff's deputy shirt with a 'Los Angeles County Sheriff' arm patch and a gold star badge. She wears black hot pants, a wide black belt, thigh garters, and mirrored aviator sunglasses reflecting the sky. The background shows a paved desert road and rocky mountains under bright daylight. ### 309. 复古魅力钢琴系列提示

**作者**: [KeorUnreal](https://x.com/KeorUnreal/status/2020443836539895854)  **日期**: 2026-02-08  **语言**: en

> 这是一个为 Nano Banana Pro 模型设计的结构化 JSON 提示，用于生成一系列四格图像。图像内容为一位年轻女性，身处复古、迷人的场景中，并带有一架复古钢琴。该提示详细说明了每一帧的特定服装、环境、灯光和独特姿势，强调高对比度、超现实的复古美学。

![复古魅力钢琴系列提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770619725504_qzlnds_HAncN4Db0AA3dYI.jpg)
![复古魅力钢琴系列提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770619725526_48hk0w_HAoO8-ZWsAAdLCj.jpg)

```
{
  "project_title": "Vintage Glamour Piano Series",
  "common_elements": {
    "subject": "Young woman with dark hair, straight bangs, and red lipstick.",
    "outfit": "Sheer, dusty red halter-neck bodysuit covered in large iridescent crystals and sequins, with a fringed skirt layer.",
    "environment": "Ornate vintage hotel room with pink damask wallpaper, heavy maroon curtains, patterned beige carpet, and a retro green upright piano.",
    "lighting_and_style": "Direct flash photography, high contrast, vintage aesthetic, fisheye or wide-angle lens distortion, saturated colors, 4k resolution, hyper-realistic textures."
  },
  "frames": [
    {
      "frame_id": 1,
      "position": "Top Left",
      "visual_prompt": "Low-angle fisheye shot. The subject is perched on top of a green upright piano, leaning back with knees bent. One leg is extended dramatically toward the camera lens, making the foot appear larger than life. She wears red fishnet socks and red strappy heels with crystal details. The focus is sharp on the texture of the fishnet and shoe in the foreground, blurring slightly toward her face.",
      "pose_details": "Sitting on piano, leg extended, looking away casually."
    },
    {
      "frame_id": 2,
      "position": "Top Right",
      "visual_prompt": "High-angle wide shot looking down at the subject seated at the green piano. She is looking up at the camera with a soft expression. Her right hand rests on the piano keys, fingers spread, showcasing a large ring. The wide-angle lens elongates her arm and hand. The background shows an unmade bed with gold satin sheets and a vintage lamp.",
      "pose_details": "Seated at keys, hand on piano, head tilted up."
    },
    {
      "frame_id": 3,
      "position": "Bottom Left",
      "visual_prompt": "Dynamic medium shot. The subject stands with her back to the camera, turning her head to look over her left shoulder. Her left arm is raised toward the camera, creating a motion-blurred foreground element. The side profile of the bodysuit reveals a backless design and hanging crystal fringe. The lighting highlights the sparkle of the gems and the curve of her shoulder.",
      "pose_details": "Standing/turning away, looking back, arm in motion."
    },
    {
      "frame_id": 4,
      "position": "Bottom Right",
      "visual_prompt": "Close-up extreme wide-angle shot, similar to a 0.5x selfie. The subject leans forward into the lens, distorting the perspective so her head appears larger. She looks directly at the viewer with a piercing gaze. The intricate detailing of the crystal bodice is highly visible. The green piano keys are visible in the lower right corner.",
      "pose_details": "Leaning forward, direct eye contact, close-up."
    }
  ]
}
```

> 一个高度结构化的提示，旨在生成一个四格生活方式拼贴画，模仿自然的 iPhone 摄影和“洁净女孩健身”美学。它严格指定了面部身份锁定，详细描述了主体（亚洲女性，运动服），并定义了每个网格面板的内容（水瓶、自拍、镜子自拍、智能手表统计数据）。

```
{
  "task": "four_grid_lifestyle_collage",
  "reference_face": {
    "identity_lock": true,
    "face_match_accuracy": "100_percent_identical",
    "notes": "No facial changes allowed. Preserve exact facial structure, proportions, eye shape, nose, lips, brows, skin texture."
  },
  "output": {
    "type": "single_image",
    "layout": "2x2_grid",
    "resolution": "ultra_high_resolution",
    "realism": "natural_iphone_photography",
    "quality": "social_media_lifestyle_collage",
    "retouching": "minimal_skin_smoothing_only"
  },
  "subject": {
    "gender": "female",
    "age_range": "early_to_mid_20s",
    "ethnicity": "asian",
    "skin": {
      "tone": "fair",
      "texture": "natural_with_soft_glow",
      "makeup": "light_natural_makeup_with_soft_pink_blush"
    },
    "hair": {
      "color": "dark_brown",
      "style": "as in picture"
    },
    "expression": "calm_focused_fresh_morning_vibe"
  },
  "wardrobe": {
    "outfit": "fitted_black_full_sleeve_activewear_top_and_black_joggers",
    "style": "clean_minimal_fitness_look",
    "coverage": "fully_modest_no_exposed_midriff",
    "accessories": [
      "smartwatch_on_wrist",
      "neutral_phone_case"
    ]
  },
  "grid_breakdown": {
    "top_left": {
      "scene": "hand_holding_matte_blue_water_bottle",
      "shot_type": "close_up_object_shot",
      "focus": "hydration_and_fitness_routine"
    },
    "top_right": {
      "scene": "selfie_half_body",
      "camera_angle": "slightly_high_angle",
      "pose": "relaxed_morning_selfie",
      "expression": "soft_smile"
    },
    "bottom_left": {
      "scene": "mirror_selfie_full_upper_body",
      "camera": "iphone_front_camera",
      "pose": "standing_straight",
      "composition": "no_extreme_angles"
    },
    "bottom_right": {
      "scene": "smartwatch_fitness_stats_close_up",
      "details": "workout_time_calories_heart_rate_visible",
      "style": "authentic_post_workout_capture"
    }
  },
  "environment": {
    "setting": "indoor_home_gym_or_bedroom",
    "lighting": "soft_morning_natural_light",
    "color_palette": "neutral_black_beige_soft_blue",
    "mood": "productive_calm_morning_energy"
  },
  "style_notes": {
    "aesthetic": "clean_girl_fitness_lifestyle",
    "vibe": "morning_routine_realism",
    "camera_effects": "slight_film_softness_no_heavy_filters",
    "background": "simple_uncluttered"
  },
  "restrictions": {
    "no_face_alteration": true,
    "no_body_distortion": true,
    "no_sexualized_pose": true,
    "no_text_overlay": true,
    "no_logos_or_watermarks": true
  }
}
```

**作者**: [Jessia](https://x.com/itsjessiababy/status/2020417475653870063)  **日期**: 2026-02-08  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的提示，用于生成一张逼真的镜面自拍图像，画面中一位女性以跪姿（脊柱前凸）身穿露脐上衣和金属质感短裙，置身于一间居家风格的房间内。该提示特别强调智能手机摄影的真实感、黄金时段的光线，以及 iPhone 和奥利奥形状靠垫等详细道具。

![居家环境中的“诱惑”镜面自拍美学](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770619706540_nhckt3_HAn25iiXsAAVLu-.jpg)

```
{
"subject": "Young woman with light skin tone and very long, dark brown wavy hair cascading over her right shoulder. She is wearing a white long-sleeved button-up shirt, unbuttoned at the bottom and cropped to reveal her midriff and a black bra underneath. She wears a tight, metallic grey mini skirt that sits low on the waist, and sheer black thigh-high stockings with intricate floral lace tops. On her feet are black high-heeled shoes. Her physique is curvy with a slim waist and fuller hips.",
"pose": "The subject is in a kneeling position on all fours on a white fluffy rug, angled slightly to the left. Her back is arched (lordosis), emphasizing the curve of her hips. Her weight is supported by her right hand placed flat on the rug and her knees. Her left hand holds a {argument name="phone color" default="pink"} iPhone up to a mirror to take a selfie. Her head is tilted slightly to the right, and her mouth is open in a playful expression. She is looking at the phone screen/mirror reflection.",
"environment": "A bright domestic interior room with white walls and light grey wood-laminate flooring. A large white faux-fur rug covers the floor area where the subject is kneeling. To the right, there is a tall indoor potted plant (fiddle leaf fig style) and a stack of three distinct round floor cushions resembling giant Oreo cookies (black with white filling). In the background, a blue LED light strip is visible along the baseboard.",
"camera": "Mirror selfie perspective. The image captures the reflection of the subject in a large vertical mirror. The framing is a full-body shot, capturing the subject from the floor up to the top of the mirror frame. The phone (a pink iPhone with a multi-lens camera array) is visible in the subject's hand, obscuring part of her face.",
"lighting": "Warm, natural golden-hour sunlight entering from the left side. The light creates distinct, hard shadows of the plant leaves on the white wall behind the subject. The lighting highlights the texture of the white shirt and the metallic sheen of the grey skirt. There is a mix of warm sunlight and cooler ambient light from the room shadows.",
"mood_and_expression": "Playful, confident, and casual. The expression is candid with a 'duck face' or open-mouthed surprise look common in social media selfies. The mood is relaxed, leaning towards an influencer or 'thirst trap' aesthetic.",
"style_and_realism": "Realistic smartphone photography. High fidelity to real-life textures (skin, hair, fabric). Not a studio shot; exhibits natural grain and dynamic range typical of a high-end smartphone camera.",
"colors_and_tone": "The palette is dominated by neutrals: white (shirt, wall, rug), grey (skirt, floor), and black (stockings, cushions). There is a vibrant accent of hot pink from the phone case and a subtle blue line from the LED strip. The skin tones are warm and natural, enhanced by the golden sunlight.",
"quality_and_technical_details": "Sharp focus on the subject, slightly "
}
```

```
{
  "image_analysis": {
    "subject_details": {
      "demographics": "Young woman, light skin tone",
      "hair": "Long, dark brunette, wavy texture, voluminous, highlighted by strong sunlight",
      "face": "Soft makeup, rosy blush, winged eyeliner, neutral to slight smile expression, looking into the mirror (phone screen)"
    },

      "bottoms": "Light wash blue denim shorts with frayed hems",
      "footwear": "Knee-high brown suede boots with fringe details (moccasin/boho style), prominence in the foreground"
    },
    "accessories_details": {

      "jewelry": "Small silver hoop earrings",

    },
    "scene_details": {
      "setting": "Cozy bedroom interior",
      "background_elements": [
        "Unmade bed with cream-colored bedding",
        "Chunky knit beige throw blanket",
        "White plush stuffed animal (bear) in the upper right corner",
        "Minimalist wall art featuring a black arrow and reversed text '1831 MI'"
      ],
      "flooring": "Light beige textured carpet"
    },
    "lighting_and_atmosphere": {
      "type": "Natural sunlight, Golden Hour",
      "quality": "High contrast, warm directional light streaming from the left, creating bright highlights on hair and legs and deep shadows",
      "vibe": "Aesthetic, cozy, casual, Pinterest-style, warm, intimate"
    }
  },
  "technical_specifications": {
    "quality": "4k HD, 8k resolution, highly detailed",
    "style": "Photorealistic, Mirror Selfie, Lifestyle photography",
    "visual_fidelity": "Sharp focus on subject, detailed textures (suede, hair strands, fabric weave), accurate lighting physics"
  },
  "master_prompt": "A hyper-realistic 4k HD mirror selfie of a young woman sitting on a beige carpeted bedroom floor during golden hour. She has long, voluminous wavy dark brown hair illuminated by intense, warm sunlight coming from the left. She is wearing a vintage strapless floral tapestry corset top, light blue denim cut-off shorts, and distinctive knee-high brown suede boots with fringe detailing. One leg is extended towards the camera, emphasizing the texture of the suede boots. She holds a smartphone with a cow-print case, taking the photo in a large mirror. The background is a cozy, slightly messy bed with a chunky knit cream blanket, a white stuffed bear prop, and minimalist wall art with an arrow. The lighting is dramatic and warm, creating a soft, aesthetic sun-kissed glow."
}

### 315. Sadie Sink E-Girl 镜面自拍提示词

**作者**: [Sadia](https://x.com/SadiaMalik182/status/2020372115971621333)  **日期**: 2026-02-08  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成 Sadie Sink 采用 E-girl 风格的镜面自拍图像。该提示详细说明了拍摄对象的头发（太空发髻，姜黄色）、妆容（浓重的粉色腮红，上扬眼线）、服装（粉色抹胸迷你连衣裙，Jordan 1 款式运动鞋）和环境（住宅走廊），以实现时尚的社交媒体网红风格。

### 320. AI 影响者镜面自拍姿势提示

**作者**: [Alejo](https://x.com/ecommartinez/status/2020203847923442045)  **日期**: 2026-02-07  **语言**: en

> 这是一个详细的多部分提示，专为 Gemini 3（或类似的图像生成模型）设计，旨在创建一张高度逼真、带有“粗粝感”的 AI 生成女性网红的镜面自拍。该提示着重于特定的身体姿势、手势（突出的胜利手势）、光线、纹理（脏镜子、颗粒感）和时尚细节，以营造一种亲密、深夜卧室的氛围。

![AI 影响者镜面自拍姿势提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770532864795_yohhx3_HAk0sTlacAE_kug.jpg)
![AI 影响者镜面自拍姿势提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770532864797_3ukmqg_HAk0sDVbMAAKnlO.jpg)

```
Un selfie de espejo tipo "gritty" (crudo/granulado) tomado con iPhone tarde por la noche en un dormitorio femenino. La mujer es capturada a través del reflejo, sosteniendo el teléfono de manera casual a la altura del pecho, ocultando parcialmente su rostro. El espejo está ligeramente sucio, con manchas y restos de polvo que añaden textura y realismo.

Está sentada en el borde de su cama, ligeramente inclinada hacia adelante.

Su postura es relajada y natural (sin posar): una pierna doblada, la otra colgando con naturalidad, los hombros sueltos y el cuerpo ligeramente angulado debido a la perspectiva del espejo. Cabeza sutilmente inclinada hacia la derecha del espectador, el rostro domina casi todo el encuadre, los hombros redondeados hacia adelante y el cuerpo inclinándose ligeramente hacia la cámara para lograr esa clásica compresión de selfie nocturno acogedor.

La mano derecha (lado izquierdo del espectador) está levantada directamente frente al rostro, a la altura de la barbilla o la boca, con la palma mirando claramente hacia la cámara, realizando un gesto prominente de paz / signo de la V:

Los dedos índice y medio están completamente extendidos y bien separados (un ángulo de ~60–70° entre ellos).

Los dedos anular y meñique están completamente doblados, presionados con fuerza y sujetos de forma plana por el pulgar.

El pulgar ancla firmemente los dedos doblados, siendo claramente visible al presionar contra ellos.

Los dedos apuntan ligeramente hacia arriba y hacia adelante (no perfectamente verticales, con una suave inclinación natural).

Mano posicionada en el centro, muy cerca del rostro; las puntas de los dedos están aproximadamente a la altura de los labios o la nariz, creando un elemento fuerte en primer plano.

La mano izquierda no es visible, está completamente fuera de encuadre.

Postura relajada y casual del torso: hombros ligeramente encogidos hacia adelante, cuello suavemente estirado hacia la lente, la típica pose encorvada de un selfie de dormitorio con poca luz.

Ambiente: íntimo, juguetón, atmósfera nocturna de luz tenue, con un fuerte énfasis en el gesto audaz de la mano en el centro del encuadre, justo frente al rostro.

Viste un elegante {argument name="prenda superior" default="crop-top negro ajustado"} con una silueta afilada y refinada, una {argument name="prenda inferior" default="minifalda de cuero negro"} y {argument name="calzado" default="zapatillas blancas"}. Lleva un peinado de ondas salvajes. La alta moda contrasta sin esfuerzo con la atmósfera relajada de la habitación.

La iluminación proviene únicamente de la lámpara del techo del dormitorio, cruda e imperfecta: flash directo del teléfono reflejado en el espejo, luces quemadas en la piel y la tela, sombras duras, exposición desigual, grano visible, ligero desenfoque de movimiento, destellos del flash y reflejos dentro de los reflejos.
```

**Related**: [[科技产品]]、[[奇幻世界]]

**作者**: [Lex](https://x.com/lexx_aura/status/2020183749682409566)  **日期**: 2026-02-07  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的提示，用于生成一张超现实的 RAW 照片：一名女性身着风格化的“沙漠巡逻”服装（裁剪的警长衬衫、热裤、大腿袜），斜倚在沙漠景观中的红色汽车引擎盖上。该提示强调了技术规格，例如大景深 (f/22)、无限对焦和 8K 分辨率，以确保整个场景的细节都晶莹剔透。

![RAW 照片：沙漠巡逻女郎](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770532762370_angpmt_HAkiYgOW4AEYNoQ.jpg)
![RAW 照片：沙漠巡逻女郎](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770532762424_ux2elw_HAkiYezX0AALatJ.jpg)
![RAW 照片：沙漠巡逻女郎](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770532762443_m1vblf_HAkiYfnWkAASicz.jpg)

```
{
  "image_generation_prompt": {
    "subject_details": {
      "description": "Young woman with long, straight, light brown hair and a fit, tanned physique.",
      "facial_features": "Chin tilted upwards, confident expression, wearing large silver-rimmed aviator sunglasses with a blue sky reflection.",
      "pose": "Leaning forward against the hood of a car, hands resting on the red surface, back arched, hips pushed back, standing in a three-quarter profile view."
    },
    "apparel_and_accessories": {
      "upper_body": "A beige, long-sleeve uniform shirt cropped short to reveal the midriff. The shirt features a yellow six-pointed 'SHERIFF' star badge on the left breast and a circular brown and yellow 'LOS ANGELES COUNTY SHERIFF' patch on the left upper arm.",
      "lower_body": "Very short, tight black hot pants.",
      "accessories": "A wide black leather belt with a large silver buckle, black strappy thigh garters on the legs, and aviator sunglasses."
    },
    "environment_and_props": {
      "foreground": "The glossy {argument name="car color" default="red"} hood of a vehicle.",
      "background": "A dry desert landscape with sandy terrain, sparse green scrub brush, a paved asphalt road, and rocky mountains in the distance.",
      "lighting": "Bright natural daylight, hard sun, clear sky, high contrast."
    },
    "technical_specifications": {
      "quality": "RAW photo, 8k resolution, uncompressed, sharp texture, hyper-realistic.",
      "style": "Deep depth of field, f/22 aperture, infinite focus, crystal clear background, no bokeh, no blur, wide angle lens.",
      "texture_details": "High-quality fabric textures on the uniform, glossy reflection on the car paint, detailed skin pores, sharp grit on asphalt."
    }
  },
  "combined_prompt_string": "RAW photo, 8k resolution, uncompressed. A photorealistic portrait of a woman leaning on the hood of a {argument name="car color" default="red"} car in a desert landscape. She has long brown hair and is wearing a cropped beige sheriff's deputy shirt with a 'Los Angeles County Sheriff' arm patch and a gold star badge. She wears black hot pants, a wide black belt, thigh garters, and mirrored aviator sunglasses reflecting the sky. The background shows a paved desert road and rocky mountains under bright daylight. Deep depth of field, f/22 aperture, everything in focus, sharp background, no bokeh, crystal clear details, master shot."
}
```

### 323. Sadie Sink 健身房镜子自拍超写实主义

**作者**: [Iris](https://x.com/xIrissy/status/2020157571706024274)  **日期**: 2026-02-07  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张萨迪·辛克 (Sadie Sink) 在商业健身房锻炼后对着镜子自拍的超逼真图像。该提示详细描述了她汗流浃背的样子、服装（阿迪达斯灰色运动服）、健身房环境（镜子、器械），以及模拟 iPhone 摄像头拍摄效果的技术细节，包括明亮、漫射的荧光灯照明。

![Sadie Sink 健身房镜子自拍超写实主义](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770532759296_05kewy_HAkKl1zacAEQ1LG.jpg)
![Sadie Sink 健身房镜子自拍超写实主义](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770532759151_broz4p_HAkKl12aoAAz9NS.jpg)
![Sadie Sink 健身房镜子自拍超写实主义](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770532759382_82t1sw_HAkKl1wa8AA3xma.jpg)

```
{
  "image_generation_prompt": {
    "subject_details": {
      "appearance": "Young woman with a strong likeness to {argument name="subject name" default="Sadie Sink"}, fit and athletic physique, medium-length dark brunette hair worn loose and messy with a sweaty 'post-workout' texture.",
      "face": "Natural face with flushed rosy cheeks indicating exertion, neutral to slightly pouting expression, looking directly at the phone screen in the mirror, minimal to no makeup, glossy lips.",
      "skin_texture": "High-fidelity skin details, visible sweat sheen on collarbones and forehead, realistic skin pores and slight flushing."
    },
    "outfit_and_styling": {
      "clothing_set": "Matching grey athletic two-piece set by Adidas.",
      "top": "Grey sleeveless high-neck crop top with the white Adidas logo centered on the chest and signature three white stripes running down the sides.",
      "bottom": "Grey high-waisted biker shorts with matching three white stripes on the sides and a small white logo on the left thigh.",
      "accessories": "Holding a light pink iPhone Pro with a triple-lens camera system."
    },
    "environment_context": {
      "setting": "Commercial gym interior.",
      "background_elements": [
        "Large wall-to-wall mirrors reflecting the gym equipment.",
        "Dumbbell rack on the left loaded with various weights.",
        "Weight plate tree with yellow, blue, and red bumper plates.",
        "Cable machine frame in the background.",
        "Beige/neutral colored gym walls and standard drop-ceiling tiles.",
        "Beige speckled rubber gym flooring."
      ]
    },
    "pose_and_framing": {
      "type": "Mirror selfie shot.",
      "stance": "Standing upright, facing the mirror directly, body slightly angled to the right.",
      "action": "Right hand holding the phone up to capture the reflection, left arm resting naturally at the side.",
      "composition": "Medium shot capturing the subject from the thighs up."
    },
    "lighting_and_atmosphere": {
      "type": "Indoor artificial overhead lighting.",
      "quality": "Bright, diffuse fluorescent lighting typical of gyms, creating soft downward shadows and highlights on the sweaty skin and forehead.",
      "mood": "Candid, authentic, fitness-focused, tired but accomplished."
    },
    "technical_specifications": {
      "camera_simulation": "Shot on Apple iPhone 13/14 Pro main camera, 24mm wide lens.",
      "visual_style": "Ultra-photorealistic, 8k resolution, raw photo aesthetic.",
      "details": "Sharp focus on the subject, slight depth of field softening the gym equipment in the background, realistic fabric textures (spandex/polyester mix), accurate mirror reflection physics."
    }
  }
}
```

},
"pose": {

},

},
"camera": {

"device": "White smartphone (iPhone style) with a case featuring a black heart or text design, held in the right hand.",

"framing": "Vertical framing."
},

        "face": "Visible smiling at camera",
        "other_details": "Holding iPhone"
      }
    ],

    },
    "lighting_and_color": {
      "lighting": "Cool blue/purple LED ambient, moody highlights on skin/fabric, mirror reflections",

    },

### 329. Sadie Sink 风格：淡粉色连衣裙搭配运动鞋的镜面自拍

**作者**: [Rowan](https://x.com/rowanali09/status/2020013245403381909)  **日期**: 2026-02-07  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张全身镜面自拍照，灵感来自 Sadie Sink 的形象。该提示指定了俏皮的表情、柔和的粉色褶皱迷你连衣裙、高帮篮球运动鞋（深摩卡配色）和一条粗大的串珠项链，场景设置在室内走廊，光线柔和自然。

![Sadie Sink 风格：淡粉色连衣裙搭配运动鞋的镜面自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770532792177_f8aqm3_HAiHVzgaIAAbvcH.jpg)

      },
      "appearance": {

      },

    },
    "attire": {
      "dress": {
        "color": "{argument name="dress color" default="Pastel pink / Baby pink"}",
        "style": "Strapless tube top mini dress",
        "fit": "Bodycon, tight-fitting",
        "details": "Ruched fabric texture (gathered horizontal folds) throughout the dress"
      },
      "footwear": {

### 330. 编辑角度参考表

**作者**: [K](https://x.com/ChillaiKalan__/status/2020012469260059098)  **日期**: 2026-02-07  **语言**: en

> 一个针对 Google Nano Banana Pro 在 Gemini 上生成 3x3 图像网格（4:5 宽高比）的高度具体提示，要求在九个不同的编辑角度（例如，侧面、低角度、荷兰倾斜）展示一个单一主体。它强制要求所有面板中的面部 100% 一致性，并需要附带一张自拍照作为身份参考，重点是高端时尚摄影风格。

![编辑角度参考表](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770532819165_3kp3jk_HAiGoHJbEAABLoE.jpg)

```
High-resolution Editorial Angle Reference Sheet. Perfect 3x3 grid. Aspect ratio 4:5. Strictly use attached selfie as identity reference. Maintain 100% facial consistency across all 9 panels (same face, age, hair, skin tone, proportions). Wardrobe (fixed for all panels): Oversized red suit jacket and trousers, white dress shirt, black necktie. Clean editorial oversized fit. Background: neutral light-grey studio cyclorama. Lighting: soft professional studio lighting with subtle fill. Camera: 85mm portrait look, shallow depth of field, sharp focus on face and outfit. Composition: centered subject in every cell, consistent framing, balanced spacing. Grid labels: clean white sans-serif text at bottom center of each cell showing the angle. Row 1 (Top): 1. Front Medium — front-facing waist-up, direct gaze. 2. Close-Up — extreme close-up on face and eyes. 3. Three-Quarter — 3/4 turn of torso and face. Row 2 (Middle): 4. Profile — exact side profile. 5. Low Angle Full — full body from slightly below. 6. High Angle — camera slightly above. Row 3 (Bottom): 7. Over Shoulder — over-the-shoulder look back. 8. Dutch Tilt — slight camera tilt. 9. Mid Walk — natural mid-step candid pose. Style: editorial fashion photography, cinematic, high-end. Render quality: ultra photorealistic, sharp text, visible fabric texture, natural skin, consistent lighting. Negative prompts: identity change, distorted anatomy, extra limbs, inconsistent clothing, busy background
```

**Related**: [[时装大片]]、[[综合时尚]]、[[综合艺术]]

{

### 332. 健身房自拍网红美学肖像

**作者**: [alexander](https://x.com/alexgarcia_XX/status/2019847663387308058)  **日期**: 2026-02-06  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的提示，用于生成一张试衣间里的超逼真镜面自拍，捕捉社交媒体网红的美学风格。它详细说明了拍摄对象的夸张身材（突出的臀腰比）、着装（鲜艳的蓝色氨纶短裤）、姿势（弓背、扭转躯干）以及环境细节（有纹理的墙纸、花岗岩台面、粉色随行杯）。

{
"subject": "Young woman with long, voluminous, dark brown wavy hair featuring curtain bangs and lighter highlights. She has a medium-tan complexion and soft skin texture. She is wearing a loose-fitting blue t-shirt with black trim on the collar and tight, high-waisted vivid {argument name="shorts color" default="blue"} spandex shorts that conform closely to her body. Her physique is heavily curvaceous with an exaggerated, prominent glute-to-waist ratio, featuring a slim waist and very full, rounded hips and buttocks. Visible details include a large floral tattoo on her right outer forearm and a gold chain bracelet with green clover motifs (Alhambra style) on her right wrist. She holds a white iPhone Pro Max with a marble-patterned case in her right hand.",
"pose": "Standing mirror selfie posture. The subject is angled with her back and left side toward the mirror, twisting her torso sharply to the right to face the reflection. Her weight is shifted to accentuate the curve of her hips. There is a distinct anterior pelvic tilt (arched back) that emphasizes the projection of the glutes. Her right arm is raised to hold the phone at chest level, while her left arm hangs naturally at her side. Her head is slightly tilted, gazing softly into the mirror.",
"environment": "A small, enclosed interior space, likely a fitting room or restroom. The walls are covered in a textured beige or oatmeal-colored wallpaper. To the right, there is a dark, speckled granite countertop or bench supported by a wooden leg. On the bench sits a large pink tumbler cup with a straw and a white lid, along with a car key fob. The floor in the bottom left corner shows light-colored square tiles.",
"camera": "Mirror selfie perspective. The shot captures the subject's reflection from the thighs up. The framing is vertical (portrait). The focal length mimics a standard smartphone camera lens, capturing the subject and the immediate background with sharp focus on the subject and slight depth falloff.",
"lighting": "Soft, diffuse overhead indoor lighting typical of a dressing room. The light casts subtle shadows beneath her hair and chin, highlighting the contours of her face and the volume of her hair. The lighting is even, avoiding harsh contrast, with a neutral to slightly warm color temperature.",
"mood_and_expression": "Casual, confident, and alluring. The expression is neutral with a soft pout, conveying a 'baddie' or influencer aesthetic. The mood is relaxed and self-focused.",
"style_and_realism": "High-fidelity social media realism. The image creates the look of a high-quality smartphone photo posted to Instagram or Snapchat. It focuses on physical attractiveness and lifestyle documentation. Texture details like the fabric of the shorts, the hair strands, and skin pores are rendered realistically.",
"colors_and_tone": "The palette is dominated by neutral beige and warm skin tones, punctuated by the vivid purple of the shorts and the bright pink of the "
}
```

**作者**: [Selena 🔥](https://x.com/Queen_khan143/status/2019690537612357673)  **日期**: 2026-02-06  **语言**: en

> 一个高度具体的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张原始的、逼真的、高角度自拍照：一位酷似安娜·德·阿玛斯 (Ana de Armas) 的女性，在健身房的卧推凳上，大汗淋漓，精疲力尽，强调真实的皮肤纹理和刺眼的顶灯。

![安娜·德·阿玛斯 (Ana de Armas) 健身房香汗淋漓自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770446046686_dl3kf6_HAdh1gZacAEEiom.jpg)
![安娜·德·阿玛斯 (Ana de Armas) 健身房香汗淋漓自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770446046715_qn8ps0_HAdhn3abwAA6mHr.jpg)
![安娜·德·阿玛斯 (Ana de Armas) 健身房香汗淋漓自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770446046742_qvl89w_HAdg_eibQAAVOo1.jpg)

```
{
  "image_analysis": {
    "overall_scene": "A dynamic, high-angle close-up of a woman in a gym, pausing mid-workout while leaning over a weight bench, capturing intense physical exertion.",
    "subject": {
      "identity": "Ana de Armas (extremely close resemblance)",
      "age_appearance": "Early to mid 30s",
      "build": "Fit and toned, visible collarbones and shoulder definition",
      "skin": " deeply flushed and red from intense cardio, covered in heavy sweat sheen, realistic texture with pores and imperfections visible",
      "hair": "Dark brown, messy and wet with sweat, pulled back with loose strands sticking to neck and temples",
      "face": "Looking upward toward the camera lens while body is bent forward, mouth slightly open in exhaustion, large hazel/green eyes, no makeup",
      "expression": "Intense exhaustion mixed with determination, breathless"
    },
    "pose": "Leaning forward over a black vinyl flat weight bench, supporting upper body weight with one arm planted firmly on the bench surface, torso angled downward, face lifted to look at the camera (high selfie angle)",
    "clothing": {
      "visible": "Light yellow/lime pastel ribbed sports bra, tight fit, scoop neck"
    },
    "lighting_and_color": {
      "lighting": "Harsh overhead gym strip lighting, creating bright highlights on the sweaty forehead and shoulders, reflection visible in background mirrors",
      "color_palette": "Pale yellow clothing, flushed red skin tones, cool grey and black gym equipment"
    },
    "background": "Busy gym environment, blurred reflection in mirrors showing squat racks and dumbbells, white industrial ceiling with beams",
    "photography_style": "Candid, raw, high-angle selfie perspective, sharp focus on eyes and skin texture, shallow depth of field"
  },
  "generated_prompt": {
    "full_text_prompt": "photorealistic high-angle gym selfie of a woman resembling {argument name="celebrity name" default="Ana de Armas"} leaning forward over a black weight bench, one hand planted on the bench surface supporting weight, body bent over but face tilted up looking into camera, {argument name="clothing color" default="light yellow"} ribbed sports bra, heavy sweat dripping down face and chest, extremely flushed red skin, wet messy dark hair, gym background with mirrors and weights, harsh overhead fluorescent lighting, raw and candid style, 8k resolution, ultra-detailed skin texture, visible pores",
    "negative_prompt": "dry skin, perfect makeup, studio lighting, standing pose, blurred face, cartoon, illustration, bad anatomy, floating limbs, distorted hands",
    "recommended_parameters": {
      "style": "photorealistic, candid gym",
      "quality_tags": "raw, heavy sweat, flushed skin, sharp focus",
      "aspect_ratio": "3:4",
      "camera": "smartphone high angle, wide aperture"
    }
  }
}

### 352. 超高保真镜像自拍，带身份锁定功能

**作者**: [Dan Reed](https://x.com/daaaaanc/status/2019231651650498803)  **日期**: 2026-02-05  **语言**: en

> 一个极其技术性的提示，用于生成一张超逼真的镜面自拍，模拟 iPhone 17 Pro 拍摄效果。它使用“身份锁定”（Identity Lock）和“表情同步”（Expression Sync）功能，以 1:1 的比例精确复制外部参考图像（A 和 B）中的面部几何结构和表情。它详细描述了服装（罗纹针织迷你连衣裙）、身体形态（超清晰沙漏型身材）和背景完整性（像素级完美的居家公寓场景）。

![超高保真镜像自拍，带身份锁定功能](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770359927467_itef80_HAXAerQbMAAp45i.jpg)

```
(9:16). Portrait orientation. Raw high-fidelity photograph, iPhone 17 Pro simulation, 24mm wide-angle focal length, f/2.4 aperture for total structural depth, authentic digital grain, mirror-selfie perspective.

[Subject & Identity Locking]

Identity Lock: Absolute inheritance of all facial geometry, epidermal characteristics, ocular structure, and natural hair color/texture directly from Reference Image A. The AI must perform a 1:1 pixel-mapping of the subject's identity from Image A into the target scene.
Bio-Fidelity: Epidermal physics featuring visible micro-pores, fine vellus hair along the jawline, and satin-finish hydration on the T-zone, maintaining the exact skin-tone profile inherited from Image A.
Expression Sync: Expression Lock—replicate the mirror-selfie gaze through the lens, specific pouty lip tension, and soft tension of the facial muscles from Reference Image B.
[Outfit & Physicality] (CASE B - Standard Fashion)

Technical Description: High-tensile rib-knit mini-dress in {argument name="dress color" default="deep chocolate brown"} with a mock-neck collar and short sleeves. Hemline at upper-thigh geometry.
Textile Architecture: Visible vertical ribbing texture; material-to-skin tension showing realistic bunching at the waist. Paired with checkered-pattern comfort slides.
Anatomical Volume: Hyper-defined S-curve silhouette; maximum anatomical emphasis on the waist-to-hip ratio and leg definition; apply the 20% over-description rule for "Hyper-defined hourglass geometry" to counteract model bias.
Accessories: Transparent clear-frame optical glasses; long square-tip manicured nails; a small luxury monogram-texture leather handbag held in the left hand. Blue-cased smartphone held for the selfie.
[Pose & Interaction]

Geometry: Full-body standing mirror selfie pose. Right arm raised for the phone; left arm at the side holding the handbag. Subject is centered with a slight hip-pop to emphasize the silhouette.
Articulation: Precise finger-joint articulation on the smartphone and the bag handle; realistic skeletal alignment of the shoulders and neck.
[Environment & Lighting]

Atmosphere: Casual domestic interior apartment setting; soft diffused 4000K neutral-warm overhead lighting.
Background Integrity: Pixel-perfect inventory of wood-plank flooring; white interior doors (one featuring a {argument name="sticker detail" default="Hello Kitty sticker"}); a kitchen breakfast bar with a dark wooden bar stool; a pink handbag hanging in the mid-ground; and miscellaneous household items on the counter.
Shadow Ray-Tracing: Natural ambient occlusion in the garment folds; soft shadows cast by the subject onto the floor; realistic mirror-plane reflection with accurate depth and light-bounce from the background elements.
```

**Related**: [[综合时尚]]、[[贴纸]]、[[室内设计]]

### 353. 热带海滩上的阳光普照第一视角自拍（生活方式美学）

**作者**: [FL⭕RA](https://x.com/Flora_Janer8/status/2019098119409934817)  **日期**: 2026-02-04  **语言**: en

> 一个高分辨率的提示，用于描述一张阳光普照的 POV 自拍/中景照片，画面中一位时尚的金发女性（形似 Millie Bobby Brown）身处白色沙滩。该提示详细说明了生活方式影响者的美学，包括她的着装（红色豹纹比基尼）、配饰（超大银色飞行员墨镜、珍珠耳环），以及营造出古铜色闪亮光泽的强烈正午光线。

![热带海滩上的阳光普照第一视角自拍（生活方式美学）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770273444840_kyydu4_HAVHCf6XYAAS4u_.jpg)
![热带海滩上的阳光普照第一视角自拍（生活方式美学）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770273444899_a0cpkr_HAVHCe0X0AA8oyV.jpg)

```
"A high-resolution, sun-drenched POV selfie and a medium-shot of a stylish blonde woman sitting on a white sand beach. She is wearing a {argument name="bikini color" default="red leopard-print"} bik!ni with cherry accents and thin red straps. She has a playful, confident expression, posing with a golden bottle of tanning oil or body mist near her face.
Fashion & Accessories:

Eyewear: Oversized, square-framed silver aviator sunglasses with a slight blue/pink gradient tint.

Jewelry: Statement floral-shaped white pearl earrings.

Hair: Blonde hair styled in a casual, textured updo with a red bow accessory.

Details: Long, manicured almond-shaped nails with silver glitter/metallic tips. Small, minimalist tattoos visible on the wrist and ribcage.
Environment & Lighting:

Setting: A pristine tropical beach with bright white sand and scattered patches of dark sea kelp.

Lighting: Harsh, direct overhead midday sunlight creating sharp, high-contrast shadows. The skin has a bronzed, dewy, and shimmering glow.

Color Palette: Dominant reds, golden ambers from the product bottle, and the neutral tones of the sand.
Technical Style:
Shot on a modern smartphone, sharp focus on the subject, vibrant saturation, high contrast, lifestyle influencer aesthetic, summer vacation vibes."
```

**作者**: [Sudee🥀](https://x.com/NameIsSudee/status/2019061671327842483)  **日期**: 2026-02-04  **语言**: en

> 一个结构化的 JSON 提示词，用于生成一张年轻女性（参考 Josephine Langford）在豪华大理石浴室中拍摄的坦率、私密的镜面自拍照。提示词指定她穿着毛绒麻糬浴巾，有自然的雀斑，并使用柔和温暖的灯光来营造优雅、私密的氛围。它要求严格遵循提供的面部参考照片。

![浴室镜子自拍肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770273484783_4obx59_HAUl29_aEAA24Et.jpg)

  "image_generation_request": {

      "type": "photograph",
      "style": "candid, elegant, intimate",
      "aspect_ratio": "implicit portrait/vertical due to mirror selfie format"
    },
    "subject": {
      "demographics": "Young woman, slim and delicate build",
      "face_reference_constraint": {
        "instruction": "Strict adherence to the provided reference photo. The generated image must use this exact face, maintaining identity, facial structure, and the specific calm, thoughtful expression without any changes."
      },
      "appearance": {
        "skin": "Very fair, natural freckles visible across face and shoulders",
        "hair": "{argument name="hair color" default="Light red"} color. Styled in a loose, slightly messy updo with soft strands falling around the face, giving a natural, just-finished look."
      },
      "expression": "Calm, thoughtful, subtly introspective. Relaxed lips, gently focused eyes looking at phone screen. Face turned slightly to the side.",
      "pose": "Captured from the waist up, slightly angled body. One hand rests lightly over the towel across her chest; the other holds a smartphone.",
      "attire": {
        "garment": "Plush mochi bath towel secured across the chest.",
        "accessories": "Smartphone with a light-colored patterned case."
      }
    },
    "environment": {
      "location": "Luxurious marble bathroom, upscale hotel-like atmosphere.",
      "architectural_details": "Warm beige marble walls, large mirror, glass shower enclosure, sink counter with reflective surfaces, classic bathroom fixtures, detailed ceiling, clean lines.",
      "background_elements": "Reflections in mirrors and surfaces, bathroom fixtures."
    },
    "cinematography": {
      "shot_type": "Mirror selfie frame.",
      "framing": "Waist-up, slightly angled.",
      "lighting": "Soft warm lighting from overhead fixtures and a wall-mounted lamp. Creates a gentle glow on skin, highlighting collarbones and features without harsh shadows.",
      "color_palette": "Warm and neutral: creamy whites, soft beiges, muted gold tones.",
      "mood": "Calm, intimate, luxurious, private, natural, quietly confident."
    }
  }
}
