**作者**: [Bethany](https://x.com/JustBethanyai/status/2019036490328686953)  **日期**: 2026-02-04  **语言**: en

> 一个高度结构化的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张超逼真的 8K 原始照片，内容是一位年轻女性以高角度 POV 拍摄自拍。该提示侧重于俏皮、略带顽皮的表情（眨眼、吐舌头），具体的头发和服装细节（金金色头发、超大款米色亚麻衬衫），以及模拟广角智能手机镜头在温暖、高对比度晨光下的技术规格。

![年轻女子俏皮地眨眼，8K 自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770273479604_ttugo3_HAUO8eKWYAAD4Cv.jpg)
![年轻女子俏皮地眨眼，8K 自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770273479489_x5a677_HAUO-f-WAAEBg4u.jpg)

```
{
  "prompt_structure": {
    "subject": {
      "demographics": "Young woman, early to mid 20s, fair complexion",
      "features": {
        "hair": "Light golden blonde hair, voluminous and softly tousled, worn down with signature curtain bangs framing the face, sunlit highlights catching the light",
        "eyes": "Warm brown eyes, right eye winking, left eye open and looking directly at the camera",
        "face": "Playful, flirty expression with softly raised cheeks, smooth yet natural skin texture with a gentle rosy flush",
        "mouth": "Bright smile with teeth visible, tongue playfully sticking out to the side, classic cheeky pop-star energy"
      }
    },
    "apparel": {
      "upper_body": "Oversized, pale cream or buttery yellow button-down shirt",
      "fabric": "Textured linen or black cotton gauze, slightly wrinkled, translucent quality in bright light",
      "styling": "Casual loungewear style, buttons done up to mid-chest, loose fit"
    },
    "pose_and_action": {
      "type": "High-angle POV selfie",
      "posture": "Kneeling on a bed, leaning slightly forward toward the lens",
      "limbs": "One arm extended holding the camera (out of frame), other arm resting straight down with hand pressed into the soft mattress",
      "dynamic": "Candid, energetic, spontaneous movement"
    },
    "environment": {
      "location": "Bedroom or hotel room interior",
      "foreground": "White, plush duvet/bed sheets with realistic folds and compression from weight",
      "background": " blurred wooden nightstand, neutral beige walls, hint of a lamp and personal items, soft domestic setting"
    },
    "lighting": {
      "source": "Strong natural daylight / morning sun coming from top left",
      "quality": "High contrast sunlight creating rim lighting on hair (halo effect) and distinct soft shadows on the face and neck",
      "tone": "Warm, golden hour or bright morning ambiance"
    },
    "camera_specifications": {
      "angle": "High-angle selfie perspective",
      "lens": "Wide-angle smartphone lens simulation (approx 24mm or 28mm)",
      "aperture": "f/2.2 for slight depth of field blurring the background while keeping face sharp",
      "focus": "Sharp focus on facial expression"
    },
    "style_and_mood": {
      "vibe": "Playful, intimate, silly, carefree, 'woke up like this', goofy aesthetics",
      "aesthetic": "Naturalism, Gen Z selfie style, soft-focus background, clean core"
    },
    "tech_specs": {
      "quality": "Ultra photorealistic, 8k resolution, raw photo style",
      "details": "High fidelity skin texture, realistic fabric weave, physically correct lighting rendering, granular detail on eyelashes and hair"
    }
  }
}
```

### 360. 超逼真情侣对镜自拍提示词

**作者**: [Kaan](https://x.com/kaanakz/status/2018941378558877777)  **日期**: 2026-02-04  **语言**: en

> 这是一个为 Nano Banana Pro 设计的提示词，请求生成一张情侣使用智能手机自拍的超现实镜像照片。重点在于皮肤的真实感（可见毛孔、痘印、肤色不均、自然油光）和相机的真实感（细微的传感器颗粒、轻微的边缘柔和）。提示词指定了室内白天窗边的光线、特写构图，并明确排除了常见的 AI 伪影，如“AI 光泽”或“塑料皮肤”。此提示词需要一张参考图像来指导生成。

![超逼真情侣对镜自拍提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770273496387_kthyak_HAS4eilXwAALs5U.jpg)
![超逼真情侣对镜自拍提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770273496466_45rqg6_HAS4ehOXEAARm1a.jpg)

```
Ultra-realistic smartphone mirror selfie of a couple late 20s–early 30s, indoor near window, daytime. Close-up framing collarbone to top of head. Phone partially covering face, slight downward gaze, calm neutral expression. Natural tied-back dark hair with flyaways, light grey cotton hoodie with clear fabric texture separation, small silver earrings. Skin realism focus: visible pores, fine micro-texture, organic acne marks (non-repeating), uneven pigmentation, subtle redness, natural oil sheen only on high points. No symmetry correction. Real daylight with slight warmth, accurate white balance, natural contrast. True-to-life colors. Phone-camera realism, subtle sensor grain, slight edge softness. No retouching, no smoothing, no beauty filters. Negatives: AI glow, plastic skin, skincare-ad look, cinematic lighting, studio light, pastel or faded colors, flat lighting, cartoon/3D style, logos or text.
```

**Related**: [[科技产品]]、[[美妆护肤]]、[[综合艺术]]

> 一个结构化的 JSON 提示词，用于生成一张三位名人（Victoria Justice、Sabrina Carpenter 和 Selena Gomez）在光线明亮的健身房环境中拍摄的逼真镜面自拍。该提示词详细说明了她们的着装（运动内衣和短裤）、姿势（正在自拍、微笑）、构图（中景、可见倒影）以及明亮的光线和出汗的外观等细节。

![明星健身房镜面自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770273474768_kgthpa_HAR07jIWgAAmWp9.jpg)
![明星健身房镜面自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770273474854_fmq0bb_HAR07iyW0AAPgEr.jpg)

```
{
  "image": {
    "type": "photograph",
    "setting": "brightly lit gym with mirrors and weight machines",
    "subjects": [
      {
        "name": "{argument name="first subject name" default="Victoria Justice"}",
        "position": "left",
        "attire": {
          "top": "dark grey sports bra",
          "bottom": "dark grey workout shorts"
        },
        "pose": "holding smartphone, taking selfie, smiling"
      },
      {
        "name": "{argument name="second subject name" default="Sabrina Carpenter"}",
        "position": "center",
        "attire": {
          "top": "beige sports bra",
          "bottom": "beige workout shorts"
        },
        "pose": "smiling slightly, looking at phone"
      },
      {
        "name": "{argument name="third subject name" default="Selena Gomez"}",
        "position": "right",

{ Subject: A full-body mirror selfie of three young women standing side-by-side in a hotel room. They are recognizable as {argument name="person 1" default="Sadie Sink"} (left), {argument name="person 2" default="Natalia Dyer"} (center, holding the phone), and {argument name="person 3" default="Millie Bobby Brown"} (right).
 
Attire: All three are wearing identical FC Barcelona home football kits from the 2022-2023 season, featuring the classic blue and deep red vertical stripes with the "Spotify" sponsor logo. They are also wearing matching blue athletic shorts, striped team socks, and white sneakers.

Setting: A neutral, modern hotel room with a grey accent wall, a white bed visible in the background, and a patterned beige and black carpet.

Composition & Lighting: A vertical "mirror selfie" perspective. The lighting is soft and overhead, typical of indoor hotel lighting. The mood is casual and deadpan, with the subjects looking directly into the mirror with neutral expressions.

Technical Style: High-resolution digital photo, slight mirror reflection texture, realistic skin tones, and soft shadows.
A Quick Note on Authenticity
While these three actresses are indeed costars, this particular "trio in Barça kits" image is a popular edit that has circulated on social media. You can tell by the slight inconsistencies in the logos (which are mirrored/distorted) and the way the subjects are blended together."}}

    },

      "accessories": "Layered gold necklaces (a thin chain and a pendant). Small gold hoop earrings. A glimpse of a white manicure.",
      "makeup": "Soft glam look: dewy foundation, rosy cream blush on high cheekbones, champagne highlighter on the nose tip, and glossy lip tint."
    },
    "environment": {
      "setting": " upscale, 'lived-in' modern apartment living room.",
      "background_elements": {
        "immediate_background": "Textured cream-colored wall and the edge of a velvet rust-orange sofa. A messy black coffee table in the mid-ground cluttered with a 'Stanley' style tumbler, a bag of gourmet chips, and a scattered deck of cards.",
        "deep_background": "Blurred view of a floor-to-ceiling window with sheer white curtains letting in diffused city light. A tall indoor plant (Fiddle Leaf Fig) in the corner."
      },
      "lighting": "Golden hour sunlight streaming in from the left, hitting the side of her face and hair, creating a halo effect. Soft, cool ambient fill light from the room interior to balance the shadows."
    },
    "technical_specs": {
      "camera_style": "iPhone 15 Pro Max front camera simulation or 24mm f/1.8 lens.",
      "visual_quality": "Hyper-realistic, 8k UHD. Focus on micro-details: individual strands of hair, fabric knitting texture, light reflection in eyes (catchlights), and skin texture (pores, peach fuzz).",
      "color_grading": "Warm, vibrant, slightly desaturated backgrounds to make the subject pop. High contrast and sharpness."
    }
  }
}

> 一个高度明确且详细的提示，用于生成一张女性自拍照，该女性拥有夸张的沙漏型身材，特别强调巨大的臀部曲线和纤细的腰肢。场景设定在卧室的黄金时段，拍摄对象俯卧在床上，回头望向镜头，以智能手机摄像头的审美风格捕捉。

```
{
	 "subject": {
	 	 "body": {
	 	 	 "type": "Exaggerated hourglass physique",
	 	 	 "proportions": "Massively enhanced glutes with voluminous curves, sharply contrasting with a very narrow waist. Dramatic waist-to-hip ratio, rounded hips and prominent gluteal muscles visible under the clothing. Shoulders are proportional to the waist, creating a distinct figure-eight shape.",
	 	 	 "pose": "Lying prone on the bed, weight on forearms, looking back over her shoulder towards the camera, legs bent upwards behind her, showcasing the significant glute development. Mouth is closed, lips are together. Left hand holds a pink smartphone.",
	 	 	 "features": {
	 	 	 	 "hair": "{argument name="hair style" default="Silver-grey, tied in a messy, textured bun with loose, wispy strands framing the face."}",
	 	 	 	 "eyes": "green.",

	 	 	 },

	 	 	 	 "bottom": "Black thin-strap bikini bottoms, exposing the large gluteal curves.",
	 	 	 	 "accessories": "Silver ring on the left ring finger, black hair tie on the left wrist."
	 	 	 }
	 	 },
	 	 "lighting": {
	 	 	 "style": "Natural sunset light filtering through a window.",
	 	 	 "quality": "Warm, golden, and soft, creating long shadows and highlighting textures.",
	 	 	 "direction": "From the back left, through the window blinds.",
	 	 	 "setup": "Sunlight as the primary source, reflecting off the beige bedding."

	 	 },

### 372. 纹身搭配粗犷闪光镜面自拍

**作者**: [Lex](https://x.com/lexx_aura/status/2018592028049678596)  **日期**: 2026-02-03  **语言**: en

> 一个结构化的 JSON 提示词，用于生成一张原始、坦率、逼真的镜子自拍，带有邋遢的审美风格，让人联想到 2000 年代的数码相机摄影。它详细描述了拍摄对象的样貌（红棕色头发、苍白皮肤、可见毛孔、特定纹身）以及杂乱、肮脏的浴室环境，并强调了刺眼的直射相机闪光灯效果。

![纹身搭配粗犷闪光镜面自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770187116931_eam9dz_HAN6vJeWcAAXRbM.jpg)
![纹身搭配粗犷闪光镜面自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770187116956_i0aowu_HAN6vJcWEAAq15b.jpg)
![纹身搭配粗犷闪光镜面自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770187116890_38itso_HAN6vItWcAAHgYg.jpg)

```
{
  "image_generation_prompt": {
    "subject": {
      "description": "Young woman with a candid, slightly grungy aesthetic taking a mirror selfie.",
      "hair": "Messy, textured reddish-brown hair, parted to the side, looking casual and unstyled.",
      "skin": "Pale skin with high-definition texture, visible pores, natural imperfections, and freckles. Not airbrushed.",
      "face": "Direct eye contact, sharp winged eyeliner, biting the nail/finger of the left hand in a nervous or playful gesture."
    },
    "body_and_clothing": {
      "pose": "Standing close to the mirror, one arm raised to mouth.",
      "outfit": "Simple, dark heather grey V-neck t-shirt.",
      "tattoos": [
        "Line-art floral/leafy branch tattoo extending up the left forearm",
        "Script text tattoo on the outer edge of the left wrist",
        "Tiny heart outline tattoo on the middle finger of the left hand",
        "Small minimalist heart outline tattoo on the center of the chest/sternum"
      ]
    },
    "environment_and_style": {
      "setting": "Cluttered bathroom with vintage {argument name="wallpaper pattern" default="beige floral patterned"} wallpaper.",
      "foreground_details": "Dirty mirror surface with visible water spots, smudges, and dust particles creating a layer of texture over the subject.",
      "background_details": "Towel rack, shower curtain rod, and a ceiling light fixture visible in reflection."
    },
    "technical_specifications": {
      "aesthetic": "Amateur flash photography, 2000s digital camera vibe, raw and candid.",
      "lighting": "Harsh direct camera flash creating a bright glare on the mirror and hard shadows behind the subject.",
      "quality": "Photorealistic, 4K, focus on skin texture and mirror grime details.",
      "camera_angle": "Eye-level mirror selfie shot."
    }
  }
}
```

**作者**: [Bethany](https://x.com/JustBethanyai/status/2018561777621966929)  **日期**: 2026-02-03  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张年轻女性健身后的超逼真、高端自拍照，重点突出光滑的皮肤纹理、细微的汗珠光泽，以及现代、设计精美的健身房内部的电影级灯光效果。

![高档健身房里逼真的运动后自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770187198892_wmq0uz_HANfNEaXEAAg8wH.jpg)

{

    },

    },
    "background": "Upscale modern gym interior with aesthetic design: clean architectural lines, large mirrors, warm LED strip lighting, minimalistic weight machines, polished concrete and wood accents, softly blurred to maintain strong subject focus",
    "photography_style": "Photorealistic high-end fitness selfie, shallow depth of field, sharp facial detail with smooth skin texture, lifestyle editorial feel, premium social media aesthetic"
  },
  "generated_prompt": {
    "full_text_prompt": "photorealistic close-up post-workout selfie of a beautiful young woman, mid 20s, slim fit physique, smooth olive-fair skin with natural post-workout glow and light sweat sheen, long dark brown hair in a sleek high ponytail with loose face-framing strands, almond-shaped brown eyes with soft sultry tired gaze, full glossy lips slightly parted, minimal natural makeup, wearing a neutral beige fitted sports bra with clean modern design, leaning slightly forward toward the camera, relaxed shoulders, confident calm expression, upscale

### 375. 健身后亲密自拍

**作者**: [Melisa♡](https://x.com/xmliisu/status/2018557839032099248)  **日期**: 2026-02-03  **语言**: en

> 一个复杂、结构化的 JSON 提示词，用于生成一张特写、超逼真的年轻女性（在生成的提示词部分指定了萨迪·辛克 (Sadie Sink) 的形象）运动后自拍照。它着重于汗水、潮红的皮肤纹理、凌乱的头发以及明亮、略显刺眼的健身房顶灯等细节，捕捉了一个亲密、坦率的瞬间。

![健身后亲密自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770187118900_wcrxl9_HANbpe7W0AAukls.jpg)
![健身后亲密自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770187118895_3g836y_HANbpe4XoAELOXz.jpg)
![健身后亲密自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770187118854_tbswns_HANbpe7WsAAaJ2w.jpg)

```
{
  "image_analysis": {
    "overall_scene": "A close-up, post-workout selfie of a young woman in a gym, visibly sweaty and flushed, captured in a casual, intimate moment under bright indoor lighting.",
    "subject": {
      "identity": "Sydney Sweeney (extremely close resemblance)",
      "age_appearance": "Early 20s",
      "build": "Athletic and toned with natural curves, defined shoulders and arms, full bust",
      "skin": "Fair, flushed pink/red from exertion, glistening with sweat droplets across face, neck, chest, and shoulders, natural texture with visible pores and light freckles",
      "hair": "Red, pulled back into a loose, messy ponytail with wet strands sticking to forehead and neck, flyaways framing face",
      "face": "Heart-shaped face, large expressive  blue eyes looking directly at camera with tired/sultry half-lidded gaze, full natural lips in slight pout, no visible makeup, post-exercise glow",
      "other_details": "Small beauty mark on cheek, subtle sheen on collarbones"
    },
    "pose": "Leaning forward toward the camera in a close-up selfie style, head slightly tilted, shoulders relaxed, expression of post-workout exhaustion mixed with playful confidence, one arm likely holding phone (cropped out)",
    "clothing": {
      "visible": "Light Pink ribbed sports bra/tank crop top with deep scoop neckline, thick straps, fitted and slightly stretched, emphasizing cleavage and midriff (lower body not visible)"
    },
    "lighting_and_color": {
      "lighting": "Bright overhead fluorescent gym lighting, even and slightly harsh, creating strong highlights on sweat and skin, subtle shadows under chin and arms",
      "color_palette": "Neutral gym tones: white sports bra contrasting flushed pink skin, dark blurred background equipment"
    },
    "background": "Blurred modern gym interior with visible weight machines, cable pulleys, concrete ceiling with exposed pipes, dark rubberized floor, shallow depth of field keeping focus tightly on subject",
    "photography_style": "Photorealistic intimate gym selfie, high resolution, sharp detail on sweat droplets and skin texture, taken from arm's length front-low angle, natural post-workout aesthetic"
  },
  "generated_prompt": {
    "full_text_prompt": "photorealistic close-up post-workout selfie of a beautiful young woman strongly resembling {argument name="subject likeness" default="Sadie Sink"}, early 20s, red messy wet ponytail with strands on forehead, fair flushed skin covered in sweat droplets, large blue eyes with tired sultry gaze, full lips in slight pout, wearing tight {argument name="bra color" default="light yellow"} ribbed sports bra with deep scoop neckline showing cleavage, glistening collarbones and shoulders, leaning forward in gym setting, bright overhead fluorescent lighting, blurred background with weight machines and concrete ceiling, highly detailed sweat and skin texture, natural glow, sharp focus on face and upper body, intimate athlet"
  }
```

**作者**: [Rowan](https://x.com/rowanali09/status/2018557248835141653)  **日期**: 2026-02-03  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细、结构化的 JSON 提示词，用于生成一张两名主体（暗示为 Sadie Sink 和 Millie Bobby Brown 的形象）在现代健身房中拍摄镜面自拍的超逼真图像。该提示词详细定义了健身房场景、主体穿着的配套运动服（黄色和红色）、具体的姿势（深蹲、双手叉腰）以及相机视角（镜面自拍/低角度定时拍摄）。

{
  "scene_description": {
    "location": "Modern indoor gym",

      "Full-wall mirrors reflecting the room depth",

      "Cable weight machines in the background",
      "Black padded weight bench on the right",
      "Black rubber gym flooring",
      "Linear LED ceiling lights providing bright, cool illumination"

      "id": "subject_1",

      "appearance": {
        "hair": "Reddish-blonde, long, tied back in a ponytail",

          "Looking at mirror",
          "Looking sideways",
          "Smiling directly at camera"
        ]
      },
      "apparel": {
        "outfit_type": "Matching ribbed workout set",
        "color": "{argument name="subject 1 outfit color" default="Lemon yellow"}",
        "top": "Sports bra with a scoop neck and visible 'alo' logo on the band",
        "bottom": "High-waisted biker shorts (mid-thigh length)",
        "footwear": "White crew socks, white sneakers"
      },
      "poses": [
        "Standing with hands on hips",
        "Standing slightly turned inward",
        "Wide stance squat with hands resting on thighs"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "subject_2",
      "position": "Right",
      "appearance": {
        "hair": "Brunette, styled in a messy high bun",
        "skin_tone": "Light-to-medium",
        "expression": [
          "Soft smile",
          "Focused neutral expression",
          "Looking at phone screen in mirror"
        ]
      },
      "apparel": {
        "outfit_type": "Matching ribbed workout set",
        "color": "{argument name="subject 2 outfit color" default="Bright red"}",
        "top": "Deep V-neck sports bra",
        "bottom": "High-waisted mini shorts",
        "footwear": "White crew socks, white sneakers"
      },
      "accessories": [
        "Smartphone with dark case and MagSafe ring",
        "Black dumbbell with silver handle"
      ],
      "poses": [
        "Standing holding phone for mirror selfie",
        "Goblet squat holding a dumbbell at chest height with both hands"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "camera_perspective": {
    "type": "Mirror selfie and low-angle timer shot",
    "framing": "Full body and 3/4 body shots",
    "lighting": "Overhead artificial gym strip lighting",
    "focus": "Sharp focus on subjects, slight depth of field in background reflection"
  },
  "specific_details": {

  }
}

> 一个结构化的提示，用于生成一张超逼真的图像：一位年轻女性在明亮、高调的白色卧室里对着镜子自拍。提示详细描述了拍摄对象的形象（铂金色头发、纹身、粉色吊带裙）、姿势（坐在床边，手指放在嘴唇上）以及环境元素，旨在营造一种社交媒体网红的审美风格。

    },

> 一个高度结构化的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张在阳光充足的卧室里拍摄的随意镜子自拍照。它细致地定义了光线（左侧刺眼的直射阳光）、背景元素（拱形镜子、凌乱的床）、拍摄对象的服装（白色露脐上衣、粉色短裤），以及高对比度和生活方式美学的技术规格。

{
  "lighting": {

    "highlights": "bright_highlights_on_subject_leg_shoulder_and_bedding"
  },

    "setting": "bedroom_interior",
    "elements": [
      "large_arched_floor_mirror_with_thin_frame",
      "bed_with_white_duvet_and_grey_striped_throw",
      "large_window_with_city_view_and_blue_sky",
      "tan_textured_walls",
      "white_door",
      "ceiling_light_fixture",
      "laundry_basket",
      "rug_on_floor"
    ],
    "view_outside_window": "buildings_and_bright_blue_sky_with_clouds"
  },
  "typography": {},

    "focus": "subject_and_reflection",
    "balance": "asymmetrical",
    "framing": "full_body_shot_reflected_in_large_arched_mirror",
    "perspective": "eye_level_reflection",
    "depth_of_field": "deep",
    "elements_arrangement": "subject_centered_in_mirror_reflection"
  },
  "color_profile": {
    "palette": "neutral_with_natural_light",
    "saturation": "natural",
    "accent_colors": [
      "#E0C5A8",
      "#2A2A2A"
    ],
    "color_harmony": "complementary_between_warm_indoor_and_cool_outdoor_tones",
    "dominant_colors": [
      "#E8E4DC",
      "#5A5E6B",
      "#FFFFFF",
      "#B38B6D",
      "#3A5F9A"
    ]

### 379. 具有严格身份锁定的逼真时尚自拍

**作者**: [Özge Döner](https://x.com/astronomerozge1/status/2018435142495129991)  **日期**: 2026-02-02  **语言**: en

> 一个高度复杂的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张超逼真的时尚自拍。它使用基于参考图像的严格“FACE_IDENTITY_LOCK”，要求保留所有面部细节（痣、毛孔、比例）。创意提示指定了造型细节，如玳瑁太阳镜、叠戴珍珠项链和浅蓝色条纹衬衫，所有这些都在清晰的自然日光下呈现。

![具有严格身份锁定的逼真时尚自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770100823106_2qirm0_HALsAATXAAE7bFa.jpg)

```
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "tool": "NanoBanana Pro",
      "task_type": "photoreal_candid_selfie_fashion_portrait",
      "version": "v1.0_SUNGLASSES_PEARLS_BLUE_SHIRT_DAYLIGHT_SELFIE_FACELOCK_EN",
      "priority": "highest",
      "language": "en"
    },

    "references": {
      "reference_image_face": {
        "source": "UPLOAD_REFERENCE_IMAGE (OPTIONAL)",
        "purpose": "FACE_IDENTITY_LOCK",
        "strict_lock": true,
        "face_similarity_priority": "MAX",
        "no_identity_blending": true,
        "no_beautify": true,
        "no_age_shift": true,
        "preserve_skin_texture": true,
        "preserve_facial_proportions": true,
        "preserve_moles_freckles_scars": true,
        "preserve_eye_shape": true,
        "preserve_nose_shape": true,
        "preserve_lip_shape": true,
        "preserve_jawline": true
      },
      "reference_image_style": {
        "source": "UPLOAD_REFERENCE_IMAGE (REQUIRED)",
        "purpose": "STYLE_COMPOSITION_ANCHOR",
        "strict_lock": true,
        "preserve_composition": true,
        "preserve_lighting": true,
        "preserve_palette": true,
        "preserve_vibe": true
      }
    },

    "global_constraints": {
      "rating": "PG-13",
      "no_nudity": true,
      "no_explicit_sexual_content": true,
      "no_logos": true,
      "no_watermark": true,
      "no_readable_text": true
    },

    "output_settings": {
      "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
      "orientation": "portrait",
      "resolution_target": "ultra_high_res",
      "render_style": "photoreal_candid_lifestyle",
      "sharpness": "crisp_but_natural",
      "film_grain": "subtle",
      "color_grade": "clean_daylight_neutral_warm_skin",
      "dynamic_range": "natural_not_hdr",
      "skin_rendering": "real_texture_no_retouch"
    },

    "creative_prompt": {
      "scene_summary": "Create a photoreal close-up fashion selfie of one adult woman in clean indoor daylight. Camera is slightly above eye level, framing from upper chest to top of head, with a subtle tilt. The woman has long, softly waved medium-brown hair with natural highlights, parted slightly off-center.\n\nStyling details (must match): {argument name=\"sunglasses type\" default=\"tortoiseshell cat-eye sunglasses\"} with dark lenses; soft glam makeup with natural brows, subtle contour, and full glossy rose-nude lips; a chunky gold hoop earring visible; layered pearl necklaces including a statement pendant charm. Outfit: light blue thin-striped button-up shirt, collar open, slightly oversized fit.\n\nEnvironment: bright modern interior with a white wall/tiles on one side, a wooden louvered door or panel behind, and a white cabinet/ceiling fixture in the background. Background should be softly out of focus (shallow depth of field).\n\nLighting: natural window light, soft and even, with realistic reflections visible on the sunglasses lenses. Preserve real skin texture and pores; avoid smoothing or beauty retouching. No text, no logos,"
    }
  }
}
```

### 381. 具有身份锁定的逼真镜面自拍

**作者**: [D. Humann](https://x.com/dhumann/status/2018378833913606633)  **日期**: 2026-02-02  **语言**: en

> 此提示旨在利用参考照片生成特定人物（THE_SUBJECT）的超逼真镜面自拍。它要求精确复制面部特征和外貌，将场景设置在现代简约的浴室中，并采用柔和的自然光线，确保最终图像看起来与真实的手机自拍完全一致，并具有准确的反射效果。

![具有身份锁定的逼真镜面自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770100810298_bdj8si_HAK1M-kWQAEhlh0.jpg)

```
The main subject is the person in the attached photos (hereinafter referred to as THE_SUBJECT). Carefully and accurately replicate THE_SUBJECT’s facial features, hairstyle, skin tone, proportions, and overall appearance exactly as shown in the photo. 

Create a photorealistic mirror-selfie of THE_SUBJECT sitting on the edge of a bathroom counter, slightly turned to the side while looking over her shoulder toward the mirror. She is holding her phone up with one hand to capture the photo.

The setting is a {argument name="bathroom style" default="modern, minimal bathroom"} with light neutral walls, a glass shower, folded towels, a marble countertop, and soft natural lighting. The photo should look exactly like a realistic phone selfie with accurate reflections, sharp detail, and natural skin texture. Create the image with perfect composition, lighting and photographic detail.
```

Create a realistic selfie-style photograph, preserving the woman’s facial features exactly with no changes. The scene shows a woman standing in front of a large mirror in the free-weights area of a gym. She wears a {argument name="clothing item" default="black long-sleeved zipped jumpsuit"} and light-colored sneakers. Her hair is pulled back into a loose bun, and her makeup is polished and flawless. She holds a water bottle in one hand and a smartphone in the other, with a workout app visible on the phone screen. ![带埃菲尔铁塔景观的健身房镜面自拍提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770014612847_in969y_HAF9ClmbsAAAqUe.jpg)

```
{
  "subject": {
    "body": {
      "description": "A fit young woman with a slender and curvy physique, kneeling on a yoga mat. She is facing a large full-length mirror, holding a smartphone to take a mirror selfie. Her hair is styled in a high, messy bun with loose strands framing her face.",
      "pose": "Kneeling on shins on the mat, body angled slightly away from the mirror but twisting her torso to face the reflection. She is looking at her phone screen/reflection."
    },
    "wardrobe": {
      "top": "A {argument name="top color" default="pink"} strappy sports bra or crop top, exposing the midriff.",
      "bottom": "Tight light blue athletic shorts (hot pants).",
      "feet": "Barefoot.",
      "accessories": "Smartphone with a dark green case."
    }
  },
  "camera": {
    "type": "Smartphone camera (mirror selfie)",
    "angle": "Eye-level reflection relative to kneeling position.",
    "aspect_ratio": "9:16"
  },
  "scene": {
    "location": "Modern high-rise gym.",
    "background": "Large floor-to-ceiling windows showcasing a clear daytime view of the {argument name="landmark" default="Eiffel Tower"} in Paris against a blue sky. Gym equipment like treadmills are visible on either side.",
    "props": "A textured light blue yoga mat on the beige floor."
  },
  "lighting": {
    "type": "Natural daylight.",
    "quality": "Bright and clear, streaming in from the large windows, creating soft natural shadows."
  }
}

    },

    "type": "Smartphone camera (mirror selfie)",

  },
  "scene": {

> 一个高度详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张 Sadie Sink 身穿粉色罗纹家居服的超逼真抓拍自拍，强调自然的皮肤纹理、雀斑和凌乱的现代公寓背景，模拟 Z 世代网红美学。

![Sadie Sink 穿家居服的抓拍自拍提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770014615352_a3h5qm_HAE5QswXkAA9JYW.jpg)

```
{
  "prompt_details": {
    "subject": {
      "appearance": "{argument name="subject name" default="Sadie sink"} with pale skin and distinct, natural freckles scattered across face and chest. Bright blue eyes, natural eyebrows, and soft pink lips. Long ginger/red hair pulled back into a high, messy ponytail with loose strands framing the face.",
      "pose": "Selfie angle (high angle shot). Seated posture, likely on a chair or couch. Left hand raised near face, with the index finger playfully touching or resting near the lower lip. Direct eye contact with the camera.",
      "expression": "Candid, slightly parted lips, relaxed and casual gaze."
    },
    "attire_and_styling": {
      "outfit": "Matching light pink, ribbed-knit loungewear set. Top is a long-sleeved, cropped zip-up hoodie with the zipper partially down. Bottoms are matching pink ribbed pants.",
      "accessories": "Multiple gold rings stacked on the left hand (index, middle, and ring fingers). A loaded charm bracelet with silver and pink charms on the left wrist.",
      "makeup": "Minimal to no makeup 'natural' look, highlighting skin texture and freckles."
    },
    "environment": {
      "setting": "Cluttered, modern apartment living room interior.",
      "background_elements": {
        "left": "Black coffee table holding water bottles, a glass jar, snacks, and a game controller. A brown faux-fur rug on the floor. In the distance, a dining area with red metal chairs and a white door with blinds.",
        "right": "Edge of an orange upholstered sofa. A black television stand with a large flat-screen TV (off). A glimpse of a kitchen with stainless steel appliances in the far background."
      },
      "lighting": "Natural daylight entering from a window on the left side, creating soft shadows and illuminating the subject's face. Ambient indoor lighting filling the rest of the room."
    },
    "mood_and_atmosphere": {
      "vibe": "Casual, intimate, 'at home' aesthetic, relaxed, Gen Z influencer style, candid everyday life.",
      "style": "Mirror selfie or front-facing camera selfie style."
    },
    "technical_specs": {
      "camera_style": "Smartphone front-facing camera or wide-angle 24mm lens simulation.",
      "visual_quality": "Ultra photorealistic, highly detailed textures (visible knitting on the sweater, skin pores, stray hairs, reflection in eyes).",
      "resolution": "8k resolution, sharp focus on the subject with natural depth of field fall-off in the background."
    }
  }
}
```

### 393. 豪华东京酒店浴室肖像提示

**作者**: [Javeriya 🇺🇸](https://x.com/JadoonKhan281/status/2017924414562840738)  **日期**: 2026-02-01  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张在东京豪华酒店浴室中，一位女性的超写实肖像。它指定了 35mm 胶片美学、暖色钨丝灯照明，以及一件带有精致日式刺绣的黑色丝绸和服。

![豪华东京酒店浴室肖像提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770014686141_9uo7r5_HAEbj36bUAA80Nj.jpg)
![豪华东京酒店浴室肖像提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770014686154_r9z2s4_HAEbjljagAALS_p.jpg)

```
{
  "image_generation_request": {
    "title": "Cozy Tokyo Hotel Portrait",
    "version": "2.1",
    "mode": "photorealistic_portrait",
    "reference_settings": {
      "use_reference_image": true,
      "reference_type": "face_likeness",
      "strength": 0.85
    },
    "prompt_components": {
      "subject": {
        "description": "Precise facial likeness of the blonde woman from the reference, with clear, glowing skin.",
        "pose": "Standing centered, facing the camera, holding a white ceramic mug with both hands.",
        "expression": "Warm, genuine smile with eyes looking toward the camera."
      },
      "attire": {
        "item": "Black silk kimono robe with a deep V-neckline.",
        "details": "Intricate Japanese floral and koi carp embroidery in gold and red tones."
      },
      "environment": {
        "location": "Luxurious, dimly lit hotel bathroom in Tokyo.",
        "background_elements": "Large mirrors on both sides reflecting the subject's back and the warm room lighting; marble countertop and chrome faucet visible.",
        "atmosphere": "Quiet, cozy late-night vibe with visible steam rising from the mug."
      },
      "lighting": {
        "type": "Soft, warm tungsten lighting from a wall sconce.",
        "effects": "Gentle shadows, cinematic glow on the hair, and soft highlights on the face."
      },
      "technical_photography": {
        "camera": "35mm film photography style",
        "lens_settings": "f/1.8 aperture, shallow depth of field, sharp focus on the face.",
        "texture": "Fine film grain, natural skin textures, high dynamic range."
      }
    },
    "concatenated_prompt": "Photorealistic portrait of a blonde woman with a precise facial likeness to the reference, smiling warmly at the camera. She is standing in a dimly lit, luxury Tokyo hotel bathroom, holding a white ceramic mug with steam rising from it. She wears a black silk kimono with gold and red floral embroidery. The background features large mirrors reflecting her figure and the warm glow of a wall sconce. 35mm film aesthetic, f/1.8 aperture, soft cinematic lighting, warm tungsten tones, fine grain, ultra-detailed, high-end fashion editorial style.",
    "negative_prompt": "bright daylight, harsh shadows, fluorescent light, sad expression, distorted hands, blurry face, low resolution, cartoonish, messy environment, direct harsh flash.",
    "parameters": {
      "aspect_ratio": "2:3",
      "sampler": "DPM++ 2M Karras",
      "steps": 30,
      "cfg_scale": 7.5
    }
  }
}

### 395. 豪华衣帽间镜子自拍，带狗狗和参考脸

**作者**: [The Prompt Engineer](https://x.com/rorschachvibes/status/2017874146605314453)  **日期**: 2026-02-01  **语言**: en

> 生成一张超写实 4K 镜像自拍的提示词：一位女性跪坐在豪华步入式衣帽间的地板上。关键在于，她的脸部必须与参考图片 100% 保持一致。场景中有一只毛茸茸的小狗，还有一个有趣的细节：手机壳里夹着一张功夫熊猫的拍立得照片。

![豪华衣帽间镜子自拍，带狗狗和参考脸](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770014634996_v5v7vi_HADtvQubAAAE7tR.jpg)

```
Create a 4:5 hyper-realistic 4K mirror-selfie image of a young adult woman kneeling on a light wood floor in a luxury walk-in closet. She wears a fitted black spaghetti-strap mini dress with a square neckline, short hem, and sleek silhouette. Her brown hair with burgundy front highlights is pulled into a low bun with loose strands framing her face. She makes a playful pout, looking directly at her mirror reflection while holding a smartphone with a tan/beige case in her right hand; a small Polaroid photo of Kung-fu Panda is tucked into the back of the case. Accessories include small gold hoop earrings, a thin silver bracelet on her left wrist, rings on her fingers, and a white polished manicure. A small fluffy dog with a merle coat (brown, tan, white patches) and a red/pink collar stands beside her, facing left in profile. The environment is a bright, tidy dressing room with a large floor-length mirror, open wardrobe shelves with folded clothes, hanging garments, white shelving, and visible Sephora and Mango shopping bags. Bright indoor artificial lighting with soft diffusion, eye-level mirror composition, neutral beige/wood/white palette with high-contrast black subject, sharp focus, photorealistic textures. Keep the face hundred percent the same from the reference picture.
```

### 400. 镜面自拍，夸张的比例，以及分段染发

**作者**: [Pinodi](https://x.com/PinodiArt/status/2017561053123465519)  **日期**: 2026-01-31  **语言**: en

> 一个结构化的提示，用于生成一张女性的镜面自拍图像，该女性具有特定、夸张的解剖特征（极致沙漏身材）和分层染发。该提示着重强调在镜面反射中保持解剖学上的一致性，并详细说明了服装、姿势和灯光细节，以实现高分辨率、专业影棚品质的输出。

![镜面自拍，夸张的比例，以及分段染发](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769927665585_rf5fkf_G__RBpGXkAEnGwU.jpg)

```
{
  "subject": {
    "description": "Young woman with long, wavy split-dyed hair (half jet black, half platinum blonde) and straight-cut bangs. Facial features include soft doe-eyes with winged eyeliner and a delicate nose.",
    "body": "Extraordinarily pronounced hourglass figure with an extreme waist-to-hip ratio. Her waist is extremely narrow, contrasting with very large, prominent, and full rounded glutes. Wide pelvic structure with an exaggerated lower body curve and voluminous thighs. Slender, toned upper body and limbs with anatomically precise skin textures and subtle muscle definition in the lower back."
  },
  "wardrobe": {
    "top": "Simple pink cropped tank top.",
    "bottom": "Minimalist thin black bikini bottom with high-cut side straps; the garment is designed to emphasize the extreme lower body proportions and the voluminous curvature of the large glutes.",
    "feet": "Bare feet, no socks, natural skin texture.",
    "accessories": "Smartphone with a pink case."
  },
  "pose_action": {
    "position": "Lying prone on a white bed, propped up on elbows. Chin resting on one hand, while the other hand holds the phone for a mirror selfie.",
    "legs": "Legs bent at the knees, feet raised vertically toward the ceiling."
  },
  "scene": {
    "environment": "Minimalist bedroom with neutral-toned walls. Large bed with rumpled white linens and plush pillows.",
    "background": "Soft window light entering from the side, creating a clean, domestic atmosphere.",
    "reflection_integrity": "Mirror reflection must accurately synchronize the subject's pose, hair color split, and the phone case position. Reflection rules apply to maintain anatomical consistency."
  },
  "lighting": {
    "type": "Soft, natural daylight from a lateral window source.",
    "effects": "Gentle shadows emphasizing the deep curvature of the hips and the texture of the bedding; high dynamic range."
  },
  "camera": {
    "aspect_ratio": "9:16",
    "angle": "Eye-level mirror shot, medium-full body framing.",
    "technical": "High-resolution portrait photography, sharp focus on the subject with soft background bokeh, 8k resolution, professional studio quality."
  },
  "negative_constraints": [
    "no socks",
    "no logos",
    "no text",
    "no beautify smoothing",
    "no extra limbs",
    "no watermark",
    "no distorted proportions in reflection"
  ]
}
```

### 401. 超逼真镜面自拍提示词，包含详细解剖结构

**作者**: [Jessia](https://x.com/itsjessiababy/status/2017527072495649124)  **日期**: 2026-01-31  **语言**: en

> 一个极其详细、结构化的 JSON 提示词，用于生成一张超逼真的镜子自拍图像，其中指定了精确的解剖细节、服装、姿势（蹲姿、扭身）、环境（公寓走廊/厨房）和相机视角（智能手机自拍）。

```
{
  "subject": {
    "description": "Young woman with blonde hair, dark roots, taking a mirror selfie. She is wearing a black sports bra and pink flared leggings. She has gold bracelets on her left wrist and is holding a black smartphone in her right hand. Her nails are painted dark. She is looking back over her shoulder with her tongue sticking out.",
    "anatomy": {
      "body_proportions": "Exact match to reference image, prominent buttocks, full bust, curvy figure.",
      "skin_texture": "Realistic skin texture, pores, minor imperfections, visible subsurface scattering.",
      "hair_details": "Blonde, shoulder-length hair, slightly wavy, with dark roots visible."
    },
    "clothing": {
      "top": "Black sports bra with thin straps.",
      "bottom": "Pink high-waisted flared leggings with a ruched back seam."
    },
    "accessories": "Several gold bracelets on left wrist, small earrings.",
    "phone": "Black smartphone held in right hand, screen facing away."
  },

![带有身份锁和戏剧性灯光的编辑肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769927653603_wckvxb_G_-HAelbEAEI-3F.jpg)

Editorial portrait from the attached reference photo, photorealistic. Use uploaded selfie as ONLY face reference. Identity lock: exact likeness, facial geometry/proportions, natural skin texture. No beautification. Keep clothing style, color, material, and fit identical to the reference. Medium close-up (face and shoulders), low angle looking up (heroic/dominant perspective), sharp focus on face/eyes.Serious, intense, focused expression, gaze directed upward and away from camera (beyond the frame). Dramatic saturated studio lighting, high-contrast chiaroscuro with deep shadows, vibrant oranges and deep reds palette, strong rim light creating a halo separation. Solid studio backdrop, rich orange-red smooth gradient, pattern-free, hot radiant atmosphere. High skin texture fidelity (pores visible), 8k, portrait aspect ratio, cinematic lighting, 4:5.
```

> 这是一个高度结构化的 JSON 提示，专为 Gemini Nano Banana Pro 设计，旨在生成一张具有特定角色身份锚点的镜面自拍。主体身穿柔和的粉色罗纹家居服，置身于光线昏暗的更衣室中。该提示强调保留用户在参考照片中的身份，同时详细描述服装、姿势以及暖色调、逼真皮肤纹理等电影元素。

        "outfit": "A soft pink, ribbed knit co-ord set consisting of a long-sleeved cropped cardigan with small buttons and ruffled cuffs, paired with matching high-waisted lounge pants featuring an elastic waistband."

    },

> 一个高度详细的提示，用于生成一张逼真的镜面自拍，画面中一位身材曲线优美、体格健美的女性身处现代公寓健身房，重点在于精确的解剖结构、突出臀部的特定姿势以及混合照明条件。

![逼真健身房镜子自拍提示（曲线身材）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769841083837_u97abj_G_7ZzLHW8AEvZuc.jpg)

```
{
"subject": "Young woman with a curvy, athletic physique, light tan skin tone, and dark brunette hair styled in a high, messy ponytail with loose strands framing the face. She is wearing a matching grey heather athleisure set consisting of a racerback sports bra with a thick elastic underband and tight dolphin-hem shorts. The fit emphasizes a narrow waist and voluminous, prominent glutes and hips, maintaining exact anatomical proportions from the reference. The upper back shows subtle muscular definition.",
"pose": "Standing rear-view mirror selfie pose. The subject stands with her back mostly to the mirror, twisting her torso and hips to the right to profile her side and glutes. Her weight is shifted onto her left leg, accentuating the hip curve. Her right arm is bent, holding a silver smartphone (iPhone Pro style) up to capture the reflection in the mirror. Her left hand is raised, touching the base of her ponytail. Her head is turned to the right, looking at the phone screen in the mirror. The spine exhibits a natural arch.",
"environment": "A modern, open-concept apartment interior. To the left, a grey sectional sofa and a glass-top table are visible in a living area. To the right, a kitchen features white cabinetry, stainless steel appliances including a large refrigerator and oven, and a central island with distinct blue LED under-counter accent lighting. The flooring is light wood planks laid diagonally. In the background, large floor-to-ceiling windows with lowered blinds let in daylight. A black folding cart or wagon is visible on the floor near the kitchen.",
"camera": "Mirror selfie perspective. The image is captured via the reflection in a large wall mirror. The shot framing captures the subject from the mid-thighs up to above the head, including a wide view of the room behind her. The phone is visible in the reflection, partially obscuring the face/chest area. The focal length creates a natural indoor perspective without extreme wide-angle distortion, preserving the depth of the room.",
"lighting": "Mixed lighting environment. Strong natural daylight enters from the background windows, creating a backlit effect that diffuses through the room. Interior ambient lighting is present, including the cool blue glow from the kitchen island LED strip which contrasts with the warmer natural light. The subject is lit by the ambient room light, creating soft, natural shadows on the skin and clothing.",
"mood_and_expression": "Casual, confident, and relaxed. The body language is checking progress or posing for a fitness update. The expression is focused on the phone screen/reflection, appearing calm and self-assured.",
"style_and_realism": "High-fidelity photorealism. The image must look exactly like a raw smartphone photo taken in a mirror. Texture of the heather grey fabric, skin pores, hair strands, and reflections in the stainless steel appliances must be rendered with absolute physical accuracy. N"

### 408. 不对称健身生活方式照片网格提示

**作者**: [Keskin](https://x.com/craftian_keskin/status/2017277545448911260)  **日期**: 2026-01-30  **语言**: en

> 一个提示，旨在生成一个现代、不对称的生活方式拼贴画（照片网格），具有 Instagram/Pinterest 美学，重点关注健身、海滩场景和穿着中性运动服的运动型女性，强调自然光和时尚杂志般的氛围。

![不对称健身生活方式照片网格提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769841052240_dtl4ao_G_7PNpmWsAAark8.jpg)

```
Lifestyle collage of unevenly sized images, modern Instagram / Pinterest aesthetic, fitness and beach-inspired theme.

The composition features multiple photos arranged asymmetrically, with different image sizes and aspect ratios placed together in a casual, editorial collage layout. No strict grid alignment. Natural overlaps and varied spacing create an organic, curated look.

Image Content (Across the Collage)

Adult women with athletic, toned physiques, photographed in different environments

Beach scenes at sunset with ocean waves and warm golden light

Outdoor tropical setting with palm trees and poolside vibes

Indoor mirror selfie with casual fitness wear

Back-view and side-profile poses emphasizing posture and body lines

Activewear, bikinis, and fitness outfits in neutral, black, and muted tones

Subjects are confident, relaxed, and stylish, captured in candid or lightly posed moments. Faces are partially obscured or turned away, creating a lifestyle/editorial feel rather than portrait focus.

Color & Lighting

Warm highlights mixed with soft shadows
Natural daylight and sunset tones
Earthy neutrals, skin tones, muted blacks and greens
Consistent cinematic color grading across all images

Visual Style

Instagram lifestyle collage
Fitness and wellness aesthetic
Editorial mood
Candid, natural photography
High realism
Soft contrast

Camera & Composition

Mix of full-body, mid-shot, and close-up framing
Varied perspectives back
Natural depth of field
No strict symmetry
Casual magazine-style layout

Mood Keywords

Confident
Natural
Aesthetic
Summer lifestyle
Fitness-inspired
Relaxed
Editorial

Negative Prompt

Perfect grid layout, equal image sizes, heavy borders, text overlays, logos, watermarks, exaggerated body proportions, oversexualization, CGI look, cartoon style, harsh lighting
```

**Related**: [[运动休闲]]、[[综合艺术]]、[[室内设计]]

### 411. 高保真镜像自拍提示词与身份锁定

**作者**: [Dan Reed](https://x.com/daaaaanc/status/2017220153566487027)  **日期**: 2026-01-30  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的图像生成提示，模拟一张原始、高保真的智能手机镜面自拍。它指定了技术相机设置（零散景、锐利对焦、数字颗粒），并包含身份锁定指令，以保留特定的面部几何结构和详细的皮肤物理特征，重点描绘了一个穿着哑光缟玛瑙黑色科技微型连体衣的运动型到精瘦体型。

Raw high-fidelity photograph, iPhone 17 Pro sensor simulation, indoor ambient lighting, zero bokeh, SHARP focus from the foreground textile folds to the background wall, f/5.6 aperture for structural clarity, authentic digital grain.
[Subject & Identity Locking]

Identity: Absolute preservation of Image A’s specific facial geometry, emphasizing the almond eye shape, high lip volume, and defined chin structure.
Bio-Fidelity: Detailed skin physics (micro-pores, satin-finish hydration, and visible fine vellus hair along the jawline). Precise rendering of the collarbone and upper-torso symmetry.
Expression: Mirror-selfie aesthetic; the face is partially obscured by the technical device, capturing a focused and magnetic gaze toward the reflection.
[Outfit & Physicality]

Technical Description: High-impact technical micro-romper in a matte onyx black performance textile.
Textile Geometry: Off-the-shoulder architecture with a straight horizontal neckline and full-length compression-fit sleeves.
Accessories: Minimalist silver cross-shaped drop earrings; delicate silver-link chain necklace with a small circular pendant.
Surface Physics: High-tensile material-to-skin surface compression. The fabric must exhibit realistic physical tension lines as it contours the anatomical bust volume and emphasizes a pronounced hourglass S-curve silhouette.
Physicality: Confident self-assured seated posture, highlighting the waist-to-hip ratio and symmetrical proximal limb geometry of the upper thighs.
[Pose & Composition]

Geometry: Full-body seated mirror-reflection framing. The subject is sitting upright on the edge of a bed, legs positioned symmetrically and forward.
Framing: Vertical 9:16 orientation. The subject holds a dark technical smartphone centrally at face level, capturing the reflection in a full-length mirror.
Anatomy: Realistic shoulder-joint displacement and upper-body symmetry, reflecting the athletic-to-lean transition characteristic of Image A.
[Environment & Lighting]

Atmosphere: Minimalist domestic interior (bedroom).
Interior Details: The subject is seated on a white bed with high-detail quilted linens and realistic fabric folds. The background is a clean, neutral-toned flat-painted wall.
Lighting: Diffused {argument name="lighting temperature" default="3500K warm"} indoor lighting. The light source provides even illumination across the skin and the black textile, creating soft shadows that define the muscle-to-skin interaction in the legs.
Background Integrity: All background architectural elements and bedding textures must remain in sharp focus with zero artificial blurring.
[Failure Prevention Rule]

Command: Use "Technical off-the-shoulder micro-romper" and "Full-length compression-fit sleeves" to ensure the AI maintains the exact garment fit.
Constraint: Explicitly command "Zero artificial bokeh" and "Sharp focus on bedding texture" to ensure the photo maintains an authentic smartphone aesthetic. Specify "Anatomical bust vo
```

    "reflection": "Partial reflection of the arm visible in the mirror on the left edge"
  },
  "environment": {

  },

  "technical_specifications": {

    "focus": "Sharp focus on subject's face and abs, creamy bokeh background",

}

> 一个高度详细的提示，用于生成一张超现实的、杂志级别的年轻金发女性在现代咖啡馆里自拍的照片。该提示详细描述了她的外貌（发型、妆容、表情）、服装（露脐 T 恤、牛仔迷你裙）、配饰（iPhone 15 Pro、DJI Osmo Mobile）以及环境（柔和的中性色调、自然日光），并着重强调了照片级的纹理和准确的反射效果。

Beautiful young blonde woman with long wavy hair styled in a loose low ponytail, a few soft face-framing strands falling naturally, fair glowing skin, soft natural makeup with subtle blush and glossy lips, gentle sweet smile and relaxed eyes. She is taking a mirror selfie using an {argument name="phone model" default="iPhone 15 Pro"} held in one hand, visible MagSafe pop socket attached to the phone, while holding a DJI Osmo Mobile smartphone gimbal casually in the other hand.
She is wearing a cream-white cropped t-shirt with elegant cursive typography reading “{argument name="shirt text" default="Bangerz Live"}”, perfectly fitted but casual, paired with a high-waisted light-wash denim mini skirt, styled with a brown leather belt featuring a large vintage-style buckle. Minimal jewelry: small gold hoop earrings, clean nails, effortless everyday fashion.
Her pose is casual and confident, slightly angled toward the mirror, relaxed shoulders, natural posture typical of an authentic smartphone selfie. The scene is set inside a modern trendy café interior with soft neutral tones, wooden textures, stylish furniture, and large lush green plants placed around the space. Natural daylight streams through large windows, creating a warm, cozy, inviting atmosphere with soft highlights and gentle shadows.
Ultra-realistic professional smartphone photography, photorealistic skin texture with visible pores, realistic fabric folds, accurate reflections in the mirror, sharp focus, natural depth of field, clean composition. Soft natural window light, true-to-life colors, realistic exposure and contrast, modern lifestyle aesthetic. Captured as a high-quality iPhone selfie, realistic lens perspective, cinematic yet natural look, editorial-level realism.

**作者**: [Dan Reed](https://x.com/daaaaanc/status/2017043028880306210)  **日期**: 2026-01-30  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细、结构化的提示，旨在生成一张运动型女性在特定姿势和环境下的原始、高保真照片，强调对脸部几何、头发动态、服装细节的严格控制，以及零人工散景以实现完全景深。

![高保真运动肖像，具有严格的身份和物理控制](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769841117975_qzyztw_G_358CxWoAAHlY_.jpg)

```
[Header] (9:16)
Raw high-fidelity photograph, iPhone 17 Pro sensor simulation, high-angle downward perspective, zero bokeh, SHARP focus from the foreground grass textures to the background architecture, f/8 aperture for total structural depth, authentic digital grain.
[Subject & Identity Locking]
•Identity: Absolute preservation of Image A’s specific facial geometry, emphasizing the almond eye shape, high lip volume, and defined jawline.
•Hair Physics: Long, thick braided ponytail composed of dark chocolate textured waves, secured with black technical bands. High-definition follicle detail and hair texture visible where the hair is pulled back under the cap.
•Bio-Fidelity: Detailed skin physics (micro-pores, satin-finish hydration). Realistic rendering of the side-profile neck architecture and jawline symmetry.
•Expression: Magnetic presence; a self-assured gaze directed upward and slightly off-camera, capturing an authentic post-run athletic aesthetic.
[Outfit & Physicality]
•Technical Description: High-performance monochromatic athletic-wear.
•Upper Geometry: Long-sleeved technical compression-fit half-zip top in matte onyx black.
•Lower Geometry: Technical high-cut performance-wear shorts in matte black, showing realistic material-to-skin surface compression.
•Accessories: Black technical baseball cap with a white "NY" logo; white technical wireless earbuds (AirPods style); white technical smartwatch on the left wrist.
•Physicality: Athletic proximal limb geometry; symmetrical quadricep definition emphasized by the crouching pose.
[Pose & Composition]
•Geometry: High-angle downward "squat" selfie. The subject is in a full crouch on a grass surface, right arm extended toward the lens to capture the shot.
•Framing: Vertical 9:16 orientation. The composition uses the wide-angle perspective to include the subject’s body and the surrounding environment.
•Anatomy: Realistic knee-joint flexion and calf-to-thigh compression. The extended selfie arm must show natural muscle-to-skin interaction and shoulder-joint displacement.
[Environment & Lighting]
•Atmosphere: Public park or suburban residential green space.
•Background Integrity: A red-toned technical-surface running track curving into the distance. Background features bare deciduous trees and white multi-story modern residential buildings. The grass in the foreground is lush green with scattered brown autumn leaves.
•Lighting: Neutral diffused 5500K daylight. The light source provides consistent illumination across the skin and black textiles, creating soft shadows that define the subject’s anatomical contours.
[Failure Prevention Rule]
•Command: Use "Technical compression-fit athletic top" and "High-cut performance-wear shorts" to ensure the AI maintains the exact fit and length.
•Constraint: Explicitly command "Zero artificial bokeh" to ensure the distant apartment buildings and the red track remain perfectly crisp. Specify "Anatomical thigh symmetry" to ensure t
```

### 424. 高保真社交媒体快照与身份锁定

**作者**: [Bushmill0x](https://x.com/bushmill0x/status/2017007209591558246)  **日期**: 2026-01-29  **语言**: en

> 一个高度限制性的提示，旨在根据参考照片生成一张逼真的、未经滤镜处理的社交媒体快照，重点在于严格保留身份和解剖结构。它详细描述了拍摄对象的容貌（被阳光亲吻的肌肤、蓬松的头发、特定的体格）、服装（橙色褶皱面料抹胸比基尼）、姿势（整理头发、开放的姿态）和环境（现代简约室内，漫射日光），明确禁止任何形式的美学修正或平滑处理。

![高保真社交媒体快照与身份锁定](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769754991248_workbw_G_3ZE-zXAAEj6tk.jpg)

```
Generate a photo of a woman in the reference photo with the same facial features, skin tone and hair. She has slightly sun-kissed, tanned skin with long voluminous hair featuring curtain bangs framing the face. She has an anatomically distinct physique similar to reference photo. She wears a bright orange textured crinkle-fabric bandeau bikini top featuring a ruffled edge and a knotted tie detail on the viewer's right side. The bottom of the frame reveals a hint of white and green crochet knit shorts. Her skin has realistic texture with visible pores, natural sheen, and dewy highlights on the chest and face without artificial smoothing. Her pose shows torso facing more directly toward camera with shoulders squared and body upright rather than leaning. Both arms are raised with hands adjusting her hair behind her head, elbows pointing outward creating an open relaxed posture that frames her upper body. Head tilted gently to her right with chin lifted slightly and gaze directed straight at the lens. The setting is an indoor modern interior with a minimalist aesthetic featuring a white ceiling with recessed linear air vents or lighting tracks visible above and a textured white wall behind her creating a bright clean daytime indoor environment. Camera captures a close-up intimate portrait framing from eye-level with 35mm to 50mm focal length. Sharp focus on face and eyes with equal clarity throughout. The subject fills the majority of the frame cut off at mid-torso with raised elbows partially visible at frame edges. Lighting is natural diffused daylight coming from the front with soft even quality creating gentle shadows under the jawline and along the underarms while highlighting curves and facial features. Specular highlights appear on the forehead, nose tip, shoulders, and upper chest indicating slightly dewy skin with natural occlusion shadows in natural areas and under the hair. The image has a photorealistic high-fidelity social media snapshot style with unfiltered raw capture aesthetic and high texture detail. Color palette features warm skin tones, bright saturated orange, and neutral white beige background with medium contrast and neutral to slightly warm daylight white balance. High frequency details visible in hair strands and fabric weave. Specifications: — Style: Photorealistic social media snapshot, casual intimate portrait, unfiltered raw aesthetic — Exclude: Forbidden content, anatomy normalization, body proportion averaging, reduced volume, flattened or compressed features, slimmed torso, aesthetic proportion correction, beauty standard enforcement, wide-angle distortion, depth flattening, mirror selfies, phone-in-hand selfies, reflections, beautification filters, skin smoothing, plastic skin, airbrushed texture, stylized realism
```

### 425. 花卉边框的逼真编辑镜面自拍

**作者**: [Özge Döner](https://x.com/astronomerozge1/status/2016913838545744112)  **日期**: 2026-01-29  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细、结构化的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张超逼真的编辑风格镜面自拍。它指定了一个由红色花朵环绕的巴洛克金色镜子，一位身穿红色荷叶边连衣裙的女性正在自拍，以及精确的相机和灯光设置（50mm 定焦镜头，柔和的窗边日光），以实现浪漫、复古的编辑风格外观，并带有自然的皮肤纹理。

![花卉边框的逼真编辑镜面自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769754998141_x2jznm_G_2EUWAWIAAYlJ_.jpg)

```
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "tool": "NanoBanana Pro",
      "task_type": "photoreal_editorial_mirror_selfie_floral_frame",
      "version": "v1.0_NO_TEXT_RED_DRESS_RED_FLOWERS_BAROQUE_MIRROR_SELFIE_EN",
      "priority": "highest",
      "language": "en"
    },
    "references": {
      "reference_image_style": {
        "source": "UPLOAD_REFERENCE_IMAGE (RECOMMENDED)",
        "purpose": "COMPOSITION_POSE_PROPS_ANCHOR",
        "strict_lock": true,
        "preserve_pose": true,
        "preserve_composition": true,
        "preserve_vibe": true
      },
      "reference_image_face": {
        "source": "UPLOAD_REFERENCE_IMAGE (OPTIONAL)",
        "purpose": "FACE_IDENTITY_LOCK",
        "strict_lock": false
      }
    },
    "output_settings": {
      "aspect_ratio": "3:4",
      "orientation": "portrait",
      "resolution_target": "ultra_high_res",
      "render_style": "cinematic_editorial_ultra_photoreal",
      "sharpness": "crisp_but_soft",
      "film_grain": "subtle_35mm",

The mirror frame is decorated with ONLY red flowers in a curated arrangement. A young adult woman sits inside the mirror frame composition, taking a selfie with a simple phone. She wears a red off-shoulder ruffled dress (or red chiffon mini dress) with soft folds. The scene is clean, elegant, and vintage-romantic. Absolutely no text anywhere.",

        "description": "ornate baroque gold mirror frame, rich carved details, teal velvet backing inside the frame",
        "flower_decor": "only red flowers placed around the mirror edges (red roses, red tulips, red ranunculus, red peonies), no pink, no yellow, no white"

    }
  }

### 429. 高保真镜面自拍，搭配情人节玫瑰和身份锁

**作者**: [Dan Reed](https://x.com/daaaaanc/status/2016633131244081288)  **日期**: 2026-01-28  **语言**: en

> 一个高度技术性的提示，用于生成高保真度的镜面自拍，模拟 iPhone 17 Pro 传感器。它要求绝对保留参考图像中主体的面部几何结构，重点关注真实的物理效果（头发、皮肤、织物张力）和整个景深范围内的清晰对焦（零散景），以营造一种高端、富有魅力且亲密的氛围。

![高保真镜面自拍，搭配情人节玫瑰和身份锁](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769668483555_uppn42_G_yFJBoXEAAgPz9.jpg)

```
[Header] (9:16)
Raw high-fidelity photograph, iPhone 17 Pro sensor simulation, indoor ambient lighting, zero bokeh, SHARP focus from the ornate mirror frame to the background door, f/5.6 aperture for maximum structural depth, authentic digital grain.

[Subject & Identity Locking]
Identity: Absolute preservation of Image A’s specific facial geometry, emphasizing the almond eye shape, high lip volume, and defined chin structure.
Hair Physics: Voluminous dark chocolate textured waves, layered and frizz-free. The hair should exhibit high-definition strand separation, cascading naturally behind the shoulders and framing the visible section of the face.
Bio-Fidelity: Detailed skin physics (micro-pores, satin-finish hydration, fine vellus hair along the jawline). Precise anatomical rendering of the arms and hands, showing realistic skin-tone gradients and a soft-glam makeup aesthetic.
Expression: Magnetic presence; a playful and magnetic half-smile peeking out from behind the smartphone, capturing a high-impact visual allure.
[Outfit & Physicality]
Technical Description: High-impact minimalist evening-wear. A technical strapless compression-fit bodice in matte black.
Textile Geometry: Strapless straight-cut neckline architecture with material-to-skin surface compression.
Accessories: A black smartphone in a technical gold-tone protective case with a decorative star pattern. On the right wrist, a high-end gold quatrefoil-motif (clover) bracelet and a thin gold bangle. Minimalist layered gold necklaces.
Surface Physics: The fabric must exhibit realistic physical tension lines highlighting anatomical bust volume symmetry and upper-torso architecture.
Male Counterpart: A male subject positioned behind her, providing a protective embrace, wearing a black structured outer garment and a white inner layer.
[Pose & Composition]
Geometry: Full-body mirror-reflection framing within a large ornate gold-gilded mirror. The subject is holding a massive bouquet of vibrant pink roses wrapped in white structural paper.
Framing: Vertical 9:16 orientation. The camera is positioned to capture the subject’s reflection, with the ornate gold frame of the mirror acting as a foreground border on the right.
Anatomy: Realistic shoulder-joint displacement and proximal limb geometry. Hand-to-phone contact must show precise finger-joint articulation and skin texture.
[Environment & Lighting]
Atmosphere: Upscale modern domestic interior.
Interior Details: Polished white marble flooring with grey veining; a large dark-wood paneled door in the background; and a minimalist white wall with technical light switches and an intercom unit.
Lighting: Diffused 3500K warm indoor lighting. The ceiling shows realistic caustic light patterns (reflections) from the mirror and polished surfaces. The lighting provides even illumination on the subject’s skin and the saturated pink tones of the roses.
Background Integrity: All backg
```

**Related**: [[综合时尚]]、[[室内设计]]、[[情人节]]

      "carto"

### 433. 2x2 健康与健身生活方式拼贴画提示

**作者**: [Keskin](https://x.com/craftian_keskin/status/2016575249714991210)  **日期**: 2026-01-28  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的提示，用于生成一个 2x2 网格拼贴画，包含四张不同的图片，所有图片都以简洁的健身和健康美学为主题，采用柔和的中性色调。这些图片包括一张健身必需品的平铺照片、一张穿着运动服的镜面自拍、一张健康酸奶碗的俯拍照片，以及一张补水追踪水瓶的特写，旨在营造现代社交媒体风格。

![2x2 健康与健身生活方式拼贴画提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769668459143_qlqbks_G_w0-uPXEAAjEKN.jpg)

```
2×2 grid lifestyle collage with a clean fitness and wellness aesthetic, modern social-media style, soft neutral tones.

Top Left Panel – Workout Essentials, ar 5:8

Flat-lay composition of minimalist workout essentials on a dark yoga mat: white sneakers partially visible, white wireless earbuds with case, and two small white dumbbells. Clean, monochrome color palette. Soft natural lighting, tidy arrangement, calm fitness vibe.

Top Right Panel – Fitness Mirror Selfie ar 6:8

A sensual, blond, beautiful adult woman taking a mirror selfie in a modern kitchen or apartment. She wears a white tank top with deep neckline and light gray fitted shorts, athletic and toned physique. One hand holds a drink, the other holds the phone. Natural daylight, casual confident posture, wellness lifestyle aesthetic.

Bottom Left Panel – Healthy Breakfast Bowl 3:8

Overhead shot of a healthy yogurt bowl arranged neatly with sliced strawberries, blueberries, banana slices, granola, and pink yogurt base. Bright, fresh colors, clean presentation, soft natural light. Emphasis on nutrition and balance.

Bottom Right Panel – Hydration Tracker 2:8

Close-up of a clear reusable water bottle with time markers printed on the side, held by a woman’s hand. Minimal background, clean composition. Highlights hydration, routine, and self-care.

All four images feel cohesive through neutral tones, natural light, minimalist styling, and a calm wellness-focused mood.

Visual Style

Instagram lifestyle aesthetic
Clean and minimal
Wellness and fitness inspired
Soft natural lighting
High realism
Editorial social-media look

Camera & Composition

Mix of flat-lay, mirror selfie, overhead food shot, and close-up
Balanced framing
Sharp focus
Consistent color grading
No motion blur

Mood Keywords

Healthy
Balanced
Motivational
Clean
Modern
Self-care
Daily routine

Negative Prompt

Text overlays, emojis, cluttered backgrounds, harsh lighting, oversaturation, exaggerated body proportions, CGI look, cartoon style, watermarks, logos
```

**作者**: [brindley](https://x.com/brindleyai/status/2016569867726417949)  **日期**: 2026-01-28  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的提示，用于生成一张在家庭浴室环境中拍摄的逼真镜面自拍照。重点在于拍摄对象的姿势——强烈的躯干扭转，臀部靠在台面上，以突出曲线玲珑的下半身轮廓。提示中详细说明了服装（紧身红色 T 恤、深灰色“蜜桃短裤”）、配饰（蓝色智能手机、粉色指尖陀螺手机壳）以及混合照明（前景明亮的梳妆台灯，背景卧室凉爽的蓝色环境光）。

![俏皮浴室镜自拍提示（突出曲线）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769668464926_e3970e_G_xLl7mXoAAykcR.jpg)

```
{
"subject": "Young woman with fair skin and voluminous, shoulder-length wavy black hair. She is wearing a tight, red short-sleeved t-shirt that is fitted to her torso and dark grey, tight athletic shorts ('booty shorts') that accentuate the glutes. On her left wrist, she wears a thin gold bangle bracelet. Her fingernails are long, manicured with white french tips. She is holding a blue smartphone with an orange camera module and a pink 'pop-it' fidget toy case attachment.",
"pose": "Mirror selfie stance with a strong torso twist. The subject stands with her back and hips angled towards the mirror, twisting her upper body deeply to the left to face the reflection. Her hips are pushed back and resting against the white bathroom vanity counter, emphasizing a curvy lower body silhouette. Her left arm is bent, holding the phone up to face level to take the photo. Her right arm is raised, with her hand resting high on the white doorframe for support. Her head is tilted slightly to the right, and she is making a playful pouting 'kissy face' expression.",
"environment": "A domestic bathroom interior. The foreground features a white countertop. To the immediate left, a dark grey textured bathrobe hangs on a hook against a tiled wall. The subject is framed by a white doorframe. Through the open door behind her (visible in the mirror reflection), a bedroom is seen with cool blue ambient lighting and a white cherry blossom branch decal on the wall. The floor appears to be light-colored tile.",
"camera": "Mirror selfie perspective. The shot is taken from the reflection in a bathroom mirror. The camera angle is slightly high, looking down at the hips and level with the face. The phone itself is visible in the frame, obscuring part of the subject's hand. The framing captures from the mid-thighs up to above the head, centered on the subject's reflection.",
"lighting": "Mixed lighting. The foreground (subject and bathroom) is illuminated by bright, neutral-white overhead bathroom vanity lighting, creating soft highlights on the skin and hair. The background (bedroom) is bathed in a distinct cool blue ambient light, creating a color contrast between the warm/neutral foreground and the cool background.",
"mood_and_expression": "Playful, confident, and flirty. The subject's expression is a deliberate pout (duck face), and the pose is calculated to highlight her physique. The vibe is casual, typical of a social media 'fit check' or lifestyle update.",
"style_and_realism": "High-fidelity smartphone photography. Realistic skin textures, natural fabric folds on the tight clothing, and accurate capturing of the mirror reflection physics. Not stylized; represents a candid real-world snapshot aesthetic.",
"colors_and_tone": "Vibrant contrast. The bright red of the shirt stands out against the neutral whites and greys of the bathroom and shorts. The blue phone case and blue background lighting add cool tone accents. Skin
```

    },
    "clothing": {
      "dress_type": "Bodycon mini tube dress",
      "fabric": "Overlapping electric {argument name="dress color" default="blue metallic"} paillette sequins",
      "texture": "Reflective, liquid-metal sheen with layered scale-like depth",
      "color": "Warm electric blue / Bronzed copper"
    },
    "styling_accessories": {
      "neckwear": "Statement metallic rose choker in matching electric blue",
      "jewelry": [
        "Stacked chunky gold rings with large gemstone accents",
        "Layered silver chain bracelets and bangles on both wrists",
        "Small gold diamond hoop earrings"
      ],
      "handbag": "Miniature luxury crystal-encrusted bucket bag with a cross-pendant charm and beaded handle",
      "device": "White modern smartphone (iPhone 17 pro max aesthetic) in a clean orange case"
    }
  },
  "environment": {
    "setting": "Opulent minimalist interior / Dressing room",
    "background_elements": [
      "Purple-colored textured walls",
      "Gilded ornate gold frame of a Picasso painting visible on the left",
      "Soft faux-fur throw or plush seating surface (beige/tan)",
      "Minimalist white-clothed table corner in the foreground"
    ],
    "lighting": {
      "type": "Soft-focus ambient indoor lighting",
      "key_features": "Warm golden-hour glow, diffused shadows, high-specular highlights on sequins and jewelry to create a 'sparkle' effect"
    }
  },
  "camera_and_technical_specs": {
    "camera_angle": "Eye-level, mirror-reflection perspective",
    "focal_length": "35mm (standard wide-angle for portraits)",
    "aperture": "f/1.8 (shallow depth of field, soft background bokeh)",
    "shot_type": "Medium shot (waist-up)",
    "image_quality": [
      "8k resolution",
      "highly detailed skin texture",
      "micro-detail on sequin edges",
      "ray-traced reflections",
      "ultra-photorealistic rendering"
    ]
  },
  "mood": "Confident, luxurious, sophisticated, and polished."
}

Ultra-detailed silly playful close-up selfie of two young girls taken indoors, spontaneous and candid, shot at arm’s length with a wide-angle smartphone lens creating slight natural perspective distortion.
On the left: a brunette girl leaning very close into the frame, head slightly tilted, tongue out playfully, mischievous sparkling eyes, soft natural brows, high-shine glossy lips, subtle lip texture visible, healthy glowing skin with realistic pores, faint natural freckles, smooth cheeks catching warm highlights. She wears a delicate thin gold necklace resting on her collarbone and a stylish checkered top with visible fabric texture and stitching.
On the right: a short-haired girl with a fun cropped haircut, making an exaggerated goofy distorted face—puffed cheeks, slightly crossed eyes, playful asymmetry, expressive facial muscles frozen mid-joke. Lips look hydrated and glossy, skin luminous and smooth, realistic light reflections on cheeks and forehead.
Both faces are very close to the camera, filling most of the frame, creating an intimate selfie feel. Playful, goofy, carefree mood, strong sense of friendship and shared laughter. Warm indoor lighting with soft golden tones, cozy ambience, gentle shadows shaping the face, natural color balance. Background softly blurred and unobtrusive, hint of an indoor room without distraction.
Hyper-realistic rendering, photorealistic quality, ultra-sharp focus on eyes and lips, realistic skin texture, fine facial hair barely visible, natural makeup, authentic imperfections, high resolution, cinematic warmth, social-media selfie aesthetic, candid moment frozen in time.
```

> 一个高度详细、结构化的提示，用于生成一张在高端夜店洗手间里拍摄的魅力十足的镜面自拍。它详细描述了拍摄对象的服装、姿势，并结合了戏剧性的红色霓虹环境照明和手机直闪，营造出高对比度、自信和精英的氛围。

      "hair": "Sleek back-combed 'wet look' hair",

    },
    "environment": {

        "Red and purple neon 'Hustle' sign reflected in the glass",
        "Luxury marble countertop and perfume bottles"
      ]

      ]
    },

      "mood": "Expensive, confident, sultry, elite"
    },
    "render_quality": {
      "realism": "Subsurface scattering on skin under artificial light",
      "detail_level": "Sharp focus on the dress's silk texture and the jewelry's sparkle"

}

### 449. 比基尼写实网红生活肖像

**作者**: [Nano banana pro🍌](https://x.com/Vishnudxe/status/2016188856543150108)  **日期**: 2026-01-27  **语言**: en

> 一个高度技术化的 JSON 提示词，用于生成一张照片级的图像，描绘一位身材健美、曲线优美的女性，身穿白色比基尼，置身于高档热带度假村。它包含特定的 ControlNet 指令以及负面约束，以防止美学修正并保持高细节和胸部丰满度。

![比基尼写实网红生活肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769581975779_vgv0l4_G_rxFF3WMAUcaE3.jpg)

```
{
  "subject": {
    "physique": "Fit curvaceous woman, tan skin, defined waist, soft texture, prominent bust volume",
    "face": "Oval shape, wavy dirty-blonde hair, neutral expression, direct gaze, minimal makeup",
    "apparel": "White smocked crinkle bikini, bandeau top, detached puff sleeves, side-tie bottom",
    "accessories": "Gold hoop earrings, delicate pendant necklace"
  },
  "composition": {
    "pose": "Seated on white sofa, body angled right, legs bent diagonal, hands resting, head forward",
    "framing": "Medium shot, knees up, eye-level, centered, 50mm focal length, 3:4 vertical",
    "environment": "Upscale tropical resort villa, glass sliding doors, palm trees background, wood beam ceiling"
  },
  "rendering": {
    "style": "Photorealistic influencer lifestyle, raw texture, 8k, natural high-key daylight",
    "tech_specs": {
      "res": "8k",
      "iso": "low",
      "light": "diffuse backlight, soft shadows"
    },
    "control_net": {
      "dw_pose": { "weight": 1.0, "goal": "skeletal_lock" },
      "zoe_depth": { "weight": 0.8, "goal": "volumetric_preservation" }
    },
  "negative_constraints": [
    "anatomy normalization",
    "reduced chest volume",
    "flattened depth",
    "skin smoothing",
    "plastic texture",
    "aesthetic proportion correction",
    "mirror selfies",
    "wide-angle distortion"
  ]
}
```

> 一个高度具体、结构化的提示，用于生成一张东亚女性在现代玩家房间里拍摄的逼真镜面自拍。该提示着重于夸张的体型细节（沙漏型身材、突出臀部）、特定服装（超大连帽衫、皮卡丘主题短裤）以及来自 RGB LED 和屏幕发光的复杂照明。

```
{
  "subject": {
    "type": "person",
    "description": "A beautiful East Asian young woman with long, dark red/burgundy hair tied back in a ponytail. She is sitting on a plush carpet in a gaming room, facing away from the camera, holding up her phone to take a mirror selfie. She is no longer wearing glasses.",
    "body": {
      "physique": "Extraordinarily pronounced hourglass figure with very large, prominent glutes and an extreme waist-to-hip ratio. Her hips are wide, and her waist is very narrow. Her legs are athletic and toned, tucked under her as she sits. Her back is arched, emphasizing her curves.",
      "proportions": "Exaggerated lower body curve, full and rounded glutes, slender upper body, toned limbs."
    },
    "wardrobe": {
      "top": "A oversized, light grey hooded sweatshirt with the hood down, revealing her neck and back.",
      "bottoms": "Ultra-short, form-fitting shorts in a vibrant yellow and green pattern, possibly featuring stylized Pikachu or similar characters. The shorts are significantly shorter than, barely covering her large glutes.",
      "accessories": "No glasses, ear piercings, holding a smartphone with a black patterned case."
    }
  },
  "scene": {
    "type": "interior",
    "description": "A detailed, modern gamer room. The background includes a large desk with a multi-monitor setup showing gaming interfaces, a high-end gaming chair, RGB LED light strips lining shelves and behind the monitors creating a warm and cool light mix (blues, purples, oranges), various gaming peripherals, posters, and collectible figurines on shelves. A plush grey carpet covers the floor.",
    "objects": [
      "Multi-monitor PC setup",
      "Gaming chair",
      "RGB LED light strips",
      "Gaming keyboard and mouse",
      "Posters",
      "Collectible figurines",
      "Headset stand",
      "Plush grey carpet"
    ]
  },
  "lighting": {
    "type": "mixed",
    "description": "Warm and cool light from the RGB LEDs and screen glow, creating soft shadows and highlights on her body and the room's textures. The primary light source is from the gaming setup and ambient room LEDs.",
    "setup": "Professional interior lighting with LED accents, creating a cozy and dynamic atmosphere."
  },
  "camera": {
    "type": "DSLR",
    "lens": "Wide-angle lens",
    "aperture": "Low f-stop, shallow depth of field, focused on the subject, particularly her back and glutes",
    "perspective": "Eye-level, capturing the selfie reflection",
    "style": "Professional photograph with sharp details and rich colors"
  },
  "aspect_ratio": "9:16",
  "negative_constraints": [
    "no logos",
    "no beautify smoothing",
    "no extra limbs",
    "no text"
  ],
  "reflection_integrity_rules": "Ensure the mirror reflection accurately matches the subject's pose, wardrobe, and the gaming room background without distortion."
}
