### 457. 南极企鹅探险（2 种选择）

**作者**: [C A R L O ™](https://x.com/NarendarVarma07/status/2016120227462054244)  **日期**: 2026-01-27  **语言**: en

> 一个提示，提供了两种在南极洲生成超逼真电影感图像的变体。第一个是广角自拍，画面中一名男子被帝企鹅和冰川环绕。第二个是详细的场景，一名男子跪下与企鹅握手/握鳍，强调了画面的宏大和冒险感。

![南极企鹅探险（2 种选择）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769581925943_74wmf1_G_qyp4pboAAwicp.jpg)
![南极企鹅探险（2 种选择）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769581925854_icglsq_G_qyp8PbAAQv2Qz.jpg)

```
Prompt Image 1:- A wide-angle selfie photograph in Antarctica showing a man sitting on the snow, surrounded by a large colony of Emperor penguins. The man has short dark hair, a full beard, and is wearing red-lensed metal-frame sunglasses, a dark blue unbuttoned denim jacket over a white crew-neck t-shirt, dark blue cargo pants, and a brown canvas backpack. He is leaning slightly back, holding an orange smartphone in his right hand to take the selfie, with his left hand near the backpack strap. Around him, dozens of adult Emperor penguins are standing and walking on the snow, some close to the camera and others stretching into the distance. The background features massive towering glaciers and ice mountains with white cliffs and blue ice formations, deep snow with visible footprints, and a clear bright blue sky. Bright natural daylight creates crisp shadows, with sharp focus on the man, penguins, and the vast icy landscape, captured from a slightly low perspective that emphasizes scale and isolation.

Prompt Image 2:- A highly detailed, cinematic wide-angle photograph in Antarctica: a handsome young man with short dark neatly styled hair, a full trimmed beard, and a confident expression is kneeling on one knee in the deep snow, gently shaking hands / holding flipper with a large adult Emperor penguin standing upright in front of him. The man is wearing red-tinted metal-frame aviator sunglasses, a dark blue unbuttoned denim jacket over a white crew-neck t-shirt, dark blue cargo pants, brown canvas backpack with straps over both shoulders, white Nike sneakers, and a wristwatch. He is looking at the penguin with a slight smile, his right hand clasping the penguin's flipper. The Emperor penguin is life-size, black head with yellow-orange neck patches, looking directly at the man. Surrounding them is a vast icy Antarctic landscape with massive towering glaciers, snow-covered mountains, blue ice formations, and distant icebergs under a clear bright blue sky. Crisp natural daylight, sharp shadows, high detail on textures of snow, denim fabric, penguin feathers, and facial features. Slightly low camera angle to emphasize scale and adventure, photorealistic style, sharp focus throughout, vibrant yet natural colors & heartwarming composition.
```

**Related**: [[科技产品]]、[[圣诞节]]、[[奇幻世界]]

### 463. 镜面自拍美学，兼具精细物理效果和身份锁定功能

**作者**: [Dan Reed](https://x.com/daaaaanc/status/2015996100155416684)  **日期**: 2026-01-27  **语言**: en

> 一个极其详细的图像生成提示，专注于镜面自拍美学，要求原始高保真摄影、精确的解剖学渲染（包括皮肤纹理和手部关节），以及运动休闲服的特定纺织品物理效果。它还包括一个身份锁定功能，表明需要参考图像。

![镜面自拍美学，兼具精细物理效果和身份锁定功能](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769581971656_te9pfw_G_pBwzGW0AAuKzZ.jpg)

```
[Header] (3:4)
Raw high-fidelity photograph, iPhone 17 Pro sensor simulation, diffused indoor ambient lighting, zero bokeh, SHARP focus from the foreground carpet textures to the background closet tracks, f/5.6 aperture for structural depth, subtle digital grain.

[Subject & Identity Locking]
Identity: Absolute preservation of {argument name="reference image" default="Image A"}'s specific facial geometry, focusing on the lip volume, cheekbone structure, and soft-glam aesthetic.
Hair Physics: Voluminous dark chocolate textured waves, layered with frizz-free definition. The hair should cascade naturally over the shoulders and down the back, showing high-definition strand-level detail.
Bio-Fidelity: Detailed skin physics including micro-pores, satin-finish hydration, and visible fine vellus hair along the jawline. Precise anatomical rendering of the hands, including realistic finger-joint articulation and a polished white manicure.
Expression: Mirror-selfie aesthetic; the face is partially obscured by the technical device, capturing a focused gaze directed at the reflection.
[Outfit & Physicality]
Technical Description: High-performance athletic loungewear. An oversized black technical-cotton sweatshirt with a cropped silhouette.
Lower Geometry: Technical micro-performance-wear shorts in matte charcoal grey, featuring a high-cut V-shape waistline and seamless construction.
Textile Physics: High-tensile material-to-skin surface compression. The grey shorts must exhibit realistic physical tension lines across the gluteal proportions and proximal limb geometry. The black sweatshirt shows heavy fabric folding and realistic volume around the torso and arms.
Footwear: Low-cut white cotton crew socks with a soft knit texture.
Physicality: Confident self-assured posture. The body is positioned in a "torsion S-curve," kneeling on the floor with the torso rotated 180 degrees to face the mirror, highlighting the waist-to-hip ratio and symmetrical lower-body silhouette.
[Pose & Composition]
Geometry: Low-angle mirror-reflection framing. The subject is kneeling on a high-pile neutral-toned carpet.
Framing: Vertical orientation capturing the full lower-body geometry and the upper-body rotation.
Reflection Physics: Accurate rendering of the phone-to-hand contact point in the reflection, with the black smartphone held in a technical grip.
[Environment & Lighting]
Atmosphere: Minimalist modern bedroom setting.
Interior Details: Large white sliding closet doors with vertical metallic tracks; a secondary arched mirror is visible in the reflection. Neutral white walls and a light-beige textured carpet.
Lighting: Soft, top-down diffused lighting (3500K). The light source is positioned to emphasize the anatomical bust volume and the muscle definition in the legs without creating harsh shadows.
Background Integrity: All background elements, including the closet doors and wall seams, must remain in sharp focus and perfectly grid-aligned.
[Failure Prevention Rule]
```

**Related**: [[运动休闲]]、[[综合时尚]]、[[手绘素描]]

### 464. 原始高保真镜面自拍模拟

**作者**: [Dan Reed](https://x.com/daaaaanc/status/2015992961251623134)  **日期**: 2026-01-27  **语言**: en

> 一个高度技术性的提示，模拟使用 iPhone 17 Pro 传感器拍摄的原始、高保真镜面自拍，要求从前景到背景都具有锐利的焦点，精确的身份保留，以及不对称技术针织紧身连衣裙上逼真的纺织物理效果。

![原始高保真镜面自拍模拟](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769581962637_8ugv4b_G_o-6LVWsAA_bYg.jpg)

```
[Header] (9:16)
Raw high-fidelity photograph, iPhone 17 Pro sensor simulation, indoor ambient lighting, zero bokeh, SHARP focus from subject to background appliances, f/5.6 aperture for maximum structural clarity, subtle digital grain.
[Subject & Identity Locking]

Identity: Absolute preservation of Image A’s facial geometry (pixel-accurate chin shape and eye-spacing).
Hair Physics: Ultra-long layered straight hair with a high-gloss deep espresso finish. The hair must drape naturally over the shoulders and extend down the back, maintaining the strand-level detail and texture from Image A.
Bio-Fidelity: Detailed skin physics (visible micro-pores, satin-finish hydration). Clear rendering of the proximal limb geometry and upper-torso symmetry, emphasizing a realistic athletic-to-lean transition.
Expression: Mirror-selfie aesthetic; the face is partially obscured by the technical device to maintain the authentic composition of Image B.
[Outfit & Physicality]

Technical Description: High-impact {argument name="dress color" default="burgundy"} technical-knit bodycon mini-dress.
Textile Geometry: Asymmetrical neckline architecture. The left side features an off-the-shoulder drop-sleeve design, while the right side transitions into a full-length compression-fit sleeve.
Surface Physics: High-tensile material-to-skin surface compression. The prompt must specify the "micro-ribbed knit texture" to ensure the fabric interacts realistically with the body’s S-curve silhouette.
Physicality: Confident self-assured posture. The torso is angled to highlight the waist-to-hip ratio, with physical tension lines visible where the fabric stretches over the gluteal proportions and hips.
[Pose & Composition]

Geometry: Mirror-reflection framing. The subject is leaning with the left arm against a neutral-toned vertical surface, creating a "torsion" effect in the midsection.
Framing: Full-body vertical orientation. The right hand holds a smartphone with a "blue butterfly graphic" protective case, held at eye level.
Interaction: Precise material interaction between the leaning arm and the wall, showing realistic shoulder-joint displacement.
[Environment & Lighting]

Atmosphere: Domestic interior setting (hallway/kitchen transition).
Lighting: Soft, diffused indoor lighting. Light sources are positioned to cast natural shadows along the right side of the subject, emphasizing the anatomical bust volume and garment texture.
Background Integrity: High-detail domestic background. To the left, a white wall with electrical cabling; in the background, professional-grade built-in kitchen ovens and neutral cabinetry. Background elements must remain sharp and non-distorted.
[Failure Prevention Rule]

Command: Use "Asymmetrical technical-knit bodice" to prevent the AI from defaulting to a standard symmetrical long-sleeve dress.
Constraint: Explicitly require "Zero blurring of the kitchen appliances" and "Perfect grid-alignment of the floor and wall seams" to ensure backgr
```

(9:16 Ratio). Raw high-fidelity photograph, iPhone 17 Pro simulation, zero artificial bokeh, sharp focus from foreground to background, fine digital grain.

[Pose & Composition]

Framing: Full-body mirror selfie, eye-level focus. The black frame of the mirror is visible on the left edge.
[Environment & Lighting]
Atmosphere: Domestic walk-in closet environment with warm 3500K interior lighting.
Lighting: Direct overhead illumination creating soft highlights on the skin and defining the curl structure of the hair.
Background Integrity: High-detail depiction of a white modular storage system. A clothing rack is visible in the mid-ground holding a variety of dark and grey hoodies. The floor area features stacked shoeboxes (including {argument name="shoe brand color" default="red"} branding) and various footwear. All background elements remain in sharp, high-fidelity focus.

        "outfit": "A form-fitting {argument name="dress color" default="black"} sleeveless mini dress with a high neckline (turtleneck). Knee-high brown suede boots with high heels. Accessories include a small structured handbag held in the left hand and a bracelet on the wrist."
      },

> 一个详细的、照片级的提示，用于生成一张幽默的、广角的热带森林旅行自拍。它使用严格的面部身份锁定，并要求一只猕猴占据前景，看起来像是在自拍，表情惊讶，而一名女子则在背景中大笑，营造出一种抓拍的、超广角智能手机美学。

    "meta_data": {

      "task_type": "photoreal_travel_selfie_wide_angle_comedy",
      "version": "v1.0_MONKEY_SELFIE_JUNGLE_PATH_FACELOCK_SAFE_EN",
      "priority": "highest",
      "language": "en"
    },

    "references": {
      "reference_image_style": {

        "purpose": "STYLE_COMPOSITION_POSE_LIGHTING_ANCHOR",
        "strict_lock": true,
        "preserve_pose": true,
        "preserve_composition": true,

        "strict_lock": true,

        "no_identity_blending": true,

        "preserve_moles_freckles_scars": true,
        "preserve_eye_shape": true,
        "preserve_nose_shape": true,
        "preserve_lip_shape": true,
        "preserve_jawline": true

      "color_grade": "natural_daylight_warm_green",
      "dynamic_range": "natural_not_hdr",
      "skin_rendering": "real_texture_no_retouch"
    },

    "creative_prompt": {
      "scene_summary": "Create a photoreal travel selfie in a lush tropical forest. Setting: a narrow outdoor walkway/path with wet ground, dense green foliage, tall trees, and a humid jungle atmosphere.\n\nForeground: a macaque monkey extremely close to the camera lens, dominating the frame with a humorous wide-angle distortion. The monkey’s arm reaches forward as if it is taking the selfie. The monkey mouth is open in a funny surprised expression. Realistic fur detail, natural anatomy, no deformation.\n\nBackground: one adult woman behind the monkey, laughing with an open-mouth smile, both hands raised doing a double peace sign. Natural candid joy. Hair in a casual updo with soft bangs framing the face. Light summer outfit ({argument name="outfit color" default="white"} dress or top), minimal jewelry. One wrist has a simple yellow wristband (no readable text).\n\nCinematography: smartphone ultra-wide selfie look (14mm equivalent), close perspective, mild lens distortion, natural daylight, soft shadows, realistic skin texture, no heavy retouch, no beauty filter. Keep it fun and spontaneous, high realis"

> 一个为 Nano Banana Pro 撰写的叙事提示，描述了一个名叫 Sloane 的角色，在赶去地下仓库锐舞派对之前，穿着镀铬文胸和超短裤，在全身镜前拍了一张重要的自拍照，重点是闪光灯下全息材质的反射效果。

![仓库锐舞派对穿搭自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769322328888_lrbgsc_G_cvxzJXUAAuyxf.jpg)

```
Sloane is running 45 minutes late for the underground warehouse rave. She's supposed to be meeting the group outside, but she's still battling her outfit. After discarding two full looks onto the bedroom floor, she settles on the chrome bralette and micro shorts. This quick, full-length mirror selfie is the crucial moment: testing how the holographic material reflects the flash before she grabs her mesh coat and runs out the door, sweat already beading on her skin from the rush.
```

},

},
"pose": {
"type": "Standing rear-view mirror selfie pose.",
"orientation": "Body angled away from the camera (mirror surface), back turned towards the viewer.",
"head_position": "Head turned sharply over the left shoulder, looking directly into the mirror/camera lens.",
"arms": "Right arm raised holding a black smartphone to take the photo; left arm relaxed by the side.",
"spine_and_hips": "Natural standing posture with weight slightly shifted, emphasizing the curve of the lower back and glutes.",
"specifics": "Shoulder blades subtly visible due to the off-shoulder sweatshirt."
},
"environment": {
"setting": "Bright, modern bedroom interior.",
"elements": [
"Large vertical window on the left with black frame and white sill.",
"Large artificial fiddle leaf fig plant with broad green leaves positioned in front of the window.",
"Wooden dresser or chest of drawers in the background (right side) with a separate square mirror resting on it.",
"Corner of a bed with white linens visible in the lower right foreground.",
"Dark grey or brown carpeted flooring.",
"White walls."
]
},
"camera": {
"shot_type": "Mirror selfie, reflection shot.",
"perspective": "Eye-level relative to the reflection.",
"framing": "Medium shot capturing from the upper thighs to the top of the head.",
"device": "Black Apple iPhone with triple-lens camera system visible in the right hand, partially obscuring the face.",
"focal_length": "26mm equivalent (smartphone main camera).",
"depth_of_field": "Deep depth of field, background elements slightly softer but distinct."
},
"lighting": {
"source": "Natural daylight entering from the large window on the left.",
"quality": "Soft, diffused directional light illuminating the left side of the subject and casting soft shadows on the right side of the body.",
"shadows": "Natural contact shadows in clothing folds and on the right side of the torso/legs.",
"ambience": "Bright, airy, daytime interior illumination."
},
"mood_and_expression": {
"mood": "Casual, relaxed, confident.",
"expression": "Neutral to soft gaze, focused on the phone screen/reflection, partially hidden by th"
}}

### 483. 健身房镜面自拍，搭配蛇纹紧身裤美学

**作者**: [Lex](https://x.com/lexx_aura/status/2015053910575358071)  **日期**: 2026-01-24  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张在健身房更衣室里拍摄的逼真镜面自拍。主体是一位年轻、身材健美的女性，身穿灰色运动文胸和蛇皮纹高腰紧身裤。提示详细说明了姿势（臀部微翘，手持手机）、配饰（珠宝、腕带、纹身）以及柔和的室内照明，以实现高分辨率的社交媒体美学效果。

![健身房镜面自拍，搭配蛇纹紧身裤美学](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769322284173_kkoq43_G_bo14zW8AAh4nD.jpg)

```
{
  "subject": {
    "appearance": {
      "gender": "Female",
      "age_range": "Young adult (approx. 20s)",
      "hair": {
        "color": "Blonde with slightly darker roots",
        "style": "Long, straight, layered, falling over shoulders",
        "bangs": "Wispy curtain bangs framing the face"
      },
      "skin_tone": "Light/Fair",
      "facial_features": {
        "eyes": "Light blue or green",
        "expression": "Neutral, soft, slightly gazing away from the lens to the left",
        "makeup": "Natural/minimal, subtle blush, groomed brows"
      },
      "physique": "Athletic, toned, fit, curvaceous silhouette"
    },
    "pose": {
      "type": "Mirror selfie",
      "body_orientation": "Three-quarter turn to the left",
      "posture": "Standing with weight shifted to one hip (popped hip), creating an S-curve",
      "hands": {
        "right_hand": "Holding a smartphone up to capture the reflection",
        "left_hand": "Resting gently near the midriff/waist"
      }
    },
    "clothing": {
      "top": {
        "type": "Sports bra",
        "color": "{argument name="bra color" default="Light heather grey/off-white"}",
        "details": "Spaghetti straps, plunging neckline, ribbed texture"
      },
      "bottom": {
        "type": "High-waisted leggings",
        "color": "Light grey/blue and white",
        "pattern": "{argument name="leggings pattern" default="Snakeskin or animal print"}",
        "fit": "Tight, compression fit"
      },
      "accessories": {
        "jewelry": [
          "Thin silver or gold necklace",
          "Multiple silver rings on fingers",
          "Black and green thin wristbands/hair ties on left wrist",
          "Small tattoo on left forearm"
        ],
        "nails": "Dark red/burgundy polish, medium length"
      }
    }
  },
  "environment": {
    "setting": "Gym locker room or changing area",
    "background_elements": {
      "left": "Metal coat rack stand with a black puffer jacket and a black/green gym bag hanging (text 'FITNESS' visible inverted)",
      "floor": "Dark bench, light beige tiled flooring",
      "walls": "White textured plaster walls",
      "right": "Corner of a wall, glimpse of a doorway or hallway"
    }
  },
  "lighting": {
    "type": "Soft indoor ambient lighting",
    "direction": "Frontal/Overhead",
    "quality": "Diffused, creating soft highlights on the skin and hair, minimal harsh shadows"
  },
  "tech_specs": {
    "camera_angle": "Eye-level (via mirror)",
    "framing": "Medium shot (thighs up)",
    "device_visible": "iPhone with a white case and MagSafe ring, grey lanyard strap hanging down",
    "style": "Photorealistic, high-resolution social media aesthetic, candid lifestyle shot"
  }
}

### 484. 2x2 镜面自拍拼贴提示词

**作者**: [Link - Fuera de la Matriz](https://x.com/linkproia/status/2015020914212008410)  **日期**: 2026-01-24  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的提示，用于生成一张 2x2 拼贴画，内容是一个穿着蓝白碎花比基尼的角色在镜子前自拍。该提示详细说明了角色的外貌（编织的麻花辫、特定的面部特征）、服装、环境（带百叶门的更衣室），以及拼贴画中每个面板的四种不同姿势/表情。

![2x2 镜面自拍拼贴提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769322358620_398dcj_G_bK1wMWAAAwV3d.jpg)

```
{
  "metadata": {
    "task_type": "image_generation",
    "reference_lock": "strict",
    "output_quality": "photorealistic",
    "constraints": {
      "allow_face_change": false,
      "allow_body_change": false,
      "match_reference": true
    }
  },
  "technical_specs": {
    "layout_type": "collage",
    "grid_format": "2x2",
    "total_panels": 4,
    "aspect_ratio": "9:16",
    "visual_style": "mirror selfie"
  },
  "character_model": {
    "complexion": {
      "tone": "light–medium warm tan",
      "texture": "smooth",
      "finish": "slight sheen"
    },
    "facial_features": {
      "shape": "soft oval",
      "cheeks": "naturally full",
      "nose": "straight bridge, rounded tip",
      "lips": "full with cupid bow",
      "eyes": {
        "shape": "almond",
        "makeup": "winged liner, warm shadow",
        "lashes": "long"
      },
      "brows": "arched, medium-full"
    },
    "hair": {
      "color": "medium brown",
      "style": "two braided pigtails",
      "bangs": "straight fringe",
      "accessory": "black sunglasses resting on head"
    }
  },
  "wardrobe": {
    "swimwear": {
      "type": "bikini",
      "cut": "triangle top, low-rise bottom",
      "pattern": "blue with white floral print",
      "details": "yellow edging and ties"
    },
    "footwear": "yellow open-toe sandals with ankle strap",
    "jewelry": [
      "large gold hoop earrings"
    ],
    "handheld_props": {
      "phone": {
        "case_color": "light pink",
        "features": "square dual-camera bump"
      }
    }
  },
  "environment": {
    "setting": "indoor dressing room / bedroom",
    "elements": {
      "background": "white louvered closet doors",
      "floor": "beige carpet",
      "mirror": "full-length with thin gold frame"
    },
    "lighting": {
      "type": "soft indoor",
      "tone": "neutral-warm",
      "shadows": "minimal"
    }
  },
  "composition_panels": [
    {
      "panel_id": 1,
      "pose_description": "deep squat, chin resting on fist",
      "expression": "pout"
    },
    {
      "panel_id": 2,

      "expression": "neutral"
    },
    {

      "expression": "playful"
    },
    {

    }
  ]
}

### 485. 超逼真自拍提示词（日式餐厅和浴室）

**作者**: [行者AI视频](https://x.com/joshesye/status/2014984983937773951)  **日期**: 2026-01-24  **语言**: zh

> 两个独立的逼真自拍提示。第一个提示生成一张在日本餐厅拍摄的温馨私密镜面自拍，重点突出特定的服装、配饰和温暖的室内照明。第二个提示生成一张在昏暗浴室中拍摄的高对比度、闪光灯照明的镜面自拍，强调真实手机闪光灯摄影特有的镜头光晕和高对比度。

![超逼真自拍提示词（日式餐厅和浴室）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769322345191_42gws2_G_ao5JBaUAECgmu.jpg)
![超逼真自拍提示词（日式餐厅和浴室）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769322345369_mvs0dv_G_ao5JjXcAAJoxz.jpg)
![超逼真自拍提示词（日式餐厅和浴室）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769322345274_oma0kn_G_ao5JAaAAA0O0u.jpg)
![超逼真自拍提示词（日式餐厅和浴室）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769322346335_p29tek_G_apYBEbUAApT-c.jpg)

```
1、照片级真实感，特写自拍，第一人称视角。
一位年轻女性在日式餐厅对镜自拍，背景是悬挂手写菜单木牌的木质墙壁。
她身穿露肩奶油色刺绣上衣，佩戴显眼绿色大手镯，手持橙色iPhone，正微微舔上唇并看向镜头。
光线为温暖的室内环境光，面部有柔和粉调光晕，带轻微美颜柔焦效果。色彩以暖橙、奶油白、深草木绿为主，搭配木色与深棕。突出上衣面料、木墙纹理及手机质感。画面氛围温暖私密，如真实的居酒屋自拍。高清，细节丰富。

2、写实摄影，镜面自拍，垂直构图，中景。一位年轻女性在灰色瓷砖浴室对镜自拍，身穿纹理白色抹胸与白裙。画面核心是手机相机闪光造成的强烈镜头光斑和高光，明亮照亮人物及镜中手机反射，与昏暗的浴室环境（含马桶、深色门）形成高对比。镜中清晰反射人物长发、专注表情及手持手机的姿态。色彩以白、深灰、黑为主，辅以暖米、浅灰。带有低光环境下闪光的轻微颗粒感。强调真实手机拍摄的闪光效果与镜面构图。高清，细节丰富。
```

### 486. 高对比度编辑肖像照，具有身份锁定功能

**作者**: [Nano banana pro🍌](https://x.com/Vishnudxe/status/2014947903345983676)  **日期**: 2026-01-24  **语言**: en

> 一个用于编辑肖像的图像生成提示，严格根据上传的自拍照片锁定身份，确保精确的相似度和自然的皮肤纹理，不进行美化。该提示指定了中景特写、低角度、高对比度的明暗对照（chiaroscuro）照明，以及充满活力的橙色/红色调色板，旨在营造严肃、强烈和电影感的视觉效果。

![高对比度编辑肖像照，具有身份锁定功能](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769322301809_vgm1zm_G_aIcJkboAARme9.jpg)
![高对比度编辑肖像照，具有身份锁定功能](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769322301783_vzu6t5_G_aIcDubAAUCglZ.jpg)

```
Editorial portrait from the attached reference photo, photorealistic. Use uploaded selfie as ONLY face reference. Identity lock: exact likeness, facial geometry/proportions, natural skin texture. No beautification. Keep clothing style, color, material, and fit identical to the reference. Medium close-up (face and shoulders), low angle looking up (heroic/dominant perspective), sharp focus on face/eyes.Serious, intense, focused expression, gaze directed upward and away from camera (beyond the frame). Dramatic saturated studio lighting, high-contrast chiaroscuro with deep shadows, vibrant oranges and deep reds palette, strong rim light creating a halo separation. Solid studio backdrop, rich orange-red smooth gradient, pattern-free, hot radiant atmosphere. High skin texture fidelity (pores visible), 8k, portrait aspect ratio, cinematic lighting, 4:5.
```

**Related**: [[奇幻世界]]、[[修复与增强]]

### 487. Sydney Sweeney 0.5 倍自拍拼贴

**作者**: [Nano banana pro🍌](https://x.com/Vishnudxe/status/2014925023413444990)  **日期**: 2026-01-24  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的 JSON 提示，用于 Nano Banana Pro 生成一个 2x2 网格拼贴画，内容为西德尼·斯威尼（Sydney Sweeney）的自拍照。这些自拍照使用超广角镜头（0.5 倍 / 鱼眼效果）拍摄，捕捉了 Z 世代随性社交媒体分享的美学，并展现了特定的表情和一件石灰绿色亮片连衣裙。

![Sydney Sweeney 0.5 倍自拍拼贴](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769322330336_l2wdw7_G_ZzoT7aYAAc4Mu.jpg)

```
{
  "image_structure": {
    "format": "2x2 Grid Collage",
    "total_panels": 4,
    "layout_style": "Four distinct 0.5x wide-angle selfies arranged in a square grid",
    "aspect_ratio": "Square (1:1) or 4:5 overall ratio containing four vertical 3:4 images"
  },
  "global_style_settings": {
    "camera_effect": "0.5x Ultra-wide angle lens / Fisheye effect",
    "perspective": "High-angle selfie with arm distortion (arms appear elongated and large in foreground)",
    "lighting": "Indoor ambient overhead light mixed with front-facing phone screen flash (bright, slightly cool toned)",
    "aesthetic": "Gen Z candid social media dump, chaotic fairy vibes"
  },
  "subject_universal_details": {
    "demographics": "Young woman, approx 20 years old, Caucasian",
    "skin": "Fair/Pale complexion with cool pink undertones, very smooth skin texture",
    "hair": "Dirty blonde/light brown roots transitioning to blonde lengths, styled in a messy high bun (topknot) with loose face-framing wispy strands",
    "outfit": "Lime green/Chartreuse mini dress covered in large circular sequins, thin spaghetti straps",
    "accessories": [
      "Large translucent light green fairy wings with glittery vein details",
      "Black plastic tattoo-style choker necklace"
    ],
    "makeup": "Heavy black winged eyeliner (cat eye), subtle mascara, highlighter on the tip of the nose, rosy pink blush on high cheekbones, glossy mauve/pink natural lip color"
  },
  "panel_breakdown": {
    "top_left_panel": {
      "expression": "Playful, tongue sticking out flat",
      "gaze": "Looking directly into camera",
      "pose": "Head slightly tilted, both arms extended forward towards lens",
      "specific_detail": "Tongue is extended downwards, eyes wide open"
    },
    "top_right_panel": {
      "expression": "Duck face / Pouty lips",
      "gaze": "Looking straight at camera",
      "pose": "Chest forward, shoulders up, arms framing the body",
      "specific_detail": "Lips pursued together, innocent expression"
    },
    "bottom_left_panel": {
      "expression": "Winking (Left eye closed, Right eye open), subtle pout",
      "gaze": "Right eye looking at camera",
      "pose": "Head tilted to her right, leaning slightly back",
      "specific_detail": "One eye scrunched closed tight, jawline defined"
    },
    "bottom_right_panel": {
      "expression": "Winking (Left eye closed, Right eye open), exaggerated kissy face",
      "gaze": "Right eye looking at camera",
      "pose": "Head tilted to her left, body angled slightly",
      "specific_detail": "Lips puckered forward for a kiss, eyebrows slightly raised"
    }
  },
  "background_environment": {
    "location": "Suburban living room",
    "furniture": "Dark grey fabric sectional sofa (visible behind her in all shots)",
    "architecture": "White staircase with banister rails visible in background (top left and bottom left specifically)",
    "decor": "Wooden vertical "
  }
}

      "pose": "Chest forward, shoulders up, arms framing the body",
      "specific_detail": "Lips pursued together, innocent expression"
    },

      "gaze": "Looking straight at camera",
      "pose": "Head tilted to her right, leaning slightly back",
      "specific_detail": "One eye scrunched closed tight, jawline defined"
    },
    "bottom_right_panel": {
      "expression": "Winking (Left eye closed, Right eye open), exaggerated kissy face",
      "gaze": "Looking straight at camera",
      "pose": "Head tilted to her left, body angled slightly",
      "specific_detail": "Lips puckered forward for a kiss, eyebrows slightly raised"
    }

        },

        },

**作者**: [timedoctor.eth](https://x.com/timedoctor_nft/status/2014579355691765956)  **日期**: 2026-01-23  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细、结构化的提示，专为超现实主义肖像画设计。它指定了一个主角在粗野主义混凝土房间中的中景镜头，周围环绕着轨道运行的镀铬球体和镜面碎片，以可视化“无尽的创意”。该提示包含了关于灯光、纹理（柯达 Vision3 500T 胶片颗粒）、构图、主体外观和服装的广泛细节，旨在呈现出高端的实用效果，而非数字叠加。

![精神轨道：超现实主义肖像画](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769235984029_webw6u_G_U5P0UWwAAYWGO.jpg)
![精神轨道：超现实主义肖像画](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769235984138_214mem_G_U5PwMXwAAAf15.jpg)

```
{
  "vibe_title_en": "The Mental Orbit",
  "master_prompt": "A hyper-realistic medium shot of The Protagonist standing in a cavernous, dimly lit brutalist concrete chamber. The concept is 'Endless Ideas' visualized as a surreal kinetic sculpture. The subject is surrounded by dozens of floating, chrome spheres and jagged mirror fragments of varying sizes that orbit their head like a planetary ring. These objects must look like high-end practical effects, with realistic weight and reflection, not digital overlays. The subject gazes intensely at a single crystal prism hovering just above their open palm, which refracts a spectrum of light onto their face. Shot on a Hasselblad H6D-100c with an 80mm f/2.8 lens. The lighting is moody and directional, creating deep shadows and bright specular highlights on the chrome surfaces. Texture is rich with film grain (Kodak Vision3 500T), emphasizing the contrast between the smooth metal and the porous skin texture of the subject. No neon, just cold tungsten and daylight tones.",
  "meta": {
    "intent": "Surrealist Portraiture",
    "priorities": "Photorealism, Physicality of Surreal Elements, Texture",
    "device_profile": "High-Resolution Cinema Display"
  },
  "frame": {
    "aspect": "4:5",
    "composition": "Center-weighted subject with chaotic orbital elements filling the negative space",
    "layout": "Symmetrical subject anchoring asymmetrical floating props",
    "camera_angle": "Eye-level",
    "tilt_roll_degrees": "0"
  },
  "subject": {
    "gender": "Female",
    "identity": "The Intellectual Protagonist",
    "demographics": "Universal/Ageless",
    "face": "Neutral, highly focused gaze, micro-expressions of wonder",
    "hair": "Natural texture, slightly windblown by the static energy of the room",
    "body": "Static posture, hands raised slightly to interact with levitating objects",
    "expression": "Intense concentration, mouth slightly parted",
    "pose": "Standing still, resembling a conductor of the floating elements"
  },
  "wardrobe_accessories": {
    "garments": [
      {
        "item": "Turtleneck Sweater",
        "material": "Fine Cashmere or Merino Wool",
        "color": "{argument name="sweater color" default="Charcoal Grey or Deep Navy"}",
        "fit": "Fitted, textured"
      },
      {
        "item": "Tailored Trousers",
        "material": "Wool Blend",
        "color": "Black",
        "fit": "Straight leg"
      }
    ],
    "accessories": [
      {
        "item": "None",
        "color": "N/A",
        "material": "N/A",
        "brand_style": "Minimalist"
      }
    ]
  },
  "environment": {
    "setting": "Brutalist Concrete Chamber (Void Space)",
    "surfaces": "Raw concrete, polished chrome, glass shards",
    "depth": "Deep background fading into shadow, sharp focus on subject and immediate floating objects",

### 499. 逼真的健身房镜子自拍（结构化 JSON）

**作者**: [KeorUnreal](https://x.com/KeorUnreal/status/2014091052764758102)  **日期**: 2026-01-21  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细、结构化的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张逼真的健身房镜子自拍照。它指定了构图（后方四分之三背部视角）、拍摄对象的特征（健美身材、黑色头发、特定服装如黄色短款上衣和绿色短裤）以及现代健身房环境。该提示旨在实现高技术质量、清晰对焦和休闲自信的运动后氛围。

![逼真的健身房镜子自拍（结构化 JSON）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769063162837_jpq584_G_N9IGRWcAAqVmZ.jpg)

![逼真的健身房镜子自拍（结构化 JSON）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769063162573_utftys_G_N9IL4WEAAX3l8.jpg)
![逼真的健身房镜子自拍（结构化 JSON）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769063164262_idbkts_G_N9IRPXUAAtuc8.jpg)

```
{
  "prompt_type": "photorealistic gym mirror selfie",
  "main_composition": "rear three-quarter back view mirror selfie of a single young woman standing confidently in a modern gym on a green turf area, holding her iPhone in right hand for the photo with reflection showing her front and subtle neutral expression, relaxed casual pose with slight hip tilt and weight on one leg emphasizing athletic curves, bright indoor lighting with cardio machines and large windows in background",
  "subject": {
    "description": "beautiful young woman in her early 20s, attractive feminine features with light natural makeup (defined eyeliner, long lashes, subtle contour, glossy lips), large expressive eyes visible in mirror reflection, fair tanned smooth skin with healthy glow and athletic toned hourglass figure",
    "clothing": "fitted yellow long-sleeve crop top with thumb holes and subtle texture, high-waisted seamless green lime athletic shorts with ruched scrunch detail at back and small white branding on waistband, white crew socks pulled mid-calf, clean white low-top athletic sneakers",
    "details": "long loose wavy black hair styled in a high ponytail with natural volume and loose face-framing strands, subtle confident neutral expression in mirror reflection looking at phone, manicured neutral nails visible holding phone with colorful patterned case (white with black splatter or abstract design), relaxed stance with natural body confidence"
  },
  "environment": {
    "foreground": "green artificial turf gym mat area underfoot",
    "midground": "large gym mirror reflecting full front view and phone details",
    "background": "modern spacious gym with rows of black cardio machines (ellipticals with digital screens), one with white towel draped over handle, large windows allowing night light with blurred outdoor view, clean professional fitness center atmosphere"
  },
  "lighting_and_atmosphere": "bright even indoor gym lighting with natural night light from large windows creating soft warm glow on skin, hair, teal fabric, and glossy phone case, subtle sheen on leggings and sneaker details, casual confident post-workout vibe with high contrast between colorful outfit and dark equipment, photorealistic detail",
  "technical_quality": "highly detailed, sharp focus on subject with realistic fabric textures (long-sleeve crop stretch, seamless shorts shine), hair movement, skin glow, phone case pattern, and mirror reflection accuracy, 8k resolution, professional mirror selfie photography style with natural depth of field softly blurring distant machines and windows",
  "negative_prompt_suggestions": "blurry, deformed, extra limbs, phone screen visible, mirror distortion or misalignment, overexposed windows, underexposed outfit details, low quality, cartoon, anime, text watermark, extra peo
```

![豪华健身房中的双人明星镜面自拍提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769063193218_48fktn_G_MsznXbgAEo5s-.jpg)

```
A high-quality, ultra-realistic mirror selfie captured in a luxury modern fitness center. The composition shows two young women posing together, showcasing their athletic physique from the back. On the left, a character with the likeness of Sydney Sweeney, featuring her signature blonde hair tied in a messy high ponytail, wearing a bright emerald green tight-fitting long-sleeve athletic crop top. On the right, a character with the likeness of Natalia Dyer (Nancy), with wavy brunette hair pulled back, wearing a soft lemon-yellow racerback sports bra. Both women are styled in identical bubblegum pink high-waisted seamless scrunch leggings that emphasize their form, paired with clean white athletic crew socks. The background is filled with professional gym equipment including a row of treadmills and weight stations. The atmosphere is cinematic, featuring industrial-style ceiling pipes and vibrant neon blue and purple ambient lighting. Shot in 8k resolution, capturing skin textures and realistic fabric details.
```

    "device_type": "smartphone rear camera",
    "angle": "slightly high eye-level",
    "shot_type": "medium full-body mirror selfie",
    "lens": "wide smartphone lens"
  },

  "lighting": {
    "type": "soft indoor ambient lighting",
    "shadows": "soft natural shadows"
  },

  "subject": {
    "face": {
      "shape": "oval",
      "skin_tone": "light warm beige with pink undertones",
      "texture": "smooth youthful skin",
      "expression": "gentle closed-mouth smile",
      "eyes": "almond-shaped dark brown eyes with light makeup"
    },

    "hair": {
      "color": "{argument name="hair color" default="light blonde"}" with darker roots",
      "style": "high ponytail with braided sections",
      "accessory": "purple bow hair tie"
    },

    "body": {
      "build": "athletic, toned",
      "pose": "hip slightly pushed to the side",
      "arms": {
        "left": "holding phone",
        "right": "hand behind head"
      }
    },

    "outfit": {
      "type": "gymnastics leotard",
      "color": "{argument name="leotard color" default="deep royal blue"}" with metallic sheen",
      "design": "sleeveless high-neck",
      "details": "plain leotard with no text, no logos, no symbols"
    }
  },

  "background": {
    "location": "indoor hallway or hotel corridor",
    "elements": ["full-length mirror", "neutral walls"],
    "depth": "slight background blur"
  },

  "mood": "confident, youthful, athletic",
  "style": "hyper-realistic lifestyle portrait",

  "negative_prompt": [
    "text",
    "logos",
    "letters",
    "symbols",
    "watermarks",
    "mirrored text",
    "reversed text",
    "cartoon",
    "anime",
    "distorted anatomy",
    "extra limbs",
    "blur"
  ]
}

**作者**: [Lex](https://x.com/katmanai/status/2013768242368582064)  **日期**: 2026-01-21  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的提示，用于生成一张年轻女性情绪化夜间街头肖像自拍。它指定了诱惑而忧郁的表情、私密的低光都市氛围、特定的灯光效果（温暖的钠灯街灯光芒与清冷的月光混合，金色轮廓光），以及带有颗粒感和暖色调的复古手机相机美学，强调超详细的皮肤纹理和自然的瑕疵。

{
  "main_prompt": "moody nighttime street portrait selfie of a stunning young woman in her late teens to early 20s with fair-to-light olive skin and natural dewy glow, long silky straight dark brown hair with soft waves cascading over shoulders, subtle natural makeup with defined brows, dark winged eyeliner, long lashes, glossy nude-pink lips in soft pout, seductive melancholic expression with half-lidded eyes gazing directly at camera, finger gently touching her lower lip in teasing pose, wearing oversized loose gray hoodie or jacket with hood down, intimate low-light urban night vibe: dimly lit street background with blurred city lights, trees and pavement at night, warm sodium streetlamp glow mixing with cool moonlight and subtle flash fill, golden hour-like rim light on hair and cheekbones from side, soft lens flare and light leaks in corners, vintage phone camera aesthetic with slight grain, vignette edges and warm orange color cast, photorealistic, ultra-detailed skin texture with realistic pores, freckles and natural imperfections, individual hair strands catching light, cinematic color grading with warm skin tones, deep shadows and muted contrast, shot on iPhone in night mode portrait with flash, shallow depth of field focus on face and hand with soft bokeh on background street, dreamy intimate late-night energy, raw unfiltered urban fantasy vibe, high fashion editorial meets candid street selfie aesthetic --ar 3:4 --stylize 250 --v 6 --q 2",
  "negative_prompt": "blurry, lowres, deformed hands, extra fingers, fused fingers, bad anatomy, poorly drawn face, bad proportions, extra limbs, mutated hands, ugly, disfigured, tiling, out of frame, jpeg artifacts, signature, watermark, text, error, cropped badly, worst quality, low quality, cartoon, 3d render, plastic skin, doll-like, airbrushed skin, overexposed flash, harsh shadows, pale skin, heavy makeup overload, instagram face, duck lips, smiling happy expression, elderly, child, male, group shot, bright daylight, indoor setting, clean minimalist background, no finger on lip, desaturated colors, cold blue tones, synthetic look, perfect symmetrical face, no grain, modern high-res filter, visible phone in frame, deformed reflection, cluttered foreground",
  "style_tags": [
    "photorealistic",
    "nighttime urban selfie",
    "finger on lip teasing pose",
    "moody low-light street aesthetic",
    "warm sodium + cool moonlight mix",
    "raw candid energy",
    "cinematic warm grading",
    "film grain and light leaks",
    "dreamy melancholic expression",
    "high fashion meets street vibe",
    "intimate late-night fantasy"
  ],
  "technical": {
    "aspect_ratio": "3:4 or 9:16 (vertical phone selfie style)",
    "lighting": "warm sodium streetlamp (~2800K) from side creating golden rim light on hair/cheek, cool moonlight fill from above, subtle phone flash adding soft highlights on face/lips, soft shadows accentuating features, lens flare and light leaks subtle",
}

### 514. 身穿黑色服装的金发女性的三种变体

**作者**: [Isha 🪡](https://x.com/Isha8x/status/2013566030719729863)  **日期**: 2026-01-20  **语言**: en

> 一组三个不同的图像生成提示，旨在创建一位金发碧眼、身穿黑衣的年轻女性的不同版本，在保持主体核心外观的同时，将场景和风格在阳光明媚的花园、黄金时段的城市屋顶和专业影棚拍摄之间进行戏剧性转换。

![身穿黑色服装的金发女性的三种变体](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768977333629_uw0roo_G_GfnrzWYAAUOLj.jpg)

```
{
"action": "image_generation",
"action_input": "{ "prompt": "A high-quality, realistic full-body shot of a young woman with blonde hair and blue eyes, wearing a stylish black outfit. She is standing in a lush, sunlit garden surrounded by vibrant flowers and greenery. The lighting is soft and natural, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. The composition is artistic and well-balanced, focusing on her serene expression and the beautiful outdoor setting." }",
"thought": "The user wants to generate different images based on the provided photos. I will create a prompt that captures the essence of the woman's appearance (blonde hair, blue eyes) and her style (black clothing) but places her in a completely new, high-quality setting like a sunlit garden to provide a 'different' image as requested."
}
{
"action": "image_generation",
"action_input": "{ "prompt": "A cinematic, high-resolution portrait of a young woman with blonde hair and striking blue eyes. She is wearing an elegant black evening dress and is posed in a modern, minimalist urban rooftop setting during the golden hour. The city skyline is visible in the background with soft bokeh. The lighting is dramatic and warm, highlighting her features and the texture of the dress." }",
"thought": "For the second variation, I'll change the environment to a modern urban rooftop at sunset. This maintains the character's core look but offers a different mood and background compared to the original indoor and hayfield settings."
}
{
"action": "image_generation",
"action_input": "{ "prompt": "A professional studio photography shot of a young woman with blonde hair tied in a bun and blue eyes. She is wearing a sleek, black athletic zip-up top. The background is a clean, neutral grey. The lighting is sharp and professional, emphasizing the contours of her face and the fit of the clothing. High detail, 8k resolution." }",
"thought": "For the third image, I will focus on a studio setting that mirrors the 'selfie' style of the first image but elevates it to a professional photography level. This provides a clean, focused alternative while staying true to the visual elements found in the source images."
}
```

### 519. 超逼真网红比基尼姿势

**作者**: [Mikasa](https://x.com/Mikasa_rose729/status/2013485416582664350)  **日期**: 2026-01-20  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张照片般逼真的图像：一位身材曼妙的女性，身穿白色褶皱比基尼，坐在一栋高档热带度假别墅的白色沙发上。该提示使用 ControlNet 参数（dw_pose, zoe_depth）来精确控制姿势和体积保留，旨在营造一种网红生活方式的美学。

![超逼真网红比基尼姿势](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768977271112_agkoli_G_FWTydW4AAn8Z-.jpg)

```
{
  "subject": {
    "physique": "Fit curvaceous woman, tan skin, defined waist, soft texture, prominent bust volume",
    "face": "Oval shape, wavy dirty-blonde hair, neutral expression, direct gaze, minimal makeup",
    "apparel": "White smocked crinkle bikini, bandeau top, detached puff sleeves, side-tie bottom",
    "accessories": "Gold hoop earrings, delicate pendant necklace"
  },
  "composition": {
    "pose": "Seated on white sofa, body angled right, legs bent diagonal, hands resting, head forward",
    "framing": "Medium shot, knees up, eye-level, centered, 50mm focal length, 3:4 vertical",
    "environment": "Upscale tropical resort villa, glass sliding doors, palm trees background, wood beam ceiling"
  },
  "rendering": {
    "style": "Photorealistic influencer lifestyle, raw texture, 8k, natural high-key daylight",
    "tech_specs": {
      "res": "8k",
      "iso": "low",
      "light": "diffuse backlight, soft shadows"
    },
    "control_net": {
      "dw_pose": { "weight": 1.0, "goal": "skeletal_lock" },
      "zoe_depth": { "weight": 0.8, "goal": "volumetric_preservation" }
    }
  },
  "negative_constraints": [
    "anatomy normalization",
    "reduced chest volume",
    "flattened depth",
    "skin smoothing",
    "plastic texture",
    "aesthetic proportion correction",
    "mirror selfies",
    "wide-angle distortion"
  ]
}
```

    "background": "creepy gym with dim red/purple ambient lighting, blurred cardio machines and weight equipment, exposed ceiling ducts and pipes, clean spacious professional fitness center atmosphere but in upside down style with suspended particles on air, and an eerie, oppressive silence",

  "lighting_and_atmosphere": "dim moody indoor gym lighting with cool red/purple neon accents and overhead spots, subtle highlights on skin, hair, and shiny leggings fabric creating vibrant color pops, energetic confident workout vibe with high contrast between bright outfits and dark surroundings, photorealistic detail",

**作者**: [Sharon Riley](https://x.com/Just_sharon7/status/2013455695811879119)  **日期**: 2026-01-20  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细、结构化的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张自信年轻女性在豪华健身房中拍摄的超逼真 8K 镜面自拍，重点突出健美的身材比例、具体的服装（短款运动衫、骑行短裤）和电影级的灯光效果。

![逼真的健身房镜子自拍提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768977314986_lozzdu_G_E7Rw6XQAA5e8q.jpg)

```
{
  "prompt": "A confident young woman taking a mirror selfie in a luxurious modern gym, full-body shot, athletic curvy hourglass figure with a very defined waist and prominent rounded glutes, standing in a side-angle pose to highlight curves. Long high ponytail, natural-looking makeup with glossy lips. Wearing an oversized loose {argument name="top color" default="white"} cropped sweatshirt and tight black high-waisted seamless biker shorts. Pink over-ear wireless headphones (Sony or AirPods Max style). Holding an iPhone while taking the selfie. Bright, spacious, high-end gym interior with large mirrors, abundant natural light, cardio machines and weight equipment in the background. Clean aesthetic, photorealistic, sharp details, 8k resolution, professional smartphone selfie photography, natural skin texture, soft cinematic lighting.",
  "negative_prompt": "blurry, low resolution, overprocessed skin, unrealistic body proportions, extra limbs, distorted hands, distorted face, harsh flash, cluttered background, text, watermark, logo",
  "style": "photorealistic",
  "camera": {
    "type": "smartphone",
    "perspective": "mirror selfie",
    "shot": "full body",
    "angle": "side angle"
  },
  "lighting": "soft cinematic natural light",
  "environment": "luxury modern gym",
  "quality": {
    "resolution": "8k",
    "detail": "high",
    "sharpness": "high"
  }
}
```

### 523. 夜间自拍闪光灯编辑人像

**作者**: [Özge Döner](https://x.com/astronomerozge1/status/2013350554542498168)  **日期**: 2026-01-19  **语言**: en

> 一个高度具体的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张超逼真的特写自拍肖像，该肖像在夜间使用手机直闪拍摄，呈现出一种自然但具有编辑感的风格。它强制要求严格锁定面部身份，详细描述了拍摄对象的特征（乌黑的头发，珍珠头链），并指定了灯光和背景（昏暗的休息室，散景高光）。

![夜间自拍闪光灯编辑人像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768890662377_5diu24_G_DbnLqWoAAEqSM.jpg)

```
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "tool": "NanoBanana Pro",
      "task_type": "photoreal_selfie_flash_nightlife_editorial",
      "version": "v1.0_PEARL_HEADCHAIN_SELFIE_FLASH_NO_AI_LOOK_NO_TEXT",
      "priority": "highest"
    },

    "references": {
      "reference_image_1": {
        "source": "UPLOAD_REFERENCE_IMAGE (OPTIONAL)",
        "purpose": "FACE_IDENTITY_AND_GLAM_STYLE_LOCK",
        "strict_lock": true,
        "face_similarity_priority": "MAX",
        "no_identity_blending": true,
        "no_beautify": true,
        "no_age_shift": true,
        "preserve_skin_texture": true,
        "preserve_facial_proportions": true,
        "preserve_expression": true
      }
    },

    "output_settings": {
      "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
      "orientation": "portrait",
      "resolution_target": "ultra_high_res",
      "render_style": "flash_candid_editorial",
      "sharpness": "flash_crisp_face_soft_background",
      "film_grain": "subtle_35mm",
      "color_grade": "warm_night_flash_neutral_skin",
      "dynamic_range": "natural_not_hdr",
      "skin_rendering": "real_texture_editorial_finish"
    },

    "creative_prompt": {
      "scene_summary": "Ultra-photorealistic close-up selfie portrait at night with direct phone flash. A glamorous young woman with long straight jet-black hair looks into the camera with a confident, slightly pouty expression. She wears an intricate pearl-and-crystal head chain (net pattern) draped over the hairline with small dangling drops, plus long pearl drop earrings. Outfit is an elegant ivory shimmer halter dress with modest coverage and realistic fabric folds. The overall look is luxury nightlife, candid but editorial, with clean skin texture and perfect facial structure.",

      "environment": {
        "location": "dim indoor-outdoor lounge / villa entrance at night",
        "background": "dark wood beams, soft ambient practical lights, shallow depth of field, bokeh highlights",
        "lighting": "dominant direct phone flash as key, minimal ambient fill, realistic specular highlights on pearls"
      },

      "subject": {
        "appearance": {
          "hair": "long straight black hair, glossy but natural, visible strands, no waxy look",
          "makeup": "soft glam, sharp eyeliner, defined brows, subtle blush, glossy nude lips, realistic pores",
          "skin": "real skin texture, no smoothing, no plastic finish"
        },
        "accessories": {
          "headpiece": "pearl-and-crystal lattice head chain, symmetrical net pattern across the top of the head, small dangling pearl drops at the forehead and sides, realistic sparkle",
          "earrings": "long pearl drop earrings, elegant, realistic reflections"
        },
        "wardrobe": {
          "dress": "ivory shimmer halter dress, elegant neckline, modest coverage, realistic drape and micro-glitter"
        },
        "pose": "selfie angle, arms extended toward camera, shoulders relax"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

### 526. 原始高对比度镜面自拍（iPhone 超广角）

**作者**: [Dan Reed](https://x.com/daaaaanc/status/2013288064559231174)  **日期**: 2026-01-19  **语言**: en

> 一个极其详细的提示，用于生成一张原始、高对比度的镜面自拍，使用模拟 iPhone 超广角镜头。它强调“TrueLens”生物保真度、激进的解剖学塑形、科技面料上的压缩痕迹，以及一个完全清晰、未经修饰的居家背景。

![原始高对比度镜面自拍（iPhone 超广角）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768890641374_zs7ye3_G_Ci0ozWMAQBspT.jpg)

```
(Vertical 9:16 smartphone aspect ratio). A raw, high-contrast [Candid Mirror Documentation] captured with an iPhone 17 Pro using the 0.5x ultra-wide-angle lens. NO ARTIFICIAL BOKEH. Every focal plane remains SHARP and in focus from the subject's skin to the distant wardrobe textures.
Subject & Identity Locking:
•Identity: Strictly preserve the exact face and unique features of the woman in Image 1 (Selfie).
•Bio-Fidelity: Render high-fidelity "TrueLens" biological physics: visible micro-pores, a natural "satin-finish" night hydration glow, and fine vellus hair catching the light ONLY along the jawline. Her lower limbs show a healthy, smooth, and radiant surface texture.
•Silhouette Calibration (MAXIMUM UFF-FACTOR): Prioritize a dominant structural upper-torso volume and substantial, thick-toned anatomical depth in the lower extremities. Focus on an aggressive architectural tapering at the midsection to maximize the S-curve geometry and fit, symmetrical proportions.
Outfit & Textural Interaction:
•Clothing: A high-density matte-black strapless compressed textile bodice paired with a high-tension {argument name="skirt pattern" default="leopard-print"} technical mini-skirt featuring an adjustable cinch-drawstring on the lateral thigh.
•Tension: The technical fabrics exhibit extreme mechanical tension and a vacuum-tight fit, creating realistic textural expansion, skin-to-textile indentations, and "compression lines" where the materials contour to her fit silhouette.
•Detail: A small minimalist architectural ink marking is visible on the interior aspect of the right wrist.
Pose & Composition:
•Pose: A straight-on frontal mirror composition. She is standing with a bilateral hip-pop and an arched spine to maximize the visual impact of her fit, symmetrical 3D volume and lower-body prominence.
•Action: Her LEFT HAND holds a smartphone with a patterned protective casing, capturing the full-body "fit-check" reflection.
Environment & Social Realism:
•Lighting: Direct indoor illumination creating high-contrast specular highlights and deep, defining shadows that amplify her 3D form.
•Background (SHARP): A detailed domestic interior showing uncurated realism. A white faux-fur rug on light wood-grain flooring, a beige wardrobe with vertical structural lines, and a minimalist white wall are all perfectly IN FOCUS. No artificial blur.
Quality: Raw unedited social-media dump aesthetic, high dynamic range, visible digital grain in the deep shadows (ISO 800 style), 8k resolution. Everything is sharp, detailed, and physically real.
```

### 527. 超逼真健身房镜子自拍提示（iPhone 17 Pro 模拟）

**作者**: [Dan Reed](https://x.com/daaaaanc/status/2013280839228866742)  **日期**: 2026-01-19  **语言**: en

> 这是一个为 Gemini Nano Banana Pro 设计的高度技术性提示，旨在模拟使用超广角 iPhone 17 Pro 镜头拍摄的原始、高对比度健身房镜子自拍。它要求极高的生物保真度、所有平面上的锐利焦点（无散景）、强烈的解剖学渐变，以及服装和皮肤上逼真的纹理细节，以达到未经编辑的社交媒体随手发帖美学。

![超逼真健身房镜子自拍提示（iPhone 17 Pro 模拟）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768890706556_m6fybh_G_CcP-yXYAEMd4u.jpg)

```
(Vertical 9:16 smartphone aspect ratio). A raw, high-contrast [Gym Interior Mirror Capture] taken with an iPhone 17 Pro using the 0.5x ultra-wide-angle lens. NO ARTIFICIAL BOKEH. Every focal plane remains SHARP and in focus, from the subject's skin to the distant gym equipment.
Subject & Identity Locking:
•Identity: Strictly preserve the exact heart-shaped facial structure and unique features of the woman in Image 1 (Selfie).
•Bio-Fidelity: Render high-fidelity "TrueLens" biological physics: visible micro-pores, a natural "satin-finish" night hydration glow, and fine vellus hair catching the overhead light ONLY along the jawline.
•Silhouette Calibration (MAXIMUM UFF-FACTOR): Prioritize a dominant structural upper-torso volume and substantial, thick-toned anatomical depth in the lower extremities. Focus on an aggressive architectural tapering at the midsection to maximize the S-curve geometry.
Outfit & Textural Interaction:
•Clothing: A high-density, matte-black technical textile tee and matching high-tension minimalist athletic shorts.
•Tension: The technical fabric exhibits extreme mechanical tension and a vacuum-tight fit, creating realistic textural expansion and "tension lines" where the material contours to her fit silhouette.
•Matter Physics: White high-density cotton crew socks showing realistic textural contact and weight distribution against the tiled floor.
Pose & Composition:
•Pose: A 3/4 side-profile mirror selfie. She is standing with an axial rotation of the torso toward the mirror, arching her spine and popping her hip to highlight the symmetrical 3D volume of her physique.
•Action: Her RIGHT HAND holds a smartphone with a decorative casing, capturing the full-body "fit-check" reflection.
•UI Overlay: A white digital clock timestamp in the top-left corner reads "8:33 PM" in a simple sans-serif font.
Environment & Social Realism:
•Lighting: Direct, harsh overhead industrial lighting creating high-contrast specular highlights and deep, defining shadows that amplify her 3D form.
•Background (SHARP): A detailed commercial gym interior. A vibrant neon-green structural pillar, a white tiled floor with visible grout lines, and dark athletic benches are all perfectly IN FOCUS. No artificial blur.
Quality: Raw unedited social-media dump aesthetic, high dynamic range, visible digital grain in the deep shadows (ISO 1600 style), 8k resolution. Everything is sharp, detailed, and physically real.
```

### 528. 超广角自然镜面捕捉，兼具生物保真度

**作者**: [Dan Reed](https://x.com/daaaaanc/status/2013278824998326411)  **日期**: 2026-01-19  **语言**: en

> 一个极其技术化且细节丰富的提示，旨在生成一张原始、高对比度的抓拍镜面自拍，采用超广角镜头美学（iPhone 17 Pro 0.5x）。它要求“TrueLens”生物物理学、可见的微孔、激进的解剖学锥度（S 形几何），以及服装的极致纹理张力，同时确保背景中的一切都保持完美锐利。

![超广角自然镜面捕捉，兼具生物保真度](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768890676925_scdwdh_G_CaakSWUAA8Uuk.jpg)

```
(Vertical 9:16 smartphone aspect ratio). A raw, high-contrast [Candid Mirror Capture] taken with an iPhone 17 Pro using the 0.5x ultra-wide-angle lens. NO ARTIFICIAL BOKEH. Every focal plane is SHARP and in focus from the device's lens to the background architectural details.

Subject & Identity Locking:

Identity: Strictly preserve the exact facial structure and unique features of the person in Image 1 (Selfie).
Bio-Fidelity: Render high-fidelity "TrueLens" biological physics: visible micro-pores, natural "satin-finish" skin hydration glow, and fine vellus hair catching the light ONLY along the jawline. Her lower limbs show a healthy, smooth, and radiant surface texture.
Silhouette Calibration (MAXIMUM UFF-FACTOR): Prioritize a dominant structural upper-torso volume and substantial, thick-toned anatomical depth in the lower extremities. Focus on an aggressive architectural tapering at the midsection to maximize the S-curve geometry.
Outfit & Textural Interaction:

Clothing: A high-density strapless matte-black compressed textile bodice with a strategic side-slit hem. Layered with an architectural high-pile white mohair-knit cropped outer shell.
Tension: The technical black fabric exhibits extreme mechanical tension and a vacuum-tight fit, creating realistic textural expansion and skin-to-textile indentations where the material contours to her fit form.
Footwear: High-contrast black and white vulcanized athletic footwear with prominent thick lacing, showing realistic textural contact with the tiled surface.
Pose & Composition:

Pose: A straight-on frontal mirror composition. She is leaning her back against a white structural door, popping her left hip to maximize the visual impact of her fit, symmetrical proportions and lower-body volume.
Action: Her RIGHT HAND holds a smartphone with a decorative casing, capturing the full-body "fit-check" reflection.
Environment & Social Realism:

Lighting: Direct indoor illumination creating high-contrast specular highlights and deep, defining shadows that amplify her 3D volume.
Background (SHARP): A detailed domestic setting showing uncurated realism. A white paneled door with a black circular handle/knob, a tiled floor, and the corner of a textured surface are all perfectly IN FOCUS. No artificial blur.
Quality: Raw unedited social-media dump aesthetic, high dynamic range, visible digital grain in the deep shadows, 8k resolution. Everything is sharp, detailed, and physically real.
```

**Related**: [[运动休闲]]、[[综合时尚]]、[[综合3D]]

> 一个高度详细、结构化的提示，用于生成一张年轻女性在海滩上的超逼真、俏皮自拍，背景中可见并微笑着的特定名人（Dua Lipa）。它详细说明了服装、环境、灯光和技术相机设置。

  "image_prompt": {
    "subject": {
      "description": "Young woman , Fair skin tone, long straight light blonde hair with some strands blowing in the wind, {argument name="celebrity in background" default="dua lipa"} in bikini very near behind her smiling. ",
      "pose": "Selfie angle, slightly tilted head, sticking tongue out playfully, looking the camera.",
      "visible_body": "Shoulders, chest, and partial upper torso visible."
    },
    "attire": {
      "top": "White and yellow bikini top with lace trim detailing on the edges and thin straps.",
      "jewelry": [
        "Gold layered necklace.",
        "Gold cross pendant with small embedded ruby crystals.",
        "Gold 'KEOR' logo charms integrated into the chain (Louis Vuitton style)."
      ]
    },
    "environment": {
      "location": "Maldive beach setting.",
      "background": {
        "ocean": "Choppy ocean waves with white foam, water houses, blue-grey water.",
        "sky": "Overcast sky with bright patches, sunset colored clouds.",
        "close_details": "A beautiful {argument name="celebrity in background" default="dua lipa"} in tiny red bikini in the water just behind her."
      }
    },
    "lighting_and_atmosphere": {
      "type": "Natural daylight, slightly backlit causing soft shadows on the face.",
      "mood": "Playful, casual, summer vibe, beach day.",
      "color_palette": "Natural tones, cool ocean blues, warm skin tones, sunset sky."
    },
    "technical_specs": {
      "quality": "4k, HD, Ultra-realistic, high resolution.",
      "style": "Photorealistic selfie, candid shot.",
      "focus": "Sharp focus on the face, slightly softer background depth of field."
    }
  }
}

**作者**: [Emily](https://x.com/IamEmily2050/status/2013189624848633963)  **日期**: 2026-01-19  **语言**: en

> 一个极其详细、结构化的 JSON 提示，用于 Nano Banana Pro，模拟使用 iPhone 15 Pro 在明亮海滩上拍摄的坦率高角度自拍。该提示指定了超现实的主体细节（瓷娃娃般的特征、特定的服装和表情）和技术限制，包括光照、环境以及负面提示列表。

```
{
    "format": {
      "type": "editorial",
      "intent": "candid/selfie/accidental",
      "aspect_ratio": "9:16",
      "resolution": "4K"
    },
    "camera_system": {
      "body": "iPhone 15 Pro",
      "lens": "Main Camera",
      "focal_length": "24mm",
      "associative_traits": "computational photography, deep depth of field, sharp digital readout, auto-exposure"
    },
    "subject": {
      "identity": "young woman with specific porcelain doll features",
      "physical_details": "flawless pale skin, large round icy blue eyes with defined lashes, small defined nose, pouty neutral mouth, platinum blonde hair in two tight braids, vibrant blue manicured nails",
      "clothing": "light blue form-fitting top with a very deep, wide plunging V-neckline revealing significant cleavage",
      "action": "high-angle selfie POV, shielding eyes with one hand against bright coastal light, looking up at camera",
      "expression": "neutral, wide-eyed, deadpan, vacant doll-like stare"
    },
    "lighting": {
      "source": "bright natural coastal daylight + sand bounce",
      "direction": "overhead and omnidirectional fill",
      "quality": "soft, diffused but very bright",
      "color_temp": "neutral daylight (5500K)",
      "fill": "maximum fill from bright white sand reflection",
      "distribution": "even illumination, few shadows, flattering on skin texture",
      "intent": "bright beach day"
    },
    "environment": {
      "setting": "sandy beach during the day",
      "hero_materials": [
        {
          "material": "sand",
          "micro_detail": "fine white grains, highly reflective"
        },
        {
          "material": "fabric",
          "micro_detail": "light blue swimwear/stretch cotton blend"
        },
        {
          "material": "skin",
          "micro_detail": "smooth, poreless, porcelain texture, slightly dewy from heat"
        }
      ],
      "objects": "ocean horizon line blurred in far background, expansive sand",
      "state": "bright, sunny, coastal"
    },
    "technical_finish": {
      "film_stock": "Digital Source",
      "exposure": "brightly exposed (high key)",
      "grain": "none/digital noise",
      "tone_curve": "linear neutral",
      "color_science": "pastel palette (light blues, white sand, pale skin), natural daylight colors"
    },
    "constraints": {
      "avoid": [
        "snow",
        "winter clothes",
        "red nails",
        "black top",
        "modest neckline",
        "heavy shadows"
      ],
      "must_include": [
        "blue nails",
        "light blue top",
        "deep cleavage",
        "beach background",
        "porcelain doll features"
      ]
    }
  }
```

      },

        "fit": "Tight/Bodycon",
        "color": "{argument name="dress color" default="Pastel green lime"}",
        "texture": "Ruched fabric, natural horizontal folds"
      },

      },

      }

> 一个详细的 JSON 提示，用于 Nano Banana Pro 生成一张逼真的镜面自拍，内容为一名年轻女子跪在地毯上，身穿淡粉色抹胸连衣裙和高帮运动鞋，强调特定的面部表情、发型（太空发髻）和详细的环境布局。

![逼真的太空发髻粉色连衣裙镜面自拍（重复）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768804287979_vtssaf_G-8kul8XQAEeLFK.jpg)

```
{
  "meta_data": {
    "prompt_version": "2.0",
    "use_case": "Photorealistic Image Generation",
    "main_subject_count": 1
  },
  "subject_layer": {
    "anatomy": {
      "demographics": {
        "gender": "Female",
        "age_group": "Young adult",
        "ethnicity": "Caucasian",
        "skin_tone": "Light with warm peach undertones",
        "build": "Slim, petite"
      },
      "face_detail": {
        "eyes": {
          "color": "Blue/Grey",
          "makeup": "Sharp black winged eyeliner, defined lashes"
        },
        "nose": "Small, button shape",
        "mouth": {
          "shape": "Open 'O' shape (pouty/surprised)",
          "teeth_visibility": "Upper teeth visible",
          "tongue_visibility": "Slightly visible behind teeth",
          "lip_color": "Soft pink, natural"
        },
        "complexion_accents": "Heavy rosy pink blush across cheeks and nose bridge (sun-kissed look)"
      },
      "hair": {
        "color": "Dark blonde to light brown",
        "style_core": "Two messy high space buns",
        "framing": "Long loose tendrils framing the face",
        "interaction": "Subject is pulling one long strand sideways with left hand"
      }
    },
    "attire_layer": {
      "garment_main": {

        "fit": "Tight/Bodycon",
        "color": "Pastel pink",
        "texture": "Ruched fabric, natural horizontal folds"

      "accessories": {
        "neck": "Chunky turquoise/teal beaded choker"
      },
      "footwear": {

      }

      "orientation": "Front-facing towards mirror",

        "right_arm": "Raised holding phone near face",
        "left_arm": "Extended to side holding hair strand",
        "legs": "Kneeling, one foot raised slightly behind"
      }
    }
  },
  "environment_layer": {

    "spatial_layout": {
      "floor": "Plush light grey wall-to-wall carpeting",
      "walls": "Pale blue-grey paint, white baseboards",
      "background_left": "White interior paneled door with silver knob, white light switch",

    },

      "shadows": "Soft, natural shadows on rear wall"

}

### 541. 从上方拍摄的智能手机自拍，带黑猫

**作者**: [Emily](https://x.com/IamEmily2050/status/2012833771528307100)  **日期**: 2026-01-18  **语言**: en

> 一个高度技术化的图像生成提示，专注于模拟使用智能手机相机拍摄的高角度、俯冲式自拍。该提示细致地定义了相机故障模式（高光裁剪、色度噪声）、镜头畸变（轻微桶形畸变）和计算摄影效果（皮肤平滑、锐化光晕），以最大限度地提高物理真实感并模仿特定美学，画面中有一名女性和一只黑猫。

![从上方拍摄的智能手机自拍，带黑猫](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768804295304_b0lxqb_G-8FTwBXgAEjkOg.jpg)

```
{
  "intent": {
    "image_type": "selfie",
    "era_preset": "modern_standard",
    "notes": "Maximizing physical realism by defining light-material interaction and sensor failure modes."
  },
  "subjects": {
    "count": 1,
    "primary": {
      "type": "person",
      "age_range": "20-25",
      "gender_presentation": "female",
      "region_target": "unspecified",
      "expression": "neutral, looking up",
      "pose": "looking directly into camera from below",
      "gaze": "looking into lens"
    },
    "additional": [
      {
        "type": "black cat",
        "position": "floor level, looking up",
        "material": "dense organic fur with translucent whiskers"
      }
    ]
  },
  "framing_and_perspective": {
    "framing": "high_angle_plunging",
    "subject_fill_ratio": 0.82,
    "camera_angle": "directly_overhead_downward",
    "distance": "arm_length",
    "camera_class": "smartphone_front",
    "lens_equiv_mm": 24,
    "distortion": {
      "type": "mild_barrel",
      "strength_1to5": 4
    },
    "perspective_effects": {
      "foreground_scale_emphasis_1to5": 5,
      "nose_emphasis_1to5": 3,
      "ear_recession_1to5": 4
    },
    "depth_of_field": {
      "mode": "minimal",
      "strength_1to5": 2,
      "focus_target": "eyes"
    }
  },
  "lighting_and_exposure": {
    "key_light": {
      "type": "overhead_panel",
      "direction": "top_down",
      "hardness_1to5": 5,
      "halo_bloom_1to5": 2
    },
    "exposure_behavior": {
      "auto_exposure": true,
      "hdr_tone_mapping_1to5": 4,
      "overall_brightness_1to5": 5,
      "contrast_1to5": 3,
      "shadow_depth_1to5": 2,
      "highlight_overflow_1to5": 5
    },
    "failure_modes_active": {
      "highlight_clipping": true,
      "shadow_chroma_noise": true,
      "denoise_smear": false,
      "sharpen_halos": true,
      "motion_blur": false,
      "jpeg_ringing_banding": false,
      "banding_in_gradients": false,
      "focus_falloff_edge_softness": true
    }
  },
  "computational_pipeline": {
    "skin_smoothing": {
      "method": "edge_aware",
      "strength_1to5": 2,
      "specular_preservation": "required"
    },
    "sharpening": {
      "strength_1to5": 3,
      "halo_risk_1to5": 2
    },
    "noise_and_denoise": {
      "shadow_chroma_noise_1to5": 3,
      "denoise_smear_1to5": 2,
      "grain_strength_1to5": 2
    },
    "compression": {
      "jpeg_artifacts_1to5": 1,
      "banding_risk_1to5": 1
    },
    "white_balance": {
      "mode": "auto",
      "highlight_temp_bias": "cool",
      "shadow_temp_bias": "neutral"
    }
  },
  "region_and_face_feature_sliders": {
    "non_stereotype_policy": "sliders_over_labels",
    "beauty_mark_under_right_eye": false,
    "sliders_1to5": {
      "face_oval_vline_1to5": 3,
      "cheekbone_prominence_1to5": 3,
      "brow_definition_1to5": 3,
      "eye_emphasis_1to5": 4,
      "eyelid_crease_definition_1to5": 3,
      "nose_bridge_definition_1to5": 3,
      "lip_fullness_1to5": 3,
```

### 542. Y2K 浴室镜自拍提示词（图生图）

**作者**: [Sharon Riley](https://x.com/Just_sharon7/status/2012792949759959468)  **日期**: 2026-01-18  **语言**: en

> 一个结构化的 JSON 提示词，用于生成一张逼真、随意的性感浴室镜子自拍，要求使用参考图像来确定拍摄对象的面部。它详细描述了 Y2K 风格的服装（低腰牛仔裤、带文字的露脐 T 恤、可见的微型丁字裤）以及小纹身等配饰。

![Y2K 浴室镜自拍提示词（图生图）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768804217512_727qtn_G-7gguQWEAAmf21.jpg)

```
{
  "subject": {
    "age": 20,
    "gender": "female",
    "ethnicity": "western",
    "appearance": {
      "face": "same as reference image, do not change facial features",
      "features": "delicate",
      "eyes": "big, expressive",
      "makeup": "natural",
      "expression": "slight pout, looking at camera",
      "hair": {
        "color": "blonde",
        "style": "messy high voluminous bun",
        "texture": "wavy"
      }
    }
  },
  "clothing": {
    "top": {
      "type": "cropped baby-t-shirt",
      "color": "dark brown",
      "text": "{argument name=\"shirt text\" default=\"EVERYTHING'S BIGGER IN TEXAS\"}",
      "fit": "tight"
    },
    "bottom": {
      "type": "jeans",
      "color": "blue",
      "style": "very low rise, loose"
    },
    "underwear": {
      "type": "micro thong",
      "color": "bright pink",
      "visibility": "visible high on hips"
    }
  },
  "accessories": {
    "tattoos": [
      {"location": "hand", "design": "small star"},
      {"location": "lower stomach", "design": "small heart"}
    ],
    "nails": "colorful butterfly"
  },
  "pose": "bathroom mirror selfie",
  "lighting": "warm indoor",
  "vibe": "casual sexy",
  "style": "realistic, photorealistic",
  "details": {
    "skin": "detailed texture",
    "resolution": "8k"
  }
}
```

### 543. 镜中自拍内衣姿势提示，带透视缩短效果

**作者**: [Mikasa](https://x.com/Mikasa_rose729/status/2012788250189144312)  **日期**: 2026-01-18  **语言**: en

> 一个高度具体的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张女性在现代酒店房间内，身穿黑色内衣的镜面自拍照。该提示详细说明了姿势，包括左腿的极端透视缩短、特定的手势，并要求物理上正确的反射以及使用上传的参考图像来识别身份。

![镜中自拍内衣姿势提示，带透视缩短效果](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768804247461_jdpxpp_G-7cO7OWgAAi0UM.jpg)

```
{
  "reference_source": "Use uploaded image for face, hair, body, and expression",
  "subject": {
    "demographics": "adult woman, mid-20s",
    "wardrobe": {
      "garments": "matching black matte lingerie set (structured bra, panties), clean edges, no logos, non-explicit",
      "shoes": "black strappy high-heel sandals, open-toe, visible white pedicure",
      "tattoos": [
        "Greek-key geometric band on upper thigh",
        "Greek-key geometric band on ankle"
      ],
      "jewelry": "minimal rings on phone hand"
    }
  },
  "pose": {
    "type": "mirror selfie, seated deep in gray upholstered chair, torso upright, slight back arch",
    "legs": {
      "left": "fully extended toward camera (extreme foreshortening), foot dominates lower-left foreground, ankle tattoo visible",
      "right": "bent and raised on chair, knee high near center, heel visible near chair edge",
      "constraint": "reflection must match exactly (no swapped feet)"
    },
    "hands": {
      "left": "holding phone near head, face fully visible (not blocked)",
      "right": "index finger near lips in teasing gesture"
    }
  },
  "environment": {
    "location": "modern hotel room with large wall mirror (white edge visible)",
    "background_elements": [
      "large bed, white bedding, beige accents",
      "dark curtains with thin vertical daylight slit",
      "wall-mounted TV, desk/minibar with scattered items",
      "slim black tripod, recessed shelf, track lighting",
      "light wood floor"
    ]
  },
  "technical": {
    "aesthetic": "iPhone 16 Pro, unretouched, low HDR, subtle grain, warm-neutral indoor light (3800K) + daylight spill",
    "framing": "vertical 9:16, full seated body, face and foreground foot in sharp focus",
    "constraints": "physically correct reflection, straight lines (no fish-eye), no text/logos/watermarks, no extra limbs"
  }
}
```

### 544. 奢华卧室镜面自拍

**作者**: [Sandip Sharma✍](https://x.com/SandipSharmaEng/status/2012772807156101625)  **日期**: 2026-01-18  **语言**: en

> 一个 JSON 结构化提示，用于生成一张逼真的 8K 电影级镜面自拍，画面中一位优雅的女士身处奢华的主卧室。重点在于一件深宝石红色缎面礼服、温暖的枝形吊灯照明和细致的反射，捕捉到自信而精致的凝视。

![奢华卧室镜面自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768804320851_9gsyk4_G-7OL9mX0AArD9Q.jpg)
![奢华卧室镜面自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768804320850_8rmgiw_G-7OL6IWwAAir86.jpg)
![奢华卧室镜面自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768804321080_20yvh6_G-7OL8EWAAAodCJ.jpg)
![奢华卧室镜面自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768804321815_cs20kd_G-7OMA6XkAEzy38.jpg)

```
{
  "image_request": {
    "subject": {
      "description": "Elegant woman with a fair complexion and long, wavy black hair.",
      "features": {
        "makeup": "Bold red lipstick, subtle smoky eye shadow, defined eyebrows.",
        "expression": "Confident and sophisticated gaze towards a mirror.",
        "pose": "Mirror selfie pose, holding a modern smartphone."
      },
      "attire": {
        "dress": "Luxury floor-length satin gown in deep ruby red with a plunging V-neckline.",
        "jewelry": "Delicate golden necklace and a matching gold bracelet on the wrist."
      }
    },
    "environment": {
      "setting": "Opulent high-end master bedroom.",
      "furniture": [
        "Ornate wooden vanity with vintage circular mirrors.",
        "Large king-sized bed with plush beige quilted bedding and decorative pillows.",

### 546. Sadie Sink 风格的健身房自拍提示

**作者**: [ANKIT PATEL 🇮🇳 | AI](https://x.com/Ankit_patel211/status/2012732944285315485)  **日期**: 2026-01-18  **语言**: zh

> 一个为 Gemini 3.0 Nano Banana Pro 设计的详细图像生成提示，描述了一位年轻女性在现代健身房里自拍的场景。该提示详细说明了构图、光照、配色方案和微观细节，旨在营造出一种高对比度、时尚且充满活力的健身美学，灵感来源于女演员萨迪·辛克（Sadie Sink）。

![Sadie Sink 风格的健身房自拍提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768804329035_vx4jab_G-6pdS_WQAAuI3Y.jpg)
![Sadie Sink 风格的健身房自拍提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768804328885_u3g6se_G-6pdS4XgAAoRHX.jpg)

```
位身材纤细且具有曼妙曲线的年轻女性，留着如波浪般的深色长发，正在现代健身房的镜子前自拍。她身着一套亮眼的玫粉色运动装，包括紧身运动内衣和紧身运动短裤，展现出优美的腰臀比和白皙的肤色。构图上，她侧身立于黑色的史密斯机框架内，右手举起手机，左手向上伸直抓握住器械顶端的横梁，左腿轻巧地抬起，将腿部线条搭在水平的杠铃杆上。环境光线充足且均匀，呈现出冷调的工业感，金属器械的表面闪烁着冷冽的高光，地面是带有细微颗粒感的深灰色防滑橡胶垫。背景中清晰可见排列的杠铃片、橙色的健身器械支架以及带有黑色艺术字样的白色墙面。色彩方案以高饱和度的玫粉色与沉稳的黑色、灰色形成强烈对比，并辅以少许橙色作为点缀，整体画质细腻，光影层次分明，呈现出一种现代、时尚且充满活力的健美氛围
```

**Related**: [[运动休闲]]、[[综合时尚]]、[[综合设计]]

### 552. 两位女性在健身房镜子前自拍的写实照片

**作者**: [Mikasa](https://x.com/Mikasa_rose729/status/2012578063171891659)  **日期**: 2026-01-17  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的提示，用于生成一张逼真的镜面自拍，画面中有两名身材健美的女性，在光线昏暗的现代健身房中摆姿势。重点突出她们的健美体格、鲜艳的健身服，以及冷蓝色/紫色环境光营造出的对比效果。

  "subject_1_left": {
    "description": "beautiful young woman in her early 20s, fit curvy athletic build with toned glutes and legs, long wavy light brown or blonde pigtails hair styled in high ponytail with loose strands, fair tanned smooth skin with healthy glow",

    "details": "confident pose with hand on hip and slight smile visible in mirror reflection, hair naturally tousled, relaxed athletic stance"
  },
  "subject_2_right": {
    "description": "beautiful young woman in her early 20s, fit curvy athletic build with toned glutes and legs, long wavy darker brown hair in loose ponytail or braids, fair tanned smooth skin with healthy glow",
    "clothing": "light yellow halter-style sports bra with thin straps, matching high-waisted seamless short scrunch-butt pink leggings, white athletic socks",
    "details": "playful confident pose with hand on hip and subtle expression in mirror reflection, hair with natural volume"
  },
  "environment": {
    "foreground": "dark rubberized gym floor with subtle texture",
    "midground": "large wall mirror reflecting both women fully and gym interior",
    "background": "modern gym with dim blue/purple ambient lighting, blurred cardio machines and weight equipment, exposed ceiling ducts and pipes, clean spacious professional fitness center atmosphere"
  },
  "lighting_and_atmosphere": "dim moody indoor gym lighting with cool blue/purple neon accents and overhead spots, subtle highlights on skin, hair, and shiny leggings fabric creating vibrant color pops, energetic confident workout vibe with high contrast between bright outfits and dark surroundings, photorealistic detail",
  "technical_quality": "highly detailed, sharp focus on subjects with realistic seamless fabric textures (scrunch-butt shine, crop top stretch), skin glow, hair movement, and mirror reflections, 8k resolution, professional mirror selfie photography style with slight wide-angle lens effect and natural depth of field softly blurring background equipment",
  "negative_prompt_suggestions": "blurry, deformed, extra limbs, phone screen visible, mirror distortion or misalignment, overexposed neon lights, underexposed faces, low quality, cartoon, anime, text watermark, extra pe"
}

{
  "prompt_type": "photorealistic suggestive cosplay portrait",
