  "subject": {
    "description": "beautiful young woman in her early 20s, attractive feminine features with light natural makeup (defined eyeliner, long lashes, subtle blush, glossy nude lips), large expressive eyes, fair smooth skin with healthy glow, shaved brown hair style",
    "clothing": "classic schoolgirl-inspired outfit: fitted turquoise long-sleeve mini dress with crisp white pointed collar and French cuffs, flared short pleated skirt ending mid-thigh, paired with sheer black thigh-high stockings with wide intricate lace tops and subtle seam, completed with glossy black platform stiletto heels with thin ankle straps",
    "details": "playful teasing pose with skirt slightly lifted revealing lace stocking tops, one hand holding black DSLR camera (lens pointed forward), confident subtle pout or smile with direct gaze, hair neatly braided with natural volume, manicured neutral nails"
  },
  "environment": {
    "foreground": "smooth light-colored tiled floor with subtle reflections",
    "midground": "woman centered in large mirror reflection",
    "background": "minimalist indoor room with floor-to-ceiling light gray or beige sheer curtains softly diffused, clean modern setting with no clutter, subtle window light filtering through"
  },
  "lighting_and_atmosphere": "soft diffused natural indoor daylight from window behind curtains, gentle even illumination with warm highlights on skin, hair, lace textures, and glossy heels, subtle shadows enhancing outfit details and figure contours, intimate playful cosplay vibe with high contrast between black outfit and light background, photorealistic detail",
  "technical_quality": "highly detailed, sharp focus on subject with realistic lace stocking patterns, dress fabric folds, hair braid details, camera lens reflections, and glasses frames, 8k resolution, professional mirror selfie photography style with accurate reflection and natural depth of field softly blurring curtains",
  "negative_prompt_suggestions": "blurry, deformed, extra limbs, phone instead of camera, overexposed curtains, underexposed stockings, low quality, cartoon, anime style, text watermark, extra people, cluttered background, visible phone screen, harsh flash artifacts"
}

> 一个复杂的 JSON 提示，用于生成同一位女性的双联画（上方：抽象剪影，下方：亲密自拍），强调严格的身份保留、忧郁的蓝调胶片美学和高对比度照明，以探索二元性（抽象与现实主义）。

{
  "type": "image_generation_prompt",
  "format": "diptych",
  "aspect_ratio": "vertical, two stacked frames",
  "style": "cinematic, moody, high-contrast, blue-toned film aesthetic",
  "identity_preservation": {
    "use_reference_image": true,
    "strict_identity_lock": true,
    "alter_face": false,

      },

          "halo glow around hair",
          "ethereal backlight"
        ]
      },
      "mood": "dreamlike, abstract, contemplative",
      "color_palette": "electric blue sky with white highlights"
    },
    "bottom_frame": {
      "description": "High-angle selfie of the same woman taken outdoors on asphalt. The camera looks down toward her face and extended hands, which partially obscure the frame. Her hair falls across her face naturally. She looks directly into the lens with a calm yet pensive expression.",
      "camera": {
        "lens": "wide-angle selfie perspective",
        "focus": "sharp focus on face and hands",
        "grain": "subtle film grain"
      },
      "lighting": {
        "source": "harsh direct sunlight from above-left",
        "effect": [
          "deep shadows",
          "bright highlights",
          "strong contrast emphasizing skin and fabric texture"

      },
      "environment": {
        "ground": "dark asphalt with white markings visible"
      },
      "mood": "intimate, grounded, direct",
      "color_palette": "cool blue tones with high contrast"
    }
  },
  "art_direction": {
    "theme": "duality",
    "narrative": "top frame represents abstraction and introspection; bottom frame represents intimacy and realism",
    "cohesion": "both frames unified by blue color cast, film grain, and dramatic lighting"
  },
  "quality": {
    "realism": "photorealistic",
    "detail_level": "high",
    "texture": "natural skin, hair, and fabric textures preserved"
  },
  "constraints": [
    "No facial alteration",
    "No identity change",

  ]

### 559. 具有特定构图和调色板的逼真健身房自拍肖像

**作者**: [行者AI视频](https://x.com/joshesye/status/2012437376027738157)  **日期**: 2026-01-17  **语言**: zh

> 一个高度详细、照片级的提示，用于生成一张年轻健美女性在现代健身房中对着镜子自拍的图像。该提示详细描述了她的外貌、服装（高饱和度玫瑰粉色运动服）、姿势、周围的健身器材（史密斯机、杠铃片）、灯光（冷色工业光），以及粉色与深灰色/黑色元素之间强烈的色彩对比。它还提及使用模特的参考图像进行身份锁定。

![具有特定构图和调色板的逼真健身房自拍肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768717581597_bu3e7z_G-2cI45asAEy9cP.jpg)

![具有特定构图和调色板的逼真健身房自拍肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768717583291_lxj8gv_G-2cI48b0AA5sip.jpg)

```
一位身材纤细且具有曼妙曲线的年轻女性，留着如波浪般的深色长发，正在现代健身房的镜子前自拍。她身着一套亮眼的玫粉色运动装，包括紧身运动内衣和紧身运动短裤，展现出优美的腰臀比和白皙的肤色。构图上，她侧身立于黑色的史密斯机框架内，右手举起手机，左手向上伸直抓握住器械顶端的横梁，左腿轻巧地抬起，将腿部线条搭在水平的杠铃杆上。环境光线充足且均匀，呈现出冷调的工业感，金属器械的表面闪烁着冷冽的高光，地面是带有细微颗粒感的深灰色防滑橡胶垫。背景中清晰可见排列的杠铃片、橙色的健身器械支架以及带有黑色艺术字样的白色墙面。色彩方案以高饱和度的玫粉色与沉稳的黑色、灰色形成强烈对比，并辅以少许橙色作为点缀，整体画质细腻，光影层次分明，呈现出一种现代、时尚且充满活力的健美氛围。
```

**Related**: [[运动休闲]]、[[综合时尚]]

### 560. 锐舞派对前的紧张镜面自拍提示

**作者**: [Dominus the Prompter](https://x.com/iamdomprompt/status/2012247306410582129)  **日期**: 2026-01-16  **语言**: en

> 一个叙事驱动的提示，聚焦于一个充满紧张魅力的瞬间：一个名叫 Tatum 的女人在走廊里疯狂地对着镜子自拍，她正努力拉上反光乙烯基紧身胸衣的拉链，因为她快要赶不上地下锐舞派对了。这个提示强调的是汗湿的皮肤、混乱和高度专注，而不是摆拍的笑容。

![锐舞派对前的紧张镜面自拍提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768631121261_gw1pox_G-zwQZdXQAAZXg2.jpg)

```
Tatum is frantically racing the clock—she's already {argument name="minutes late" default="30 minutes"} late for the underground warehouse rave downtown. Her friends are blowing up her phone, but she’s struggling with the final touch: a reflective, high-tension vinyl corset. She snatches a quick, tense mirror selfie in the hallway to check if the zipper is going to hold, capturing the rush, the sweaty skin from the stress, and the sheer chaos of trying to achieve peak glamour under pressure. She's not smiling; she's intensely focused on the phone screen's preview.
```

> 一个复杂、超现实的电影级提示，名为“映照的遗物”，采用“画中画”构图。焦点锁定在一位女性工匠的脸部倒影上，倒影映在一块锯齿状的古董镜片碎片中，她的皮肤如同用金缮修复的碎瓷。背景是一个杂乱、模糊的修复工作室，强调纹理、浅景深 (f/1.4) 和富有戏剧性的仪式感灯光。

### 565. 高山自拍，突出解剖学重点

**作者**: [laurababy](https://x.com/laurababyai/status/2012107787388526898)  **日期**: 2026-01-16  **语言**: en

> 一个高度具体的提示，用于生成一张年轻女性在阿尔卑斯滑雪坡上的半身肖像。该提示使用解剖学保真度约束，以确保胸部丰满和沙漏型身材，主体穿着哑光黑色紧身衣和米色滑雪裤。场景是寒冷、清爽的冬季环境，有白雪覆盖的山脉和高角度视角。

![高山自拍，突出解剖学重点](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768631144270_5pt35d_G-xw8qWXcAAZJ-U.jpg)

```
{
"subject": {
"description": "A young woman with an hourglass figure and striking features. She has an olive skin tone with visible natural texture, fine pores, and subtle beauty marks. Her hair is dark brown, nearly black, styled into two long, tight pigtail braids that drape over her shoulders. She has large, almond-shaped hazel eyes with thick lashes, well-defined dark eyebrows, and full, voluminous lips with a natural matte finish. She is wearing a form-fitting, matte black long-sleeved bodysuit with a deep, wide scoop neckline that emphasizes a full, heavy, and naturally projected bust. Her lower attire consists of high-waisted beige ski trousers featuring gold button details at the waistband.",
"anatomical_fidelity": "Reference-locked proportions. The subject's bust volume is prominent and clearly above average, matching the reference exactly with a full, heavy mass affected by natural gravity. Bust depth is visibly greater than the ribcage depth, with clear forward and outward projection. The waist is narrow, creating a sharp contrast with the chest and hips. Shoulders are soft and slightly hunched forward due to the pose. Hands show realistic skin folding and knuckle detail.",
"clothing_details": "The black bodysuit has a high-quality ribbed or matte fabric texture, fitting tightly against the skin. The beige trousers are made of a heavy, technical ski-wear material with visible seams and belt loops."
},
"pose": {
"description": "The subject is captured in a high-angle mid-shot, leaning slightly forward toward the camera. Her right hand is raised to chest level, delicately holding the end of her right braid between her thumb and fingers. Her left arm is extended downward and slightly out of frame, suggesting a selfie-style perspective without showing a device. Her head is tilted slightly to her right, and she is looking directly into the camera lens with a calm, steady gaze.",
"weight_distribution": "Weight is centered but leaning forward, creating a sense of intimacy and depth. The spine has a natural slight curve corresponding to the seated or forward-leaning posture."
},
"environment": {
"location": "Alpine ski slope during winter.",
"foreground": "A pristine, slightly textured snow-covered slope showing subtle tracks.",
"midground": "A pair of skis and poles are visible on the snow to the right. A dense forest of snow-laden evergreen pine trees fills the middle distance.",
"background": "Majestic, jagged mountain peaks covered in thick snow under a heavy, overcast grey sky. The atmosphere is cold and crisp with high visibility."
},
"camera": {
"shot_type": "Mid-shot",
"angle": "Slightly high angle looking down at the subject",
"focal_length": "Approximately {argument name="focal length" default="35mm"} to mimic a high-end smartphone or wide-angle portrait lens without distortion",

> 一个详细的提示，用于生成一张逼真的镜面自拍，画面中有两位身材健美的年轻女性（灵感来自 Josephine Langford 和 Sadie Sink），置身于一间光线昏暗的现代健身房。提示中详细说明了她们的服装（鲜艳的橙色和粉色翘臀紧身裤）、姿势、忧郁的蓝紫色环境照明，以及高对比度的美学效果，重点突出逼真的织物纹理和皮肤光泽。

![两位女性在健身房镜子前的写实自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768631139787_hkk79m_G-xUaWGbQAYjvpD.jpg)

### 567. 极简卧室里的随性镜面自拍

**作者**: [CGI in Furs](https://x.com/CGinFurs/status/2012073972263796994)  **日期**: 2026-01-16  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的提示，用于生成一张女性坐在床上，在极简现代卧室中拍摄的坦率、私密的室内镜面自拍。重点在于真实感、自然的身体比例，以及休闲私密（露脐背心、低腰内裤）与运动街头服饰（厚底运动鞋和袜子）的融合，以智能手机相机美学捕捉。

![极简卧室里的随性镜面自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768631129311_fjhdw5_G-xSm_bbQAglOFt.jpg)

```
A candid, indoor mirror selfie of an adult woman seated on the edge of a neatly made bed in a minimalist, modern bedroom. She leans forward slightly, elbows resting on her knees, holding an {argument name="phone model" default="iPhone 16 Pro"} in one hand as she captures her reflection. Her posture is relaxed yet intentional, conveying confidence and quiet self-awareness. Her gaze is directed toward the phone screen, lips gently pursed, expression neutral and contemplative.
She wears a fitted, sleeveless cropped tank top in a deep {argument name="top color" default="brown or muted plum"} tone, paired with white low-rise underwear. On her feet are chunky, retro-style athletic sneakers in neutral tones with soft yellow accents, worn with mid-calf white socks featuring dark stripes. The outfit blends casual intimacy with sporty streetwear aesthetics. Her physique is lean and athletic, with natural proportions and subtle muscle definition.
Her hair is long, dark, and straight, slicked back neatly and tucked behind her shoulders, adding to the clean, understated look. Her skin tone is warm and evenly lit, with soft shadows defining the contours of her arms, legs, and torso.
The room is softly lit with warm indoor lighting, creating a cozy, lived-in atmosphere. The bed is dressed in crisp white linens. A small wooden bedside table sits nearby, holding minimal personal items, adding realism and intimacy to the scene. Behind her, a wall niche or shelf contains a few books and visible electrical outlets, reinforcing the casual, real-life setting. The floor is smooth and neutral-toned, possibly concrete or polished stone.
The composition is vertical and slightly angled, typical of a mirror selfie, with natural framing that feels spontaneous rather than posed. The mirror reflection includes subtle perspective distortion, enhancing authenticity. The color palette is muted and warm—whites, browns, skin tones, and soft neutrals—giving the image a modern, editorial lifestyle feel.
Captured with a smartphone camera, featuring realistic lighting falloff, slight grain, and natural color balance. The overall aesthetic is intimate, contemporary, and unfiltered—blending everyday realism with understated fashion and personal expression.
```

### 569. 四格比基尼镜面自拍拼贴

**作者**: [sammy](https://x.com/sumiturkude007/status/2012045821563518976)  **日期**: 2026-01-16  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的提示，用于生成一个 4 格（2x2）逼真的镜子自拍拼贴画。主体通过严格的参考锁定（无面部/身体变化）指定，穿着蓝色和白色花卉比基尼，带有黄色饰边。每个面板都在室内更衣室/卧室环境中，以柔和、温暖的灯光呈现不同的俏皮姿势（下蹲、低坐、抬腿）。

![四格比基尼镜面自拍拼贴](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768631156861_4vu75t_G-w5AZ2bQAgZZJ8.jpg)

```
{
  "type":"img_prompt",
  "ref_lock":"strict",
  "layout":{
    "format":"4-panel 2x2 collage",
    "aspect_ratio":"1:1",
    "style":"mirror selfie"
  },
  "subject":{
    "skin":"light–medium warm tan, smooth, slight sheen",
    "face":{
      "shape":"soft oval",
      "cheeks":"naturally full",
      "nose":"straight bridge, rounded tip",
      "lips":"full with cupid bow, playful pout variations",
      "eyes":"almond, winged liner, long lashes, warm shadow",
      "brows":"arched, medium-full"
    },
    "hair":{
      "color":"medium brown",
      "style":"two braided pigtails",
      "bangs":"straight fringe",
      "accessory":"black sunglasses on head"
    }
  },
  "outfit":{
    "bikini":{
      "style":"triangle top + low-rise bottom",
      "pattern":"{argument name="bikini pattern" default="blue with white floral print"}",
      "trim":"yellow edging and ties"
    },
    "footwear":"yellow open-toe sandals with ankle strap",
    "jewelry":"large gold hoop earrings"
  },
  "accessories":{
    "phone":"light pink case, square dual-camera bump",
    "sunglasses":"held near lips in one panel"
  },
  "poses":{
    "p1":"deep squat, chin on fist, pout",
    "p2":"low sit, sunglasses near mouth",
    "p3":"one leg raised to mirror, holding braid",
    "p4":"leaning forward, knees bent, soft pout"
  },
  "environment":{
    "room":"indoor dressing/bedroom",
    "background":"white louvered closet doors",
    "floor":"beige carpet",
    "mirror":"full-length, thin gold frame"
  },
  "lighting":"soft indoor, neutral-warm, minimal shadows",
  "quality":"photorealistic, sharp, natural colors",
  "constraints":{
    "no_face_or_body_change":true,
    "match_reference_exactly":true
  }
}

  "main_prompt": "vintage 2016 bohemian bedroom portrait, young woman in her late teens to early 20s with olive/tanned Mediterranean skin, long dark brown hair in messy high bun with loose strands framing face, subtle natural makeup with dark eyeliner and nude lips, melancholic dreamy expression with half-lidded eyes gazing off-camera, slight pout, sitting on wooden chair leaning against wall with head resting on shoulder, one leg extended straight out resting on vintage colorful patterned suitcase, other leg bent casually, wearing sheer light {argument name="dress color" default="turquoise/teal"} lace long-sleeve mini dress with delicate floral embroidery and semi-transparent bodice revealing skin underneath, fluffy light blue faux-fur coat draped over shoulders and arms like a blanket, bare feet with natural toenails visible, ankle strap sandals loosely on one foot near suitcase, cozy eclectic bedroom interior: warm wooden floor, beige/yellow beaded curtain in window filtering soft golden afternoon light, hanging macramé plant holders with trailing green plants, round wooden mirror with plants reflection, potted plants, vintage suitcase with floral/retro pattern open nearby, soft warm sunlight streaming through curtains creating god rays and lens flare, film photography aesthetic from 2016 era, slight grain and vignette, muted pastel color palette with teal accents, photorealistic, ultra-detailed skin texture with natural pores and subtle imperfections, realistic lace transparency and fur fluffiness, dreamy nostalgic intimate vibe, shot on Canon AE-1 with 50mm f/1.4 film lens or Fujifilm Superia 400, shallow depth of field, soft bokeh on background elements, high detail on fabric textures and hair strands",

    "2016 bohemian aesthetic",
    "vintage film photography",
    "dreamy nostalgic portrait",
    "indie bedroom vibe",
    "soft golden hour light",

  "technical": {

    "lighting": "soft warm golden afternoon sunlight filtering through beaded curtains from window right, god rays a"
  }

### 574. 高山滑雪肖像与解剖学规格

**作者**: [Bethany](https://x.com/JustBethanyai/status/2011881497012421116)  **日期**: 2026-01-15  **语言**: en

> 一个用于在阿尔卑斯滑雪胜地生成逼真肖像的高度技术性提示。它包括具体的解剖学规范（体型、胸部丰满度、皮肤纹理细节）和技术光学设置，旨在呈现真实、高保真度的手持智能手机美学。

![高山滑雪肖像与解剖学规格](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768544768689_no4a31_G-uhhyfbQAEHO2v.jpg)
![高山滑雪肖像与解剖学规格](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768544768750_ku1a8j_G-uhhyXbQAg9Lqa.jpg)
![高山滑雪肖像与解剖学规格](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768544768852_xj8tle_G-uhhyfagAAKU-1.jpg)

```
{
  "protocol_manifest": {
    "aspect_ratio": "3:4",
    "resolution": "8K RAW",
    "rendering_engine": "Nano Banana High-Fidelity"
  },
  "subject_logic": {
    "identity_anchor": "100% accurate match of the woman in the reference photo. Exact facial structure, eye shape, and bone density preserved. No beautification.",
    "anatomical_specifications": {
      "face": "Natural skin texture, visible pores, flushed cheeks from the cold, subtle wind-chill redness around the nose, moisture on the lips.",
      "body_silhouette": "Top-heavy body type as per canonical reference. Heavy, visibly large and dominant bust volume that defines the silhouette under the ski jacket. Natural gravity pull and mass consistency.",
      "pose": "Full body or three-quarter shot. She is standing on a snowy slope, posing naturally for a friend. She is holding a {argument name="equipment type" default="snowboard"} vertically under her left arm, pressing it against her side. Her right hand is tucked into her jacket pocket or hanging naturally. Head tilted slightly, looking at the camera with a spontaneous, natural smile."
    }
  },
  "wardrobe_logic": {
    "outerwear": "White quilted premium ski jacket with a contrasting black collar and metallic snaps. The fabric shows tension and realistic folds over the chest area due to the heavy bust volume.",
    "headwear": "Beige cable-knit beanie; professional black ski goggles resting on the forehead.",
    "equipment": "A sleek, branded snowboard held under the left arm, showing glossy texture and snow dust."
  },
  "environment_logic": {
    "setting": "Sun-drenched Alpine ski resort. Jagged snow-capped peaks in the background, a blurry ski lift (funicular) rising behind her. Crisp, groomed corduroy snow on the ground.",
    "illumination": "Bright, direct mountain sunlight. High-contrast natural light. Cool-toned blue shadows in the snow, warm golden highlights on the subject's face.",
    "atmosphere": "Crisp winter air, slight snow haze in the distance, crystal clear sky."
  },
  "technical_logic": {
    "optical": "Handheld iPhone shot, 35mm equivalent focal length. Taken by a second person at chest level.",
    "pipeline": "Photorealistic, slight organic motion blur from handheld movement, no AI smoothing, authentic smartphone sensor grain.",
    "depth_of_field": "f/2.8 medium depth; the subject is sharp, the mountain peaks have a soft, natural bokeh."
  },
  "negative_prompt": {
    "forbidden": "holding phone, selfie, plastic skin, airbrushed, cartoon, anime, 3d render, distorted snowboard, low resolution, makeup filter."
  }
}
```

  "subject_1_left": {
    "description": "beautiful young woman in her early 20s, fit curvy athletic build with toned glutes and legs, long wavy light brown or blonde pigtails hair styled in high ponytail with loose strands, fair tanned smooth skin with healthy glow",

  },
  "subject_2_right": {

    "clothing": "light yellow halter-style sports bra with thin straps, matching high-waisted seamless short scrunch-butt pink leggings, white athletic socks",
    "details": "playful confident pose with hand on hip and subtle expression in mirror reflection, hair with natural volume"
  },

    "foreground": "dark rubberized gym floor with subtle texture",
    "midground": "large wall mirror reflecting both women fully and gym interior",
    "background": "modern gym with dim blue/purple ambient lighting, blurred cardio machines and weight equipment, exposed ceiling ducts and pipes, clean spacious professional fitness center atmosphere"
  },
  "lighting_and_atmosphere": "dim moody indoor gym lighting with cool blue/purple neon accents and overhead spots, subtle highlights on skin, hair, and shiny leggings fabric creating vibrant color pops, energetic confident workout vibe with high contrast between bright outfits and dark surroundings, photorealistic detail",
  "technical_quality": "highly detailed, sharp focus on subjects with realistic seamless fabric textures (scrunch-butt shine, crop top stretch), skin glow, hair movement, and mirror reflections, 8k resolution, professional mirror selfie photography style with slight wide-angle lens effect and natural depth of field softly blurring background equipment",

**作者**: [Özge Döner](https://x.com/astronomerozge1/status/2011857044257853578)  **日期**: 2026-01-15  **语言**: en

> 一个高优先级的提示，用于生成一张逼真的时尚编辑肖像，描绘一位女性手持红色口红，站在一面复古金色边框镜子前。关键特征是镜子上用口红写着“Happy International Bagel Day”字样，将俏皮的信息与感性、自信的美学融为一体。

```
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "tool": "NanoBanana Pro",
      "task_type": "photoreal_fashion_editorial_mirror_message",
      "version": "v1.0_INTERNATIONAL_BAGEL_DAY_MIRROR_LIPSTICK",

    "output_settings": {

      "dynamic_range": "natural_not_hdr",
      "skin_rendering": "real_texture_glow"
    },

    "creative_prompt": {
      "scene_summary": "A photorealistic high-fashion editorial portrait of a woman standing in front of a vintage gold-framed mirror, holding a red lipstick. On the mirror, written clearly in red lipstick handwriting, is the phrase: '{argument name="mirror text" default="Happy International Bagel Day"}', accompanied by a subtle lipstick kiss mark.",
      
      "subject": {
        "appearance": {
          "hair": "wet, softly wavy hair, slightly tousled",
          "makeup": "glossy red lips, luminous skin, natural sculpted makeup",
          "accessories": "gold hoop earrings",
          "outfit": "elegant red satin slip dress"
        },
        "expression": "confident, sensual, calm gaze slightly off-camera"
      },

      "environment": {
        "location": "sunlit interior",
        "background": "soft blurred background with warm daylight reflections",
        "mirror": "ornate vintage gold frame, clean reflective surface"
      },

      "text_on_mirror": {
        "exact_text": "Happy International Bagel Day",
        "style": "handwritten lipstick text",
        "color": "classic lipstick red",
        "placement": "upper right area of the mirror, clearly legible",
        "additional_element": "small lipstick kiss mark near the text"
      },

      "lighting": {
        "key_light": "warm natural sunlight from the side",
        "highlights": "soft glow on skin and lips",
        "shadows": "gentle and cinematic"
      },

      "mood": [
        "playful",
        "sensual",
        "editorial",
        "celebratory",
        "confident"
      ]
    },

    "negative_prompt": [
      "cartoon",
      "illustration",
      "blurry text",
      "misspelled words",
      "extra text",
      "logos",
      "watermark",
      "harsh flash lighting",
      "overexposed skin",
      "cheap makeup look"
    ]
  }
}

    },
    "environment_dense_description": {
      "setting": "Bright, modern, minimalist outdoor terrace exterior. Mediterranean aesthetic.",
      "foreground_elements": "Perched on steep cliffs, the terrace feature hand-painted ceramic details in azure and coral tones, blending rustic elegance with luxurious comfort. Furnished with sun loungers, shaded pergolas, and al fresco dining sets, they serve as private sanctuaries for savoring morning espresso or golden-hour aperitivos.",

**作者**: [Pinodi](https://x.com/PinodiArt/status/2011761270236622885)  **日期**: 2026-01-15  **语言**: en

> 一个结构化的提示，用于生成一张逼真的、自然的自拍照，照片中有两名女性坐在一辆现代汽车内，佩戴着复古时尚的配饰，如丝巾和复董太阳镜。该提示指定了低角度拍摄、雨天自然散射光，以及充满活力、俏皮的表情。

![坦率复古别致的汽车自拍提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768544791310_umv7nu_G-s1-ZzXoAArZcG.jpg)

```
{
  "image_generation_prompt": {
    "version": "1.0",
    "aspect_ratio": "9:16",
    "subject_analysis": {
      "characters": [
        {
          "description": "A young brunette woman on the left with long wavy hair.",
          "expression": "Playful 'kiss face' or pouty lips.",
          "accessories": [
            "Retro black rectangular sunglasses with dark lenses.",
            "A silk headscarf (babushka style) tied under the chin, featuring a watercolor floral pattern in shades of pink, purple, and muted green."
          ]
        },
        {
          "description": "A young blonde woman on the right.",
          "expression": "High energy, mouth wide open in a 'yell' or 'scream' pose, tongue visible, looking slightly upward.",
          "accessories": [
            "Vintage-style gold-rimmed cat-eye sunglasses with dark tinted lenses.",
            "A vibrant silk headscarf with a geometric floral pattern in bright blue, yellow, and lime green, tied under the chin.",
            "A classic multi-strand pearl necklace."
          ]
        }
      ],
      "composition": "Close-up candid selfie, low-angle shot taken from inside a vehicle, heads tilted together in a friendly, energetic pose."
    },
    "environment_and_setting": {
      "location": "Interior of a modern car, looking up toward the ceiling.",
      "background_details": [
        "A glass sunroof visible above the subjects.",
        "Clear raindrops scattered across the glass sunroof.",
        "Soft, overcast natural daylight filtering through the clouds and the car windows."
      ]
    },
    "style_and_technical_specifications": {
      "aesthetic": "Modern aesthetic, 'it-girl' vibe, retro-chic, playful and candid photography.",
      "camera_details": "Shot on a high-end smartphone camera (iPhone style), 24mm wide-lens, sharp focus on faces, slight motion blur to enhance the candid feel.",
      "lighting": "Natural, soft diffused light from a rainy day, realistic highlights on the skin and lips, subtle reflections on the sunglasses.",
      "quality_tags": "Photorealistic, ultra-detailed skin texture, 8k resolution, highly detailed fabric textures, cinematic color grading, high fidelity.",

    }
  }

**作者**: [Dan Reed](https://x.com/daaaaanc/status/2011155585840849292)  **日期**: 2026-01-13  **语言**: en

> 一个高度技术化且受限的提示，用于生成一张原始、高对比度、超广角镜面自拍，其中包含两位身穿同款比基尼的名人（Sydney Sweeney 和 Billie Eilish），强调严格的身份保留、逼真的皮肤物理效果、场景中全程锐利对焦以及高对比度美黑晒痕。

![超广角比基尼镜面自拍，带身份锁定](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768466912865_jwerci_G-kPWDyXEAAYP6Q.jpg)

```
(Vertical 9:16 smartphone aspect ratio). A raw, high-contrast mirror selfie captured with an iPhone 17 Pro using the 0.5x ultra-wide-angle lens. NO ARTIFICIAL BOKEH. Everything is SHARP and in focus from their eyelashes to the posters on the background wall.
Subject & Identity Locking (CRITICAL):
•Identity 1 ({argument name="identity 1 name" default="Sydney Sweeney"}): Strictly preserve her exact heart-shaped facial structure, hooded blue eyes, and voluminous blonde hair. Focus on a dominant structural bust volume and substantial, thick-toned leg presence.
•Identity 2 ({argument name="identity 2 name" default="Billie Eilish"}): Strictly preserve her unique facial structure, sleepy/heavy-lidded eyes, and dark, sleek hair. Focus on her fit, curvy physique and symmetrical structural volume.
•Bio-Fidelity: Render high-fidelity "TrueLens" skin physics: visible micro-pores, natural "satin-finish" glow, and fine peach fuzz catching the lamp light ONLY along the jawlines.
•The Tan Line Factor: Both women feature sharp, high-contrast aesthetic tan lines across their chests and hips, contrasting golden-tanned skin with pale white skin beneath the bikini lines, exactly like the reference.
•Expression: Both are looking into the mirror with a neutral, confident, and slightly indifferent "bedroom eyes" gaze.
Outfit & Physicality:
•Clothing: Both wear matching minimalist {argument name="bikini color" default="Cream/Sand-colored"} Triangle Bikini Sets.
•Tension: The ultra-thin strings show extreme elastic tension and a vacuum-tight fit, creating realistic physical interaction and "tension lines" where the fabric contours to their fit silhouettes.
•Physics: Realistic skin-to-skin interaction where they stand close together, and skin-to-surface compressionwhere their forms overlap.
Pose & Composition:
•Pose: A classic "fit-check" mirror selfie. Sydney (on the left) and Billie (on the right) are standing side-by-side. They are slightly popping their hips and arching their backs to maximize the high-impact S-curve silhouettes and aggressive hourglass structural tapering at the waist.
•Action: One of them holds a gold-colored iPhone 17 Pro to capture the full-body reflection.
Environment & Social Realism:
•Lighting: Warm, naturalistic indoor lighting from a bedside lamp. The light creates high-contrast highlights on their shoulders and defining shadows that amplify the 3D anatomical depth of their forms.
•Background (SHARP): A detailed, messy "lived-in" bedroom. An unmade bed with grey linens, walls covered in mismatched posters and photos, and a white-framed doorway are all perfectly IN FOCUS. No artificial depth-of-field.
Quality: Raw unedited social-media dump aesthetic, high dynamic range, visible digital grain in the deep shadows, 8k resolution. Single frame.
```

> 一张年轻女性在海滩的超写实自拍提示词，姿势俏皮（吐舌头，看向镜头外），穿着特定服饰（棕色蕾丝边比基尼上衣，叠戴金色首饰，包括一条 Dior 风格的吊坠项链）。环境是波涛汹涌的海洋和阴沉的天空，利用略微逆光的自然日光营造出休闲的夏日氛围。

![吐舌头的俏皮海滩自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768466916190_dagjtr_G-j4V_fXEAAlepg.jpg)

### 596. 安娜·德·阿玛斯 冬季滑雪自拍肖像

**作者**: [Selena 🔥](https://x.com/Queen_khan143/status/2011108982757220419)  **日期**: 2026-01-13  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的提示，用于生成一张超逼真的安娜·德·阿玛斯 (Ana de Armas) 在阳光明媚的冬季滑雪假期中的智能手机自拍。它侧重于逼真的皮肤纹理（可见毛孔、红润的脸颊）、明亮的眼睛和特定的服装（燕麦色针织帽、白色绗缝羽绒服）。背景包括阳光普照的白雪皑皑的高山景观，有滑雪缆车和滑雪板，强调清晰的阴影和高海拔的阳光。

![安娜·德·阿玛斯 冬季滑雪自拍肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768466960478_lcje1o_G-jk9VdbQAUqO1F.jpg)

```
An extremely detailed, high-resolution smartphone selfie photograph of actress Ana de Armas during a sunny winter ski vacation. She is smiling warmly while looking directly into the camera. Her face shows realistic natural skin texture with visible pores, soft freckles, and rosy cheeks flushed from the cold mountain air. Her distinctive blue-green eyes appear bright, sharp, and reflective in the sunlight. She is wearing a thick, textured oatmeal-colored ribbed knit beanie pulled low over her forehead, with large glossy black ski goggles resting on top of her head. She has on a pristine white quilted puffer jacket featuring a contrasting black fleece-lined high collar and a row of black snap buttons down the front. Her long blonde hair falls naturally in soft waves, framing her face and resting on her shoulders. The background shows a breathtaking alpine landscape beneath a clear blue sky, with sun-lit snow-covered mountain peaks. To the right behind her, a ski lift structure with visible chairs and cables can be seen, along with a pair of white alpine skis planted upright in the snow, displaying a black HEAD logo. Bright high-altitude sunlight creates crisp shadows and highlights the textures of the snow, clothing, and facial features.
```

### 598. 自拍人像冷暖光对比

**作者**: [行者AI视频](https://x.com/joshesye/status/2011084994270413139)  **日期**: 2026-01-13  **语言**: zh

> 一个详细的提示，用于生成一张使用 Nano Banana Pro 制作的年轻亚洲女性的垂直特写自拍肖像。该提示强调了具体的发型、妆容、服装和配饰细节，并着重于戏剧性的光线对比——主体上的冷蓝色/紫色光线和背景中的暖黄色钨丝灯光——以实现逼真的社交媒体风格“自拍”美学。

![自拍人像冷暖光对比](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768379509197_ybmo8o_G-jOkfSbcAA_kdf.jpg)

```
【主题】一位年轻女性，深棕黑色头发盘成发髻，额前散落几缕碎刘海；直视镜头，表情宁静略带慵懒。右手托腮，左手持手机作自拍姿势。

【妆容与肤质】自然清透妆容，眼妆干净，睫毛根根分明，双唇莹润；皮肤极其细腻，整体肤色在冷光映衬下透出蓝紫色光泽感。

【衣着】白色细吊带低胸上衣（简约修身款）。

【配饰】手腕叠戴透明粉珠串手链与金色细链手镯（带小花/四叶草吊坠）；指甲涂浅裸色甲油。

【道具】亮黄色手机/手机壳非常醒目（位于画面左下角），增强“随手社交自拍”的真实感。

【场景】昏暗餐厅/酒吧氛围，厚重黑窗帘为背景；白色圆桌上放置酒杯与小物件，多盏暖黄色台灯营造温馨环境光。

【光影与色彩】人物受冷蓝紫色补光（如屏幕光/LED补光）照射，背景则泛暖黄色钨丝灯光，形成鲜明冷暖对比；背景轻微虚化以突出人像。

【摄影语言】竖构图近景半身（胸部以上），略带俯视/平视角度，带手机人像模式质感，中浅景深，画面肌理“清晰而柔和”。
```

> 生成一张年轻男子的黑白高对比度照片的提示，使用用户上传自拍中的面部。图像应模仿 20 世纪 90 年代一次性相机粗糙、低保真的美学，背景设定在一个昏暗的家庭派对上。重点在于拍摄对象强烈、掠夺性的眼神，反映出刺眼的相机闪光灯，体现出一种“黑暗学院”坏男孩的氛围。

![高对比度 90 年代一次性相机人像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768466970053_fxyosl_G-jD67DbQAMINsA.jpg)

High-contrast black and white photo taken with a 1990s (use my face from the uploaded selfie)disposable camera at a dark house party. A handsome young man with dark, curly hair and a sharp jawline is staring directly into the lens Focus on the eyes: intense, light-colored irises with a piercing, predatory gaze, slightly heavy-lidded (siren eyes), reflecting the harsh camera flash. He is wearing a black button-down shirt. The image is grainy, lo-fi, with a "dark academia" bad boy aesthetic.

### 601. 氛围感室内镜面自拍，搭配“纯欲”美学

**作者**: [underwood](https://x.com/underwoodxie96/status/2011069724957069656)  **日期**: 2026-01-13  **语言**: en

> 一个给 Nano Banana Pro 的详细提示，描述了一张年轻亚洲女性在大气室内对着镜子自拍的照片，风格慵懒随性，身穿白色深 V 领上衣，露出黑色文胸肩带，旨在营造“纯欲”美学和真实的社交媒体氛围。

![氛围感室内镜面自拍，搭配“纯欲”美学](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768466992464_i2yyil_G-jBGh7bQAUQZRc.jpg)

```
Overview: This photo captures a highly atmospheric indoor Mirror Selfie. It freezes a moment of a young Asian woman in a relaxed state, featuring a strong "Pure and Desire" style (Innocent yet alluring) and an authentic social media lifestyle vibe.  Subject Features: Female, with fair complexion (cool porcelain skin). Her long black hair is tied back (into a low ponytail or bun), with air bangs framing her forehead and face. The makeup is exquisite yet natural, emphasizing reddish lips and a clear, translucent foundation.  Expression & Mood: Her eyes are either dreamy or focused on the phone screen, with her head tilted slightly, conveying a sense of nonchalant elegance. Her mouth is closed, and her expression is calm with a hint of sultriness.  Pose: Seated. She sits on a black leather chair, leaning back. Her right hand rests lazily behind her head/neck area, while her left hand holds the phone (silver iPhone) to take the mirror selfie. This pose naturally showcases her neck and shoulder lines.  Outfit Details: The core visual point is the "slouchy / effortlessly disheveled" style. She wears a white deep V-neck long-sleeved top (the material looks soft, like modal or fine knit). The neckline slips off, revealing her collarbones, a large area of skin on her chest, and visible black thin bra straps, creating a classic "black and white contrast" and a hint of sexiness. She wears black trousers on the bottom.  Environment & Lighting: The background is very simple, featuring beige/grey wallpaper and wooden door frames or mirror frames on the sides. The lighting is soft and even, resembling indoor natural light or softbox lighting, giving the skin a delicate texture. There is a black hair tie on her wrist (adding a touch of realistic detail).  Vibe: Intimate, casual, the refined daily life of an urban woman, and a sense of relaxation.
```

      "right_side": "beige ceramic tiles with a horizontal brown accent stripe",
      "left_side": "dark gray or metallic stall partition door"
    },
    "details": {
      "signage": "partially visible white sign on the left door with red border and black text ('I'VE NEVER...', 'A GAME', 'I JUST RAN OUT', 'OF TIME')",
      "hardware": "silver metal stall latch/lock mechanism visible on the door frame",
      "ceiling": "drop ceiling tiles visible at the very top"
    }
  },
  "technical_details": {
    "aspect_ratio": "9:16 (vertical portrait)",
    "lighting": "overhead fluorescent indoor lighting, creating soft shadows and highlights on the skin and hair",
    "shot_angle": "eye-level, taken from behind the subject"
  }
}

{

She is wearing a matching grey two-piece athleisure set consisting of a ribbed, sleeveless cropped tank top and tight-fitting grey shorts with distinct cargo-style pockets on the glutes. She is wearing black ankle socks with a white Nike swoosh visible on the side.",
"anatomy_and_proportions": "Physique is fit and toned with a focus on lower body curvature. The glutes are prominent and shaped, emphasized by the tight shorts and the kneeling pose. The waist is tapered, leading to a wider hip ratio. The side profile of the chest is visible, showing natural volume and projection consistent with a fit body type, supported by the ribbed fabric. Shoulders are relaxed.",

},
"pose": {

"limbs": "Legs are folded underneath, shins flat against the carpet, sitting back towards the heels. The left arm hangs naturally by the side. The right arm is raised, elbow bent, holding a smartphone to capture the reflection.",
"head_and_gaze": "Head is turned to face the mirror directly. Eyes are looking at the phone screen/reflection. Chin is slightly tucked."
},
"environment": {
"setting": "Indoor bedroom interior.",
"background_elements": "A white paneled interior door with a silver handle is directly behind the subject. To the right, a black Marshall guitar amplifier sits on the floor against the wall. The floor is covered in plush grey wall-to-wall carpeting. White baseboards line the walls.",
"foreground_elements": "The edge of a black-framed full-length mirror is visible on the left side of the frame."
},
"camera": {
"perspective": "Mirror selfie perspective. The image is a reflection seen in a large standing mirror.",
"shot_type": "Medium-full shot, capturing the subject from the knees up to the top of the head.",
"focal_length": "24mm to 28mm equivalent (smartphone main camera).",
"depth_of_field": "Deep depth of field; both the subject and the immediate background (door, amp) are in focus."
},
"lighting": {
"type": "Natural diffuse daylight.",
"source": "Light source coming from the right side of the room (off-screen window), illuminating the subject's face and side profile.",
"quality": "Soft and even, creating gentle shadows on the left side of the body and behind the subject on the door.",
"shadows": "Natural contact shadows where the leg
```

**作者**: [Neiju](https://x.com/Neijux/status/2010932488026407009)  **日期**: 2026-01-13  **语言**: ja

> 一个旨在生成逼真“居酒屋自拍”图像的提示，它特意融入了低光环境下智能手机摄影中常见的瑕疵元素。关键元素包括带有紫色镜头光晕的暖光、显示脸红的皮肤纹理、前置摄像头造成的广角畸变，以及低光噪点，以实现一种“生动感”而非完美的渲染。

![逼真的居酒屋自拍，带刻意的不完美感](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768467010419_iypt5r_G-hEUt8aMAAexb5.jpg)

```
居酒屋セルフィー
・{argument name="照明の色" default="暖色"}照明＋紫のレンズフレア
・頬の赤らみ（skin_textureで指定）
・スマホ前カメラの広角歪み
・低照度ノイズ
```

### 611. 超逼真的奢华酒店浴室肖像

**作者**: [Prompt Girl](https://x.com/GirlPromptSkin/status/2010899219436224554)  **日期**: 2026-01-13  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的提示，用于生成一张超逼真的女性时尚肖像，场景设定在豪华酒店浴室，强调保留身份特征、自然的皮肤纹理和温暖的灯光，同时她穿着深红色泳衣。

![超逼真的奢华酒店浴室肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768466941042_ibmb8z_G-gmLtWbQAEi2bu.jpg)

```
Ultra-realistic luxury hotel bathroom portrait, photorealistic fashion photography, 8K quality, natural skin texture, zero facial alteration, identity fully preserved.
A beautiful woman standing in a resort-style bathroom, facial features remain 100% intact and unmodified. She has straight, waist-length jet-black hair, same hairstyle maintained, hair gently brushed back with both hands in a sensual yet natural pose.
Skin tone is very fair with a radiant glow-skin makeup look, soft pink blush, subtle pink eyeshadow, glossy pink lip gloss, luminous highlights on cheekbones.
Outfit: {argument name="swimsuit color" default="dark red"}, close-fitting swimsuit that complements her elegant figure.
Environment: warm luxury bathroom interior. Light brown natural stone or marble-pattern tiled wall behind a freestanding stone vessel sink shaped like a bowl. A large round mirror mounted above the sink. White ceramic toilet visible on the right side. On the lower left counter rests a wide-brim straw hat and minimal resort accessories.
Lighting: soft warm yellow lighting from a hanging lamp combined with gentle ceiling lights, creating a relaxing, intimate, high-end resort atmosphere.
Pose & expression: looking directly at the camera with confident, seductive elegance, relaxed posture as if adjusting her swimsuit or getting ready.
Camera: eye-level medium shot, shallow depth of field, cinematic realism, professional fashion editorial lighting, luxury hotel aesthetic.
🚫 NEGATIVE PROMPT (IMPORTANT)
face distortion, altered facial features, beauty filter, plastic skin, over-retouching, exaggerated curves, unrealistic body proportions, blur, low resolution, harsh lighting, cartoon style, CGI, anime, painting, watermark, text, logo, extra limbs, duplicate face, distorted hands, overexposed highlights, harsh shadows
```

  "prompt_type": "photorealistic close-up gym mirror selfie",

  },
  "environment": {
    "foreground": "rubberized gym floor with subtle texture, women's legs and sneakers in sharp focus",
    "midground": "large gym mirror reflecting full scene, women centered",
    "background": "modern spacious gym with rows of black cardio machines (ellipticals, treadmills) on both sides, large windows on left allowing natural light, high ceiling with exposed ducts and bright overhead lights, clean professional fitness center atmosphere"
  },

### 613. 超逼真浴室镜自拍，搭配挑染发型

**作者**: [Pinodi](https://x.com/PinodiArt/status/2010749793216197059)  **日期**: 2026-01-12  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的提示，用于生成一张在现代浴室环境中拍摄的、真实自然的、高分辨率的镜子自拍照。它指定了一位身材丰满的年轻女性，坐在白色石英梳妆台上，留着深棕色长发，带有粗大的金色“挑染”，穿着一件超大号的炭灰色运动衫和运动短裤。该提示强调了细节纹理、温暖的漫射照明，以及显示大理石瓷砖和固定装置的复杂背景反射。

![超逼真浴室镜自拍，搭配挑染发型](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768319104750_iddl8u_G-eeCosWQAAN70D.jpg)

```
{
  "meta": {
    "description": "Ultra-detailed reproduction prompt for a specific mirror selfie scenario.",
    "target_quality": "Photorealistic, 8K, Highly Textured, Candid Style",
    "aspect_ratio": "9:16"
  },
  "prompts": {
    "positive_prompt": "A candid, high-resolution mirror selfie photograph taken inside a brightly lit modern bathroom. The subject is a young woman in her early 20s with a curvy, fit physique, sitting sideways on a polished white quartz vanity countertop. Her most distinctive feature is her long, wavy dark brown hair which has prominent, thick blonde 'money piece' highlights framing her face. She has a warm, peachy skin tone, sharp black winged eyeliner, well-defined eyebrows, and a small silver stud nose piercing in her right nostril. She is smiling softly at her reflection holding up a silver iPhone 14/15 Pro with her right hand, showing long, light baby blue coffin-shaped acrylic nails. She is wearing an oversized, slouchy dark charcoal grey off-the-shoulder sweatshirt that falls off her left shoulder, revealing strap, and tight, grey marled cotton athletic jersey shorts. The pose emphasizes her curved hip and thigh. The mirror reflection behind her is detailed, showing a large glass-enclosed shower with white marble subway tiling, chrome fixtures, a ceiling fan, and a glimpse of a bathtub area. In the background (not in reflection), there is a white paneled door and a hand towel with a green pine tree pattern hanging on a rack. The lighting is warm and diffused indoor bathroom lighting, creating soft shadows. The image should have natural film grain, extremely detailed textures on skin pores, hair strands, fabric folds, and stone surfaces. 8k resolution, incredibly detailed, sharp focus on the subject.",
    "negative_prompt": "cartoon, painting, 3d render, anime, blurry, low resolution, grainy, distorted, unattractive, bad anatomy, extra fingers, deformed hands, missing limbs, bad eyes, crossed eyes, overly filtered skin, airbrushed, unnatural lighting, oversaturated colors, ugly, deformed face, noisy, low contrast, watermark, text, signature."
  },
  "parameters": {
    "aspect_ratio": "9:16",
    "cfg_scale": 7.5,
    "steps": 30,
    "sampler": "DPM++ 2M Karras",
    "seed": -1,
    "style_preset": "photographic"
  },
  "breakdown_analysis": {
    "subject": {
      "age": "Early 20s woman",
      "hair": "Long, wavy, dark brown base with distinct thick blonde face-framing highlights",
      "face": "Smiling softly, winged eyeliner, nose stud piercing",

    },

> 一个高度详细的提示，用于生成女演员西德尼·斯威尼 (Sydney Sweeney) 在阳光明媚的冬季滑雪假期中，一张超逼真的智能手机自拍照。它侧重于具体细节，例如她温暖的笑容、自然的皮肤纹理、有质感的燕麦色毛线帽、白色绗缝羽绒服，以及带有可见滑雪缆车和品牌滑雪板的高山背景。

She is smiling warmly while looking directly into the camera. Her face shows realistic natural skin texture with visible pores, soft freckles, and rosy cheeks flushed from the cold mountain air. Her distinctive blue-green eyes appear bright, sharp, and reflective in the sunlight. She is wearing a thick, textured oatmeal-colored ribbed knit beanie pulled low over her forehead, with large glossy black ski goggles resting on top of her head. She has on a pristine white quilted puffer jacket featuring a contrasting black fleece-lined high collar and a row of black snap buttons down the front. Her long blonde hair falls naturally in soft waves, framing her face and resting on her shoulders. The background shows a breathtaking alpine landscape beneath a clear blue sky, with sun-lit snow-covered mountain peaks. To the right behind her, a ski lift structure with visible chairs and cables can be seen, along with a pair of white alpine skis planted upright in the snow, displaying a black HEAD logo. Bright high-altitude sunlight creates crisp shadows and highlights the textures of the snow, clothing, and facial features."
}

### 616. 健身房镜子自拍，带身份锁和动态姿势

**作者**: [HODLER](https://x.com/hodlerr0/status/2010709729039753680)  **日期**: 2026-01-12  **语言**: en

> 一个旨在生成超逼真健身房镜面自拍的提示，严格保留上传参考图像中的人物身份。图像中，女性以动态柔韧姿势（腿向后抬起）呈现四分之三后视图，身着黑灰色运动服，置身于现代健身房中，光线 moody 且真实。

![健身房镜子自拍，带身份锁和动态姿势](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768319100100_pj44db_G-d50owXsAAqAUO.jpg)

```
Use the uploaded reference image as a strict identity anchor and preserve the person’s face, facial proportions, skin texture, and hair 100% exactly with no alteration, beautification, or reinterpretation. Ultra-photorealistic gym mirror/selfie style image showing a rear three-quarter back view of the same woman in a modern gym. She is dynamically posing with one leg raised high backward in a natural flexibility stretch or playful kick, looking back over her right shoulder with a subtle, confident smile. One hand casually holds black fingerless weightlifting gloves, posture relaxed and athletic, emphasizing a toned, fit physique without exaggeration. She wears a black fitted long-sleeve crop top with thumb holes and a small white heart logo on the sleeve, high-waisted short gray seamless athletic shorts with a small white activewear logo centered on the back waistband, and white athletic sneakers with black accents. Hair is pulled into a high ponytail with a few loose strands, skin realistic with natural highlights. Environment is a clean modern gym with rubberized flooring, dim cool overhead fluorescent lighting, red plyometric boxes, a black punching bag, and gym equipment softly visible in the background. Lighting is moody and realistic, creating soft shadows and subtle highlights on skin and fabric. Smartphone-realistic candid fitness photography, sharp focus on the subject, natural motion feel, high detail textures. Negative prompt: face or hair changes, frontal view, extra limbs, distortion, beauty filters, plastic skin, cartoon/anime, blur, text, watermark, extra people, cluttered focus.
```

**作者**: [Lex](https://x.com/katmanai/status/2010607185277919733)  **日期**: 2026-01-12  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的提示，用于生成一张具有忧郁美学的亲密、超写实肖像。它描述了一位年轻女性，皮肤非常白皙，有雀斑，铂金色头发，以及一丝不易察觉的嘟嘴表情，在昏暗的卧室中被捕捉。提示强调了温暖的金色台灯光线营造出的轮廓光、浅景深（散景），以及皮肤纹理和针织面料上的高细节，模仿了智能手机的特写效果。

![私密低光卧室自拍肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768319104240_xrwa44_G-cclC8WgAAzfZn.jpg)

```
{
  "prompt": "Intimate low-light bedroom selfie portrait of a young woman, very fair porcelain skin with subtle natural glow and light freckles, large captivating light blue eyes with soft natural lashes and slight winged liner, direct melancholic gaze at camera, full glossy nude-pink lips in subtle pout with finger gently touching lower lip, long voluminous platinum blonde wavy hair with loose curls cascading over shoulders and framing face, wearing oversized soft pink-white striped ribbed knit sweater with frayed cuffs, high neck, cozy and slightly oversized fit, sitting or leaning in dimly lit bedroom, warm golden lamp light from side creating gentle rim light on hair curls skin and sweater texture, subtle highlights on freckles and eyes, blurred background with neutral walls and soft curtains, shallow depth of field, strong cinematic bokeh, photorealistic intimate fashion selfie photography, high detail hair volume curls skin pores freckles knit texture fabric fuzz and natural imperfections, shot on smartphone close-up style with slight wide-angle, ultra detailed, 8k resolution",
  "negative_prompt": "cartoon, anime, illustration, painting, deformed, blurry, lowres, plastic skin, doll-like, heavy makeup overload, thick eyeliner, false lashes, filters, beauty filter, airbrushed skin, extra limbs, distorted proportions, asymmetrical face, harsh flash, cold lighting, day time overexposure, formal clothing, short hair, dark hair, crowded room, text watermark, logo, ugly, bad anatomy, eyes closed, no freckles, aggressive expression",
  "reference_image": {
    "enabled": true,
    "strength": 0.92,
    "description": "Strong primary reference for exact composition and vibe: young woman with long platinum blonde wavy hair, fair freckled skin, light blue eyes direct melancholic gaze, finger touching lower lip, pink-white striped oversized knit sweater, warm dim bedroom light, intimate close-up selfie style"
  },
  "style": "photorealistic intimate cozy bedroom selfie, soft melancholic aesthetic, warm golden indoor lighting",
  "aspect_ratio": "3:4",
  "lighting": "soft warm golden lamp light from side, gentle rim light on hair curls skin and sweater, subtle highlights on freckles eyes and lip gloss, cozy ambient glow with soft shadows",
  "camera": "smartphone selfie (iPhone style), close-up angle slightly from below, natural indoor warm light, minor grain for realism",
  "additional_details": [
    "hair: platinum blonde, long voluminous loose waves and curls, soft shine with strands falling over face and shoulders",
    "outfit: oversized pink-white horizontal striped ribbed knit sweater, high neck, frayed cuffs, cozy slightly baggy fit",
    "pose: sitting or leaning forward slightly, one hand with finger touching lower lip thoughtfully, relaxed intimate posture",
    "skin: very fair porcelain with light natural freckles across nose cheeks and forehead, realistic pores and dewy glow",
    "eyes: large light blue with detailed"
  ]
}

### 624. 超逼真抓拍智能手机自拍提示词

**作者**: [Doctor Wasif](https://x.com/doctorwasif/status/2010423848018100258)  **日期**: 2026-01-11  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的提示，用于生成一张超逼真、自然的年轻女性在厨房里用智能手机自拍（前置摄像头）的照片。它详细描述了拍摄对象的长相、姿势（比出“V”字手势框住眼睛）、服装和环境（明亮现代的厨房，前景物体杂乱），强调了清晨的强烈阳光和未经修饰的自然美感，并使用负面提示来避免常见的 AI 伪影。

![超逼真抓拍智能手机自拍提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768225961414_ks9ibd_G-Z11YwXwAABkjV.jpg)

```
Ultra-photorealistic smartphone selfie photo (front camera), portrait 4:5. A young adult woman seated at a kitchen table, centered framing from mid-torso to top of head. She has shoulder-length dark brown hair with soft layers, curtain bangs, and two small black hair clips on both sides. Expression is calm and slightly pouty, natural skin texture, minimal makeup. She raises her hand close to her face making a peace/V sign, with the fingers framing one eye. She wears a white ribbed camisole with delicate lace trim.
Lighting is strong direct morning sunlight coming from a large window on the left, creating hard shadows and bright highlights across her face, chest, and the table.
Environment: a bright modern kitchen with white walls and cabinets; a refrigerator in the background covered with small colorful magnets/souvenir magnets.
Foreground on the table: a white pump lotion bottle, a blue plastic water bottle, an amber pill/vitamin bottle, a pack of wet wipes, and some snack packaging including a red rectangular box, all slightly cluttered and casually placed.
Style: realistic color, natural contrast, sharp focus, high detail, authentic candid selfie look, HDR-like dynamic range, subtle film grain, no retouching, no beauty filter.
Negative Prompt (use this)
Blurry, low-res, over-smoothed skin, heavy makeup, glam retouching, unrealistic doll face, warped hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, deformed peace sign, crossed eyes, bad anatomy, distorted background, duplicated objects, text, watermark, logo, posterized lighting.
Suggested Settings
Aspect ratio: 4:5
Lens look: smartphone wide (24–28mm equivalent)
Quality: high / ultra detail
Style strength: low–medium (keep it natural)
also make watermark "doctorwasif" at bottom right corner
```

> 一个详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张全身健身房镜面自拍，具有原始、不加修饰、低保真写实美学，模拟智能手机前置摄像头拍摄。它需要一张参考图像来确定拍摄对象的身份，并侧重于真实的纹理、不均匀的照明以及数字噪点等伪影，以确保真实性。

  "scene": {
    "type": "commercial gym interior",
    "capture_style": "mirror selfie",
    "camera": "smartphone front camera",
    "aesthetic": "raw, candid, lo-fi realism"
  },

  "subject": {
    "character": "same as reference image",

    "body": {
      "build": "athletic with feminine curves",
      "legs": "toned, strong thighs and hips",
      "proportions": "natural, realistic"
    },

    "pose": {
      "position": "standing inside squat rack",
      "stance": "one knee slightly bent",
      "hips": "angled forward",
      "interaction": "leaning casually against barbell",
      "energy": "confident, relaxed, unposed"
    },

    "appearance": {
      "face": {
        "features": "exact same facial structure as reference image",
        "expression": "relaxed, confident, casual",
        "makeup": "minimal, gym-appropriate",
        "skin": "realistic texture, no smoothing"
      },
      "hair": {
        "color": "same as reference image",
        "style": "natural, worn down or loosely styled",
        "state": "slightly messy, mid-workout feel"
      }
    },

    "outfit": {
      "top": {
        "type": "tank top",
        "color": "black",
        "neckline": "deep neckline",
        "fit": "fitted athletic"
      },
      "bottom": {
        "type": "high-waisted workout shorts",
        "color": "olive green",
        "fit": "snug, functional"
      },
      "footwear": {
        "socks": "white crew socks",
        "shoes": "white trainers"
      }
    }
  },

  "environment": {
    "foreground": "squat rack and barbell",
    "midground": "subject reflected in mirror",
    "background": {
      "elements": [
        "metal gym racks",
        "weight machines",
        "rubber gym flooring",
        "other gym-goers blurred"
      ],
      "architecture": "high industrial ceiling with exposed beams",
      "lighting": "warm overhead gym lights"
    }
  },

  "camera_style": {
    "lens": "smartphone front camera",
    "distortion": "slight wide-angle distortion",
    "focus": "imperfect, slightly soft",
    "resolution": "low to medium",
    "artifacts": [
      "compression artifacts",
      "mild blur",
      "digital noise",
      "film grain"
    ]
  },

  "lighting": {
    "type": "uneven indoor gym lighting",
    "color_cast": "slightly warm",
    "quality": "non-cinematic, practical lighting"
  },

  "mood_and_style": {
    "vibe": "casual, confident, candid",
    "aesthetic": "modern lo-fi gym selfie",
    "authenticity": "looks like a real mirror selfie posted online"
  },

  "negative_prompt": [
    "ultra-high resolution",
    "professional photoshoot",
    "cinematic lighting",
    "studio polish",
    "flawless skin",
    "exaggerated curves",
    "plastic look",
    "studio background",
    "cartoon",
    "illustration",
    "text",
    "watermark",
    "celebrity likeness",
    "identity drift"
  ],

  "critical_req"
}

        "intense_pinkish_blush_blended_across_cheeks_and_nose_bridge",
        "soft_warm_skin_undertones_under_dim_lighting"

      "overall": "casual_selfie_pose_tilted_head_looking_directly_up_at_the_camera",

**作者**: [underwood](https://x.com/underwoodxie96/status/2009992377717666103)  **日期**: 2026-01-10  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的图像生成提示，用于生成一张年轻女性的特写半身自拍肖像，强调随意、放松的“社交媒体快照”氛围。该提示详细说明了发型、淡妆、服装（白色背心、灰色运动裤）、配饰、室内环境以及温暖柔和的灯光，以营造真实的手机摄像头质感。

![柔和室内光线下的特写自拍肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768143824855_imxkh0_G-TtPUKaAAASxfz.png)
![柔和室内光线下的特写自拍肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768143824972_njwi1i_G-TtPUNbgAAQNus.png)
![柔和室内光线下的特写自拍肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768143825282_167i47_G-TtPUnasAIfI_R.png)
![柔和室内光线下的特写自拍肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768143827774_w37r4s_G-TtPUkaYAAFnlg.png)

Subject: A young woman with light-colored skin and dark blonde/light brown hair casually tied in a low or mid messy bun, with a few loose strands framing her cheeks. Expression & Mood: Slight head tilt with a soft, playful smile; gentle eye contact directly toward the camera; casual, relaxed “social media snapshot” vibe. Makeup: Very natural light makeup — noticeable lashes, subtle blush, and naturally rosy glossy lips. Outfit: {argument name="top garment" default="White thin-strap tank top"} with a low or rounded neckline; waistband of gray sweatpants/lounge pants visible. Accessories: Short pearl necklace layered with a thinner metal chain. Pose & Composition: Close-up half-body to waist selfie; torso turned slightly with a slight lean forward; shoulders forming a diagonal line; the subject occupies most of the frame; background slightly blurred. Environment: Indoor setting with a light-colored wall; minimal shelving on the left with small décor items (picture frame / plant / small object); a black chair nearby. Warm indoor lighting with soft shadows, authentic phone-camera texture.
```

**作者**: [Lore](https://x.com/l_w_lorenzen/status/2009969416101040550)  **日期**: 2026-01-10  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的提示，用于生成一张原始、低保真美学的健身房镜子自拍，明确要求拍摄对象酷似 Sydney Sweeney。该提示侧重于特定的健身服装、姿势（倚靠在深蹲架杠铃上）以及模拟智能手机前置摄像头的技术限制，包括低分辨率、数字噪点和不完美的焦点，同时保持逼真的身体比例。

![低保真健身房镜面自拍，形似西德尼·斯威尼](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768143894357_vm6ywd_G-TYJcjasAAgHWA.jpg)

```
A mirror selfie taken inside a commercial gym, photographed with a smartphone front camera. The subject is an attractive, athletic woman with a curvy, feminine build, strong thighs and hips, toned legs, and a confident stance. She is wearing a black tank top with a deep neckline and {argument name="shorts color" default="olive-green"} high-waisted workout shorts, white socks, and white trainers.

She stands inside a squat rack, one knee slightly bent, hips angled forward, leaning casually against the barbell. The gym environment is clearly visible: metal racks, weight machines, rubber flooring, high industrial ceiling with exposed beams, warm overhead lights, and other gym-goers blurred in the background.

Her face is fully visible and resembles {argument name="subject likeness" default="Sydney Sweeney"} — soft facial features, expressive eyes, blonde hair styled naturally, minimal makeup, realistic skin texture — captured casually as if mid-workout. Expression is relaxed and confident, not posed.

The photo has a raw smartphone aesthetic:

noticeable film grain and digital noise

low resolution

mild blur and compression artifacts

imperfect focus

uneven indoor lighting

slightly warm color cast

The image feels candid and unpolished, like a real gym mirror selfie posted online.
Photorealistic, casual realism, modern lo-fi aesthetic, natural body proportions.

Camera & Style Cues

Smartphone front camera

Mirror selfie

Slight wide-angle distortion

Indoor gym lighting

No studio polish

Negative Prompt;

ultra-high resolution, professional photoshoot, cinematic lighting, flawless skin, exaggerated curves, plastic look, studio background, cartoon style, text, watermark
```

> 一个叙事性提示，描述了一位名叫 Sloane 的、惊慌失措的 Z 世代女性，她在一个狭小的衣柜角落里对着镜子自拍，检查一件拉链难拉的复古超短连衣裙是否合身。该提示强调了随性、非摆拍的性质、糟糕的灯光以及为群聊准备的“FitCheck”美学。

![抓拍 Z 世代穿搭镜面自拍叙事](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768143821009_69qons_G-TOdPfWEAAoVNr.jpg)

```
Sloane is ten minutes late and just realized the vintage micro-mini dress she bought needs an industrial zipper pull. Panicked, she’s contorting herself in the full-length mirror, using her iPhone to get a full-body fit check before she tries to wrestle the zip the rest of the way up. She knows the lighting in her cramped, cluttered closet corner is terrible, but the photo is just for her group chat to confirm the look is 'giving.' The intensity in her eyes is pure adrenaline, not posing.
```

### 642. Google Meet 自拍时 MacBook 屏幕的原始照片

**作者**: [Dan Reed](https://x.com/daaaaanc/status/2009644963194105910)  **日期**: 2026-01-09  **语言**: en

> 一个高度具体的提示，用于生成一张超逼真的银色 MacBook Air 放在木质书桌上的照片，强调所有层面的清晰对焦（无散景）。图像捕捉到 MacBook 屏幕显示着一个正在进行的 Google Meet 通话，其中主体（身份已从参考图像中锁定）正通过网络摄像头自拍镜子中的自己，从而创建了一个具有逼真屏幕眩光和表面瑕疵的复杂分层图像。

![Google Meet 自拍时 MacBook 屏幕的原始照片](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768143622276_5zi6k1_G-Ov6ZDXwAED9nw.jpg)

```
(Vertical 3:4 aspect ratio). A raw, ultra-realistic physical photograph of a silver MacBook Air sitting on a light oak wooden desk. This is a handheld photo of a screen. NO ARTIFICIAL BOKEH. Everything is SHARP and in focus from the keyboard to the window in the background.
Layer 1: The Physical Hardware (MacBook & Environment)

The MacBook screen is the focal point. Direct, bright natural daylight streams in from a window behind the laptop, partially illuminating the keyboard and creating a realistic sun-glare on the screen's glossy surface.
Surface Imperfections (High Realism): Visible fine dust particles on the black keyboard keys, a few realistic oily fingerprints on the screen's bezel, and the grain of the wooden desk are perfectly SHARP.
Background: Soft white curtains and a bright window are visible behind the laptop, making the room feel airy and lived-in.
Layer 2: The Digital Interface (macOS & Google Meet)

The screen displays a Chrome browser window with multiple active tabs (Google Meet, Google Docs, Calendar).
An active Google Meet video call is in progress. The interface controls (mute, camera, end call red button) are sharp and legible at the bottom of the call window.
Layer 3: The Subject & Identity Locking (The "Uff" Content)

Identity: Strictly preserve the exact face and unique features of the woman in Image 1 (Selfie).
Bio-Fidelity: Inside the video call window, she is seen taking a mirror selfie through her webcam. She has a playful "kiss-face" or "pout" expression.
Appearance: Her blonde hair is styled in a straight, shoulder-length cut. Her skin shows ultra-high-fidelity "TrueLens" physics: visible micro-pores and a healthy "satin-finish" glow even through the webcam's digital feed.
The Selfie Architecture: On the laptop screen, she is holding a smartphone with a distinctive blue-and-white cloud-patterned case, capturing her own reflection.
Quality & Lighting:

Lighting: High-key, bright, and optimistic morning light. The contrast between the bright screen and the natural room light is perfectly balanced.
Quality: Raw smartphone photo aesthetic, high dynamic range, visible subtle moiré patterns on the laptop screen pixels, 8k resolution. Single frame.
```

### 644. 超逼真高对比度镜面自拍提示词

**作者**: [Dan Reed](https://x.com/daaaaanc/status/2009624038033801441)  **日期**: 2026-01-09  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的图像生成提示，旨在创建一张原始、高对比度的侧面镜子自拍，具有极致的真实感，重点关注详细的皮肤物理效果、特定的身体比例以及未经修饰的“生活化”环境美学，模仿使用高端智能手机拍摄的现代社交媒体“穿搭检查”照片。

![超逼真高对比度镜面自拍提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768143640537_mq62be_G-OeaRKX0AAWedK.jpg)

```
(Vertical 9:16 smartphone aspect ratio). A raw, high-contrast side-profile mirror selfie captured with an iPhone 17 Pro using the 0.5x ultra-wide-angle lens. NO ARTIFICIAL BOKEH. Everything is SHARP and in focus from the subject's eyelashes to the power strip on the floor.
Subject & Identity Locking:
•Identity: Strictly preserve the exact face and unique features of the woman in Image 1 (Selfie).
•Bio-Fidelity: Render high-fidelity "TrueLens" skin physics: visible micro-pores, natural "satin-finish" night hydration glow, and fine peach fuzz catching the light ONLY along the jawline.
•Expression: Looking into the mirror reflection with a confident, neutral, and magnetic gaze.
•Silhouette Calibration (MAXIMUM UFF-FACTOR): Replicate high-impact side-profile proportions. Focus on a dominant structural bust volume and substantial, thick-toned gluteal and thigh volume. Emphasize the aggressive hourglass structural tapering at the waist.
Outfit & Physicality:
•Clothing: A skin-tight, {argument name="dress color" default="Deep Emerald Green"} Velvet Mini Dress.
•Tension: The reflective velvet fabric shows extreme elastic tension and a vacuum-tight fit, creating realistic micro-folds and highlight-sheen that defines her fit silhouette. The material reacts to the side-lighting, showcasing the anatomical depth of her form.
•Matter Physics: Realistic skin-to-surface compression (thigh squish) is visible as she leans slightly toward the mirror.
Pose & Composition:
•Pose: Standing in a 3/4 side-profile twist. She is popping her hip toward the mirror and arching her back to create an extreme S-curve silhouette.
•Action: Her RIGHT HAND holds a black iPhone 17 Pro (with a circular PopSocket grip), capturing the full-body reflection in an arched floor mirror.
Environment & Social Realism:
•Lighting: Direct natural window light from the side, creating high-contrast highlights and deep, sharp shadows that define the 3D volume of her physique.
•Background (SHARP): A detailed, cluttered "lived-in" bedroom. An unmade bed with grey linens, scattered pillows, a power strip with messy black cables on the wooden floor, and a plush toy on the bed are all perfectly IN FOCUS. No artificial depth-of-field; the room feels authentic and uncurated.
Quality: Raw unedited social-media "fit-check" aesthetic, high dynamic range, visible digital grain in the deep shadows (ISO 800 style), 8k resolution.
```

Create a full-body mirror selfie of a well-dressed man in a classic black formal suit.

Shirt neatly tucked in, tie slightly relaxed but clean.
One hand in the trouser pocket, the other holding a phone in front of the mirror.
Face partially covered by the phone, natural confident expression.

Indoor modern setting with minimal grey tiled background.
Warm natural light coming from one side, creating soft shadows on the wall.
Clean floor reflection, realistic lighting and fabric texture.
Keep body proportions natural and realistic (no height or body exaggeration).
Ultra-realistic, sharp details, professional fashion photography.
Looks like a real high-quality mirror selfie, not AI-generated.

  },

      },
      "makeup": {
        "style": "Fresh, post-shower bare skin",
        "details": "Natural hydration glow, slight under-eye shadows, natural lip gloss"
      }
    },
    "wardrobe": {
      "base_layer": "Thin white cotton spaghetti-strap tank top",
      "accessories": "Small 14k gold hoop earrings"
    },
    "posture_and_mood": {
      "pose": "Mirror selfie, right hand holding phone, slightly tilted head",
      "expression": "Peaceful, calm, trace of morning fatigue",
      "eye_contact": "Directed at phone screen reflection (downward gaze)"
    }
  },
  "environment_layer": {
    "primary_setting": "Modern Loft/Scandinavian Bathroom",
    "background_elements": {
      "wall_texture": "Red marble concrete with subtle grit",
      "window_location": "Left frame, providing directional soft light"
    },
    "foreground_tabletop": {
      "surface": "Neutral matte surface",
      "mirror_object": {
        "shape": "Perfectly round",
        "frame": "Polished chrome metal",
        "features": "Slim metal stand, realistic silvering reflection"
      },
      "decor_props": [
        {
          "id": "diffuser",
          "label": "ASOMA",
          "material": "Clear glass, wooden sticks",
          "position": "Left foreground"
        },
        {
          "id": "candle",
          "material": "Red glass jar",
          "state": "Partially burned, visible wax residue",
          "position": "Right foreground"
        }
      ]
    }
  },
  "lighting_and_optics": {
    "lighting_profile": {
      "source": "Natural diffused daylight",
      "direction": "Side-lit from left",
      "color_temperature": "5500K (Slightly cool morning light)",
      "shadow_quality": "Soft, feathered edges"
    },
    "camera_simulation": {

}

### 652. 戴眼罩和头巾的逼真镜面自拍

**作者**: [simply](https://x.com/kingofdairyque/status/2009490797889245228)  **日期**: 2026-01-09  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的提示，用于生成一张逼真的、抓拍的镜子自拍照，重点是一个个人护理时刻，画面中一位女士戴着毛巾发带和金色水凝胶眼膜，强调真实的皮肤纹理、自然日光和极简的斯堪的纳维亚美学。

![戴眼罩和头巾的逼真镜面自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768143691636_g8cfqb_G-MlOwTa8AAR7Th.jpg)

```
A highly realistic mirror selfie of a young woman taken through the reflection of a round tabletop mirror with a chrome metal frame and stand. The composition feels intimate and natural, like a quiet personal care moment.
She is wearing a thin white spaghetti-strap tank top. Her head is wrapped in a soft grey-beige terry towel styled as a turban, fully covering her hair. Under her left eye, a single pair of gold hydrogel eyepatches is applied — semi-circular, slightly reflective with a subtle metallic sheen.
Her face appears makeup-free or with very minimal natural makeup. Skin looks fresh, hydrated, and real, with visible natural texture, soft pores, slight tonal variations, and gentle under-eye shadows. Lips have a neutral tone with a light natural gloss. She wears small gold hoop earrings.
She holds a black iPhone with a triple-camera module (similar to iPhone 11 Pro or newer) in her right hand, angled toward the mirror. Her expression is calm and relaxed, slightly tired but peaceful, with her gaze directed slightly downward at the phone screen.
Environment & background:
Behind her is a grey concrete-textured wall. On the left side of the frame, a window allows soft natural daylight to enter, creating gentle, diffused illumination with a slightly cool tone.
On the table in front of the mirror:
On the left: a clear glass diffuser bottle with wooden sticks, labeled “ASOMA”.
On the right: a brown glass candle jar, partially burned, with visible wax residue.
Mood & lighting:
Soft natural daylight, subtle shadows, no harsh highlights. Scandinavian / loft-style bathroom atmosphere, minimalistic, cozy, quiet. Color palette consists of muted greys, warm beige, soft whites, and restrained gold accents.
Photographic realism, candid lifestyle photography feel, shallow depth of field, natural lens perspective (50–85mm equivalent), true-to-life proportions, no beauty retouching, no plastic skin, no exaggerated features, high detail, realistic reflections, authentic mirror distortion, editorial-quality realism.
```

  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "tool": "NanoBanana Pro",

      "version": "v1.0_MUSEUM_FRESCO_MIRROR_KISS_ID_LOCK_ULTRA_REAL_EN",

        "purpose": "ABSOLUTE_IDENTITY_POSE_COMPOSITION_BACKGROUND_LOCK",
        "strict_lock": true,
        "lock_strength": 1.0,
        "preserve_framing": true,
        "preserve_pose": true,
        "preserve_phone_position": true,
        "preserve_hand_positions": true,
        "preserve_kiss_contact": true,

        "no_identity_blending": true
      }
    },
    "identity_rules": {
      "preserve_identity": true,
      "identity_lock_strength": 1.0,
      "face_similarity_priority": "MAX",
      "same_two_subjects_only": true,
      "no_identity_blending": true,
      "no_face_morph": true,
      "no_beautify": true,
      "no_age_shift": true
    },
    "output_settings": {
      "aspect_ratio": "match_reference",
      "orientation": "portrait",
      "resolution_target": "ultra_high_res",
      "render_style": "ultra_photoreal_candid_museum_lifestyle",
      "sharpness": "crisp_subject_soft_background",
      "film_grain": "very_subtle_sensor_noise",
      "color_grade": "true_to-life_warm_indoor",
      "dynamic_range": "high",
      "skin_tone": "natural_true_to_reference"
    },
    "camera": {
      "camera_style": "smartphone mirror photo (natural, not overprocessed)",
      "lens": "24mm_equivalent",
      "aperture": "f/1.8",
      "shutter_speed": "1/120",
      "iso": 640,
      "white_balance": "indoor_warm_3600K",
      "focus_mode": "face_detect_af",
      "focus_priority": "faces_then_phone_edges",
      "realism_notes": "realistic mirror smudges/dust, gentle phone HDR, slight wide-angle perspective, no artificial sharpening halos"
    },
    "global_scene": {
      "setting": "grand baroque/renaissance interior with ornate columns and a dramatic fresco ceiling above",
      "lighting": "soft ambient indoor light, natural falloff, no harsh flash; subtle highlights on hair and jackets",
      "mood": "romantic, elegant, candid, museum-date vibe"
    },

      "group": {

        "wardrobe": {
          "male": "dark suit or dark jacket, clean minimal, no logos",

  }

```
{
  "prompt": "Extremely detailed close-up portrait selfie of a young European woman, 18-22 years old, Caucasian features with fair to light skin tone, delicate beautiful face, large expressive hazel or blue-grey eyes looking directly at camera with soft dreamy/intimate gaze, long dark brown wavy hair slightly tousled and windswept, strands falling over forehead and cheeks, snowflakes gently clinging to eyelashes, hair, cheeks, nose tip, and lips creating a magical winter effect, small straight nose with subtle snow accumulation, full natural pinkish lips slightly parted in relaxed expression, soft youthful cheeks with natural flush from cold, light freckles or subtle skin texture visible, wearing cozy oversized {argument name="coat color" default="beige or off-white"} winter coat or hoodie with fur-lined hood partially visible framing the face, snow-covered outdoor winter setting, dark moody background with blurred snowy trees or urban night, heavy snowfall atmosphere, soft diffused cold blue-grey lighting mixed with warm skin tones, cinematic moody vibe, snow particles in air and on skin, realistic frozen breath hints, photorealistic, ultra detailed snowflakes texture, realistic skin pores and cold-reddened cheeks/nose, hair strands with ice crystals, fabric fuzz on coat, 8k, sharp focus, intimate winter portrait style, high resolution smartphone camera quality with slight grain and natural low-light softness",
  "negative_prompt": "blurry, lowres, deformed, bad anatomy, extra limbs, fused fingers, poorly drawn hands/face/eyes, bad proportions, watermark, text, logo, signature, cartoon, anime, 3d render, plastic skin, doll-like, overexposed, harsh flash, heavy makeup, thick eyeliner, contour, necklace overload, earrings, tattoos, piercing, multiple people, crowded scene, visible phone arm/hand in frame, bright daylight, warm sunny lighting, summer elements, big smile, duck lips, forced expression, beard, male, elderly, child, heavy filters, tropical background, no snow, indoor setting",
  "parameters": {
    "aspect_ratio": "3:4",
    "style": "photorealistic, moody winter portrait",
    "lighting": "cold diffused winter light, soft blue-grey tones with warm skin contrast",
    "detail_level": "ultra detailed, 8k, realistic snowflakes skin hair fabric",
    "skin_texture": "realistic pores, natural cold flush, subtle imperfections",
    "sampler": "DPM++ 2M Karras or Euler a",
    "steps": 40,
    "cfg_scale": 7.5,
    "seed": -1
  }
}
```

### 657. 室内狗狗镜面自拍，如照片般逼真

**作者**: [KeorUnreal](https://x.com/KeorUnreal/status/2009310061005558175)  **日期**: 2026-01-08  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张逼真的室内镜子自拍。构图聚焦于一位年轻女性的后四分之三视角，她身穿亮面乳胶紧身裤和高领毛衣，回眸凝视。场景设置在一扇宽大明亮的窗户前，前景中有一只黑色拉布拉多犬正在休息。

![室内狗狗镜面自拍，如照片般逼真](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767967442230_wh3bx7_G-KA2HLWQAA0lrM.jpg)

```
{
  "prompt_type": "photorealistic indoor mirror selfie",
  "main_composition": "rear three-quarter back view of a single young woman standing confidently near a large bright window, looking back over her right shoulder with a subtle playful expression, head slightly tilted, relaxed pose with slight back arch and hip tilt emphasizing curves, black dog visible in lower right foreground resting near windowsill, natural daylight flooding modern bright interior",
  "subject": {
    "description": "beautiful young woman in her early 20s, attractive feminine features with light glamorous makeup (bold red matte lipstick, defined eyeliner, subtle contour), large expressive eyes visible in profile, fair skin with smooth glow, long straight dark brown or black hair styled in a low side ponytail with loose strands",
    "clothing": "fitted taupe or light brown long-sleeve ribbed turtleneck or mock-neck top with subtle texture, high-waisted shiny gray faux leather or latex leggings with glossy finish and seam details hugging curves",
    "details": "oversized black round-framed glasses, hair slightly tousled with natural volume, confident teasing expression with direct eye contact over shoulder, no visible jewelry or tattoos"
  },
  "props": {
    "dog": "black Labrador retriever partially visible in lower right, head and front paws resting on windowsill or floor, calm relaxed pose adding cute casual home element"
  },
  "environment": {
    "foreground": "white windowsill and lower part of large multi-pane window with blurred outdoor greenery",
    "midground": "woman centered against bright window backdrop",
    "background": "modern bright indoor room with white paneled walls and trim, large floor-to-ceiling style window with white frames letting in abundant natural light, clean minimalist residential interior"
  },
  "lighting_and_atmosphere": "bright natural daylight streaming from large window behind subject, soft even illumination with warm highlights on skin, hair, and glossy leggings, subtle cool tones from window light contrasting shiny fabrics, cozy casual home vibe with fresh daytime feel, high detail photorealistic",
  "technical_quality": "highly detailed, sharp focus on subject with realistic hair strands, ribbed fabric texture, glossy legging reflections, and dog fur details, 8k resolution, professional candid mirror selfie style with natural depth of field softly blurring distant background",
  "negative_prompt_suggestions": "blurry, deformed, extra limbs, frontal view, harsh shadows, overexposed window light, underexposed face, low quality, cartoon, anime, text watermark, extra people, cluttered background, visible phone or selfie artifacts"
}
```

{
  "prompt_type": "descriptive_image_generation",
