    "gender": "Female",
    "age_range": "early 20s",
    "hair": "Long dark brown hair tied in a high ponytail",
    "accessories": "White fabric headband",
    "skin_tone": "Fair to light-medium",
    "expression": "Soft confident expression, subtle smile",
    "pose": "Standing with one foot propped on a stool, body slightly angled, holding a {argument name="smartphone color" default="pink"} smartphone for a mirror selfie"
  },
  "attire": {
    "top": "White halter-style crop top",
    "bottom": "Short brown micro mini skirt",
    "hosiery": "White thigh-high stockings with lace trim",
    "footwear": "White pointed-toe high heels"
  },
  "props": {
    "phone": "Pink smartphone",
    "furniture": "Light wood stool"
  },
  "environment": {
    "location": "Bright minimalist indoor room",
    "flooring": "Light wood flooring",
    "background_elements": [
      "Full-length mirror",
      "Large green potted plant",
      "Neutral walls"
    ]
  },
  "lighting": {
    "type": "Soft natural daylight",
    "quality": "Even, diffused, flattering"
  },
  "camera": {
    "shot_type": "Full-body mirror selfie",
    "angle": "Eye-level",
    "focus": "Sharp focus on subject, clean background"
  },
  "style": {
    "aesthetic": "Modern, clean, lifestyle fashion photography",
    "realism": "High realism, photorealistic",
    "quality": "Ultra-detailed, high resolution"
  },
  "negative_prompts": [
    "face distortion",
    "extra limbs",
    "blurry image",
    "low resolution",
    "overexposed lighting",

    "AI artifacts"
  ]
}

### 665. 一致性身份日常日志提示（四象限）

**作者**: [Adam也叫吉米](https://x.com/Adam38363368936/status/2009102143840494022)  **日期**: 2026-01-08  **语言**: en

> 这是一个为 Nano Banana 设计的高度结构化 JSON 提示，旨在生成一个四象限网格图像，通过日常活动（早晨、跑步、咖啡、早餐）描绘一个连贯的身份。它强调超现实的神经合成、8K RAW 精度，并基于上传的参考图像，实现象限间的 100% 几何匹配。

![一致性身份日常日志提示（四象限）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767967505603_s2cqmb_G-HC04waUAAQnal.jpg)

```
{
  "system_architecture": {
    "version": "22.0_terminal_logic_grid",
    "project_id": "Consistent_Identity_Daily_Routine_Log",
    "framework": {
      "format": "2x2 Quadrant Grid",
      "aspect_ratio": "3:4",
      "engine_mode": "Hyper-Realistic Neural Synthesis",
      "fidelity_tier": "8K RAW / Zero-Retouch / Authentic"
    }
  },
  "biometric_anchor": {
    "subject_id": "the woman I uploaded",
    "identity_logic": {
      "fidelity_index": 1.0,
      "consistency_lock": "100% Geometry Match across all quadrants",
      "surface_parameters": [
        "Natural skin texture (pores, vellus hair)",
        "Zero beauty-filter smoothing",
        "Sub-surface scattering (SSS) enabled",
        "Authentic facial contours and proportions"
      ]
    }
  },
  "quadrant_temporal_logic": {
    "quadrant_01": {
      "id": "MORNING_WAKEUP",
      "perspective": "Mirror Reflection / Bathroom Selfie",
      "state_logic": {
        "facial": "Sleepy / Puffy eyelids / Subtle soft morning smile",
        "hair": "Unstyled bedhead / Natural morning volume / Messy",
        "apparel": "Loose-fit random cotton T-shirt"
      },
      "environmental_logic": {
        "location": "Domestic Bathroom",
        "lighting": "Standard cool-white overhead bulb",
        "composition": "Imperfect framing / Phone visible in reflection"
      }
    },
    "quadrant_02": {
      "id": "MID_ACTION_RUN",
      "perspective": "Arm-Extension / High-Motion Selfie",
      "state_logic": {
        "facial": "Focused intensity / Labored breathing / Flushed skin",
        "apparel": {
          "primary": "{argument name="running outfit color" default="Hot-pink"} shimmery athletic set",
          "accessory": "White technical running cap"
        }
      },
      "environmental_logic": {
        "location": "Sidewalk / Running Path",
        "lighting": "Natural morning sunlight / Sharp highlights",
        "dynamics": "Motion energy / Hair tucked under cap"
      }
    },
    "quadrant_03": {
      "id": "COFFEE_REST",
      "perspective": "Close-Proximity / Handheld Selfie",
      "state_logic": {
        "facial": "Thoughtful / Relaxed / Averted gaze",
        "interaction": "Holding ceramic coffee cup mid-sip"
      },
      "environmental_logic": {
        "location": "Indoor Cafe / Table Setting",
        "lighting": "Soft window-diffused daylight",
        "composition": "Deep focus / Minimal background separation"
      }
    },
    "quadrant_04": {
      "id": "OBSERVED_BREAKFAST",
      "perspective": "Third-Person Candid / Non-Selfie",
      "state_logic": {
        "facial": "Off-guard / Natural / No camera awareness",
        "interaction": "Using cutlery / Eating breakfast naturally"
      },
      "environmental_logic": {
        "location": "Outdoor Breakfast Patio",
        "lighting": "Bright overhead noon daylight",
        "composition": "Off-center framing / Rea"
      }
    }
  }
```

**作者**: [Heisenberg](https://x.com/rovvmut_/status/2008915377506648482)  **日期**: 2026-01-07  **语言**: en

> 生成一张关于两位时尚年轻人的高级时装极简主义编辑照片的提示。它指定了俯视高角度自拍视角、广角镜头畸变、搭配的黑色服装、窄边太阳镜、纯白色无缝影棚背景，以及柔和的漫射光，以营造出现代眼镜广告的审美效果。

![极简主义时尚大片自拍提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767966118402_p83cpi_G-EZ459aAAA06oO.jpg)

```
Minimalist fashion editorial photograph, overhead high-angle selfie perspective, two stylish young adults standing close together. Shot on a wide-angle lens with subtle perspective distortion, heads slightly enlarged, bodies tapering naturally. Both wearing sleek black outfits and narrow black sunglasses. Confident, neutral expressions. Pure white seamless studio background. Soft, diffused studio lighting with minimal shadows. High contrast, sharp focus. Contemporary eyewear campaign aesthetic. Ultra-clean composition, high-fashion realism, magazine editorial quality. 3:4 aspect ratio.
```

### 669. 超逼真高山自拍提示词

**作者**: [Iris](https://x.com/xIrissy/status/2008895874957754674)  **日期**: 2026-01-07  **语言**: en

> 一个为 Gemini Nano Banana Pro 设计的详细图像生成提示，旨在创建一张年轻女性在阿尔卑斯滑雪胜地的超逼真自拍。该提示细致地指定了人物外貌、服装（毛线帽、滑雪镜、羽绒服）、环境（雪山、滑雪缆车）、光线和相机设置（24 毫米、浅景深），以实现高质量、网红旅行美学风格的图像。

![超逼真高山自拍提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767966177298_v9gfd2_G-EIJAnbYAAYylQ.jpg)

```
{
  "prompt_structure": {
    "subject": {
      "description": "Young woman taking a selfie",
      "appearance": {
        "hair": "{argument name="hair style and color" default="Long, straight, platinum silver/grey hair cascading over shoulders"}",
        "skin": "Fair complexion with realistic texture, visible pores, freckles across nose and cheeks, natural rosy flush from cold weather",
        "eyes": "Bright, light-colored eyes looking directly at camera",
        "expression": "Soft, confident smile, relaxed demeanor"
      },
      "pose": "Selfie angle, arm extended, close-up portrait shot, head slightly tilted"
    },
    "apparel": {
      "headwear": "Beige ribbed knit beanie, large black ski goggles resting on forehead (brand details visible)",
      "outfit": "{argument name="outfit" default="White quilted puffer ski jacket with black inner collar lining, silver snap buttons, high-quality fabric texture visible"}"
    },
    "props": {
      "equipment": "White 'HEAD' branded ski standing vertically to the subject's right, distinct branding text"
    },
    "environment": {
      "location": "Alpine ski resort, snowy mountain peaks in distance",
      "background_elements": "Ski lift gondolas hanging on cables, blurred snow-covered mountains, other skiers faintly visible in distance, clear blue sky with light wispy clouds",
      "atmosphere": "Cold, crisp, winter vacation vibe"
    },
    "lighting": {
      "type": "Natural daylight",
      "quality": "Bright, high-key lighting, strong fill light from snow reflection, soft shadows, catchlights in eyes"
    },
    "camera_settings": {
      "angle": "Front-facing selfie perspective",
      "focal_length": "24mm (smartphone wide angle)",
      "depth_of_field": "Slightly shallow, keeping subject sharp while gently blurring the mountain background",
      "composition": "Rule of thirds, subject centered"
    },
    "technical_details": {
      "quality": "Ultra Photorealistic, 8k resolution, RAW photo quality",
      "rendering": "Unreal Engine 5 level detail, subsurface scattering on skin, realistic fabric textures (knit wool, nylon puffer), sharp focus, high dynamic range"
    },
    "mood": "Adventurous, happy, fresh, influencer travel aesthetic, winter luxury"
  }
}
```

### 670. 梵高博物馆自拍提示词

**作者**: [Keskin](https://x.com/craftian_keskin/status/2008841289761190159)  **日期**: 2026-01-07  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的提示，用于生成一张文森特·梵高在安静的艺术博物馆内，用智能手机自拍的逼真、抓拍照片。该提示要求 AI 使用一张上传的图片作为梵高自画像的参考，该自画像必须在他身后的画框中可见，同时强调现代手机相机美学（广角镜头、胶片颗粒、逼真的反光）与 19 世纪服饰的结合。

![梵高博物馆自拍提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767966118793_w9gpy3_G9_NxoYXUAA4n9v.jpg)
![梵高博物馆自拍提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767966119529_de0slb_G9_NxobWYAAZEkK.jpg)

```
Model-ready prompt (use your uploaded image as reference for the framed painting):
A candid smartphone selfie photo taken inside a quiet art museum gallery. Vincent van Gogh stands in the foreground at arm’s length holding a modern phone toward the camera, smiling warmly with bright eyes. He is positioned so that, right beside him on the wall, there’s a framed display of his own famous self-portrait (match the look/colors/brushwork of the reference image), clearly visible and recognizable behind glass. The museum setting includes a clean white wall, subtle placard label near the frame, soft ambient gallery lighting, and gentle reflections on the frame’s protective glass.
 Composition: vertical selfie framing, slightly wide-angle, his face close to lens, the framed painting fully in shot over his shoulder; natural perspective distortion typical of phone selfies.
 Wardrobe/appearance: 19th-century attire (simple jacket/coat), short reddish beard, neatly combed hair; expression friendly and proud.
 Lighting: soft diffused museum track lights, even exposure, mild highlight on face, realistic shadow falloff.
 Style: photorealistic modern phone photo with film grain, slight halation, subtle color noise, gentle vignette; crisp but not overly sharp, authentic candid moment.
 Camera cues: iPhone-like wide lens (≈24–26mm equivalent), f/1.8 look, shallow-to-moderate depth of field, slight motion micro-blur, realistic skin texture, accurate museum reflections.
Optional negative prompt:
painting/illustration look, heavy stylization, cartoon, warped face, extra fingers, deformed hands, duplicated phone, text artifacts, unreadable signage, watermark, logo, over-sharpening, HDR haloing, extreme blur, low-res, uncanny eyes, incorrect museum context
ar 3:4
```

**Related**: [[手绘素描]]、[[综合艺术]]、[[名片与Logo]]

### 671. 2x2 冬季滑雪自拍拼贴画，带狗狗

**作者**: [𝘬𝘦𝘭𝘭𝘺](https://x.com/kelly00056/status/2008812502579388904)  **日期**: 2026-01-07  **语言**: en

> 一个结构化提示，用于生成一张 2x2 网格拼贴画，其中包含四张几乎相同的自拍风格照片，拍摄地点为高山滑雪度假村。图像中包含两名年轻女性和一只白色蓬松的小狗，并详细描述了她们的服装（羽绒服、毛线帽、护目镜）和雪山背景，旨在营造一种欢快、生活化的美学。

![2x2 冬季滑雪自拍拼贴画，带狗狗](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767966132435_tg1dbk_G-C8UPBaEAABpth.jpg)

```
{
  "image_composition": {
    "layout": "2x2 grid (quad-panel collage) of four nearly identical selfie-style photographs.",
    "subject_positioning": "Two young women and a small dog are centered in the foreground, positioned from the chest up.",
    "camera_angle": "High-angle selfie perspective, slightly tilted."
  },
  "subjects": {
    "woman_left": {
      "hair": "Long, blonde, straight hair with a side part.",
      "clothing": "White quilted puffer jacket, black undershirt.",
      "accessories": "Black ski goggles resting on her forehead.",
      "expression": "Broad, cheerful smile showing teeth."
    },
    "woman_right": {
      "hair": "Long, wavy brunette hair.",
      "clothing": "Black puffer jacket.",
      "accessories": "Cream-colored ribbed knit beanie.",
      "expressions_per_panel": {
        "top_left": "Gentle smile.",
        "top_right": "Winking and making a peace sign (V-sign) with her hand.",
        "bottom_left": "Pouting/kissing face.",
        "bottom_right": "Pouting/kissing face (identical to bottom left)."
      }
    },
    "dog": {
      "breed_type": "Small white fluffy dog ({argument name=\"dog breed\" default=\"Maltese or Bichon Frise type\"}).",
      "features": "Dark eyes, black nose, tongue slightly out in a 'happy' expression.",
      "position": "Held centrally between the two women."
    }
  },

### 674. 超逼真镜面自拍提示词，具有详细的材质物理特性和身份锁定功能

**作者**: [Dan Reed](https://x.com/daaaaanc/status/2008682059922042948)  **日期**: 2026-01-06  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的图像生成提示，旨在创建极其逼真、原始、高对比度的镜面自拍。它指定了严格的身份锁定、皮肤纹理的生物保真度（TrueLens 物理）、精确的服装材质真实感（真空紧身平纹针织），以及环境细节，如逼真的镜面瑕疵和清晰的背景，旨在营造一种未经编辑的社交媒体分享美学。

![超逼真镜面自拍提示词，具有详细的材质物理特性和身份锁定功能](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767803990935_pssts9_G-BFr8xXcAEt6Xw.jpg)

```
(Vertical 9:16 smartphone aspect ratio). A raw, high-contrast mirror selfie captured with an iPhone 17 Pro. NO ARTIFICIAL BOKEH. Everything is SHARP and in focus from the ornate mirror frame to the wooden textures in the background.

Subject & Identity Locking:

Identity: Strictly preserve the exact face and unique features of the woman in Image 1 (Selfie).
Bio-Fidelity: Render high-fidelity "TrueLens" skin physics: visible micro-pores, a natural "satin-finish" glow, and fine peach fuzz catching the light ONLY along the jawline.
Expression: Looking into the mirror with a confident, calm gaze and neutral, full lips.
Silhouette Calibration: Prioritize a dominant structural bust volume and an aggressive hourglass structural tapering at the waist. Maintain a symmetrical and fit anatomical depth.
Outfit & Material Realism:

Clothing: A skin-tight, jet-black jersey-knit long-sleeved dress. The neckline is styled asymmetrical, sliding off her RIGHT shoulder to reveal her collarbone.
Tension: The fabric shows extreme elastic tension and a vacuum-tight fit, creating realistic micro-folds and "tension lines" that highlight her fit silhouette and the physical interaction between the textile and her form.
Accessories: A delicate silver chain necklace with interlocking double-circle pendants resting on her décolletage.
Pose & Composition:

Pose: A classic indoor mirror selfie. She is standing with a slight hip-pop to emphasize the S-curve of her physique.
Action: Her LEFT HAND holds an iPhone 17 Pro (with a prominent circular grip/PopSocket on the back) at chest level, capturing the reflection.
Environment & Social Realism:

Mirror: Captured through an ornate octagonal gold-gilt framed mirror. Crucially, the glass features realistic imperfections: faint water spots, dust particles, and minor smudges that catch the light for a "raw evidence" look.
Background (SHARP): A domestic bathroom setting. Behind her, a dark wood-grain door and a neutral-toned wall are perfectly IN FOCUS. The chrome handle of a sink faucet is visible at the bottom of the frame.
Quality: Raw unedited social-media dump aesthetic, high dynamic range, visible digital grain in the deep shadows, 8k resolution.
```

### 679. 低分辨率动态模糊猫咪自拍

**作者**: [Anissa](https://x.com/SimplyAnnisa/status/2008456291505893474)  **日期**: 2026-01-06  **语言**: en

> 一个高度具体的负面提示，旨在生成一种原始、不完美、低分辨率的智能手机自拍美学，其中包含一名女性和一只猫，具有因相机质量差和移动而导致的自然、不均匀的运动模糊，明确禁止锐利对焦或 AI 增强等高质量特征。

![低分辨率动态模糊猫咪自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767804055864_og86d6_G994WU9bcAIDDAK.jpg)
![低分辨率动态模糊猫咪自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767804056123_s2konk_G994WYYaMAA5pJa.jpg)

```
Use the uploaded reference photo. Low-resolution smartphone close-up selfie taken with a broken front camera screen. The image shows strong natural motion blur concentrated on the woman’s face, hair, and the cat, caused by weak autofocus, slow shutter speed, and slight hand movement while lying down. Blur appears uneven and organic, with soft smearing rather than smooth artificial blur. Facial features are partially obscured but still recognizable, with eyes, nose, and mouth visible as softened shapes. A young woman lies intimately on a cream-colored leather sofa. A light brown cat with bright green eyes is lying on the woman’s chest, pressing its body close and nuzzling its face against the woman’s cheek and jaw, partially covering her face. The cat’s head and the woman’s face overlap closely, creating intimate contact. Both the woman’s face and the cat’s face are noticeably blurred together, with softened edges and slight motion smear from small movements and breathing. The woman’s long brown hair is loose and slightly messy, falling over her forehead and partially blending into the cat’s fur due to blur. Hair strands appear heavily softened but still natural, not melted or warped. The cat’s fur texture is mostly lost, appearing as soft blurred patches consistent with low resolution and motion. Overall sharpness is low, with inconsistent focus across the frame — some tiny areas accidentally a bit clearer while most of the face and the cat remain out of focus. Flat, noisy skin texture with visible ISO noise, chroma noise, mild color banding, and muddy shadows typical of a cheap phone camera. The woman looks toward the lens with a soft, relaxed, intimate expression, though details are softened by blur. She wears simple, light-colored casual clothing, with fabric texture mostly lost. Lighting comes only from indoor room lights at night, slightly too bright, with mild overexposed highlights that do not completely blow out facial structure. Perspective distortion from the front camera wide-angle lens creates subtle stretching near the edges. The composition is very tight, awkward, and unintentional, filling the frame with the woman’s face and the cat’s body and head. The image feels like a raw, accidental selfie straight from the phone gallery — imperfect, intimate, noisy, naturally blurred, completely unedited, with no beautification and no AI enhancement.  NEGATIVE WARNINGS (important): high resolution, sharp focus, DSLR, cinematic lighting, studio lighting, ultra-detail, clean skin texture, beauty filter, HDR, professional photo, sharp edges, smooth look, AI enhancement, overprocessing, perfect blur, depth-of-field bokeh. ar 9:16
```

{
  "global_style_injection": "Heavy film grain, soft focus, dreamy Pro-Mist diffusion filter, motion blur from camera panning, vintage color grading, flash photography",
  "subject": {
    "description": "A 2x2 mirror-selfie collage of a charming Korean female idol in her bedroom. The image features a distinct 'shutter drag' effect where the subject is illuminated by flash but slightly blurred due to movement, creating a dreamy, hazy aesthetic.",
    "vibes": "Sexy yet innocent, intimate, slightly intoxicated mood (drunk on atmosphere), atmospheric, lo-fi aesthetic.",
    "looks": {
      "face": "Soft features, glowing skin due to diffusion filter, 'water-color' like makeup texture",
      "eyes": "Dreamy gaze, slightly out of focus in one panel, looking directly into the lens with a soft smile in another",
      "hair": "Long black hair, moving with the motion blur, creating silky trails"
    }
  },
  "clothing": {
    "style": "Pure and sexy loungewear",
    "item": "A white silk slip dress or a translucent oversized white t-shirt falling off one shoulder",
    "texture": "Silk or soft cotton that glows under the flash and diffusion filter",
    "details": "Hint of collarbone, casual disarray"
  },
  "pose": {
    "action": "Playful and dynamic movement. Not static.",
    "panels": [
      "Panel 1: Laughing while turning head, hair in motion blur",
      "Panel 2: Close-up wink with heavy Pro-Mist bloom on the face",
      "Panel 3: Sitting on floor, camera tilted, slight double-exposure effect from movement",
      "Panel 4: Covering mouth with hand, shy but flirting"
    ]
  },
  "background": {
    "setting": "Personal bedroom, slightly messy but cozy",
    "lighting_elements": "Warm bedside lamp, fairy lights, or neon sign reflection that creates light trails (bokeh streaks) due to the camera panning motion",
    "ambiance": "Dark room illuminated by the harsh but diffused flash"
  },
  "photography": {
    "technique": "Slow shutter sync flash (Drag Shutter)",
    "filter": "{argument name="diffusion filter" default="Black Pro-Mist 1/4 filter"} (creates halation around highlights)",
    "focus": "Soft focus, slightly missed focus for artistic effect",
    "color_grading": "Vintage film stock ({argument name="film stock" default="Kodak Portra 800 or Cinestill 800T"}), greenish shadows, warm glowing highlights",
    "texture": "Heavy film grain, noise, imperfection, analog feel"
  },
  "constraints": {
    "layout": "2x2 grid collage",
    "composition": "The camera panning effect should make the background lights streak horizontally or rotationally, while the flash freezes the face relatively clearly."
  }
}
```

**Related**: [[水彩]]、[[赛博朋克]]、[[奇幻世界]]

### 684. 原始高对比度镜面自拍 JSON 提示词

**作者**: [Dan Reed](https://x.com/daaaaanc/status/2008244707361780171)  **日期**: 2026-01-05  **语言**: en

> 一个高度具体的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张原始、高对比度的镜面自拍，长宽比为 9:16，模仿 iPhone 17 Pro 拍摄的照片。它要求严格锁定身份，高保真皮肤物理效果，运动服上极端的织物张力，以及前景和背景元素都清晰对焦，以实现未经编辑的社交媒体美学。

![原始高对比度镜面自拍 JSON 提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767682199224_tp6k49_G9636nEWsAAHT7D.jpg)

```
(Vertical 9:16 smartphone aspect ratio). A raw, high-contrast mirror selfie captured with an iPhone 17 Pro. NO ARTIFICIAL BOKEH. Everything is SHARP and in focus, from the decorative tree in the foreground to the sofa in the background.

Subject & Identity Locking:

Identity: Strictly preserve the exact face and unique features of the woman in Image 1 (Selfie).
Bio-Fidelity: Render high-fidelity skin physics: visible micro-pores, natural "satin-finish" skin hydration, and fine vellus hair catching the light ONLY along the jawline.
Expression (CRITICAL): Replicate the exact pouty, heavy-lidded, and blank yet confident expression from the provided reference. She looks into the mirror with a relaxed, slightly unimpressed or "bored" aesthetic, with full, relaxed lips and a neutral, direct gaze.
Silhouette Calibration: Amplify the dominant structural bust volume and the substantial, thick-toned leg presence. Focus on the aggressive hourglass structural tapering at the waist and the defined anatomical depth of the midriff.
Outfit & Physicality:

Clothing: A matching heather-grey jersey athletic set. The top is an ultra-crop long-sleeve, and the bottom is a pair of skin-tight micro-shorts.
Tension & Physics: The fabric shows extreme elastic tension and a vacuum-tight fit. Her RIGHT HAND is pulling down the waistband of the shorts slightly, creating realistic tension lines and a natural skin indentation on her hip.
Pose & Composition:

Pose: Standing frontally in a large circular mirror with a gold frame. Her torso is slightly arched to highlight the symmetrical curvature and athletic lines of her silhouette.
Action: Her LEFT HAND holds a white iPhone 17 Pro at eye level, capturing the full-body reflection.
Environment & Lighting:

Lighting: Realistic indoor overhead lighting that creates defining shadows under the bust and along the abdominal muscles, enhancing the 3D volume of her form.
Background (SHARP): The reflection reveals a detailed living area: a dark grey sectional sofa, a wall with a thermostat, and a messy pile of clothes on a chair.
Foreground: A dark wooden table in front of the mirror holds a mini gold-glitter decorative tree and scattered papers. Everything is perfectly IN FOCUS.
Quality: Raw unedited social-media dump aesthetic, high dynamic range, visible digital grain in the deep shadows, 8k resolution.
```

{
  "image_prompt": {
    "meta": {
      "aspect_ratio": "9:16",

      "style": "Sultry night-out mirror selfie"
    },
    "subject": {

      "hair": "Sleek back-swept wet look or effortless loose waves",
      "pose": "Leaning one hip against the marble sink, holding a small clutch and phone, body angled to accentuate curves",
      "outfit": "Backless black satin slip dress with thin spaghetti straps, layered thin gold chains"
    },
    "environment": {
      "location": "Dimly lit, aesthetic nightclub restroom",
      "background_elements": [
        "Large ornate mirror with some water droplets",
        "Red or pink neon sign reflection on the wall",
        "Marble countertop with a stray lipstick or drink glass"
      ]
    },
    "lighting": {
      "type": "Moody neon + Phone Flash",
      "characteristics": [
        "Strong red/pink ambient glow from the side",
        "Sharp frontal flash from the phone hitting the mirror and subject",
        "Deep, cinematic shadows"
      ]
    },
    "photography_style": {
      "style": "Candid glamour",
      "camera_look": "Smartphone camera with high-contrast flash",
      "imperfections": "Light smudge on the mirror over the shoulder area, slight motion blur on the hand fixing the hair, digital grain in shadows",
      "mood": "Sexy, mysterious, late-night allure"
    },
    "render_quality": {
      "realism": "High-fidelity lighting",
      "detail_level": "Focus on the gloss texture on the lips and the silk fabric sheen"
    }
  }
}

### 689. 和毛茸茸的猫咪一起的随性镜面自拍

**作者**: [Lex](https://x.com/lexx_aura/status/2008141640440177090)  **日期**: 2026-01-05  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的提示，用于生成一张逼真的、抓拍式的生活照，描绘一位年轻女性在舒适、阳光充足的卧室里，抱着一只毛茸茸的白猫自拍。该提示强调纹理细节（猫的皮毛、织物）以及温暖、诱人的清晨氛围。

![和毛茸茸的猫咪一起的随性镜面自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767682114321_x2g0m9_G95aKzMaAAAVGi-.jpg)

```
{
  "prompt_type": "4k_hd_photo_generation",
  "subject": {
    "description": "Young woman with long, messy wavy dark brunette hair and a playful, happy expression (scrunching nose).",
    "action": "Taking a mirror selfie while hugging a fluffy white cat.",
    "companion": "A large, fluffy white cat with soft fur and calm blue-green eyes, held close to the subject's chest."
  },
  "apparel": {
    "top": "Oversized {argument name="sweatshirt color" default="heather grey"} crewneck sweatshirt, casual fit.",
    "bottom": "White lounge pajama pants with a small, whimsical all-over print (cartoon cats/figures).",
    "footwear_context": "Fluffy beige slippers visible on the wooden floor in the background."
  },
  "environment": {
    "location": "Cozy, lived-in bedroom.",
    "background_elements": [
      "Unmade bed with white messy sheets and scattered clothes (denim jeans, grey tees)",
      "Clothing rack with neutral-colored garments hanging",
      "Wooden bedside table with a small modern lamp",
      "Large window allowing bright natural light",
      "Lush indoor plants (Monstera deliciosa) in white and woven pots near the window"
    ],
    "surface": "Large mirror with slight surface smudges and reflections."
  },
  "lighting_and_atmosphere": {
    "type": "Natural daylight, sun-drenched.",
    "mood": "Cozy, candid, authentic, morning vibe, warm and inviting.",
    "quality": "Soft shadows, high dynamic range."
  },
  "technical_specs": {
    "resolution": "4K, Ultra HD, 8K support",
    "style": "Photorealistic, candid lifestyle photography, mirror selfie perspective.",
    "camera_focus": "Sharp focus on the woman and cat, slight depth of field blurring the background details.",
    "textures": "Detailed fabric of the sweatshirt, individual strands of cat fur, natural skin texture."

}

![皮划艇自拍提示，适用于 Google Gemini Nano Banana Pro 2.5](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767607071334_f0xhcf_G94zF6WXkAAsW2F.jpg)

{   "action": "generate",   "content": {     "subject": {       "description": "A close-up selfie of a determined athletic woman with short blonde hair,  wearing a red protective helmet and a rugged olive-green life vest with black straps.",       "pose": "The woman is seated in a yellow kayak, holding a black paddle with a yellow blade in his right hand while taking a selfie with his left arm extended toward the camera."     },     "environment": {       "setting": "A narrow, steep rocky canyon with dark, mossy cliff walls and lush green trees visible at the top peaks.",       "water_conditions": "Fast-moving white water rapids with churning foam and splashes hitting the side of the kayak."     },     "technical_details": {       "camera_angle": "Low-angle wide-lens selfie perspective, creating a sense of immersion and speed.",       "lighting": "Bright, natural sunlight filtering down from the top of the gorge, creating high-contrast shadows on the rocks and sparkling highlights on the water.",       "style": "Hyper-realistic action photography with a shallow depth of field, focusing sharply on the man's intense expression while the background rapids have a slight motion blur."     },     "color_palette": [       "Vibrant yellow kayak and paddle",       "Deep red helmet",       "Natural mossy greens and dark grey rock",       "Crisp white water foam"     ]   } }

### 691. 超逼真复古小酒馆镜面自拍第一视角

**作者**: [yusra.](https://x.com/chatgptpaglu/status/2007837440162385986)  **日期**: 2026-01-04  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的提示，用于生成一张超逼真的 8k 分辨率图像，模拟在一家高档复古风格餐厅中拍摄的镜面自拍。它详细描述了拍摄对象的容貌、双重表情（自信的微笑和开心的笑声）、服装、配饰、温馨的暖光照明，以及智能手机模拟和丰富对比度等相机效果，营造出奢华的“夜生活”美学。

![超逼真复古小酒馆镜面自拍第一视角](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767606939959_qgl37a_G91FenkXAAAz4vn.jpg)
![超逼真复古小酒馆镜面自拍第一视角](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767606940362_6ye75q_G91FengWIAAmtJM.jpg)

```
{
  "prompt_details": {
    "subject": {
      "description": "Young woman with long, voluminous brunette hair featuring soft waves and a center part. She has almond-shaped eyes, arched brows, and defined facial features.",
      "expressions": [
        "Top: Subtle, confident smile, direct eye contact with the reflection.",
        "Bottom: Candid, joyful laughter, eyes closed, head tilted back."
      ],
      "attire": {
        "top_image": "Black high-neck sleeveless top, sophisticated and minimal.",
        "bottom_image": "Black strapless dress with subtle glittering texture (sequins or shimmer)."
      },
      "accessories": [
        "Delicate silver necklace (tennis style or similar)",
        "Thin gold/silver bracelets",
        "Rings on fingers"
      ]
    },
    "pose_and_action": {
      "type": "Mirror selfie POV.",
      "hands": [
        "Holding a wine glass filled with white wine.",
        "Holding a smartphone to capture the reflection."
      ],
      "posture": "Seated at a dining table, relaxed but elegant."
    },
    "environment": {
      "location": "Upscale, vintage-inspired restaurant or bistro.",
      "decor": [
        "Dark wood paneling",
        "Ornate mirrors reflecting the room",
        "Floral or tapestry-style wallpaper/upholstery",
        "Plush velvet seating (visible patterns)",
        "White tablecloths"
      ],
      "background_details": "Other diners softly visible in the background, vintage lamps with fringed shades."
    },
    "lighting": {
      "atmosphere": "Dim, warm, intimate evening ambiance.",
      "sources": [
        "Soft glow from vintage table lamps with warm shades",
        "Candlelight (prominent tall white candle in the bottom frame)",
        "Ambient reflection from mirrors"
      ],
      "effect": "Golden hour indoor tone, soft highlights on hair and skin, rich shadows."
    },
    "camera_and_tech": {
      "style": "Ultra Photorealistic, 8k resolution, candid lifestyle photography.",
      "camera_simulation": "Smartphone rear camera (iPhone Pro style), wide aperture (f/1.8) for depth of field.",
      "focus": "Sharp focus on the subject in the mirror reflection, soft bokeh on foreground elements (wine glass stem, candle).",
      "color_grading": "Warm, cinematic, slightly grainy low-light texture, rich contrast."
    },
    "mood": "Luxurious, festive, happy, chic, 'night out' aesthetic."
  }
}

> 一个详细的九格拼贴提示，用于化妆品广告（NYX Buttermelt Blush）。该网格指定了九个独特的镜头，从展示妆容效果的特写肖像，到详细呈现产品包装质地和显色度的超微距镜头，所有场景都设置在奢华的浴室环境中。

```
{
  "image_composition": {
    "type": "Collage",
    "layout": "3x3 Grid",
    "total_panels": 9
  },
  "visual_elements": {
    "subject": {
      "demographics": "Young woman with light skin tone",
      "features": {
        "hair": "natural",
        "eyes": "Blue",
        "eyebrows": "Groomed, natural arch"
      },
      "attire": {

        "jewelry": "Gold chain necklace with a small oval pendant"
      },
      "makeup_look": "Fresh, glowy base with prominent pink blush, defined lashes, and neutral glossy lips"
    },
    "product": {
      "brand": "{argument name="brand name" default="NYX Professional Makeup"}",
      "name": "{argument name="product name" default="Buttermelt Blush"}",
      "packaging": {
        "color": "Matte bubblegum pink",
        "shape": "Rectangular compact with rounded corners"
      },
      "texture_design": "Embossed geometric pattern resembling a woven or wavy checkerboard",
      "shade": "Soft rosy pink"
    },
    "environment": {
      "setting": "Luxury bathroom or hotel room",
      "surfaces": "White marble countertops with grey veining",
      "background": "Large mirrors, window with night view of city lights"
    }
  },
  "panel_breakdown": {
    "top_row": [
      {
        "position": "Top-Left",
        "description": "Model holding the open blush compact up to the camera with one hand, smiling softly."
      },
      {
        "position": "Top-Center",
        "description": "Still life of the product on a marble counter. One compact is standing closed (showing white logo text), another is lying open. Gold jewelry and a brush are in the background.""
      },
      {
        "position": "Top-Right",
        "description": "Model viewed through a mirror reflection, applying the blush to her cheekbone using a makeup brush."
      }
    ],
    "middle_row": [
      {
        "position": "Middle-Left",
        "description": "Close-up of a fluffy makeup brush sweeping across the surface of the blush powder, picking up pigment."
      },
      {
        "position": "Middle-Center",
        "description": "Extreme macro shot of the blush pan texture, highlighting the raised, woven geometric pattern in detail."
      },
      {
        "position": "Middle-Right",
        "description": "Portrait of the model looking directly at the camera, showcasing the finished makeup look with flushed cheeks."
      }
    ],
    "bottom_row": [
      {
        "position": "Bottom-Left",
        "description": "Extreme close-up (macro) of the model's face (eye and cheek area), showing skin texture, freckles, and the luminous finish of the blush."
      },
      {
        "position": "Bottom-Center",
        "description": "Model looking into the bathroom mirror, laughing/smiling widely with teeth visible."
      },
      {
        "position": "Bottom-Right",
        "description": "Product display on marble counter. Closed compact on left, open compact on right "
      }
    ]
  }
}

### 696. 牛仔镜面自拍人像

**作者**: [KeorUnreal](https://x.com/KeorUnreal/status/2007516521556554194)  **日期**: 2026-01-03  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张超高分辨率的女性镜面自拍肖像，她身穿牛仔紧身胸衣和迷你裙。该提示指定了构图（镜面反射，右手拿着智能手机）、拍摄对象的体格，以及带有温暖环境照明的干净、现代浴室场景。

![牛仔镜面自拍人像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767603979420_hno4ke_G9whoXyW4AAjAcx.jpg)

```
{
  "configuration": {
    "version": "2.0",
    "format": "Mirror-Selfie Portrait",
    "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
    "target_resolution": "8K UHD"
  },
  "subject_profile": {
    "biometrics": {
      "ethnicity": "European",
      "physique": "Curvy, hourglass silhouette",
      "facial_id": "High-fidelity, identical facial features, symmetrical",
      "skin_texture": "Realistic pores, soft matte finish"
    },
    "expression_and_gaze": {
      "mouth": "Softly parted lips",
      "eyes": "Direct eye contact via mirror, confident, calm",
      "head_angle": "Slightly turned, 15-degree tilt"
    },
    "kinematics": {

### 697. 超逼真的水上摩托艇度假自拍吻

**作者**: [Özge](https://x.com/astronomerozge1/status/2007515920630198670)  **日期**: 2026-01-03  **语言**: en

> 一个高度受限的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张超逼真的情侣水上摩托艇度假自拍。它要求特定的动作（亲吻脸颊，闭眼）、环境（开阔的海洋，强劲的尾流）和服装（霓虹绿救生衣），模拟在刺眼的午间阳光下拍摄的广角手机自拍。

![超逼真的水上摩托艇度假自拍吻](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767603984597_m2pf0x_G9wg7YiWIAAP94x.jpg)
![超逼真的水上摩托艇度假自拍吻](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767603985481_khe83v_G9wg7YkWQAEqEgd.jpg)

```
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "tool": "NanoBanana Pro",
      "task_type": "photoreal_lifestyle_vacation_selfie",
      "version": "v1.0_JETSKI_COUPLE_SELFIE_KISS_WAKE",
      "priority": "highest"
    },
    "output_settings": {
      "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
      "orientation": "portrait",
      "resolution": "ultra_high_res",
      "render_style": "ultra_photoreal_lifestyle",
      "sharpness": "crisp_but_natural",
      "film_grain": "none_or_minimal",
      "color_grade": "bright_true_to_life_summer"
    },
    "hard_constraints": [
      "Exactly TWO human subjects (one male, one female).",
      "Photorealistic only (no illustration, no CGI).",
      "Camera is a handheld front-facing selfie perspective (arm extended toward camera).",
      "Both wear neon green life vests (no readable brand text).",
      "Ocean wake and white foam trail behind them must be realistic.",
      "No text, no logos, no watermark.",
      "Natural anatomy, correct hands/fingers."
    ],
    "creative_prompt": {
      "scene_summary": "Create an ultra-photoreal vacation selfie on a jet ski in the open ocean under bright midday sun. The camera is held by the woman with her arm extended toward the lens, creating a natural wide selfie perspective.\n\nSubjects & action:\n- The woman is in the foreground, smiling broadly with eyes closed, joyful expression.\n- The man is directly behind her, leaning in to kiss her cheek/temple affectionately.\n- Both are wearing neon green life vests with black straps; wet hair and sunlit skin, realistic water spray highlights.\n\nEnvironment:\n- Deep blue ocean with strong texture, white foam and turbulence.\n- A long wake trail (white water) extends behind them, indicating speed.\n- Bright blue sky with scattered white clouds near the horizon.\n\nLighting:\n- Harsh natural sunlight (midday), crisp shadows, realistic highlights on skin and life vests.\n- No artificial flash.\n\nCamera & look:\n- Phone selfie look, slight wide-angle perspective.\n- Subjects sharp; background moderately sharp with natural motion feel but not blurry.\n- True-to-life color, clean summer vibe.\n\nDetails:\n- Visible wristwatch on the woman’s wrist.\n- Jet ski front edge partially visible at the bottom of the frame.\n- Water droplets and subtle spray reflections for realism."
    },
    "negative_prompt": [
      "extra people",
      "more than two subjects",
      "text",
      "logos",
      "watermark",
      "cartoon",
      "anime",
      "cgi",
      "plastic skin",
      "over-retouched faces",
      "warped hands",
      "extra fingers",
      "distorted anatomy",
      "blurred faces",
      "low resolution",
      "unrealistic water",
      "unrealistic wake",
      "overexposed highlights"
    ]
  }
}
```

### 700. 双镜自拍提示（红色 vs. 黄色开衫）

**作者**: [KeorUnreal](https://x.com/KeorUnreal/status/2007452441625702554)  **日期**: 2026-01-03  **语言**: en

> 以下是为 Nano Banana Pro 设计的两个结构化图像生成提示，旨在创建具有服装颜色细微变化（红色与黄色粗针开衫）的超逼真镜面自拍。这些提示详细说明了相机光学参数（模拟 iPhone 12/13 Pro）、强烈直射阳光以及意大利波西塔诺的背景，并要求使用参考面部。

![双镜自拍提示（红色 vs. 黄色开衫）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767604079875_0gkwhu_G9vnWdjXEAEI5gE.jpg)
![双镜自拍提示（红色 vs. 黄色开衫）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767604080105_fy74nh_G9vnWfBXIAEqL29.jpg)

```
{
  "meta": {
    "target_tool": "Nano Banana Pro",
    "image_dna": {"type": "Photo Mirror Selfie", "orientation_lock": "LOCKED 1:1", "sensor_emulation": "iPhone 12/13 Pro Front"},
    "aspect_ratio": "implied vertical"
  },
  "spatial_orientation_engine": {
    "facing": "Camera via mirror, torso square, head tilted subject's right",
    "camera": "Held in left hand at 3 o'clock"
  },
  "camera_optics": {
    "lens": "26mm f/1.6 deep DOF",
    "flaws": ["Digital sharpen", "minor flare", "wide distortion on hand"]
  },
  "environment": {
    "lighting": "Hard direct sunlight left, warm bounce, sharp shadow on chest from arm",
    "materials": "Satin scrunchie shine, matte wool absorb"
  },
  "subject": {
    "pose": "Head on right palm, left arm holding phone vertical, gaze at lens",
    "clothing": "{argument name="cardigan color 1" default="Red"} chunky knit cardigan over orange heathered tank with cleavage, black satin scrunchie on wrist",
    "identity": "[[USE_REFERENCE_FACE_SKIN_HAIR]]"
  },
  "generation_keywords": {
    "positive": "Photorealistic mirror selfie, hard sunlight window, chunky knit cardigan, satin scrunchie, detailed texture, sharp iPhone photo, positano Italy in backdrop, flowers",
    "negative": "blurry, soft light, distorted hand, no phone"
  }

{
  "meta": {
    "target_tool": "Nano Banana Pro",
    "image_dna": {"type": "Photo Mirror Selfie", "orientation_lock": "LOCKED 1:1", "sensor_emulation": "iPhone 12/13 Pro Front"},
    "aspect_ratio": "implied vertical"
  },
  "spatial_orientation_engine": {

### 702. 广角汽车自拍复刻提示词

**作者**: [Harboriis](https://x.com/harboriis/status/2007419119180931107)  **日期**: 2026-01-03  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的提示，旨在复制米色内饰汽车内真实的广角智能手机自拍。它对拍摄对象的姿势、服装、环境细节（天窗、米色内饰）有严格的限制，并要求输出精确复制上传的参考图像，包括透视畸变。

![广角汽车自拍复刻提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767603967851_fai4pf_G9vI37FbgAA8HBX.jpg)
![广角汽车自拍复刻提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767603967764_qhm9eu_G9vJAOKasAQrVAO.jpg)

```
Authentic smartphone Wide-angle selfie inside a beige-interior car with sunroof. Young man seated front left, left arm stretched toward camera, camera slightly above and in front, arm closest to lens. Beige roof fills top frame with sun visor and overhead console visible; sunroof shows trees, sky, power lines. Hair: medium-length wavy texture voluminous.

copy the uploaded reference image 1:1, reflective sunglasses, earbuds, relaxed confident expression, head slightly tilted right. Wearing loose textured grey-brown short-sleeve shirt slightly unbuttoned and light blue jeans. Left arm appears larger from perspective with visible skin texture.

Car interior matches exactly: beige seats, rear headrests, seatbelt line, partial right front seat, rear window with washed-out street.

Lighting: strong midday sunlight from above/front, natural shadows. Style: slightly desaturated, grainy, high-contrast street look. Keep pose, framing, perspective, and mood identical. No additions or changes
```

{
  "reference_target": "absolute_visual_replication",
  "subject_identity": {
    "demographics": "Female, approx 20-25 years old",
    "ethnicity": "Ambiguous / Multi-ethnic (Tan skin tone)",
    "hair": {
      "color": "Dark brown / Black",
      "texture": "Wavy, loose curls",
      "style": "Center part, falling over shoulders, slightly messy/natural finish",
      "length": "Past shoulder length"
    },
    "facial_features": {
      "eyes": "Almond shape, hazel/brown, heavy upper lash line",
      "eyebrows": "Structured, groomed, dark, slightly arched",
      "lips": "Full, plush, neutral rose-mauve tone, slight pout",
      "nose": "Straight bridge, refined tip",
      "skin_texture": "Smooth, tan, slight highlight on forehead and cheekbones from oil/sweat or makeup"
    }
  },
  "pose_geometry": {
    "type": "Selfie / Arm-extended close-up",
    "skeleton_state": {
      "spine": "Upright, slight thoracic rotation towards viewer's left",
      "neck": "Neutral length, no elongation",
      "head": "Tilted slightly to subject's right, rotated slightly towards camera",
      "shoulders": {
        "right_shoulder": "Pushed forward and elevated (holding camera)",
        "left_shoulder": "Relaxed, dropped lower, recessed slightly back"
      },
      "arms": {
        "right_arm": "Extended forward towards lens (out of frame)",
        "left_arm": "Hanging vertically by side, elbow not visible"
      }
    },
    "camera_relative_angles": {
      "eye_contact": "Direct into lens",
      "face_angle": "Frontal, slight yaw to viewer's left",
      "torso_angle": "Rotated approx 15 degrees to viewer's left"
    }
  },
  "attire_and_materials": {
    "garment": "Bikini top",
    "material": "{argument name="bikini material" default="Light blue sequins / paillettes"}",
    "construction": "Triangle cup style, thin spaghetti straps in matching light blue fabric",
    "fit": "Snug, conforming to body contours, straps digging slightly into skin at shoulders",
    "texture_detail": "Individual circular sequins visible, reflective surface, fabric bunching at base of cups"
  },
  "lighting_physics": {
    "condition": "Direct low-angle solar illumination (Golden Hour context)",
    "source_direction": "From subject's front-right (viewer's left)",
    "shadow_behavior": {
      "cast_shadows": "Hard shadow of subject cast onto the wall behind (viewer's right)",
      "self_shadows": "Deep shadow on subject's left shoulder (viewer's right) caused by head/hair blocking light",
      "contrast": "High contrast between illuminated skin and shadow areas"
    },
    "highlights": "Specular highlights on forehead, nose tip, chin, and chest; sequins reflecting intense white points"
  },
  "environment_context": {
    "setting": "Indoor bedroom",
    "background_elements": {
      "wall": "White painted wood paneling / wainscoting",

### 704. 现代室内镜面自拍肖像

**作者**: [simply](https://x.com/kingofdairyque/status/2007363499895459908)  **日期**: 2026-01-03  **语言**: en

> 一个为 Nano Banana Pro 设计的高度详细的图像生成提示，要求创作一张年轻女性在现代公寓中拍摄的自然、现代的室内镜面自拍肖像。该提示详细说明了光线、构图、服装（短款灰色毛衣和蓝色牛仔裤），并要求保留上传参考图像中的面部特征。

![现代室内镜面自拍肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767604074173_pwfu6b_G9uWduHaEAASnfJ.jpg)
![现代室内镜面自拍肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767604074357_mfv42x_G9uWdkbasAMrDhI.jpg)

```
A natural, modern indoor mirror-selfie portrait of a young woman inside a stylish contemporary apartment. The image is captured at mid-to-full body length from a slightly angled side profile, reflected in a mirror. She holds a smartphone near her shoulder while taking the photo, gently turning her head back toward the mirror with a subtle, confident smile that feels relaxed and intimate.
Her expression is calm and self-assured, with relaxed eyes and softly lifted lips, conveyingeffortless confidence. She has a light-to-medium skin tone with natural texture, soft blush on the cheeks, and minimal makeup—defined brows, lightly enhanced eyes, and natural nude-toned lips. Her long dark brown hair is worn loose and straight with a slight natural wave, parted near the center, falling smoothly down her back with a few soft strands framing her face.
She wears a {argument name="clothing item" default="cropped light gray knit sweater"} with long sleeves, paired with high-waisted, loose-fitting blue denim jeans, creating a casual yet flattering silhouette. Her posture is relaxed and candid, body angled sideways with one shoulder slightly raised, reinforcing an authentic lifestyle feel.
The background features a clean, modern interior with warm wooden flooring, dark wood-paneled walls, a door and light switches, and subtle details such as a piano and a large window revealing a distant city skyline. The background remains softly out of focus to keep attention on the subject.
Lighting is warm, natural, and evenly diffused, illuminating her face and body without harsh shadows and creating a cozy, lived-in atmosphere. The color palette blends warm wood tones, soft grays, denim blues, and natural skin hues for a calm, contemporary, aesthetically balanced look.
The overall mood is intimate, modern, stylish, and effortlessly cool—like a quiet personal moment captured at home.
Use the uploaded image as the only and exact face reference. Preserve identical facial identity, structure, proportions, and expression with no alterations.
```

**Related**: [[科技产品]]、[[综合艺术]]、[[室内设计]]

### 705. 逼真的冬季肖像与动画角色互动

**作者**: [Harboriis](https://x.com/harboriis/status/2007349298359607438)  **日期**: 2026-01-03  **语言**: en

> 一个用于生成超逼真冬季户外肖像的提示：一位年轻女性正隔着玻璃与一个卡通蓝色生物（类似于史迪奇）互动。它强调了舒适、节日的氛围，冬季外套和毛线帽的细节纹理，以及特定的灯光效果（温暖的逆光，轻柔的雪花）。

![逼真的冬季肖像与动画角色互动](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767604008546_lnx9ar_G9uJhbwasAc3PHn.jpg)

```
Create an ultra-photorealistic winter outdoor portrait of a young brunette woman with straight dark hair, front bangs, and wearing stylish black rectangular glasses. She is with a soft heart-shaped face, warm skin tone, natural makeup with subtle blush and nude lips, and a friendly, gentle smile. The woman is dressed in a thick, cozy royal-blue winter coat made of plush or faux-fur material, with a large collar and long sleeves. She wears a knitted white beanie with a pom-pom on top. Her hands are raised and gently pressed against a glass surface, as if interacting with a small animated character on the other side. The character is a playful, cartoonish blue creature similar in style to {argument name="animated character reference" default="Stitch"}, wearing a tiny knitted sweater. It is standing on its hind legs, front paws pressed against the glass mirroring the woman's hands, looking at her with large expressive eyes and an adorable joyful expression. Background: softly blurred winter cityscape or storefront window, warm lights behind the glass, gentle snow falling all around, faint snowflakes on the glass, cozy and festive atmosphere. Reflections of warm light in the glass and subtle bokeh from distant lights enhance depth. Lighting: soft, diffused natural winter daylight, slightly warm backlight from behind the glass, subtle rim light on the woman's face and hair, creating a cozy, inviting mood. Composition: medium shot, from mid-thigh up, eye-level perspective, focus sharp on the woman's face and glasses, slight depth of field blur on background and animated character's surroundings.
```

### 707. 魅力十足的化妆镜反射特写拍摄提示

**作者**: [Willy](https://x.com/jw660227/status/2007303183467774272)  **日期**: 2026-01-03  **语言**: en

> 生成一张超写实、抓拍式编辑照片的详细提示，重点是一个化妆镜反射出一位迷人女性正在涂抹口红的场景。该提示强调真实的镜面细节（污迹、眩光）、豪华酒店环境中的暖色环境光，以及对完美解剖结构和照片级真实皮肤纹理的严格要求。

![魅力十足的化妆镜反射特写拍摄提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767604038054_jys2on_G9tfmUuaoAECoNs.jpg)

```
Ultra-photoreal candid editorial shot of a makeup mirror reflecting a woman applying lipstick. The makeup mirror fills most of the frame, with realistic glass reflections, slight smudges, and mirror glare. Reflected in the mirror is a young woman with a glamorous look. She poses with a confident, seductive expression.

Environment: luxury hotel room with warm ambient lighting and subtle bokeh highlights. Composition: makeup mirror and makeup brushes are visible. Lighting: warm tungsten with soft fill; face tack sharp; background softly blurred. Camera feel: authentic candid shot, premium realism. The woman wears a silk robe and jewelry.

EXACTLY 1 person only (one woman). Perfect anatomy: hands/fingers, makeup brush grip, facial alignment correct; no extra limbs. Photoreal skin texture; no plastic smoothing. No extra people or faces in reflections.

Negative prompt: any readable text, brand names, logos, watermark, accurate real makeup mirror UI with readable labels, extra people or faces in reflections, identity drift, deformed hands, extra fingers, warped mirror geometry, cartoon, anime, CGI look, plastic or over-smoothed skin, low resolution, heavy noise, harsh blown highlights. A stylish handwritten signature Willy is elegantly and small letters placed at the Bottom Right corner
```

},

A mirror frame is visible surrounding the reflection. In the background reflection, another person or a second reflection of the subject is partially visible.",
"context": "Indoor, public or semi-public fitness facility."
},
"camera": {
"perspective": "Mirror selfie perspective. The camera (phone) is held at shoulder height, angled slightly downwards to capture the full body from thighs up. The image captures the reflection in a large wall mirror.",
"focal_length": "24mm to 28mm equivalent (smartphone main lens)",
"depth_of_field": "Deep depth of field, keeping both the subject and the locker room background relatively sharp.",
"framing": "Vertical shot, framing the subject from mid-thigh to top of head."
},

"type": "Indoor artificial gym lighting.",
"quality": "Overhead, slightly harsh downlighting typical of locker rooms. Creates highlights on the forehead, nose, and the top of the glutes. Shadows fall natu

### 709. Detailed Nano Banana Pro Image Generation Prompt

**作者**: [Chandan Singh](https://x.com/cbsingh_oo3/status/2007112159650779605)  **日期**: 2026-01-02  **语言**: en

> A highly detailed, structured prompt designed for the Nano Banana Pro image generation tool, specifying comprehensive metadata, spatial orientation, camera optics, environment physics, scene text OCR, and object/actor properties for a mirror selfie scene. This prompt is intended for generating a specific, complex visual scenario with precise technical controls.

![Detailed Nano Banana Pro Image Generation Prompt](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767508434685_9f9hv0_G9qx3xVaQAAwpv2.jpg)

```
{
  "meta": {
    "analysis_timestamp": "2026-01-02T20:39:50+05:30",
    "target_tool": "Nano Banana Pro",
    "image_dna": {
      "type": "Photo",
      "orientation_lock": "LOCKED: Orientation preserved 1:1",
      "sensor_emulation": "iPhone 14/15 Pro Main Camera"
    }
  },
  "spatial_orientation_engine": {
    "subject_facing_direction": "CAMERA (Front) - via Mirror Reflection",
    "body_rotation": "Subject is standing with back to the mirror, twisted to the LEFT to look over left shoulder. Glutes facing camera.",
    "camera_position_relative": "Mirror Selfie: Camera is virtually located at mirror surface, reflection shows subject from rear-oblique angle."
  },
  "camera_optics_and_geometry": {
    "lens_profile": {
      "focal_length": "24mm (Smartphone Wide)",
      "aperture": "f/1.7 (Moderate depth of field)",
      "lens_character": "Digital Sharpness with Smart HDR processing"
    },
    "optical_flaws": [
      "Mirror surface dust/smudges",
      "Slight perspective distortion on edges",
      "Digital noise in shadow areas"
    ]
  },
  "environment_and_physics": {
    "lighting_engine": {
      "primary_source": "Natural Daylight (Window on Right)",
      "radiosity_color_bleed": "Warm Tungsten lamp light reflecting on white walls and mixing with cool daylight on skin",
      "shadow_structure": "Soft ambient shadows on the left side of the room; contact shadows under the bag",
      "volumetrics": "Clear Air"
    },
    "surface_physics": {
      "weather_impact": "Indoor stable environment",
      "material_response": "High stretch fabric tension on shorts; specular highlights on plastic water bottle"
    }
  },
  "scene_text_ocr": {
    "detected": true,
    "content": [
      {
        "text": "{argument name=\"Water Bottle Brand\" default=\"Hydro Flask\"}",
        "location": "Water Bottle on bed",
        "font_style": "Sans-serif Logo"
      },
      {
        "text": "{argument name=\"Time on Clock\" default=\"1:00\"}",
        "location": "Digital Clock on nightstand",
        "font_style": "Digital 7-segment"
      }
    ]
  },
  "objects_and_actors": [
    {
      "id": "MAIN_SUBJECT",
      "role": "Identity Swap Target",
      "pose_engineering": {
        "skeletal_rig": "Standing upright, weight shifted to right leg, hips rotated slightly away, torso twisted left, head turned left looking at phone.",
        "gaze_vector": "Eyes looking at phone screen in mirror reflection.",
        "interaction_physics": "Right hand gripping phone, left arm relaxed by side."
      },
      "physiological_state": {
        "body_temp_visuals": "Neutral/Resting",
        "skin_light_interaction": "Soft daylight highlight on right arm and leg; warm lamp rim light on left profile."
      },
      "clothing_simulation": {
        "garment_stack": "{argument name=\"Clothing Description\" default=\"black Baseball Cap (Backwards), Black Sports Bra (Dream white) Grey Marl Booty Shorts\"}",
        "fabric_mechanics": "High tension on shorts over glutes, elastic compression on sports bra straps.",
        "texture_and_wear": "Heathered texture on grey s"

    },

      "shot_type": "intimate candid mirror selfie",
      "aspect_ratio": "9:16 vertical",
      "lens_feel": "natural smartphone lens with subtle perspective distortion",
      "texture": "ultra-photorealistic skin texture, natural grain, soft highlights, faint fingerprints and light smudges visible on the mirror, no beauty filter"
    }
  },
  "subject": {
    "apperance": "Beatiful scandinavian woman in her early 20's"
    },
    "pose": {
      "overall": "sitting on the floor directly in front of the mirror with knees pulled toward the chest",
      "torso": "upper torso turned slightly more toward the mirror, creating a frontal reflection rather than a side profile",
      "head": "head positioned close to the knees, naturally aligned with the torso",

    },
    "expression": {

    "hair": {

    },

    },
    
  },
  "style_constraints": {

    "mood": "intimate, quiet, candid",
    "avoid": [

      "studio lighting",
      "glamour photography",
      "overly polis"
    ]
}

### 712. High-Contrast Spider-Gwen Cosplay Mirror Selfie

**作者**: [Sharon Riley](https://x.com/Just_sharon7/status/2006713425850966181)  **日期**: 2026-01-01  **语言**: en

> A structured prompt for generating a high-resolution, realistic image of a young woman taking a mirror selfie in a dimly lit bedroom. The subject is wearing a form-fitting Spider-Gwen inspired spandex bodysuit. The prompt emphasizes using the same face from a reference image, high-contrast lighting from a warm bedside lamp, and a smartphone mirror selfie aesthetic.

![High-Contrast Spider-Gwen Cosplay Mirror Selfie](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767508376930_wp1qht_G9lHOHwaMAooStn.jpg)
![High-Contrast Spider-Gwen Cosplay Mirror Selfie](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767508376687_qi8y4y_G9lHOGpa0AALL17.jpg)

```
Use the same face from the reference image without changing facial features 
{
  "subject": {
    "description": "A young woman with long, flowing blonde hair and soft facial features",
    "pose": "Sitting on the edge of a bed, legs crossed, holding a smartphone for a mirror selfie",
    "expression": "Neutral, calm, looking toward the mirror",
    "attire": {
      "type": "Full-body spandex cosplay bodysuit",
      "design": "{argument name="cosplay theme" default="Spider-Gwen"} inspired theme",
      "colors": ["White base", "Red spider emblem on chest", "Blue and red web patterns on shoulders and sides"],
      "fit": "Form-fitting, sleek, athletic"
    }
  },
  "setting": {
    "location": "Modern, dimly lit bedroom",

### 715. 逼真的镜面自拍提示

**作者**: [KeorUnreal](https://x.com/KeorUnreal/status/2006435617685623068)  **日期**: 2025-12-31  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的超现实主义提示，用于生成一张女性的特写镜子自拍，她拥有铂金色头发和大量的黑色纹身，强调高分辨率、特定的服装（Nike 紧身衣）以及温暖、私密的卧室环境。

![逼真的镜面自拍提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767456139553_niplxs_G9hKjgRW0AAIBY7.jpg)

```
{
  "prompt": "Photorealistic close-up mirror selfie of a stunning young woman with long, voluminous platinum blonde hair styled in loose waves, fair skin with a subtle natural glow, striking green eyes with bold winged eyeliner, long lashes, and glossy deep nude-pink lips in a confident, slightly sultry pout. She has a small silver nose septum piercing and extensive intricate blackwork tattoos covering her upper chest, shoulders, and arms (including detailed roses, skulls, and abstract patterns). She wears an oversized beige Nike ribbed knit bodysuit with a deep plunging neckline and thin straps that accentuate her ample bust and hourglass figure, the fabric clinging to her toned midriff. A prominent black tattoo reading 'amour' in gothic script is visible on her upper chest, along with a small heart and cloud design. Pose: leaning forward slightly toward the camera with one arm raised to take the selfie, the other hand resting on her hip, head tilted subtly with a playful, seductive gaze directly at the lens. Background: bright modern bedroom with light gray walls, a large window letting in soft natural daylight, a beige tufted headboard, and a chunky knit throw on the bed, creating a warm, intimate atmosphere. Ultra-detailed skin texture with realistic subtle sheen, intricate tattoo details and ribbed fabric texture, sharp focus on face and upper body, shallow depth of field with gentle background blur, high dynamic range, 8K resolution, photorealism, masterpiece quality."
}
```

### 716. 超逼真 MacBook 屏幕 POV 视角拍摄提示词

**作者**: [Bananai](https://x.com/aibananai/status/2006430400961220861)  **日期**: 2025-12-31  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的 JSON 格式提示，旨在生成一张超现实、真实的 MacBook Pro 屏幕第一人称视角照片，置于黑暗环境中。场景聚焦于一个 macOS Photo Booth 窗口，其中显示一名女性正在拍摄镜面自拍的特写，画面中可见屏幕灰尘、像素网格，以及 Pinterest 情绪板和 Spotify 小部件等特定 UI 元素。

![超逼真 MacBook 屏幕 POV 视角拍摄提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767456289925_6tq567_G9hF0AQWUAEUynK.jpg)
![超逼真 MacBook 屏幕 POV 视角拍摄提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767456289993_4ca8mb_G9hF0AQWIAAXVAd.jpg)

```
{
  "tech_specs": {
    "style": "Raw Screen Photography (Macro)",
    "ratio": "3:4",
    "focus": "Sharp pixels, slight background blur"
  },
  "scene_composition": {
    "angle": "POV high-angle looking down at MacBook Pro",
    "lighting": "Cold screen glow + faint keyboard backlight",
    "realism": "Visible RGB pixel grid, screen dust, slight moiré, fingerprints on glass"
  },
  "screen_ui": {
    "os": "macOS Dark Mode",
    "window_1_main": {
      "app": "Photo Booth (Active)",
      "content": "Live webcam feed of a young woman, EXTREME CLOSE-UP (filling the frame). Messy bun, white tube top, gold necklaces. Holding iPhone 15 Pro visible in frame. Skin texture: natural, slightly grainy (webcam look).",
      "expression": "Nonchalant, looking at phone screen"
    },
    "window_2_side": {
      "app": "Safari / Pinterest",
      "content": "{argument name=\"Pinterest aesthetic\" default=\"Pink aesthetic moodboard\"}, 'Pinterest' text legible"
    },
    "window_3_overlay": {
      "app": "Spotify Widget",
      "details": "Floating mini-player. Text sharp: '{argument name=\"Spotify song\" default=\"Rihanna - Love On The Brain\"}' (or Adele/Future). Album art visible."
    }
  },
  "prompt": "Hyper-realistic POV shot of a MacBook screen in the dark. Screen shows macOS Photo Booth with a girl taking a mirror selfie. She is zoomed in, filling the window, wearing a {argument name=\"clothing\" default=\"white tube top\"} and messy bun. Beside it, a pink Pinterest page and a sharp Spotify widget playing Rihanna. Visible dust particles and pixel grid on the screen glass. Raw photography, candid vibe."
}
```

### 717. Trompe-l'œil 钥匙孔活眼错觉

**作者**: [Bananai](https://x.com/aibananai/status/2006080053244018792)  **日期**: 2025-12-30  **语言**: en

> 一个高度具体、结构化的提示，用于创作一张超逼真的“错视画”图像：书封上有一个物理模切的钥匙孔，透过它能看到手持书本的人的活生生的、解剖学上精确的眼睛，强调真实的深度和逼真的光照效果。

![Trompe-l'œil 钥匙孔活眼错觉](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767454951675_7038gi_G9cHJ5ybsAAIPIv.jpg)
![Trompe-l'œil 钥匙孔活眼错觉](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767454951350_4qom84_G9cHJ5zaYAE2F5P.jpg)

```
{
  "meta": {
    "aspect_ratio": "9:16",
    "quality": "ultra_photorealistic",
    "resolution": "8k",
    "camera": "iPhone 15 Pro Max (Main Lens)",
    "style": "Physical Trompe-l'œil, hyper-realistic photography, accurate scale and depth, no CGI look"
  },

  "scene": {
    "location": "Home interior, hallway/living room",
    "lighting": {
      "type": "Mixed lighting: Overhead recessed warm LED + soft ambient fill from side",
      "effect": "The overhead light creates a bright catchlight in the living eye and casts realistic, soft shadows inside the physical keyhole opening and under the book."
    },
    "background": "Neutral walls, white ceiling molding, dark window blinds in background left, framed art on right, all slightly out of focus"
  },

  "illusion_mechanics": {
    "concept": "Physical Die-Cut Hole & True Depth",
    "description": "The book cover is NOT a flat image. It has a physical, die-cut hole in the exact shape of the brass keyhole graphic. Through this physical opening, the viewer sees the actual, living right eye of the person holding the book.",
    "depth_perception": "The keyhole has visible thickness (the cardstock of the cover). The living eye is set back from the cover plane by a realistic distance (approx. 1-2cm), creating a genuine sense of looking *through* an object to the person behind it."
  },

  "subject": {
    "visible_features": "Long wavy honey-blonde hair with highlights, hands holding the book, school uniform.",
    "outfit": "Dark navy cable-knit cardigan, white button-up shirt, plaid tie (navy, grey, yellow stripes).",
    "the_eye": {
      "type": "Living human eye (anatomically accurate right eye)",
      "characteristics": "Wet sclera with subtle capillaries, complex iris pattern (hazel/brown), dilated pupil, visible blood vessels, realistic eyelashes.",
      "scale_and_proportion": "The eye is positioned and scaled precisely as if the book is pressed against the brow bone. It fills the keyhole naturally and anatomically correctly, without distortion.",
      "lighting_interaction": "The eye is lit by the room's light. A sharp, realistic catchlight from the overhead LED is visible on the cornea. The edges of the keyhole cast a soft, realistic shadow onto the skin and eyelid surrounding the eye."
    }
  },

  "prop_specifications": {
    "object": "Paperback book '{argument name="book title" default="THE HOUSEMAID"}' by Freida McFadden",
    "orientation": "Vertical, held flat in front of face. The image is a mirror selfie, so all text and the cover art are horizontally flipped.",
    "cover_details": {
      "material": "Matte cardstock with slight texture and wear on corners.",
      "background": "Deep blue with wood-grain texture.",
      "keyhole_frame": "The antique brass frame is printed on the cover, but the hole inside it is physically cut out.",
      "text": "All text is mirrored and legible: '{argument name="book title" default="THE HOUSEMAID"}' (Large, Yellow, Bold"
    }
  }
}
```

**作者**: [Melisa♡](https://x.com/xmliisu/status/2005991465571258466)  **日期**: 2025-12-30  **语言**: en

> 一个详细、结构化的提示词，旨在让图像生成模型创作一张逼真的、抓拍的年轻女性在现代浴室里刷牙的镜子自拍。该提示词明确了灯光、背景元素、构图、色彩配置文件、技术规格以及主体的动作和着装，从而生成一张高度具体且可复现的图像。

A candid mirror selfie of a young woman with long wavy brown hair, wearing a dark blue knitted sweater, brushing her teeth with a blue and white toothbrush. She is holding a black smartphone with her left hand, which has white painted nails. Her tongue is slightly out in a playful expression. The background is a bright, modern bathroom with a glass shower, chrome fixtures, white textured tiles, and a white bathtub. Overhead lighting casts a warm glow. The shot is framed from the waist up.

### 721. 带智能手机闪光灯效果的逼真合影

**作者**: [NGLPRZ](https://x.com/nglprz/status/2005953805565702160)  **日期**: 2025-12-30  **语言**: en

> 一个专注于生成逼真团体自拍的提示，自拍使用智能手机前置摄像头拍摄，捕捉了室内夜间环境中自然的不完美之处，例如曝光不均、轻微桶形畸变和闪光灯摄影效果。

![带智能手机闪光灯效果的逼真合影](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767454907589_uygnid_G9aUPTAWAAAysn5.jpg)

```
Group selfie of friends celebrating New Year’s Eve, realistic smartphone photo Wide selfie framing, multiple faces at different distances, closest face slightly larger Smartphone front camera, wide-angle lens, mild barrel distortion Indoor night setting, small living room, background cluttered with party items Materials defined: – skin with natural texture and varied highlights – hair with individual strands and soft reflections – party clothes made of mixed fabrics (cotton, synthetic, slight sheen) – plastic cups crinkled with specular highlights Lighting: single warm ceiling light from above camera-right Exposure: auto exposure prioritizing closest faces Failure mode active: shadow chroma noise visible on faces farther from light Additional pipeline behavior: mild denoise smear in darker areas Natural imperfections allowed: uneven exposure between faces, slight softness at frame edges
```

### 722. 具有身份锁定功能的逼真全身镜面自拍

**作者**: [simply](https://x.com/kingofdairyque/status/2005928053822898422)  **日期**: 2025-12-30  **语言**: en

> 这是一个为图像生成模型（特指“nano banana pro”）设计的高度详细的提示，旨在创建一张年轻女性在现代健身房中拍摄的超逼真、高分辨率全身镜面自拍照。该提示强调基于上传的参考图像进行严格的身份锁定，要求绝对保留面部特征、皮肤纹理和表情，同时详细描述了她的服装、姿势、环境和照明条件，以营造一种休闲健身生活方式的美感。

![具有身份锁定功能的逼真全身镜面自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767455004198_kntoc1_G9Z87sobIAAqVVq.jpg)

```
Create a highly photorealistic, high-resolution full-body mirror selfie of a young woman in a modern indoor gym using the uploaded reference image with strict identity lock enabled. Her face must be 100% identical to the reference image with absolute preservation of identity. Do not alter facial structure, proportions, bone shape, skin texture, skin tone, eye shape, nose, lips, expression mechanics, age,or any fine facial details. No beauty retouching, no face refinement, no identity blending, and no stylization. The face must be an exact, unmodified match to the reference.
Her hair is {argument name="hair style" default="dark brown, styled in a long, wavy, messy bun with loose strands framing her face"}, appearing natural and realistic. Skin remains natural and realistic, matching the reference precisely.
Her expression is {argument name="expression" default="calm, composed, and slightly focused as she looks at the phone screen during the mirror selfie"}. Maintain a natural, candid demeanor without changing facial expression details.
She stands with one leg slightly forward, holding an orange iPhone smartphone in her right hand for the mirror selfie and a transparent water bottle filled with blue liquid in her left hand.

Outfit details:

Fitted short-sleeve white crop top

White long-sleeve shirt tied around her waist

High-waisted black athletic leggings
White crew socks
White athletic sneakers
Environment: a clean, modern gym featuring large wall mirrors with a visible vertical mirror seam in the frame, treadmills, weight machines, rubber gym flooring, and exercise mats. The background should be clear and realistic, with accurate scale and depth.
Lighting is bright overhead fluorescent gym lighting, providing even, neutral illumination with minimal shadows and no dramatic contrast.
Composition: a casual fitness lifestyle photograph, captured at eye level, with the subject centered in the frame. Emphasize sharp facial detail, realistic clothing textures, accurate reflections, and a clean, modern, casual mood. Apply minimal post-processing, no filters, no style transfer, and maintain strict facial identity lock at all times.
```

**Related**: [[运动休闲]]、[[综合时尚]]、[[室内设计]]

### 723. 电影级蝙蝠/猫情侣镜面自拍，带身份锁

**作者**: [Shreya Yadav](https://x.com/retvikurmi/status/2005691328383025252)  **日期**: 2025-12-29  **语言**: en

> 一个高度结构化的提示，用于生成一张逼真的电影感镜面自拍，场景设定在不锈钢电梯内，包含两名人物（一男一女），其身份必须严格保留自两张独立的参考图片。这两名人物分别装扮成“蝙蝠侠”（头罩、黄色徽章）和“猫女”（面具、紧身黑色服装），重点在于精确的镜面物理效果和清晰的面部特征。

![电影级蝙蝠/猫情侣镜面自拍，带身份锁](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767166892815_yvdml1_G9Wlof8bQAERoIX.jpg)

```
{
 "generation_request": {
 "meta_data": {
 "tool": "NanoBanana Pro",
 "task_type": "photorealistic_single_image",
 "priority": "highest"
 }, 
 "references": {
 "male_character_reference_image": "UPLOAD_MALE_REFERENCE (REQUIRED)",
 "female_character_reference_image": "UPLOAD_FEMALE_REFERENCE (REQUIRED)",
 "reference_rules": {"preserve_uploaded_character_identities": true,
        "identity_lock_strength": 1.0,
        "strict_face_match": true,
        "no_identity_drift": true,
        "no_face_morphing": true,
        "no_beautification": true,
        "same_people_only": true,
        "no_extra_subjects": true
      }
    },
    "output_settings": {
      "aspect_ratio": "9:16",
      "orientation": "portrait",
      "resolution": "ultra_high_res",
      "render_style": "photorealistic_cinematic_elevator_mirror_selfie",
      "sharpness": "high",
      "film_grain": "subtle"
    },
    "hard_constraints": [
      "NO watermark or added text overlays.",
      "EXACTLY 2 subjects only: uploaded male + uploaded female.",
      "Faces must be 1:1 identical to references."
    ],
    "creative_prompt": {
      "scene_summary": "Photorealistic mirror selfie inside a modern metallic elevator. The man wears a black bat-cowl and a dark blazer over a black t-shirt with a yellow bat emblem on the chest. He holds a smartphone to take the mirror selfie. The woman wears a sleek cat-inspired mask and a fitted black outfit, posing in the foreground. Cool ceiling lights, realistic reflections, sharp faces. No extra text or watermarks.",
      "environment": {
        "location": "stainless-steel elevator",
        "lighting": "cool ceiling panels, cinematic contrast"
      },
      "camera": {
        "type": "mirror selfie",
        "angle": "vertical framing; phone visible",
        "lens_look": "smartphone wide selfie look (24-28mm equivalent)",
        "focus": "faces sharp"
      },
      "wardrobe_and_style": {
        "male": {
          "mask": "matte black bat-cowl",
          "outfit": "dark pinstripe blazer, black t-shirt with yellow bat emblem"
        },
        "female": {
          "mask": "black cat mask with small studs",
          "outfit": "fitted black top and bottoms",
          "hair": "sleek ponytail"
        }
      },
      "quality_rules": [
        "accurate mirror physics",
        "accurate hands and phone geometry",
        "no face artifacts"
      ]
    },
    "negative_prompt": [
      "watermark",
      "extra people",
      "identity drift",
      "warped reflections",
      "bad hands",
      "blur"
    ]
  }
}
```

> 一个结构化的提示，用于生成一张逼真的镜面自拍，画面中一位身穿红色紧身连衣裙、头戴圣诞帽的女士在装饰过的浴室里自拍。重点关注准确的反射物理效果、温暖的灯光，以及背景元素（如花环和其他人）的融入。

![在装饰一新的浴室镜中自拍圣诞照](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767166886502_kf0kjb_G9WbeFJaEAEjtmd.png)

```
{
"subject": {
"primary_subject_type": "human",
"count": "1 primary subject",
"age_range_appearance": "adult-appearing",
"gender_presentation": "feminine-presenting",
"skin_tone_or_material": "light to medium skin tone",
"visibility": "full body mostly visible from head to mid-thigh",
"hair": {
"color": "dark brown or black",
"style": "loose curls/waves",
"length": "long, past shoulders",
"parting": "center or slightly off-center"
},
"face": {
"expression": "neutral to slight smile",
"gaze_direction": "toward smartphone screen or mirror",
"visibility": "fully visible"
},
"body": {
"build": "slim",
"posture": "standing upright",
"torso_visibility": "fully visible",
"limb_visibility": "both arms visible, legs visible to mid-thigh"
},
"pose": {
"stance": "facing mirror/front-facing to camera via reflection",
"torso_angle": "very slight angle, mostly straight on",
"head_angle": "slightly tilted",
"arm_positions": "one arm bent upward holding phone near face/chest; other arm relaxed down by side",
"hand_positions": "one hand gripping smartphone; other hand relaxed with fingers slightly curved",
"weight_distribution": "unknown"
},
"clothing": {
"top": { "type": "sleeveless dress bodice", "color": "{argument name=\"dress color\" default=\"red\"}", "fit": "tight/ bodycon", "coverage": "shoulders and arms uncovered", "details": "simple, no visible patterns" },
"bottom": { "type": "dress skirt (part of single-piece dress)", "color": "red", "fit": "tight/ bodycon", "coverage": "extends to upper thigh", "details": "simple, no slit visible" },
"footwear": "not visible",
"other_items": "none"
},
"accessories": ["{argument name=\"accessory\" default=\"red and white Santa hat\"}"],
"props_interacted_with": ["smartphone"]
},
"environment": {
"setting_type": "bathroom or restroom with decorative elements",
"indoor_or_outdoor": "indoor",
"depth_description": "foreground is mirror frame area; subject appears in mirror; background contains decorated wall and additional people",
"foreground_objects": ["mirror surface", "lower edge of mirror frame"],
"midground_objects": ["primary subject reflection"],
"background_objects": ["green garland with lights above mirror", "wall-mounted light sconce on left", "tiled walls", "doorway or dark opening", "two other feminine-presenting people in dark clothing"],
"textures_or_materials": "glossy ceramic tiles, reflective glass mirror, soft greenery with small lights",
"notable_layout_relationships": "garland runs horizontally across top of mirror; light sconce mounted on tiled wall to left of mirror; other people are reflected further back behind subject"
},
"lighting": {
"lighting_type": "mixed ambient and artificial indoor lighting",
"light_direction": "multiple sources including overhead/garland lights and a wall sconce to the left",
"intensity": "moderate",
"color_temperature": "warm",
"shadow_behavior": "soft shadows with gentle falloff",
"reflections_or_glare": "mirror reflection of subject and background; mild specular reflections from tiles and mirror"
},
"camera": "{argument name=\"camera type\" default=\"smartphone\"}"
}

### 725. 逼真的低角度咖啡馆自拍

**作者**: [Zar⭕on](https://x.com/Zar_xplorer/status/2005676509801980090)  **日期**: 2025-12-29  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的提示，用于生成一张在舒适咖啡馆里，一位女性的逼真、低角度、手持自拍照。它着重于真实的细节：自然的姿态、可见的毛孔和皮肤瑕疵、逼真的织物纹理（低胸露背上衣），以及与私密咖啡馆环境相符的柔和、漫射的温暖室内照明。

![逼真的低角度咖啡馆自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767166862466_xag2uk_G9WYJ1oWIAAZfki.jpg)

```
{
  "prompt": "Photorealistic low-angle handheld selfie of an adult woman (25 years old) in a cozy café interior. The camera is positioned slightly below eye level and angled upward, creating a natural sense of proximity and depth. She is leaning forward over a table with realistic posture and natural weight distribution, giving a relaxed and playful feel. Facial expression shows a subtle, playful half-smile conveying confidence and warmth. Lips are softly defined with red lipstick, expression natural and unforced. Eyes are directed toward the camera, engaging and lively. She is wearing a deep blue low-cut halter top with realistic fabric texture and natural drape. The neckline follows realistic anatomy and gravity, with subtle fabric tension and folds where it interacts with the body, without exaggerated shaping. Skin appears natural and healthy with visible pores, fine texture, soft tonal transitions, and slight imperfections. Warm indoor lighting creates gentle highlights without any glossy or plastic effect. Hair is naturally styled, matching the reference image exactly in shape and structure, with realistic volume and visible individual strands, without stylization or alteration. Lighting is warm, soft, and diffused café lighting, producing gentle shadows under the chin and along facial contours. The light feels ambient and natural, consistent with an intimate café environment. The background is a cozy café setting with a mosaic tile wall and indoor plants, softly out of focus to provide texture and atmosphere without distracting from the subject.",
  "style": "photorealistic",
  "camera": {
    "angle": "slightly low angle",
    "perspective": "handheld selfie",
    "position": "below eye level",
    "lens_effect": "natural depth, shallow depth of field"
  },
  "lighting": {
    "type": "warm indoor café lighting",
    "quality": "soft and diffused",
    "shadows": "gentle, natural facial contour shadows"
  },
  "environment": {
    "location": "cozy café",
    "background_elements": [
      "mosaic tile wall",
      "indoor plants"
    ],
    "background_focus": "softly blurred"
  },
  "subject": {
    "age": 25,
    "expression": "subtle playful half-smile",
    "eye_direction": "looking at camera",
    "skin": "natural texture with visible pores and imperfections",
    "hair": "natural styling, realistic volume, visible strands"
  },
  "clothing": {
    "top": "deep blue low-cut halter top",
    "fabric": "realistic texture and natural drape"
  },
  "quality": {
    "realism": "high",
    "detail_level": "ultra-detailed",
    "rendering": "photorealistic"
  }
}
