### 727. 浴室镜自拍生活照

**作者**: [Pics Prompts](https://x.com/picsprompts/status/2005612033404793288)  **日期**: 2025-12-29  **语言**: en

> 生成一张逼真的、休闲生活快照的提示词，模拟智能手机的镜面自拍。画面中，一位年轻女性身穿黑色紧身衣，坐在白色大理石浴室台面上，以背部 3/4 视角拍摄，表情俏皮。提示词中包含特定的相机控制（DWPose、ZoeDepth）和详细的负面提示词，以确保真实感并避免常见的 AI 伪影。

![浴室镜自拍生活照](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767166855237_2tdrj3_G9VdZWmXcAAT_cb.jpg)

```
{
  "subject": {
    "description": "Young woman with long straight dark brown hair seated on a bathroom counter.",
    "attire": "Black matte high-cut open-back bodysuit.",
    "anatomy": "Emphasis on hips, thighs, and glutes from seated angle; natural tan skin.",
    "accessories": "Gold clover chain bracelet.",
    "makeup": "Natural glam with eyeliner and matte lips."
  },
  "pose": {
    "type": "Seated mirror selfie",
    "orientation": "Rear 3/4 view, torso twisted toward mirror",
    "expression": "Playful, tongue out",
    "arms": "Right hand holding phone, left resting",
    "legs": "One knee bent in foreground",
    "spine": "Natural seated arch"
  },
  "environment": {
    "location": "Modern bright bathroom",
    "features": "White marble counter, glass shower, freestanding tub, small windows, wooden stool, recessed lights",
    "floor": "White marble tile"
  },
  "camera": {
    "type": "Smartphone mirror selfie",
    "lens": "Wide (~26mm equiv)",
    "dof": "Deep focus",
    "device": "iPhone with dark patterned case"
  },
  "lighting": {
    "sources": [
      "Ceiling downlights",
      "Window daylight"
    ],
    "quality": "Bright, even, cool-neutral"
  },
  "output": {
    "ratio": "3:4",
    "orientation": "Portrait",
    "style": "Photorealistic casual snapshot"
  },
  "controls": {
    "pose": "DWPose (1.0)",
    "depth": "ZoeDepth (0.8)"
  },
  "negative_prompt": [
    "body averaging",
    "slimmed proportions",
    "closed mouth",
    "cinematic lighting",
    "blur",
    "low resolution",
    "illustration",
    "3d render"
  ]
}
```

> 一个高度具体的照片级提示，用于生成一张身穿粉色亮片比基尼的女性的抓拍镜面自拍。它包含对拍摄对象外貌、姿势和环境的详细描述，并附有明确的负面提示和约束，以保持精确的身体体积和比例，尤其侧重于胸部尺寸。

"description": "A woman with tanned skin and a dark, messy updo, holding a black smartphone. She has full lips with dark pink lipstick and dark eyes. Her skin has a noticeable sheen from oil. },

]
  },

  "environment": "A modern indoor setting, likely a home. Behind her is a staircase with dark wood treads, white risers, and a metal and glass railing. The floor is dark wood. A window is visible in the background.",

  "mood_and_expression": "Confident, self-assured, candid. Her expression is direct and relaxed.",

"pose_control": "enabled",
"depth_control": "enabled"

  "negative_prompt": [
"anatomy normalization",
"dataset-average body proportions",
"reduced chest volume",
"flattened or compressed breasts",
"excessive slimming",
"beauty filters",
"plastic skin",
"professional studio lighting",
"over-stylized realism"
  ]
}
Maintain exact body volume and proportions from the reference image. Do not reduce chest size.
```

      "render_style": "photorealistic_cinematic_elevator_mirror_selfie",

    ],

      "scene_summary": "Photorealistic mirror selfie inside a modern metallic elevator. The man wears a black bat-cowl and a dark blazer over a black t-shirt with a yellow bat emblem on the chest. He holds a smartphone to take the mirror selfie. The woman wears a sleek cat-inspired mask and a fitted black outfit, posing in the foreground. Cool ceiling lights, realistic reflections, sharp faces. No extra text or watermarks.",
      "environment": {

      },

      },
      "wardrobe_and_style": {

          "mask": "{argument name="male mask" default="matte black bat-cowl"}",

**作者**: [ANKIT PATEL 🇮🇳 | AI](https://x.com/Ankit_patel211/status/2005234820298027434)  **日期**: 2025-12-28  **语言**: en

> 一个高度技术化且细节丰富的提示，用于生成一张逼真的年轻女性镜面自拍，该女性身材健美、曲线玲珑，强调特定的服装、姿势（回眸），并使用高级控制规范（DWPose 和 ZoeDepth）来锁定骨骼结构和体积深度，同时聚焦于原始的智能手机美学。

![镜面自拍，曲线身材与 ControlNet 约束](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767061744864_mw33yi_G9QGcPHbYAAEKOb.jpg)
![镜面自拍，曲线身材与 ControlNet 约束](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767061744958_xxe28n_G9QGcHMacAAwVU6.jpg)

```
{
  "structured_prompt": {
    "subject_details": {
      "physique_and_demographics": {
        "description": "Young woman, fit curvy build.",
        "features": ["prominent glutes", "slim waist", "tan skin tone"]
      },
      "attire_and_grooming": {
        "hair_style": "Dark brown, messy high bun, wispy bangs.",
        "clothing_outfit": "{argument name="top color" default="wine red"} racerback sports bra, tight black booty shorts with Nike pattern and small blue stars."
      },
      "held_items_and_accessories": {
        "jewelry": ["Gold ring", "small earrings"],
        "primary_device": {
          "model": "iPhone 17 Pro Max",
          "finish": "Silver (no case)",
          "handling": "Held in right hand"
        }
      }
    },
    "composition_and_pose": {
      "body_stance": "Standing back to mirror, torso twisted slightly left.",
      "head_orientation": "Turned over left shoulder looking at phone reflection.",
      "visual_focus": "Emphasis on posterior profile view.",
      "shot_framing": {
        "type": "Mirror selfie, medium shot.",
        "perspective": "Shoulder height reflection view.",
        "aspect_ratio": "3:4 vertical"
      }
    },
    "environment_context": {
      "setting": "Modern apartment interior seen via mirror reflection.",
      "background_elements": [
        "Large left window showing city skyline",
        "White door frame on right",
        "Living area with furniture"
      ]
    },
    "photographic_execution": {
      "lighting_characteristics": {
        "source": "Strong natural daylight from left.",
        "quality": "High contrast creating profile highlights."
      },
      "aesthetic_style": {
        "vibe": "Raw smartphone aesthetic, unpolished.",
        "realism": "Photorealistic 8k, sharp focus, visible skin texture, subtle sensor noise."
      },
      "mood_atmosphere": "Confident, sultry, casual lifestyle."
    },
    "control_specifications": {
      "dwpose_skeleton": {
        "lock_type": "Exact skeletal structure.",
        "weight": 1.0,
        "priority": "Preserve hip angle and spine curvature."
      },
      "zoedepth_volume": {
        "lock_type": "Volumetric depth.",
        "weight": 0.8,
        "priority": "Maintain glute dominance and background separation."
      }
    }
  },
  "negative_exclusions": [
    "anatomy normalization",
    "reduced glute volume",
    "flattened curves",
    "slimmed torso",
    "beautification filters",
    "skin smoothing",
    "airbrushed texture",
    "cartoonish visual",
    "low quality output",
    "distorted hands"
  }
}
 }
```

### 741. 身份锁定的镜像自拍生成

**作者**: [Sienna](https://x.com/siennalovesai/status/2005129596035829895)  **日期**: 2025-12-28  **语言**: en

> 一个高度技术化的图像生成提示，使用 JSON 结构，严格执行从参考照片中保留身份，同时生成一个逼真的镜面自拍场景。它指定了关于光照、设置、姿势和服装的详细限制，包括一件 {argument name="dress type" default="red satin mini dress"} 和一个 {argument name="location" default="minimal modern interior"}。

![身份锁定的镜像自拍生成](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767061704722_17xi6j_G9OmvA7W8AEKsPl.jpg)

```
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "version": "v1.2",
      "priority": "high"
    },
    "technical_constraints": {
      "identity_preservation": {
        "enabled": true,
        "reference_mode": "strict",
        "parameters": {
          "use_reference_face_only": true,
          "identity_lock": true,
          "preserve_facial_features": true,
          "preserve_skin_texture": true,
          "preserve_face_proportions": true,
          "avoid_face_morphing": true,
          "no_beautification": true,
          "preservation_strength": 1.0
        }
      },
      "output_settings": {
        "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
        "resolution_target": "ultra_high_res",
        "render_engine_style": "photorealistic"
      }
    },
    "creative_prompt": {
      "scene": {
        "location": "{argument name="location" default="minimal modern interior"}",
        "background": "clean white walls with a bright sunlit window light patch on the right wall, smooth light-gray concrete floor, empty space, no clutter",
        "lighting": "soft natural daylight from the right side, gentle shadows, bright airy look"
      },
      "subject": {
        "identity_instruction": "The woman must be 100% identical to the uploaded reference photo (same identity, face, facial proportions, skin tone, and natural texture). Do not alter the face in any way.",
        "pose": "squatting in a mirror-selfie pose, knees bent, one hand resting on thigh, the other hand holding a smartphone up in front of her face",
        "expression": "soft smile, relaxed confident vibe",
        "hair": {
          "instruction": "Match the reference hair exactly (same cut, volume, texture, and styling). No changes."
        },
        "outfit": {
          "dress": {
            "type": "{argument name="dress type" default="red satin mini dress"} with rose floral print",
            "details": "thin spaghetti straps, ruched fitted silhouette, body-hugging",
            "fabric": "silky satin sheen"
          },
          "bag": {
            "type": "small beige shoulder bag",
            "details": "short strap tucked under arm"
          },
          "shoes": {
            "type": "high-heel sandals",
            "color": "light pink / nude",
            "details": "delicate straps with a small bow detail on the toes"
          },
          "jewelry": [
            "gold bracelet",
            "delicate necklace",
            "small rings"
          ]
        },
        "phone": {
          "type": "smartphone",
          "case_color": "light pink",
          "details": "camera module visible, held in selfie position"
        }
      },
      "camera_and_style": {
        "shot_style": "photorealistic mirror selfie / influencer outfit check",
        "lens": "35mm",
        "aperture": "f/2.8",
        "focus": "sharp on subject, natural depth, clean background",
        "color_grading": "neutral bright tones, natural skin color, subtle film grain",
        "quality_notes": "keep natural pores/texture, no"
```

**作者**: [DΞV](https://x.com/junwatu/status/2005079899082809761)  **日期**: 2025-12-28  **语言**: en

> 一个高度描述性的提示，用于生成一张逼真的健身房镜子自拍，主角是一位拥有混合 {argument name="heritage" default="亚洲、爪哇、欧洲和韩国"} 血统的年轻女性。该提示着重于详细的身体描述、肌肉线条，以及一个特定的低位深蹲姿势，同时手持手机进行自拍。

![逼真的健身房镜子自拍（混血）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767061729615_wplq4n_G9N5d2XbgAEvxEY.jpg)

```
A young adult woman of mixed {argument name="heritage" default="Asian Javanese European and Korean"} heritage poses confidently in front of a gym mirror. Her facial features are striking yet harmonious, blending soft Javanese contours with sharp European structure and refined Korean aesthetics. She has smooth warm toned skin, defined cheekbones, a balanced jawline, and expressive eyes that convey calm focus. Her appearance feels naturally exotic and modern, with a subtle elegance that stands out without exaggeration.

Her body is compact and powerfully built, with dense muscle definition and a firm athletic silhouette. The physique appears packed and solid, showcasing strength through toned thighs, sculpted calves, a tight core, and well defined arms while maintaining feminine proportions. Every movement suggests control and physical confidence.

Her hair is dark and glossy, styled neatly in a practical yet stylish look suitable for training. Makeup remains minimal and natural, enhancing her features without overpowering them. She wears fitted gym attire that hugs her form, emphasizing muscle density and structure while allowing freedom of movement.

She is positioned low in a squat facing the mirror, one knee slightly forward, torso leaning subtly toward the reflection. One hand holds the phone vertically in front of her face while the other rests casually on her knee. Her gaze is directed at the phone screen, focused and composed.

The environment remains an indoor gym with full height mirrors, warm overhead lighting, and softly blurred equipment in the background. The atmosphere feels intimate yet energetic, combining elegance, strength, and modern athletic aesthetics.
```

### 747. 万圣节健身镜自拍提示

**作者**: [Sienna](https://x.com/siennalovesai/status/2004961542131892391)  **日期**: 2025-12-27  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的 JSON 提示，用于 Gemini Nano Banana Pro 生成一张超逼真的镜面自拍，捕捉一位身材丰满的女性，身穿万圣节主题运动内衣和短裤，强调原始的智能手机摄影美学和来自大窗户的真实光线。

![万圣节健身镜自拍提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766987719852_fmmdha_G9MNcHMXwAIUZyr.jpg)

```
{
"subject": {
"description": "Young woman with a fit, curvy physique taking a mirror selfie",
"hair": "Dark brown hair styled in a messy, high bun with loose strands and wispy bangs framing the face",

},
"environment": {

},
"camera": {

},

},
"mood_and_expression": {

},

> 一个超写实的提示词，用于生成一张在卧室黄金时段拍摄的镜子自拍照。照片中有一位年轻女性，她有着红铜色的头发和雀斑，穿着条纹露脐上衣，在强烈、直射的阳光下被捕捉，形成了高对比度的明暗对比光线。一个关键细节是前景底部有一只狗的部分可见。

    "subject": {

    },
    "apparel": {
      "top": "Tight-fitting long-sleeve crop top with thin horizontal black and white stripes, worn slightly off-the-shoulder on the left side",
      "bottoms": "Grey heathered sweatpants or shorts (waistband visible)",
      "accessories": "Thin gold chain necklace, small hoop earring",
      "tech": "Holding a black smartphone (likely iPhone Pro model) with a dark case"
    },
    "pose_and_action": {
      "type": "Mirror selfie",
      "stance": "Standing upright, slightly angled torso",
      "hands": "Right hand holding phone to capture reflection, left hand fingers lightly touching collarbone/chest area",
      "eye_contact": "Looking at the phone screen/mirror reflection"
    },
    "environment": {
      "setting": "Indoor bedroom or walk-in closet",
      "background": "White wardrobe or closet doors with vertical wooden trim/handles, clean geometric lines",
      "foreground_details": "Head of a brown and white dog (possibly a Boxer or Pitbull mix) partially visible at the very bottom center"
    },
    "lighting": {
      "type": "Direct hard sunlight (Golden Hour/Late Afternoon)",
      "quality": "High contrast chiaroscuro",
      "effects": "Strong highlights blowing out the hair color, sharp shadows cast across the torso and background, sun-drenched aesthetic"
    },
    "technical_specs": {

      "aperture": "f/1.8",

**作者**: [simply](https://x.com/kingofdairyque/status/2004027018074378542)  **日期**: 2025-12-25  **语言**: en

> 一个旨在复刻 2000 年代初期佳能 IXUS 数码相机拍摄的夜间照片美学的提示，特点是强烈的闪光灯直射面部。它指定了场景（一个女人在极简卧室里，周围有泰迪熊，正在对着镜子自拍），并将面部和特征锁定到参考图像，重点是时尚、酷炫和性感的表情。

![2000 年代初期数码相机自拍镜面照提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766940185048_osvfrk_G8-786bb0AE7EIo.jpg)

```
Nighttime photograph of a young woman taken with an early-2000s digital camera, Canon IXUS, strong flash, compact camera style\n(keep the face and features identical to the original 100%, do not modify).A young woman stands taking a photo of herself in a mirror inside a bedroom with a white–gray color tone, clean and minimal atmosphere. She stands turned slightly to the right, her left hand holding a digital camera up at face level while calmly looking at the camera screen. She has long, straight dark hair flowing down her back. She wears a white strapless top with a cute cartoon print on the front and puffed short pants with a gray checkered pattern, clearly revealing a slim figure with naturally large breasts.Behind her is a bed covered with light-colored bedding, with several brown and cream teddy bears neatly arranged. Beside the bed is a white shelf; on it is a framed photo of the same woman, with a cream-colored teddy bear placed in front. Next to it are books, a small box, and small minimalist accessories. The room lighting is soft with a cool tone, making the image look clean, calm, and orderly.Same hairstyle, with small strands of hair partially covering the face, remove the flower from the ear. Hair slightly blowing, chic, cool, and sexy, with lightly messy layers. Pink blush on the cheeks, with a soft rosy tone on the cheeks and nose. Lips in a pink-orange shade.Looking directly at the camera, cute expression, dreamy, innocent, and playful.Pose: running fingers through the hair in a sexy IXUS flash hitting the face directly.
```

  "negative_prompt": [
    "Incorrect face",
    "Wrong hairstyle",
    "Extra limbs",
    "Distorted proportions",
    "Different dress color or "
  ]
}
```

**Related**: [[综合时尚]]、[[综合3D]]、[[奇幻世界]]

### 766. 带参考图的全身镜自拍提示

**作者**: [𝐌](https://x.com/Strength04_X/status/2003884638608281999)  **日期**: 2025-12-24  **语言**: en

> 生成一张年轻亚洲女性的站立镜面自拍，身穿粉色紧身胸衣连衣裙和蝴蝶高跟鞋。明确参考之前的图像（“image_2.png”）以获取主体细节和环境（乡村咖啡馆内部），重点是逼真的镜面视角。

![带参考图的全身镜自拍提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766936004012_rpt7ah_G886cdna0AAfWXr.jpg)

```
{
  "prompt": "A full-body standing mirror selfie, captured from the perspective of a large, ornate mirror, showing the young Asian woman from image_2.png. She is smiling gently at her phone, held in her right hand, while her legs are crossed at the ankles, displaying the pink butterfly heels. She is wearing the same light pink off-shoulder corset dress and silver jewelry (necklace, bracelet, ring). Her dark hair is tied up in a bun. The entire rustic cafe interior from image_2.png is visible around her, including the dried flower arrangements in baskets and buckets, stone walls, air conditioning unit, tiled floor, and warm overhead lighting. The reflection is sharp and realistic.",
  "subject": {
    "person": "Young Asian woman",
    "hair": "Dark hair in a bun",
    "attire": "{argument name=\"attire\" default=\"Pink off-shoulder corset dress, pink butterfly heels, silver necklace, bracelet, ring\"}",
    "expression": "Smiling"
  },
  "pose": "Standing mirror selfie, legs crossed, holding phone",
  "environment": "{argument name=\"environment\" default=\"Rustic cafe interior from image_2.png with dried flowers, baskets, stone walls, and tiled floor\"}",
  "style": "Realistic photograph from mirror perspective",
  "reference_image": "{argument name=\"reference image\" default=\"image_2.png\"}"
}
```

**作者**: [Sienna](https://x.com/siennalovesai/status/2003878390495936776)  **日期**: 2025-12-24  **语言**: en

> 一个高度结构化的提示模板，用于生成一张坦率、真实的曲线玲珑的金发年轻女性身穿米色健身套装的镜面自拍照片，强调深景深 (f/11)，使凌乱的卧室背景细节也清晰锐利。

![健身网红镜面自拍提示（大景深）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766936114075_31sx11_G880xpdWsAAUEic.jpg)

```
{
  "meta": {
    "project": "Fitness_Blonde_BeigeSet_Flux_V4.2",
    "target_engine": "Flux.1 [dev] / Nano Banana Pro",
    "version": "4.2.0 (Everything in Focus - f/11)",
    "created_at": "2025-12-24T09:15:00Z"
  },
  "engine_configuration": {
    "model": {
      "base": "flux1-dev.safetensors",
      "quantization": "fp8 / nf4",
      "vae": "ae.safetensors"
    },
    "lora_slots": [
      {
        "name": "Realism_LoRA_v2 (Optional)",
        "strength": 0.5,
        "note": "Enhances skin glow, elastic fabric texture, and indoor daylight."
      }
    ],
    "sampling": {
      "sampler_name": "euler",
      "scheduler": "simple",
      "steps": 28,
      "guidance_scale": 2.5,
      "shift": 1.0
    },
    "dimensions": {
      "width": 1024,
      "height": 1536,
      "aspect_ratio": "2:3",
      "megapixel_class": "1.5MP"
    }
  },
  "prompt_construction": {
    "narrative_layer": {
      "style": "Fitness Influencer / Mirror Selfie",
      "instruction": "Capture a sharp, side-profile mirror selfie of a blonde woman in a beige fitness set, focusing on body curves and the messy bedroom background.",
      "subject_flow": "A curvy 19-year-old blonde woman standing sideways in a mirror, wearing a beige crop top and booty shorts, arching her back."
    },
    "texture_layer": {
      "skin_physics": "pale porcelain skin with healthy glow, smooth finish, glossy lips, long nude nails",
      "fabric_physics": "tight elastic texture of beige long-sleeve top and shorts (nude illusion), crumpled texture of grey bed sheets",
      "environment_physics": "SHARP DETAILS ON BACKGROUND: wood floor grain, glass mirror reflection, scattered clothes, white extension cord, pink plushie"
    },
    "camera_physics": {
      "lens_imperfections": "smartphone camera aesthetic, soft natural light diffusion, sharp focus",
      "focus": "DEEP DEPTH OF FIELD (f/11) - NO BLUR. The woman, the unmade bed, and the floor clutter are all sharp.",
      "settings": "Smartphone Simulation, 24mm Lens, 1/100s, ISO 300 (Filtered Daylight)"
    },
    "color_grading": {
      "white_balance": "Neutral Daylight (Soft/Fresh)",
      "shadows": "Soft shadows on floor and bed",
      "highlights": "Golden highlights on blonde hair and skin"
    }
  },
  "final_prompt_string": "A candid raw mirror selfie photograph shot on Smartphone f/11. Deep depth of field, everything in focus. A curvy young woman (19) with long blonde hair with golden highlights tied in a messy half-up bun and pale porcelain skin. She stands sideways in an arched wall mirror, arching her back to accentuate her glutes and waist. She wears a tight beige long-sleeve crop top and matching high-waisted booty shorts (nude illusion look). She holds a phone high. Dramatic makeup, glossy lips. Background is sharp and detailed: Minimalist bedroom with grey walls, unmade bed with grey sheets, a pink plushie, scattered black clothes, and a white extension cord on the floor. Soft "
```

**作者**: [Sharon Riley](https://x.com/Just_sharon7/status/2003837842267758601)  **日期**: 2025-12-24  **语言**: en

> 一个为 Google Gemini Nano Banana Pro 3.0 和 Meta AI 设计的详细图像生成提示，用于创建一张具有 e-girl 美学风格的镜面自拍。主体留着粉色和黑色相间的头发，身穿红黑拼色皮衣，坐在床上，旁边有一只戴着小小的 Hello Kitty 帽子的虎斑猫。整个场景设置在一个由鲜艳紫色 LED 灯带照明的卧室里。

![E-Girl 和猫咪的镜面自拍提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766935928844_jve8q0_G88P5B1bgAAZAnt.jpg)
![E-Girl 和猫咪的镜面自拍提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766935929680_8pthkv_G88P5ByaMAAArt9.jpg)

```
{
  "subject": {
    "person": {
      "gender": "female",
      "appearance": "slender build, pale complexion, sharp facial features",
      "hair": "long pink pigtails, right side dyed black at the ends, bangs framing the face",
      "makeup": "smudged dark eyeliner, subtle red heart detail on cheekbone, pale pink lipstick",
      "pose": "sitting on a bed, taking a mirror selfie with a smartphone",
      "attire": {
        "outerwear": "red and black bi-color leather varsity jacket with striped cuffs",
        "top": "white fitted t-shirt with stylized black cursive text",
        "bottoms": "matching red and black split-color leather shorts with diamond patterns",
        "accessories": "black and red knee-high stockings"
      }
    },
    "animal": {
      "species": "tabby cat",
      "position": "sitting next to the person on the bed",
      "accessory": "small white Hello Kitty hat with a red bow"
    }
  },
  "environment": {
    "setting": "bedroom",
    "lighting": {
      "primary": "soft indoor lighting",
      "accent": "vibrant purple LED strip lights along the wall/ceiling border"
    },
    "background_details": [
      "white paneled door",
      "artificial green ivy vines draped across the wall",
      "large collection of plushies including Pikachu and Squishmallow-style toys",
      "white bedding/comforter"
    ]
  },
  "composition": {
    "viewpoint": "mirror selfie",
    "framing": "medium shot, waist-up/thigh-up",
    "color_palette": ["red", "black", "white", "vibrant purple", "soft pink"],
    "aesthetic": "e-girl, cosplay, Harley Quinn inspired"
  }
}

### 771. 2x2 网格身份锁定照片拼贴提示

**作者**: [iX | AI Video Creator](https://x.com/iX00AI/status/2003797818259992669)  **日期**: 2025-12-24  **语言**: en

> 一个高度结构化的、基于 JSON 的提示，用于让 Nano Banana Pro 生成一个 2x2 的照片拼贴。它严格锁定上传图像中主体的身份，同时在四个不同的面板（夜间户外、城市街道、镜子自拍、黄金时段车辆）中改变背景、动作和服装。

![2x2 网格身份锁定照片拼贴提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766936108283_fz4la7_G87JXYIbMAAcHPh.jpg)

```
{
  "image_layout": "2x2 grid collage featuring four distinct photographs of the same female subject.",

    "reference": "uploaded image",
    "rules": [
      "Preserve the exact same face, facial structure, body shape, skin tone, and overall identity as the uploaded reference image",
      "Do NOT change the person’s appearance, age, ethnicity, or attractiveness",
      "The subject must clearly be the same individual in all four panels"
    ]
  },

  "clothing_rules": {
    "base_rule": "Clothing may either match the uploaded image exactly OR be naturally inferred outfits that the same person would realistically wear",
    "constraints": [
      "No drastic style change",
      "No costume-like outfits",
      "Outfits must feel coherent with the subject’s real-life fashion sense"
    ]

      "setting": "Outdoors at night, dark background with softly illuminated green foliage",
      "action": "She holds a cake in one hand and licks frosting from the index finger of the other hand",
      "outfit": {

      },
      "props": {
        "item": "Round white frosted cake",
        "details": [
          "Red cherries on top",
          "Clean white piping along the edges",
          "Black icing text on the cake"
        ]
      },
      "mood": "Playful, confident, slightly cheeky"
    },

    {
      "position": "top_right",
      "setting": "Daytime upscale city street with storefronts and trees",
      "action": "She leans casually out of the open door of a black luxury car, looking directly at the camera",
      "outfit": {
        "description": "Casual-chic daytime outfit consistent with her identity (may reuse the uploaded outfit or a plausible streetwear variation)",
        "accessories": "Minimal jewelry, small shoulder bag"
      },
      "lighting": "Bright natural daylight with realistic shadows",
      "mood": "Confident, aspirational, influencer-like"
    },

    {
      "position": "bottom_left",
      "setting": "Indoor hallway with beige walls and wooden flooring",
      "action": "Full-body mirror selfie",
      "outfit": {
        "description": "A coordinated outfit suitable for an indoor mirror selfie, consistent with her fashion sense",

      },

      ],

    },

    {
      "position": "bottom_right",
      "setting": "Inside a vehicle or near a window during gold"

{

    "subject": {

      "hair": "Dark, slicked back into a low bun with a middle part",
      "makeup": "Dewy skin, rosy blush, glossy pink lips, groomed eyebrows, light mascara",
      "clothing": {
        "top": "{argument name=\"top color and style\" default=\"dark cherry red satin crop top with spaghetti straps\"}",
        "bottom": "Matching dark cherry red satin mini skirt",
        "outerwear": "Fuzzy, textured dark cherry red cardigan worn off the shoulders",
        "jewelry": "Layered silver necklaces (one pearl-like choker, one chain, one with a heart pendant), small heart hoop earrings"
      }
    },
    "setting": {
      "room": "Bedroom or dressing room with {argument name=\"room color\" default=\"pink\"} walls",
      "lighting": "Bright vanity mirror lights (Hollywood style bulbs) visible on the left frame and top, natural light from a window in the background",
      "furniture": {
        "vanity": "White vanity table with a large mirror",
        "drawers": "White 9-drawer unit (tall chest) in the background reflection",
        "seating": "Pink plush chair or sofa visible in the background"
      },
      "background_elements": {
        "window": "Large window with sheer white curtains",
        "decor": "Hello Kitty plush toys (one large pink one on the seating, smaller ones on shelves), a gold-framed floor mirror in the background"
      }
    },

        "perfume": "Square glass perfume bottle with pink liquid and crystal-like cap",

      }

  }
}

![黑蜘蛛女孩镜面自拍提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766935962840_0v6243_G87CawpbAAEbV2j.jpg)

```
{   "shot": "A tight close-up mirror selfie",   "subject": {     "appearance": "a stunning woman",     "hair": "{argument name="hair style" default="long wavy hair"}",     "pose": "sitting casually sideways on a white bathroom vanity counter",     "gaze": "looking at the mirror"   },   "outfit": {     "bodysuit": "form-fitting black symbiote-inspired superhero bodysuit with subtle dark web texturing",     "emblem": "{argument name="emblem color and shape" default="prominent white spider emblem"} on the chest"   },   "phone": {     "device": "black smartphone",     "case": "white spider logo case",     "action": "holding it up to capture the reflection"   },   "environment": {     "location": "bathroom",     "lighting": "dimly lit with warm, soft indoor lighting",     "atmosphere": "intimate atmosphere with soft shadows",     "visible_elements": "only a partial section of the white sink basin and counter surface visible at the bottom of the frame",     "mirror": "mirror edges are cropped out of view"   },   "aesthetic": "high quality, photorealistic, lo-fi social media aesthetic",   "makeup": {     "blush": "prominent soft pink blush on her cheeks",     "finish": "glowy makeup",     "highlighter": "on the tip of her nose",     "lips": "slightly parted soft warm pink lips"   },   "skin": "highly detailed skin texture",   "lighting_detail": "even, invisible front illumination that softly brightens the face with neutral white light, no visible light source, no shadows, no reflections, no hotspots",   "quality": "no blur" }
```

### 774. Coquette 审美梳妆镜自拍

**作者**: [Melisa♡](https://x.com/xmliisu/status/2003727268774916356)  **日期**: 2025-12-24  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张“娇媚美学（coquette aesthetic）”风格的图像，模拟“和我一起准备（Get Ready With Me）”的场景。主体是一位年轻女性，在梳妆台前涂抹唇彩，周围是粉色装饰、Hello Kitty 毛绒玩具和温暖的好莱坞式灯光，强调柔和、女性化和单色粉红主题。

![Coquette 审美梳妆镜自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766935981594_smtwft_G86rU1-XMAAhHEm.jpg)

```
{
  "image_details": {
    "subject": {
      "person": "Young woman",
      "pose": "Leaning forward slightly towards a vanity mirror, applying lip gloss with right hand, left hand resting on the table surface",
      "expression": "Soft gaze, lips slightly parted",
      "hair": "Dark, slicked back into a low bun with a middle part",
      "makeup": "Dewy skin, rosy blush, glossy pink lips, groomed eyebrows, light mascara",
      "clothing": {
        "top": "Light pink satin crop top with spaghetti straps",
        "bottom": "Matching light pink satin mini skirt",
        "outerwear": "Fuzzy, textured pink cardigan worn off the shoulders",
        "jewelry": "Layered silver necklaces (one pearl-like choker, one chain, one with a heart pendant), small heart hoop earrings"
      }
    },
    "setting": {
      "room": "Bedroom or dressing room with pink walls",
      "lighting": "Bright vanity mirror lights (Hollywood style bulbs) visible on the left frame and top, natural light from a window in the background",
      "furniture": {
        "vanity": "White vanity table with a large mirror",
        "drawers": "White 9-drawer unit (tall chest) in the background reflection",
        "seating": "Pink plush chair or sofa visible in the background"
      },
      "background_elements": {
        "window": "Large window with sheer white curtains",
        "decor": "Hello Kitty plush toys (one large pink one on the seating, smaller ones on shelves), a gold-framed floor mirror in the background"
      }
    },
    "foreground_objects": {
      "vanity_surface": {
        "perfume": "Square glass perfume bottle with pink liquid and crystal-like cap",
        "makeup_tools": "Jar of makeup brushes (brown and rose gold handles)",
        "cosmetics": "Various makeup palettes, tubes, and a Glossier lip gloss tube standing upright",
        "action_item": "Lip gloss wand being held near lips"
      }
    },
    "composition": {
      "perspective": "Selfie-style or shot through a mirror reflection",
      "color_palette": "Monochromatic {argument name="color palette" default="pink"} theme (various shades of pink), white accents, warm lighting",
      "style": "{argument name="aesthetic style" default="Coquette aesthetic"}, 'Get Ready With Me' vibe, soft and feminine"
    }
  }
}
```

### 776. 保留身份的镜面自拍提示

**作者**: [Ravya](https://x.com/IamRavya2002/status/2003687017830551687)  **日期**: 2025-12-24  **语言**: en

> 一个为 Gemini Nano Banana Pro 设计的高度详细的图像生成提示，要求生成一张年轻女性坐在床上的镜面自拍。该提示要求严格保留上传参考图片中人物的面部特征，同时将发色改为黑色。她摆出“嘘”的手势，身穿白色迷你连衣裙，纹身可见，场景设定在一个明亮通风的卧室中。

![保留身份的镜面自拍提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766935954553_8icjwm_G86GopAbIAAOs1d.jpg)

```
{
  "prompt": "A young woman with long, straight black hair styled in a center part, taking a mirror selfie while sitting on a bed. She is positioned with her legs bent and drawn up, knees slightly apart. Her right hand holds a black smartphone with a red cloud pattern case (Akatsuki from Naruto) up to her face, partially obscuring it, while her left index finger is gently pressed to her lips in a 'shh' gesture. She wears a white, strappy, low-cut mini dress with lace trim at the hem and delicate straps tied into bows over her shoulders. She has multiple visible tattoos: intricate designs on both forearms, a small one on her upper left chest near the collarbone, and another small tattoo on her right thigh. She wears subtle jewelry including small hoop earrings, a pearl choker necklace, and a thin bracelet. The background features a large, full-length mirror reflecting a bright window with sheer white curtains on the left, allowing soft natural light to fill the room. To the right, a white metal bed frame or headboard is visible, adorned with small potted plants and purple flowers. The bed she sits on is covered with a white duvet featuring a detailed black floral or botanical print. The lighting is bright, airy, and diffused, creating soft shadows and highlighting skin texture and fabric details. The image is sharply focused, high-resolution, capturing fine details like individual hair strands, the texture of the lace, and the clarity of the tattoos. The overall mood is intimate, serene, and slightly playful. The woman's face must remain exactly as uploaded — identical features, expression, and angle — only the hair color is changed to black.",
  "negative_prompt": "blurred, low quality, distorted face, extra limbs, deformed hands, unnatural lighting, cartoon, anime, illustration, painting, text, watermark, multiple people, different pose, different outfit, blonde hair, brown hair, short hair, hat, glasses, different phone case, harsh shadows, dark room",
  "width": 1024,
  "height": 1024,
  "steps": 30,
  "cfg_scale": 7.5,
  "seed": null,
  "sampler_name": "Euler a",
  "scheduler": "Karras",
  "denoising_strength": 0.75,
  "enable_hr": false,
  "hr_scale": 2.0,
  "hr_upscaler": "Latent",
  "hr_second_pass_steps": 20,
  "hr_resize_x": 0,
  "hr_resize_y": 0,
  "refiner_checkpoint": null,
  "refiner_switch_at": 0.5,
  "clip_skip": 2,
  "face_restoration_model": "CodeFormer",
  "face_restoration_visibility": 1.0,
  "sd_model_checkpoint": "v1-5-pruned-emaonly.safetensors"
}
```

### 777. 老旧电脑效果肖像提示词

**作者**: [BeautyVerse](https://x.com/BeautyVerse_Lab/status/2003685735002677379)  **日期**: 2025-12-24  **语言**: en

> 一个为 Nano Banana Pro 设计的详细英文提示，基于 SDT（Stable Diffusion Template）结构，旨在生成一张逼真的女性自拍照，显示在老式 CRT 显示器屏幕上，具有特定的 2000 年代美学元素，如扫描线、荧光粉发光、高数字噪点和 Mac OS X 界面。该提示需要一个角色参考图像。

![老旧电脑效果肖像提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766936083153_kc6ag7_G86FjUna0AAHg_K.jpg)

```
A realistic selfie photograph displayed on a vintage CRT monitor screen in a dark room. The woman based on the input reference image is sitting in a computer chair, leaning toward the camera and playfully winking at the lens with a charming, flirtatious expression. She has the same glasses and hairstyle as the reference. The CRT screen shows scanlines, phosphor bloom, a soft, tender pinkish glow dominating the display, and a Mac OS X early 2000s desktop interface. The photo aesthetic on the screen is authentic 2000s, with strong direct flash striking her face, rosy and warm tones, high digital noise, grain, sharp texture, and hard flash shadows.
```

**Related**: [[奇幻世界]]

> 一个高度详细的 JSON 结构化提示，用于生成一张逼真的肖像，描绘一位年轻女性在豪华现代浴室中涂抹红色口红的场景。构图聚焦于中景侧面拍摄，主体凝视着一面大型圆形镜子，确保镜中倒影清晰且聚焦。它还指定了灯光、调色板（白色、黑色、红色、金色）以及大理石、镀铬和特定道具等场景元素。

![豪华浴室自拍，带镜面反射](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766936020267_5ag0tu_G86EO_mbUAAddvU.jpg)

```
{ "图像设定": { "类型": "写实摄影 / 人像", "主题": "魅力、美感、妆前准备", "风格": "优雅、现代、高端", "画幅比例": "3:4 (竖版)" }, "视觉描述": "一位美丽的黑色长发年轻女子正在涂抹红色口红。采用中景侧面构图，女子位于画面右侧，正看向左侧一面大型圆形镜子，镜中完整映出她的倒影，焦点清晰地聚焦在女子及其倒影上。人物为亚洲女性，妆容精致无瑕，拥有黑色长卷发；身着带有金色太阳纹装饰的白色无肩带礼服或上衣，佩戴金色项链与手链；手中拿着红色口红管，正对镜涂抹。场景设定在奢华现代风格的浴室，核心元素包括带明亮冷白色LED光环的大型圆镜、深色光面瓷砖墙、线条流畅的白色椭圆形台上盆搭配现代镀铬水龙头以及黑色台面。道具包含插有一支白色马蹄莲的白色陶瓷花瓶，以及黑色托盘上的小型化妆品瓶。", "色彩与光影": "主色调为鲜明白色、深邃黑色、鲜艳红色（口红）与金属金色；光线来自LED镜环发出的柔和悦目的冷光，形成光晕效果并突出主体，辅以室内环境光，氛围精致、宁静而私密", "技术参数": [ "照片级真实", "高分辨率", "专业摄影质感", "细节锐利", "倒影清晰" ] }

**作者**: [Dove 🕊️](https://x.com/Lovie_dovie__/status/2003434791790665920)  **日期**: 2025-12-23  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张超逼真的镜面自拍。它指定了拍摄对象的服装（灰褐色马海毛开衫、黑色上衣、高腰牛仔裤）、配饰（麻花针织贝雷帽）、姿势，以及一个极简的室内环境，配有柔和、漫射的灯光，强调纹理和清晰的焦点。

![极简主义背景下的精致镜面自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766673194121_4z72af_G82hUVybIAEwdYM.jpg)
![极简主义背景下的精致镜面自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766673198222_wymfaz_G82hUWEaIAAhhLd.jpg)

```
{
  "prompt": {
    "subject": {
      "type": "female",
      "pose": "standing, taking a mirror selfie, holding a light pink smartphone with triple-lens camera in right hand, slight angle to face for selfie look",
      "hair": {
        "length": "long",
        "style": "wavy, flowing naturally over shoulders",
        "color": "dark black, shiny with natural highlights"
      },
      "facial_features": {
        "skin_tone": "fair, smooth complexion",
        "eyebrows": "well-defined, slightly arched",
        "lips": "full, wearing matte red lipstick",

### 783. 混乱自信咖啡馆浴室镜自拍

**作者**: [Emma](https://x.com/Emmalaurent0/status/2003379222321000481)  **日期**: 2025-12-23  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的提示，用于生成一张在咖啡馆洗手间拍摄的、具有高能量感的逼真镜面自拍，特点是“疯狂但时尚”的姿势、刺眼的灯光和特定的造型细节，同时严格保持参考图像中的人物身份。

![混乱自信咖啡馆浴室镜自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766673149466_y52rdk_G81upFWWwAAGwGk.jpg)

```
A trendy café bathroom mirror selfie with chaotic, confident “unhinged but make it fashion” energy. The phone is visible in the mirror, classic selfie POV, camera slightly above eye level. Harsh overhead bathroom lighting that would be unflattering on most people, but she completely owns it. The mirror is slightly dirty with water spots, clearly a real bathroom, not a photoshoot.

A young adult woman taking a mirror selfie with an intentionally unhinged pose. One leg is up on the sink, knee bent, creating a chaotic body line. Alternatively, she’s arched dramatically against the wall next to the mirror, head tilted back. Her upper body is twisted to catch angles, pulling slightly at her top or aggressively playing with her hair. She’s facing the mirror with intense eye contact — pure “I know I’m hot” energy. Lips slightly parted, biting the lower lip or tongue touching the upper lip, one eyebrow subtly raised. Main-character confidence that feels earned.

She has sharp facial features, a defined jawline, full lips, glowing youthful skin with a dewy finish. Slim but curvy in all the right places, tight waist, youthful firmness. Her hair is warm honey blonde, long messy waves, intentional chaos like she’s been running her hands through it all day.

She’s wearing a going-out outfit, clearly stopped in the bathroom to document how good she looks. A tiny cropped tank or going-out top, tight and minimal, {argument name="top color" default="white, black, or red"}, showing stomach with light cleavage. Bottoms are high-rise or low-rise denim shorts, very short, fitted, showing legs and hip line, effortlessly sexy without trying too hard. Shoes are either not visible or chunky platform soles barely peeking into frame.

Accessories include chunky silver hoop earrings, layered silver chains (one with a charm), a tiny purse on the counter or still worn crossbody, and a trendy phone case with bows or rhinestones.

The bathroom is a popular aesthetic café restroom: large mirror, possible stickers or a lipstick kiss mark in the corner, marble or ceramic sink, tiled or color-painted walls, maybe a neon sign or art piece, soap dispenser and paper towels visible. It’s the bathroom everyone takes photos in — she’s just doing it better. Face and hair should closely match the reference image I uploaded — same facial structure, proportions, expression style, and hair color/texture/length. Preserve the identity, facial harmony, and hair details from the reference image without stylization drift.

Smartphone mirror selfie, sharp quality, no flash, framed wide enough to capture the absurd pose. Vertical 9:16 aspect ratio. The overall vibe is reckless confidence, zero self-consciousness, social-media ready — sexy without being explicit, attitude over skin.
```

### 788. 宿舍里真实的“慵懒性感”镜面自拍

**作者**: [Sienna](https://x.com/siennalovesai/status/2003195265193279869)  **日期**: 2025-12-22  **语言**: en

> 生成一张高度逼真的垂直镜面自拍的提示词，画面中是一位年轻的白人女孩，身处一个舒适、略显凌乱的宿舍房间。提示词明确了“慵懒性感”的造型（紧身白色短款背心，低腰灰色运动裤）、姿势（提臀，看向手机屏幕反射），以及环境细节（柔和的 LED 灯光，未整理的床铺），以营造一种自然、讨喜的美感。

![宿舍里真实的“慵懒性感”镜面自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766667311950_1mbemg_G8zHdp2WwAAkaDH.jpg)

```
(Vertical 9:16 smartphone aspect ratio). A highly realistic, casual full-body mirror selfie taken in a cozy, slightly messy bedroom or college dorm.

Subject: A cute 19-year-old Caucasian girl with a youthful, fresh face and long, messy-wavy blonde/light-brown hair.* 

Physique: She has a fit, curvy body with a slim waist and wider hips.*   

Pose: She stands in front of a tall floor mirror. She adopts a flattering pose: one leg is stepped slightly forward, and she pops her hip to the side, accentuating her curves. 

She holds an iPhone (with a cute case) up to the mirror. She is looking at the phone screen in the reflection, not the camera.

Outfit (The "Lazy-Hot" Look):*   

Top: A tight, white ribbed tank top or baby tee, cropped short to show her midriff and belly button.*   

Bottom: Grey sweatpants worn low-rise (rolled down at the waist) to highlight her waist-to-hip ratio.

Environment: The room is a typical teenager's bedroom. Unmade bed in the background, soft LED strip lights (purple or warm white) on the ceiling, and maybe some clothes on a chair. It feels lived-in and authentic.

Lighting: Natural light coming from a window mixed with the soft indoor room light, creating a flattering, soft glow on her skin.
```

*   Physique: She has a fit, curvy body with a slim waist and wider hips.

She holds an iPhone (with a cute case) up to the mirror. She is looking at the phone screen in the reflection, not the camera.

Outfit (The "Lazy-Hot" Look):
*   Top: A tight, white ribbed tank top or baby tee, cropped short to show her midriff and belly button.
*   Bottom: Grey sweatpants worn low-rise (rolled down at the waist) to highlight her waist-to-hip ratio.

Environment: The room is a typical teenager's bedroom. Unmade bed in the background, soft LED strip lights (purple or warm white) on the ceiling, and maybe some clothes on a chair. It feels lived-in and authentic.

Lighting: Natural light coming from a window mixed with the soft indoor room light, creating a flattering, soft glow on her skin.
```

### 790. 穿红色缎面连衣裙，带身份锁的镜子自拍

**作者**: [Özge Döner](https://x.com/astronomerozge1/status/2003171523863924769)  **日期**: 2025-12-22  **语言**: en

> 这是一个为 Nano Banana Pro 设计的高度结构化提示，强调严格保留上传参考照片中的身份特征。它要求拍摄一张主体蹲姿的超逼真镜面自拍，身穿红色缎面迷你连衣裙，置身于极简现代室内，光线为柔和的自然日光。

![穿红色缎面连衣裙，带身份锁的镜子自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766667316573_6vl8kj_G8yx1bDWkAAg8xT.jpg)

```
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "version": "v1.2",
      "priority": "high"
    },
    "technical_constraints": {
      "identity_preservation": {
        "enabled": true,
        "reference_mode": "strict",
        "parameters": {
          "use_reference_face_only": true,
          "identity_lock": true,
          "preserve_facial_features": true,
          "preserve_skin_texture": true,
          "preserve_face_proportions": true,
          "avoid_face_morphing": true,
          "no_beautification": true,
          "preservation_strength": 1.0
        }
      },
      "output_settings": {
        "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
        "resolution_target": "ultra_high_res",
        "render_engine_style": "photorealistic"
      }
    },
    "creative_prompt": {
      "scene": {
        "location": "minimal modern interior",
        "background": "clean white walls with a bright sunlit window light patch on the right wall, smooth light-gray concrete floor, empty space, no clutter",
        "lighting": "soft natural daylight from the right side, gentle shadows, bright airy look"
      },
      "subject": {
        "identity_instruction": "The woman must be 100% identical to the uploaded reference photo (same identity, face, facial proportions, skin tone, and natural texture). Do not alter the face in any way.",
        "pose": "squatting in a mirror-selfie pose, knees bent, one hand resting on thigh, the other hand holding a smartphone up in front of her face",
        "expression": "soft smile, relaxed confident vibe",
        "hair": {
          "instruction": "Match the reference hair exactly (same cut, volume, texture, and styling). No changes."
        },
        "outfit": {
          "dress": {
            "type": "red satin mini dress with rose floral print",
            "details": "thin spaghetti straps, ruched fitted silhouette, body-hugging",
            "fabric": "silky satin sheen"
          },
          "bag": {
            "type": "small beige shoulder bag",
            "details": "short strap tucked under arm"
          },
          "shoes": {
            "type": "high-heel sandals",
            "color": "light pink / nude",
            "details": "delicate straps with a small bow detail on the toes"
          },
          "jewelry": [
            "gold bracelet",
            "delicate necklace",
            "small rings"
          ]
        },
        "phone": {
          "type": "smartphone",
          "case_color": "light pink",
          "details": "camera module visible, held in selfie position"
        }
      },
      "camera_and_style": {
        "shot_style": "photorealistic mirror selfie / influencer outfit check",
        "lens": "35mm",
        "aperture": "f/2.8",
        "focus": "sharp on subject, natural depth, clean background",
        "color_grading": "neutral bright tones, natural skin color, subtle film grain",
        "quality_notes": "keep natural pores/text"
      }
    }
  }
}

### 794. 高对比度黑白纹身镜面自拍

**作者**: [KeorUnreal](https://x.com/KeorUnreal/status/2003134710432559360)  **日期**: 2025-12-22  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的文本提示，用于生成一张戏剧性、高对比度的黑白镜面自拍。主体是一位女性，腿部有大面积的黑灰纹身，身穿一件时尚的系带黑色紧身衣，坐在一间极简主义房间的现代椅子上。该提示强调超逼真的皮肤和纹身细节、电影般的灯光以及复古胶片美学。

![高对比度黑白纹身镜面自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766667345747_1gue4n_G8yQZg5WoAEL9f2.jpg)

```
A captivating young woman with platinum blonde hair takes a bold, intimate mirror selfie while seated on a modern metal chair in a minimalist, softly lit room. She wears a sleek black long-sleeve bodysuit made of smooth, slightly glossy fabric, featuring a daring open-front lace-up design with crisscross black ribbons that create a floral-shaped cutout over her cleavage, revealing tantalizing glimpses of skin. The bodysuit hugs her toned curves tightly, accentuating her hourglass figure and defined waist. Her legs are spread confidently wide apart, showcasing her full, heavily tattooed thighs and calves covered in an intricate sleeve of black-and-gray tattoos featuring mythical creatures, eagles, birds, feathers, and detailed organic designs that flow down to her bare feet. She holds her phone high with one hand, partially obscuring her face, while her other hand rests casually on her thigh. The black-and-white filter gives the image a dramatic, high-contrast, vintage film look with rich shadows and glowing highlights on her skin and fabric. The background is a clean, neutral studio space with a light gray floor and subtle wall texture. Ultra-realistic skin and tattoo details, strong cinematic lighting, moody and empowering atmosphere, highly detailed textures on lace-up ribbons, glossy fabric, and intricate ink work.
```

> 一个高度技术化的 JSON 提示（使用虚构的 Flux 引擎参数），用于生成一张原始的、超逼真的 e-girl 坐在床上的镜面自拍。该提示明确要求深景深（f/11），以便主体、床单和背景杂物（凌乱的房间细节）都清晰对焦，模拟特定的智能手机相机设置。

```
{
  "meta": {
    "project": "Egirl_Bed_Selfie_HelloKitty_Flux_V4.2",
    "target_engine": "Flux.1 [dev] / Nano Banana Pro",
    "version": "4.2.0 (Everything in Focus - f/11)",
    "created_at": "2025-12-19T15:50:00Z"
  },

    "model": {

      "vae": "ae.safetensors"

    },

    },
    "color_grading": {
      "white_balance": "Natural Daylight (Neutral/Soft)",
      "shadows": "Soft shadows on floor and bed",
      "highlights": "Soft white highlights on skin and hair"
    }
  },
  "final_prompt_string": "A candid raw mirror selfie photograph shot on Smartphone f/11. Deep depth of field, everything in focus. A young woman (19) with pale porcelain skin and long black hair with bangs (wolf cut) sitting on the edge of a bed with grey sheets. She sits with legs crossed (right over left), knee up. She wears a tight black long-sleeve off-shoulder top, a beige and black plaid pleated mini skirt, and opaque black thigh-high stockings. She holds an iPhone with a cute Hello Kitty case. Confident, seductive expression with dramatic e-girl makeup. Background is sharp and detailed: Minimalist room with white blinds filtering li"

**作者**: [Iris](https://x.com/xIrissy/status/2003060637635604501)  **日期**: 2025-12-22  **语言**: en

> 一个用于生成超逼真、高分辨率空中动作照片的 Gemini Nano Banana Pro 提示词。它需要一张参考图像进行身份锁定，描绘了一位女性在滑翔伞运动中，通过自拍杆以低角度广角自拍，强调动感、超逼真的皮肤纹理和充满活力的热带海岸线背景。

![低角度滑翔伞自拍动作镜头](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766667262832_xe4f0d_G8xNBd6asAAorNE.jpg)

```
{
  "generation_request": {
    "subject_reference": {
      "Gender": "Female", A Beautiful Woman in her 20s.
      "facial_preservation": "High fidelity, exact features, no stylization, no alteration to identity"
    },
    "prompts": {
      "positive_prompt": "High-resolution aerial action photography of [Reference Woman] paragliding. Low-angle wide-angle selfie shot captured via a selfie stick held in her left hand. She is suspended in a professional paragliding harness with legs freely dangling, wearing a black bikini and simple flip-flops. Her right hand grips the paragliding control handle. The background is an expansive, vibrant tropical coastline with deep turquoise ocean and clear blue sky. Bright natural daylight, sharp focus, hyper-realistic skin texture, cinematic composition, dynamic motion, true-to-life proportions.",
      "negative_prompt": "CG, 3d render, anime, cartoon, painting, drawing, illustration, altered face, distorted features, bad anatomy, deformed hands, missing fingers, helmet, sunglasses, wetsuit, sneakers, cloudy, dark lighting, blurry, noise, grain, low resolution"
    },
    "scene_details": {
      "camera_angle": "Low perspective, wide-angle, looking up from selfie stick",
      "lighting": "Bright natural daylight, hard sunlight",
      "attire": [
        "Black bikini",
        "Simple flip-flops"
      ],
      "pose_constraints": {
        "left_hand": "Holding selfie stick pointed toward self",
        "right_hand": "Holding paragliding control handle",
        "legs": "Dangling freely"
      }
    },
    "technical_settings": {
      "aspect_ratio": "9:16",
      "style": "Ultra-realistic, raw photography"
    }
  }
}
```

{
  "image_asset": {
    "title": "Glamorous Woman Applying Lip Gloss in Mirror Reflection",
    "scene_id": "glam_bathroom_mirror_001",
    "category": "Lifestyle / Beauty",
    "format": "Vertical Portrait"
  },
  "content_analysis": {
    "subject": {
      "description": "Young woman with sleek dark hair in a high ponytail.",
      "attire": "Light pink spaghetti strap slip dress.",
      "jewelry": [
        "Large white floral stud earrings with gold centers",
        "Van Cleef & Arpels Alhambra motif bracelet",
        "Flat gold bangle"
      ],
      "makeup": {
        "style": "Full glamour",
        "details": [
          "Flawless base",
          "Contoured cheeks",
          "Winged eyeliner",
          "Glossy nude-pink lips"
        ]
      },
      "action": "Applying lip gloss to lower lip while looking into a large oval mirror."
    },
    "environment": {
      "setting": "Bathroom/Dressing area.",
      "key_elements": [
        "Large oval gold-framed mirror",
        "Dark teal vertical subway tiles",
        "Brushed gold brass sconce",
        "Dark wooden doorway (reflected)",
        "Glass shower enclosure (reflected background)"
      ]
    },
    "lighting_and_mood": {
      "type": "Warm artificial ambient.",
      "mood": "Glamorous, intimate, confident.",
      "color_palette": [
        "#004d55 (Deep Teal)",
        "#f2cdd3 (Pale Pink)",
        "#cfa97e (Skin Tone)",
        "#bca36a (Gold)"
      ]
    }
  },
  "technical_metadata": {
    "camera_angle": "Eye-level, mirror reflection shot.",
    "focus": "Sharp focus on face and hands; softer background reflection.",
    "lighting_quality": "Soft, flattering highlights on skin and glazed tiles."
  },
  "generation_config": {
    "engine_hints": "Social media aesthetic, high fidelity, rich textures (gloss, glass, tile).",
    "positive_prompt": "A candid photograph of a glamorous woman with sleek dark hair in a high ponytail, wearing a pink slip dress and gold jewelry, applying lip gloss. She is reflected in a large oval gold mirror in a bathroom with dark teal vertical subway tiles. Warm, soft artificial lighting creates highlights on her skin and the tiles. The reflection shows a doorway and another person in the background.",
    "negative_prompt": "blurry, low resolution, text, watermark, distorted features, messy hair, bright daylight, harsh shadows, cartoonish, oversaturated."
  }
}

### 800. 电锯人蕾塞全身镜自拍 Cosplay

**作者**: [gemini_prompts](https://x.com/YeKyaHoRhaHaiBe/status/2003021200461894116)  **日期**: 2025-12-22  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的图像生成提示，旨在创建一张年轻女性扮演《电锯人》中蕾泽（Reze）角色的全身镜面自拍风格影棚照片。该提示详细说明了姿势、表情、服装、灯光和背景的精确细节，以使用 Gemini Nano Banana Pro 模型实现精致、高清和时尚的美学效果。

![电锯人蕾塞全身镜自拍 Cosplay](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766667313826_5errlh_G8wpJtYbwAAPU8P.jpg)

```
"Create a full-body mirror selfie–style studio photograph of a young woman(match face) cosplaying Reze from #chainsawman, standing on a glossy black circular platform. The image is shot at eye level with centered framing in a 9:16 vertical aspect ratio, capturing her full body. She holds a white smartphone with multiple camera lenses slightly offset to the center of her face, covering only part of the face, while one eye, part of the cheek, and the jawline remain clearly visible. The phone is positioned naturally like a casual mirror selfie, not blocking the entire face. No reflection or text artifacts appear on the phone.
Her expression feels cool and mysterious, with the visible eye directed forward toward the mirror. Her face is partially obscured but still expressive, maintaining a stylish, confident presence rather than full anonymity. She has dark violet-black hair styled in a neat, anime-accurate short bob with bangs and a silky texture.
Her body proportions are slender and anime-inspired, with long, toned legs, a slim waist, and a natural chest. Visible skin areas include arms, thighs, neck, and part of the face, with a fair tone and smooth texture under soft, even studio lighting.
Her pose remains elegant and balanced: standing upright with one leg slightly forward, right hand extended gracefully to the side with refined finger placement, and left hand holding the phone near her face in a relaxed selfie posture.
Her outfit faithfully represents Reze’s cosplay: a crisp, fitted white sleeveless collared shirt with a black ribbon bow tie and button-up front, paired with high-waisted black denim hot pants, opaque black thigh-high socks, black loafers, and a black choker necklace. Accessories remain minimal and limited to the choker and the phone. The black circular platform beneath her feet is clearly visible.
The setting is a clean infinity cyclorama studio with a smooth gradient background transitioning from {argument name="background color" default="purple to violet"}, featuring a seamless curved wall-to-floor transition with no horizon line, corners, props, or studio equipment visible. Lighting is soft, evenly distributed studio lighting with cool-toned ambient light, deep focus, and a clean high-definition minimalist aesthetic. The subject occupies approximately 80 percent of the vertical frame with balanced spacing and moderate headroom.
The overall vibe remains cool, stylish, playful yet mysterious, resembling a life-sized figurine display or cosplay showcase. The aesthetic is polished, pop-culture–inspired, clean, and staged to perfection. Avoid messy environments, full face obstruction, reflections revealing unintended artifacts, complex patterns, paper backdrops, floor seams, wall corners, baseboards, furniture, text overlays, grain, low quality, shadows on walls, or any NSFW elements."
```

### 801. 用于生成镜面自拍图像的详细 JSON 提示

**作者**: [Chandan Singh](https://x.com/cbsingh_oo3/status/2002979538243047610)  **日期**: 2025-12-22  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的 JSON 提示，用于 Google Gemini Nano Banana Pro 3.0 模型，旨在生成一张女性主体拍摄镜面自拍的特定生活方式图像。该提示细致地定义了主体的外貌、着装、姿势、构图、光照、场景和技术细节，以实现一种真实的社交媒体美学。

![用于生成镜面自拍图像的详细 JSON 提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766667361236_t3imuy_G8wDRIEaEAA8_-a.jpg)

```
{
  "subject": {
    "gender": "{argument name="gender" default="female"}",
    "appearance": {
      "hair": "{argument name="hair style" default="blonde, medium-length, wavy, slightly messy/effortless style"}",
      "expression": "{argument name="expression" default="playful pout, eyes slightly narrowed"}",
      "pose": "{argument name="pose" default="standing, mirror selfie, body angled away from mirror while looking back, making a peace sign (V-sign) with left hand"}",
      "skin_tone": "{argument name="skin tone" default="fair"}"
    },
    "attire": {
      "top": "{argument name="top attire" default="vibrant pink tank top or camisole"}",
      "outerwear": "{argument name="outerwear" default="white chunky-knit cardigan, oversized balloon sleeves, worn open"}",
      "bottom": "{argument name="bottom attire" default="high-waisted dark grey or faded black denim jeans, skinny or slim fit"}",
      "accessories": "{argument name="accessories" default="spiral hair tie on wrist, delicate necklace"}"
    }
  },
  "composition": {
    "shot_type": "{argument name="shot type" default="medium shot, mirror selfie"}",
    "angle": "{argument name="angle" default="low angle, looking slightly up"}",
    "lighting": "{argument name="lighting" default="bright, natural indoor lighting, soft shadows"}",
    "framing": "{argument name="framing" default="vertical, reflection in a large floor-to-ceiling mirror with a thin gold or wooden frame"}"
  },
  "setting": {
    "environment": "{argument name="environment" default="modern bedroom or dressing area"}",
    "background_elements": [
      "white minimalist walls",
      "white dresser with gold hardware",
      "white door and door handle",
      "square ceiling light fixture",
      "some clothing items visible on the dresser in the background"
    ],
    "color_palette": ["white", "black", "pink", "soft grey"]
  },
  "technical_details": {
    "camera_in_hand": "{argument name="camera in hand" default="black smartphone (dual-lens setup)"}",
    "style": "{argument name="style" default="lifestyle photography, social media aesthetic, candid feel"}"
  }
}
```

  },
  "skin": "highly detailed skin texture",

}

**作者**: [Melisa♡](https://x.com/xmliisu/status/2002691541811216648)  **日期**: 2025-12-21  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张网红镜面自拍风格的图片。它详细描述了拍摄对象的形象（金色头发、光泽感妆容）、服装（文胸式上衣、高腰裙、仿皮草外套）、动作（手持 iPhone Pro）和环境（带洞石瓷砖和暖色灯光的奢华浴室），以实现高分辨率的生活方式摄影美学。

![奢华镜面自拍提示词（网红美学）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766489442768_yf7c5q_G8r9VGyWYAAT23J.jpg)

```
{
  "prompt_details": {
    "subject": {
      "type": "Woman",
      "appearance": {
        "hair": "{argument name="hair style" default="Long, blonde, highlighted, straight with slight wave, parted in the middle"}",
        "skin_tone": "Tan, bronzed",
        "expression": "{argument name="expression" default="Smiling warmly, white teeth visible, looking at phone screen"}",
        "makeup": "Glowy natural glam, defined brows, glossy lips, soft contour"
      }
    },
    "attire": {
      "top": "Nude/beige structured bralette or bikini top with underwire and thin straps",
      "bottom": "Dark chocolate brown high-waisted pencil skirt",
      "outerwear": "Oversized, fluffy faux fur coat in light beige/taupe, worn open and draped over arms",
      "accessories": [
        "Small gold hoop earrings",
        "Gold ring on left ring finger",
        "Nude/light pink manicure"
      ]
    },
    "action": {
      "pose": "Standing mirror selfie",
      "hands": "Right hand resting on hip, left hand holding phone",
      "device": "iPhone Pro model (likely gold or silver) with three camera lenses"
    },
    "environment": {
      "setting": "Luxury bathroom or dressing room",
      "architecture": "Beige stone/travertine tiled walls, arched alcove with built-in wooden shelving",
      "furniture": "Large rectangular mirror with bevel, wooden vanity counter",
      "decor": "Skincare bottles and products on shelves, wall-mounted sconce lights with warm shades",
      "background_reflection": "Reflection shows depth of room and another mirror/doorway"
    },
    "technical_specs": {
      "lighting": "Soft warm indoor lighting mixed with natural light from the left, golden hour vibes",
      "color_palette": [
        "Beige",
        "Cream",
        "Chocolate Brown",
        "Tan",
        "Gold"
      ],
      "style": "Influencer aesthetic, lifestyle photography, high resolution, soft focus background",
      "angle": "Front-facing reflection shot"
    }
  }
}
```

    },
    "pose": "seated on the floor with one leg bent and the other extended, leaning back slightly, holding the phone with one hand at eye level, lips slightly parted in a playful expression",
    "expression": "playful, with a wink and a sultry smile, eyes glancing at the phone screen",
    "clothing": {
      "top": {
        "color": "red",
        "style": "fitted crop top with a plunging neckline",
        "details": "strappy, with small gold accents"
      },
      "bottom": {
        "color": "black",
        "style": "high-waisted faux leather pants",
        "texture": "sleek and shiny"
      }
    },
    "accessories": {
      "jewelry": [
        "small hoop earrings",
        "gold bracelet on wrist",
        "delicate gold chain necklace"
      ],
      "nail_polish": {
        "fingers": "bright red",
        "toes": "glittery gold"
      }
    }
  },
  "setting": {
    "environment": "indoor, dimly lit bedroom with soft natural light coming from a nearby window",
    "objects": {
      "phone": {
        "type": "smartphone",
        "color": "dark grey or black",
        "camera_layout": "triple lens arrangement (indicative of iPhone Pro model)"
      },
      "mirror": "large floor mirror reflecting the subject",
      "background_elements": [
        "plush pillow with a velvet texture",
        "light-colored decorative candles on a bedside table"
      ]
    },
    "surface": "wooden floor with a soft rug beneath"
  },
  "lighting": {
    "style": "natural light with soft diffused glow",
    "sources": [
      "sunlight streaming through the window, creating warm highlights on the skin"
    ],
    "quality": "soft, flattering shadows, natural warmth"
  },
  "composition": {
    "angle": "low angle shot from the floor, capturing the full reflection with focus on the face and legs in the foreground",
    "focus": "sharp focus on the subject’s sultry expression and toned body",
    "framing": "full-body mirror selfie, with emphasis on the confident posture"
  },
  "style": {
    "aesthetic": "sexy, confident, playful",
    "color_palette": "red, black, gold, skin tones",
    "mood": "flirty, spicy, confident"
  }
}

**作者**: [a to z prompts](https://x.com/atozprompts/status/2002524853971075103)  **日期**: 2025-12-20  **语言**: en

> 一个为 Nano Banana Pro 设计的详细 JSON 提示，旨在生成一张超逼真、高端的 Instagram 快拍图片。场景描绘了一位名叫 Ellie 的优雅棕发女子，在一家现代餐厅的洗手间里，于夜晚时分对着镜子自拍。图片着重展现了她的着装、精致的珠宝，以及一种精致、易于传播的美学风格，非常适合推广珠宝品牌。

![Instagram 快拍镜面自拍提示（珠宝推广）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766385911555_gv4g0o_G8plvYRWgAILxQw.jpg)

```
{
  "scene_type": "Instagram Story – Night Out",
  "aspect_ratio": "9:16",
  "description": "An elegant Instagram story of {argument name="influencer name" default="Ellie"} taking a mirror selfie during a special night out, styled for a premium social media look with subtle UI overlays.",
  "scene": {
    "setting": "modern_restaurant_bathroom_night",
    "lighting": {
      "style": "soft_warm_overhead_and_side_lighting",
      "effects": [
        "subtle_glow_on_skin",
        "mirror_reflections",
        "ambient_bathroom_light"
      ],
      "mood": "night_out_elegance"
    },
    "background": {
      "elements": [
        "large_mirror",
        "dark_tile_walls",
        "soft_wall_sconces",
        "minimalist_sink"
      ],
      "palette": "deep_neutrals_with_gold_accents"
    }
  },
  "subject": {
    "name": "{argument name="subject name" default="ellie"}",
    "description": "Extremely elegant and stylish brunette woman enjoying a special night out",
    "pose": "mirror_selfie_with_phone_in_right_hand",
    "expression": "soft_confident_night_out_look",
    "appearance": {
      "hair": "loose_natural_shiny_waves",
      "makeup": "subtle_glam_evening_style_with_warm_highlights",
      "skin": "warm_even_skin_tone_with_soft_glow",
      "distinct_feature": "small visible mole on her upper chest"
    },
    "outfit": {
      "type": "black_evening_dress",
      "style": "sleek_minimalist_elegant",
      "details": "deep neckline with tasteful cleavage, clean silhouette, high-end fabric",
      "accessories": [
        "gold_hoop_earrings",
        "thin_gold_necklace",
        "subtle_rings"
      ]
    }
  },
  "camera": {
    "perspective": "mirror_selfie_portrait",
    "framing": "medium_close_up_showing_upper_body_and_outfit",
    "phone": {
      "model": "modern_smartphone",
      "finish": "gold",
      "reflections": "visible_in_glass"
    },
    "focus": "sharp_on_subject_face_soft_background",
    "lens": "standard_35mm_look"
  },
  "instagram_ui": {
    "top_left_profile": {
      "profile_image": "mini_circular_profile_photo",
      "username": "{argument name="username" default="ellie"}"
    },
    "story_text": {
      "content": "{argument name="story text" default="A Special night <3"}",
      "placement": "middle_top_left",
      "style": "clean_instagram_story_font_white"
    }
  },
  "visual_style": {
    "render": "ultra_realistic_evening_photography",
    "color_grade": "rich_warm_tones_with_subtle_contrast",
    "detail_level": "high_skin_texture_hair_strands_fabric_detail",
    "vibe": "luxury_night_out_elegance",
    "quality": "high-end Instagram story, polished and viral-ready"
  }
}

### 813. 灰姑娘娇媚镜中自拍，带身份锁定提示

**作者**: [Özge Döner](https://x.com/astronomerozge1/status/2002460527063413140)  **日期**: 2025-12-20  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张具有“灰姑娘洛丽塔”美学风格的镜面自拍，要求严格锁定参考图像中的身份。它指定了奶油金色的卷发、精致的蓝色头饰、淡蓝色露脐上衣和迷你裙，以及手持蓝色勿忘我花束的姿势，强调自然的皮肤纹理和柔和、真诚的微笑。

![灰姑娘娇媚镜中自拍，带身份锁定提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766385972163_9nnm9f_G8oq_PzWMAAZagk.jpg)

```
{
  "reference": {
    "source_image": "uploaded_reference_image",
    "identity_lock": true,
    "strict_face_match": true,
    "face_preservation": "100% identical to the uploaded reference: no changes to facial structure, eyes, nose, lips, brows, skin tone, skin texture, proportions",
    "keep_unique_features": true,
    "no_identity_drift": true
  },

  "subject": {
    "type": "young_adult_woman",
    "ethnicity": "same_as_reference",
    "age": "adult_same_as_reference",
    "eye_color": "same_as_reference",
    "skin_texture": "same_as_reference_natural_with_visible_pores_and_imperfections_no_blur_or_smoothing",
    "expression": "warm_genuine_smile_with_soft_coquette_vibe",

    "makeup": {
      "finish": "matte",
      "blush": "light_pink",
      "eyeshadow": "soft_pink",
      "eyeliner": "thin_black",
      "lashes": "defined",
      "lip_color": "matte_dusty_pink",
      "lip_shape": "same_as_reference"
    },

    "hair": {
      "color": "{argument name="hair color" default="BUTTERY_BLONDE (CINDERELLA_VIBE)"}",
      "length": "same_as_reference",
      "texture": "voluminous_defined_curls_glossy",
      "bangs": "same_as_reference_or_keep_visible_match",
      "crown_style": "natural_curl_volume_at_crown_no_braided_crown",
      "side_sections": "curly_face_framing_sections",
      "accessories": [
        "ELEGANT_BLUE_TIARA (delicate, princess style, not plastic)"
      ]
    },

    "nails": {
      "style": "short_coquette",
      "color": "soft_pastel_blue_or_sheer_nude"
    },

    "pose": {
      "type": "mirror_selfie",
      "camera_angle": "slight_downward_diagonal",
      "head_angle": "very_subtle_tilt",
      "body_position": "leaning_forward_slightly",
      "right_arm": "holding_phone",
      "left_arm": "holding_BLUE_FORGET_ME_NOT_BOUQUET_close_to_torso"
    }
  },

  "apparel": {
    "top": {
      "type": "BLUE_CROP_TOP (CINDERELLA_INSPIRED)",
      "pattern": "solid_or_subtle_shimmer",
      "fit": "tight_and_form_fitting",
      "closure": "secure_no_gapping",
      "neckline": "tasteful_covered_no_cleavage_focus",
      "sleeves": "optional_off_shoulder_or_short_sleeves (elegant)",
      "integrity": "top_stays_in_place_no_sliding_no_opening",
      "opacity": "fully_opaque_non_see_through",
      "color_tone": "PALE_CINDERELLA_BLUE_OR_PERIWINKLE"
    },

    "undershirt": {
      "type": "none",
      "material": "n/a",
      "coverage": "top_is_opaque_non_see_through"
    },

    "necklace": {
      "type": "PEARL_NECKLACE",
      "style": "delicate_single_strand",
      "pendant": "none_or_tiny_center_pearl"
    },

    "bottoms": {
      "type": "BLUE_MINI_SKIRT (CINDERELLA_INSPIRED)",
      "details": "opaque_non_see_through_clean_seams",
      "material_hint": "satin_or_soft_tulle_overlay (tasteful)"
    }
  },

  "phone": {
    "model": "iPhone_15_Pro_Max",
    "held_in": "right_hand",
    "case": {
      "design": "SOLID_BLUE_CASE",
      "details": {
        "finish": "matte_or_soft_gloss"
       }
    }
  }
}

### 814. Y2K 垃圾摇滚浴室自拍提示

**作者**: [ANKIT PATEL 🇮🇳 | AI](https://x.com/Ankit_patel211/status/2002391767640125605)  **日期**: 2025-12-20  **语言**: en

> 一个用于 Gemini 3.0 / Nano Banana Pro 的图像生成提示，内容是一位身穿 Y2K 垃圾摇滚风格服装（黑色哥特图案背心，蝙蝠吊坠）的年轻女性，在涂鸦遍布的粗糙浴室里自拍，利用刺眼的闪光灯摄影营造出前卫的视觉效果。

![Y2K 垃圾摇滚浴室自拍提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766385994259_2vhxu2_G8nsrvraAAAmrD7.jpg)

```
{
  "image_analysis": {
    "subject": {
      "demographics": "{argument name="demographics" default="Young woman, estimated late teens to early 20s"}",
      "skin": "{argument name="skin" default="Light complexion, smooth texture with soft sheen"}",
      "hair": {
        "color": "{argument name="hair color" default="Dark brown/Black"}",
        "style": "{argument name="hair style" default="Long, voluminous, messy/tousled texture, layered"}",
        "details": "{argument name="hair details" default="Framing the face, slightly wind-blown look"}"
      },

        "eyes": "{argument name="eyes" default="Light green/hazel, almond-shaped, sharp winged eyeliner, long lashes"}",
        "lips": "{argument name="lips" default="Full, pouty, glossy pink/nude shade"}",
        "expression": "{argument name="expression" default="Confident, sultry, direct gaze at camera"}"
      }
    },
    "attire": {
      "top": {
        "color": "{argument name="top color" default="Black"}",
        "style": "{argument name="top style" default="Tank top / Camisole with spaghetti straps"}",
        "graphic": "{argument name="graphic" default="White gothic-style font and imagery (resembling a metal band logo or skeleton graphic) across the chest"}"
      },

      ]
    },

      "lighting": "{argument name="lighting" default="Direct on-camera flash (harsh lighting on subject, darker background)"}",
      "camera_style": "{argument name="camera style" default="Digital snapshot, slightly grainy/lo-fi aesthetic, 'flash photography'"}",
      "aesthetic": "{argument name="aesthetic" default="Y2K grunge, urban street style, edgy, 'cool girl' vibe, candid night shot"}"
    }
  }
}

**作者**: [KeorUnreal](https://x.com/KeorUnreal/status/2002380231483564495)  **日期**: 2025-12-20  **语言**: en

> 一张年轻女性的特写、低角度自拍的详细照片级写实提示词，她拥有大面积的黑纹身、金色辫子、猫耳朵和鼻中隔穿孔，身穿运动服，置身于舒适的卧室环境中，强调超详细的皮肤纹理和诱惑的眼神。

![纹身女性与猫耳自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766385936175_mtii52_G8niM8ZXgAA5tr9.jpg)

```
Photorealistic close-up selfie of a beautiful young woman with long braids blonde hair parted in the middle, white cat ears, fair skin with a subtle natural glow, striking green eyes with bold winged eyeliner, long lashes, and glossy deep nude-pink lips in a confident smile. She has a small silver nose septum piercing, multiple delicate layered silver necklaces including a cursive '{argument name="pendant name" default="Keor"}' pendant and small star charms. Her upper chest, shoulders, and arms are covered in extensive intricate blackwork tattoos featuring roses, skulls, floral designs, and abstract patterns. She wears a fitted white sports bra with thin straps and a deep scoop neckline that reveals her toned midriff and cleavage, paired with high-waisted lavender pastel athletic leggings that hug her curves. Pose: standing in a cozy bedroom taking a low-angle selfie with one arm extended holding the phone, body angled slightly to show her figure, one hand resting on her hip, looking directly at the camera with a playful, seductive gaze. Background: soft-lit bedroom with light gray walls, a gray upholstered headboard, beige chunky knit throw, pink salt lamp, and decorative pillows, warm natural daylight creating gentle highlights on her skin and tattoos. Ultra-detailed skin texture with realistic freckles and glow, intricate tattoo details, sharp focus on face and upper body, shallow depth of field with gentle background blur, high dynamic range, 8K resolution, photorealism, masterpiece quality.
```

**作者**: [ANKIT PATEL 🇮🇳 | AI](https://x.com/Ankit_patel211/status/2002234573527339142)  **日期**: 2025-12-20  **语言**: en

> 一个用于 Nano Banana Pro 的图像生成提示，详细描述了一位年轻女性在豪华步入式衣帽间里，身着现代深红色纱丽套装，对着镜子自拍。提示强调了照片级真实感和具体细节，如银色腰链和灯光。

```
{
  "subject": {
    "description": "{argument name="subject description" default="Young woman taking a mirror selfie"}",
    "pose": "{argument name="pose" default="Standing facing the mirror, holding phone up with right hand, left hand holding the draped fabric"}",
    "physique": "{argument name="physique" default="Slender, toned midriff clearly visible"}",
    "skin_tone": "{argument name="skin tone" default="Light to medium"}"
  },
  "clothing": {
    "outfit_type": "{argument name="outfit type" default="Modern Saree ensemble"}",
    "color": "{argument name="clothing color" default="Solid crimson red"}",
    "top": "{argument name="top description" default="Sleeveless dark crimson red crop top/blouse with a V-neckline and subtle self-colored embroidery or sequins"}",
    "bottom": "{argument name="bottom description" default="Dark Crimson red saree draped low on the hips"}",
    "drape": "{argument name="drape effect" default="Fabric gathered and held in the left hand, creating a casual drape effect"}"
  },
  "hair": {
    "color": "{argument name="hair color" default="Dark brown"}",
    "style": "{argument name="hair style" default="Shoulder-length, loose, textured waves with a slightly messy, natural look"}"
  },
  "face": {
    "expression": "{argument name="expression" default="Calm, soft gaze directed at the phone screen/mirror"}",
    "makeup": "{argument name="makeup" default="Minimal, fresh-faced look with nude lips and groomed brows"}"
  },
  "accessories": {
    "waist_chain": "{argument name="waist chain" default="Thin silver waist chain (kamarbandh) resting on the midriff"}",
    "phone": "{argument name="phone model" default="iPhone Pro model with a grey case held vertically"}",
    "jewelry": "{argument name="jewelry" default="No visible necklaces or earrings"}"
  },
  "environment": {
    "location": "{argument name="location" default="Modern walk-in closet or dressing room"}",
    "background_details": [
      "{argument name="background detail 1" default="White floor-to-ceiling wardrobes with long silver handles"}",
      "{argument name="background detail 2" default="Mirror frame visible on the side"}",
      "{argument name="background detail 3" default="Reflection of light wood flooring"}"
    ]
  },
  "lighting": {

    "quality": "{argument name="lighting quality" default="Soft, diffused light from ceiling fixtures"}",
    "shadows": "{argument name="shadows" default="Minimal shadows, even illumination on the torso and face"}"
  },
  "camera": {

    "angle": "{argument name="camera angle" default="Mirror selfie, eye-level"}",
    "focus": "{argument name="focus" default="Sharp focus on the subject in the reflection"}"
  },
  "lenses": {
    "type": "{argument name="lens type" default="Standard smartphone wide lens (approx 26mm)"}"
  },
  "meta_tokens_for_photorealism": [
    "{argument name="meta token 1" default="mirror selfie"}",
    "{argument name="meta token 2" default="Indian fashion"}",
    "{argument name="meta token 3" default="dark red crimson saree"}",
    "{argument name="meta token 4" default="realistic skin texture"}",
    "{argument name="meta token 5" default="4k resolution"}",
    "{argument name="meta token 6" default="interior lighting"}"
  ],
