### 825. 花卉咖啡馆里的仙女风镜面自拍（结构化）

**作者**: [Javeriya ✨](https://x.com/JadoonKhan281/status/2002208697087377426)  **日期**: 2025-12-20  **语言**: en

> 一个高度结构化的提示，可能采用自定义格式（非纯 JSON），用于生成一张在浪漫花卉咖啡馆中的全身镜面自拍。它要求严格遵循参考照片中人物的身份、发型和表情，并详细描述了淡粉色紧身胸衣连衣裙、蝴蝶高跟鞋以及舒适的咖啡馆环境。

![花卉咖啡馆里的仙女风镜面自拍（结构化）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766385983689_gbfcp7_G8lGMpjXQAANVqI.jpg)

```
[subject]
reference_adherence = Strictly match the provided reference photo face exactly
hair = black
hairstyle = exact hairstyle from reference
makeup = Natural style as per reference
expression = Soft, calm, looking at phone screen

[subject.facial_features]
0 = Preserve exact face shape
1 = Match eye structure and eyebrow shape
2 = Retain lip shape and natural color

[apparel]
main_garment = Soft pastel pink, romantic corset-style mini dress inspired by a fairy-core aesthetic. Off-shoulder neckline with delicate gathered fabric, lace-up corset bodice that cinches the waist, and a flowy chiffon skirt with layered movement. Long, sheer, flared sleeves that drape gracefully with light fabric transparency. Dress matches exactly the reference pink dress in color, silhouette, and romantic style.
fabric_physics = Lightweight chiffon and satin blend, airy movement, natural folds, soft wind-like flow
footwear = Pastel blush pink satin high-heeled sandals with a square toe. Delicate thin straps adorned with embroidered 3D butterfly appliqués across the front and ankle straps. Slim feminine heel, elegant fairy-core aesthetic, matching exactly the reference butterfly heels in color, texture, and romantic detail.

[apparel.accessories]
0 = Silver necklace
1 = Silver bracelet
2 = Silver rings

[pose_and_action]
type = Full-body mirror selfie
stance = Squatting low gracefully, one knee forward, leaning slightly toward mirror
head_position = Tilted slightly downward
props = Smartphone with soft pink phone case, soft pastel tone, minimal design

[pose_and_action.hands]
right_hand = Holding phone vertically in front of face
left_hand = Resting gently on knee

[environment]
location = Charming floral cafe interior
background = Romantic European-style floral cafe with stone-textured walls, hanging wicker baskets, dried flower arrangements, pastel floral bouquets, vintage wooden shelves, rustic beams, and soft decorative mirrors. Warm neutral stone tones mixed with soft pinks, greens, creams, and lavender florals. Cozy, aesthetic, feminine atmosphere.
flooring = Vintage patterned tile floor with subtle reflections

[lighting_and_atmosphere]
quality = Soft, ambient cafe lighting with gentle highlights
mood = Feminine, romantic, elegant, fairy-core, social media aesthetic

[technical_specifications]
quality = 8K resolution, photorealistic, high fidelity
focus = Sharp focus on face and outfit
perspective = Eye-level mirror perspective
aspect_ratio = 4:5

[negative_prompt]
0 = Incorrect face
1 = Wrong hairstyle
2 = Extra limbs
3 = Distorted proportions
4 = Different dress color or style
5 = Different shoes
6 = Text
7 = Watermark
8 = Blurry
9 = Low resolution
10 = Artificial looking skin
```

**Related**: [[综合时尚]]、[[综合3D]]、[[奇幻世界]]

### 826. 四格复古生活方式拼贴画，带身份锁

**作者**: [آیت شاہ](https://x.com/kashmir_ki_lark/status/2002167453728555415)  **日期**: 2025-12-20  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成一个女性主体的 2x2 拼贴画，要求基于参考图像实现 100% 的身份、姿势和摄像机角度锁定。场景是一个浪漫的复古室内房间，主体穿着一件白色和蓝色花卉泡泡袖连衣裙，头发上系着一个米色丝带蝴蝶结。

![四格复古生活方式拼贴画，带身份锁](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766385985701_ys81vv_G8kgrNzbMAAM43Z.jpg)

```
{
  "image_prompt": {
    "reference": {
      "face_identity": "uploaded reference image",
      "identity_lock": true,
      "pose_lock": true,
      "camera_angle_lock": true,
      "expression_lock": true,
      "face_preservation": "100% identical facial structure, proportions, eyes, lips, nose, brows, skin texture"
    },

    "composition": {
      "layout": "2x2 collage",
      "aspect_ratio": "1:1",
      "pose_matching": "exactly match reference image poses, angles, framing, and body orientation",
      "no_variation_allowed": true
    },

    "panel_1": {
      "view": "front-facing portrait",
      "pose": "head slightly tilted, eyes toward camera, soft lips",
      "framing": "chest-up selfie angle",
      "expression": "calm, elegant",
      "match_reference": true
    },

    "panel_2": {
      "view": "back view",
      "pose": "standing facing mirror, arms raised slightly",
      "focus": "back of head and bow hairstyle",
      "framing": "upper-body rear shot",
      "match_reference": true
    },

    "panel_3": {
      "view": "mirror selfie",
      "pose": "phone covering part of face, body angled sideways",
      "framing": "waist-up",
      "match_reference": true
    },

    "panel_4": {
      "view": "side portrait",
      "pose": "head turned over shoulder looking into camera, holding bouquet close to chest",
      "expression": "soft romantic gaze",
      "framing": "upper torso",
      "match_reference": true
    },

    "subject": {
      "gender": "female",
      "ethnicity": "Asian",
      "skin_tone": "fair with soft blush"
    },

    "hair": {
      "style": "long straight hair, half-up",
      "accessory": "large cream ribbon bow",
      "placement": "exact position as reference image"
    },

    "outfit": {
      "dress": {
        "color": "white",
        "pattern": "blue floral print",
        "style": "vintage puff-sleeve dress",
        "neckline": "square neckline"
      },
      "jewelry": [
        "pearl necklace",
        "delicate gold pendant"
      ]
    },

    "environment": {
      "location": "vintage-style indoor room",
      "background": [
        "ornate mirror",
        "cream walls",
        "soft floral decor",
        "classic furniture"
      ],
      "match_reference_background": true
    },

    "lighting": {
      "type": "soft indoor daylight",
      "quality": "even, gentle, warm",
      "shadow": "minimal",
      "match_reference": true
    },

    "photography_style": {
      "style": "romantic vintage lifestyle",
      "lens": "DSLR portrait lens",
      "depth_of_field": "shallow",
      "color_grading": "soft pastel"
    },

    "render_quality": {
      "realism": "photorealistic",
      "resolution": "high",
      "texture_detail": "natural skin and fabric detail",
      "no_cartoon": true
    }
  }
}
```

### 829. 超逼真纱丽镜面自拍

**作者**: [Preetha](https://x.com/Prelks/status/2002069086113837441)  **日期**: 2025-12-19  **语言**: en

> 这是一个超详细的提示词，旨在生成一张高度逼真、自然的年轻女性镜面自拍，她身穿优雅的黑色纱丽。它详细说明了 8K 分辨率、逼真的皮肤纹理、自然光照和精确构图等技术细节，以避免常见的 AI 伪影，旨在呈现一种既有编辑感又完全自然的外观。

![超逼真纱丽镜面自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766238100843_ma24w2_G8jHOTXXcAECZvk.jpg)
![超逼真纱丽镜面自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766238101681_fcwnqt_G8jHOTPWAAAxgjR.jpg)
![超逼真纱丽镜面自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766238101216_o19wq1_G8jHOGfXwAAwnY1.jpg)
![超逼真纱丽镜面自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766238103584_hen6w1_G8jHOVlW0AAdMqK.jpg)

```
Ultra photorealistic 8K candid smartphone mirror selfie of a young adult woman with warm natural skin tone, visible realistic skin texture, subtle highlights, and no plastic or over-smoothed look. She has dark brown hair, loose with natural volume, smooth texture, and a middle part. Her expression is a soft confident gaze directly at the camera, natural lips slightly parted. Pose is relaxed and natural, slightly angled body with shoulders down, like a casual mirror selfie taken indoors. She is wearing an elegant black saree with soft realistic fabric folds and draping physics, paired with a sleeveless black blouse that has subtle shimmer embroidery, accessorized with minimal jewelry and a delicate waist chain. Setting is a modern indoor bedroom or dressing area with clean white wardrobe cabinets in the background, softly blurred. Lighting is soft overhead indoor ceiling light creating balanced natural shadows and highlights. Camera angle slightly above eye level, natural portrait lens with sharp focus on the subject and realistic depth of field. The entire image must look like a genuine real-life photo—editorial yet completely natural and candid, no cartoon style, no AI artifacts, no distortions especially on hands or limbs, no extra limbs, no text or watermarks, highly detailed realism.
(Aspect ratio 9:16 vertical)
```

**Related**: [[运动休闲]]、[[综合时尚]]、[[科技产品]]

### 830. 身份锁定镜像自拍姿势重现提示

**作者**: [Sienna](https://x.com/siennalovesai/status/2002038289990107503)  **日期**: 2025-12-19  **语言**: en

> 一个高度技术化、结构化的 Gemini Nano Banana Pro 3.0 提示词，旨在重现特定的镜面自拍姿势，同时严格锁定所有场景参数（摄像机角度、距离、镜面几何、服装几何和姿势），并且只允许替换主体的身份，以确保生成内容具有超现实的一致性。

![身份锁定镜像自拍姿势重现提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766238158790_i9za4r_G8irM8pXkAAXhKS.jpg)

```
{
  "template_id": "mirror_side_pose_workout_shorts_ultralock_v1_compact",
  "version": "1.0.1",
  "intent": "Recreate a mirror selfie of a woman in a fitted crop t-shirt and high-waisted workout shorts, allowing only identity replacement while locking all scene parameters.",
  "subject_identity_lock": {
    "replace_identity_only": true,
    "preserve_body_proportions": true,
    "preserve_skin_tone_range": true,
    "preserve_hair_length_category": "medium-long",
    "hair_color_band": "light-brown_with_highlights",
    "face_direction_degrees": {
      "yaw_right": 55,
      "pitch_down": 8,
      "roll": 0
    },
    "expression_tone": "soft_neutral",
    "age_band_years": [
      20,
      35
    ]
  },
  "camera_lock": {
    "lens_focal_length_mm": 26,
    "sensor_format": "full_frame_eq",
    "camera_distance_m": 1.2,
    "camera_height_m": 1.45,
    "camera_tilt_degrees": {
      "pitch_down": -2
    },
    "framing": {
      "aspect_ratio": "9:16",
      "subject_fill_fraction": 0.8,
      "center_bias_xy": [
        0.52,
        0.52
      ]
    },
    "mirror_geometry": {
      "plane_alignment": "parallel",
      "distance_m": 0.6,
      "dimensions_m": [
        0.9,
        2.1
      ]
    }
  },
  "phone_lock": {
    "hand": "right",
    "position_xy": [
      0.38,
      0.47
    ],
    "orientation_degrees": {
      "yaw": 2
    },
    "grip": "fingers_wrapped_thumb_along_edge"
  },
  "pose_lock": {
    "global_orientation": {
      "pelvis_yaw_deg": 80,
      "torso_yaw_deg": 65,
      "head_yaw_deg": 55
    },
    "spine": {
      "lumbar_curve": "soft",
      "thoracic_curve": "upright"
    },
    "legs": {
      "supporting": {
        "side": "left",
        "knee_deg": 8,
        "foot_angle_deg": 12,
        "foot_contact": "flat"
      },
      "rear": {
        "side": "right",
        "knee_deg": 22,
        "toe_contact": "forefoot",
        "heel_elevation_cm": 2.5
      }
    },
    "arms": {
      "right": {
        "shoulder_flex_deg": 35,
        "elbow_flex_deg": 90,
        "hand_pos_xy": [
          0.38,
          0.47
        ]
      },
      "left": {
        "visibility": "minimal"
      }
    },
    "hips": {
      "pelvis_tilt_deg": 6,
      "weight_distribution": [
        0.8,
        0.2
      ]
    },
    "neck_head": {
      "chin_down_deg": 6,
      "gaze": "toward_phone"
    }
  },
  "clothing_geometry_lock": {
    "top": {
      "type": "crop_tshirt",
      "color": "soft_white",
      "sleeves": "short",
      "hem": "above_navel",
      "fabric": {
        "stretch": "horizontal",
        "wrinkle_zones": [
          "under_bust",
          "side_seams"
        ]
      }
    },
    "bottom": {
      "type": "workout_shorts_high_waist",
      "coverage": "full",
      "inseam_cm": 7,
      "color": "lilac_with_subtle_stripes",
      "waistband_cm": 6,
      "leg_opening_ratio": 0.85,
      "stretch_zones": [
        "glutes",
        "outer_hips"
      ]
    }
  }
}
```

### 831. 蜘蛛女侠 Cosplay 自拍提示（黄色）

**作者**: [KeorUnreal](https://x.com/KeorUnreal/status/2002022430076797051)  **日期**: 2025-12-19  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的 JSON 提示，用于 Nano Banana Pro/Grok Imagine 生成一张曲线优美的年轻女性的图像，她身穿黄黑相间的蜘蛛女侠主题运动休闲服，在一个整洁的步入式衣帽间里对着镜子自拍。该提示详细说明了服装细节、灯光，旨在呈现“干净女孩美学”和高分辨率质量。

![蜘蛛女侠 Cosplay 自拍提示（黄色）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766238126017_r2c3ho_G8icxc-WIAA4aO1.jpg)

```
{
  "subject": {
    "gender": "{argument name="gender" default="female"}",
    "description": "{argument name="description" default="young woman with long, wavy blonde hair"}",
    "pose": "{argument name="pose" default="standing in front of a mirror, taking a selfie with a orange iPhone17 pro, slight pout expression"}",
    "physique": "{argument name="physique" default="curvy, hourglass figure"}"
  },
  "outfit": {
    "style": "{argument name="outfit style" default="superhero-themed athleisure / cosplay"}",
    "top": "{argument name="top" default="yellow sleeveless bodysuit with a black spider-web pattern and a large black spider emblem on the chest"}",
    "bottom": "{argument name="bottom" default="matching high-waisted tight yellow leggings"}",
    "color_palette": ["{argument name="color 1" default="yellow"}", "{argument name="color 2" default="black"}"]
  },
  "setting": {
    "location": "{argument name="location" default="indoor bedroom closet"}",
    "background_details": [
      "{argument name="background detail 1" default="white-framed rectangular mirror"}",
      "{argument name="background detail 2" default="organized walk-in closet with hanging clothes"}",
      "{argument name="background detail 3" default="shelves with folded garments"}",
      "{argument name="background detail 4" default="collection of sneakers and boots on the floor and lower shelves"}"
    ],
    "lighting": "{argument name="lighting" default="bright, natural indoor lighting, soft shadows"}"
  },
  "technical_specifications": {
    "camera_angle": "{argument name="camera angle" default="eye-level, front-facing mirror reflection"}",
    "image_quality": "{argument name="image quality" default="high resolution, sharp focus on the subject"}",
    "aesthetic": ["{argument name="aesthetic 1" default="clean girl aesthetic"}", "{argument name="aesthetic 2" default="modern influencer style"}", "{argument name="aesthetic 3" default="minimalist interior"}"],
    "composition": "{argument name="composition" default="full body shot framed by the mirror edges"}"
  }
}
```

### 832. 景深效果下的 E-Girl 镜面自拍

**作者**: [Key Alves](https://x.com/key_alvesl/status/2002007091817386379)  **日期**: 2025-12-19  **语言**: en

> 一个高度技术化的 JSON 提示，用于生成具有极简哥特风格的“E-Girl 镜面自拍”。它指定了引擎配置，包括 LoRA 插槽和采样设置，但其核心指令是强制使用深景深 (f/11)，以使主体、床纹理和背景墙都清晰锐利，这与肖像中典型的浅景深形成对比。

![景深效果下的 E-Girl 镜面自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766238113358_lp2myg_G8iOvCmW0AAdMdK.jpg)

```
{
  "meta": {
    "project": "Egirl_FrogPose_PinkHK_Flux_V4.2",
    "target_engine": "Flux.1 [dev] / Nano Banana Pro",
    "version": "4.2.0 (Everything in Focus - f/11)",
    "created_at": "2025-12-18T20:55:00Z"
  },
  "engine_configuration": {
    "model": {
      "base": "flux1-dev.safetensors",
      "quantization": "fp8 / nf4",
      "vae": "ae.safetensors"
    },
    "lora_slots": [
      {
        "name": "Realism_LoRA_v2 (Optional)",
        "strength": 0.5,
        "note": "Enhances porcelain skin tone and fabric textures."
      }
    ],
    "sampling": {
      "sampler_name": "euler",
      "scheduler": "simple",
      "steps": 28,
      "guidance_scale": 2.5,
      "shift": 1.0
    },
    "dimensions": {
      "width": 1024,
      "height": 1536,
      "aspect_ratio": "2:3",
      "megapixel_class": "1.5MP"
    }
  },
  "prompt_construction": {
    "narrative_layer": {
      "style": "E-Girl Mirror Selfie / Minimalist Goth",
      "instruction": "Capture a sharp, full-body mirror selfie of a young woman sitting in a frog pose on a bed, focusing on the midriff and the pink phone case.",
      "subject_flow": "A pale 19-21 year old woman with black wolf-cut hair sitting on a grey bed with knees up, holding a pink Hello Kitty phone."
    },
    "texture_layer": {
      "skin_physics": "pale porcelain skin, smooth texture, rosy blush, glossy lips, e-girl eyeliner",
      "fabric_physics": "ribbed knit texture of black tube top, metal grommets on belt, cotton texture of white socks, quilted grey duvet",
      "environment_physics": "SHARP DETAILS ON BACKGROUND: glass mirror reflection, white wall texture, window glass, grey fabric folds"
    },
    "camera_physics": {
      "lens_imperfections": "smartphone camera aesthetic, high fidelity",
      "focus": "DEEP DEPTH OF FIELD (f/11) - NO BLUR. The woman, the bed texture, and the background wall are all sharp.",
      "settings": "Smartphone Simulation, 24mm Lens, 1/60s, ISO 300 (Diffused Window Light)"
    },
    "color_grading": {
      "white_balance": "Cool Natural (Diffused Window Light)",
      "shadows": "Soft shadows defining the midriff",
      "highlights": "Soft highlights on skin and glossy phone case"
    }
  },
  "final_prompt_string": "A candid raw mirror selfie photograph shot on Smartphone f/11. Deep depth of field, everything in focus. A very slim 19-21 year old woman with pale porcelain skin and black hair with bangs (wolf cut) sitting on a dark grey bed in a 'frog pose' (knees bent, high and wide apart). She leans back slightly. She wears a black ribbed strapless tube top exposing her toned midriff, a low-rise black mini skirt with a heavy silver grommet belt, and white ankle socks with red Hello Kitty embroidery. She holds a phone with a light pink 3D Hello Kitty case. Dramatic e-girl eyeliner and glossy lips. Background is sharp and detailed: messy grey duvet and a plain white wall are clearly visible with no bokeh. "
```

**Related**: [[综合3D]]、[[奇幻世界]]、[[JSON结构化提示]]

### 833. 舒适、有情调的镜子自拍提示

**作者**: [Vivek HY](https://x.com/Vivekhy/status/2001994766502990133)  **日期**: 2025-12-19  **语言**: en

> 这是一个为 Google Gemini Nano Banana Pro 设计的图像生成提示，详细描述了一张舒适、低光照的镜面自拍。该提示指定了拍摄对象的俏皮表情（眨眼、比耶手势）、着装（宽松灰色连帽衫、毛茸茸的袜子）以及场景（卧室内部，暖钨灯照明），旨在营造一种情绪化、抓拍式的“Z 世代”美学。

![舒适、有情调的镜子自拍提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766238177179_hppec9_G8iDoTAbEAANpge.jpg)

```
{
  "image_analysis": {
    "subject": {
      "demographic": "Young woman",
      "hair": "Long, dark brown, loose waves",
      "expression": "Winking left eye, slight smirk, playful",
      "hand_gestures": "Right hand making a peace (V) sign, left hand holding phone"
    },
    "attire": {
      "upper_body": "Oversized light heather {argument name="hoodie color" default="grey"} hoodie",
      "lower_body": "Shorts (hidden by hoodie) / 'lampshading' style",
      "footwear": "Thick, fuzzy white/light blue socks",
      "accessories": "Small stud earrings"
    },
    "pose": {
      "posture": "Sitting on the floor, legs bent/crossed at ankles",
      "angle": "Front-facing mirror selfie, eye-level with the reflection"
    },
    "setting": {
      "location": "Bedroom / Indoor",
      "background_elements": [
        "Carpeted floor",
        "Bed with dark bedding",
        "Nightstand",
        "Lamp with warm yellow shade"
      ]
    },
    "lighting": {
      "type": "Artificial, low-light",
      "source": "Warm bedside lamp in background",
      "atmosphere": "Cozy, moody, warm tungsten glow, high contrast shadows"
    },
    "tech_specs": {
      "device": "iPhone (Pro model with triple camera lens)",
      "composition": "Vertical portrait",
      "aesthetic": "Casual, candid, 'soft girl' aesthetic, Gen Z style"
    }
  }
}
```

**作者**: [Sharon Riley](https://x.com/Just_sharon7/status/2001986796025209223)  **日期**: 2025-12-19  **语言**: en

> 一个用于 Google Gemini Nano Banana Pro 3.0 的图像生成提示，旨在呈现“干净女孩美学”的镜面自拍。该提示详细描述了拍摄对象的形象（银灰色头发、哑光淡紫色嘴唇、极简纹身）、时尚（奶油色碎花中长连衣裙、金色卡地亚风格手链）和场景（明亮、极简的室内，柔和的自然日光），着重于高分辨率、清晰和飘逸的视觉效果。

![洁净女孩美学镜面自拍提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766238168075_qn1ox5_G8h8X6LaQAAl8nP.jpg)
![洁净女孩美学镜面自拍提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766238167936_teswog_G8h8X5naoAA4q1F.jpg)

```
{
  "subject": {
    "gender": "female",
    "appearance": {
      "hair": "long, wavy, voluminous {argument name="hair color" default="silver-grey"} hair with a middle part",
      "eyes": "piercing light blue, almond-shaped",
      "makeup": "soft matte glam, winged eyeliner, neutral eyeshadow, contoured cheekbones, full matte mauve-nude lips",
      "physique": "slender, graceful posture",
      "features": "small minimalist line-art tattoos on the right arm"
    },
    "expression": "serene, confident, neutral gaze away from the camera"
  },
  "fashion_and_accessories": {
    "outfit": "{argument name="dress color" default="cream"}-colored midi dress with a pink rose floral pattern, ruched bust detail, thin spaghetti straps",
    "jewelry": "gold Cartier-style Love bracelet on the left wrist",
    "accessories": "holding a silver/grey smartphone for a mirror selfie, neutral-toned crossbody bag strap visible"
  },
  "setting": {
    "environment": "bright, minimalist interior",
    "background": "plain white/off-white wall, clean aesthetic",
    "lighting": "natural soft daylight, bright and airy, subtle shadows"
  },
  "composition": {
    "shot_type": "mirror selfie, waist-up portrait",
    "framing": "vertical, centered subject",
    "color_palette": ["silver", "cream", "soft pink", "gold", "neutral grey"],
    "quality": "high-resolution, clean lines, sharp focus on subject, soft background"
  },
  "aesthetic_keywords": [
    "clean girl aesthetic",
    "soft glam",
    "ethereal",
    "modern fashion",
    "minimalist"
  ]
}
```

**作者**: [yusra.](https://x.com/chatgptpaglu/status/2001975525997441338)  **日期**: 2025-12-19  **语言**: en

> 这是一个为 Gemini Nano Banana Pro 设计的高度结构化 JSON 提示词，最初基于 ChatGPT 提示词构建，旨在生成超逼真的图像。它专注于生成一张年轻女性身穿黑色纱丽和现代上衣的镜面自拍，严格保留其面部和身体特征与参考图像一致，并力求呈现出具有真实织物物理效果和皮肤纹理的编辑感而又自然的造型。

![超逼真纱丽镜面自拍提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766238144295_npcuj2_G8hyIM3aYAAM9KF.jpg)

```
{
  "type": "{argument name="type" default="image_generation"}",
  "model_style": "{argument name="model style" default="ultra_photorealistic"}",
  "aspect_ratio": "{argument name="aspect ratio" default="9:16"}",
  "resolution": "{argument name="resolution" default="8K"}",
  "quality": "{argument name="quality" default="high_detail_realism"}",
  "identity_reference": {
    "use_reference_image": true,
    "face_preservation": "{argument name="face preservation" default="exact"}",
    "body_preservation": "{argument name="body preservation" default="exact"}",
    "no_facial_changes": true,
    "no_body_modification": true
  },
  "subject": {
    "gender": "{argument name="gender" default="female"}",
    "age": "{argument name="age" default="young adult"}",
    "expression": "{argument name="expression" default="soft confident gaze, natural lips slightly parted"}",
    "pose": "{argument name="pose" default="slightly angled mirror selfie pose, relaxed shoulders, natural posture"}",
    "hair": {
      "color": "{argument name="hair color" default="dark brown"}",
      "style": "{argument name="hair style" default="loose, natural volume, middle part"}",
      "texture": "{argument name="hair texture" default="smooth and realistic"}"
    },
    "skin": {
      "tone": "{argument name="skin tone" default="warm natural complexion"}",
      "detail": "{argument name="skin detail" default="visible skin texture, realistic highlights, no plastic look"}"
    }
  },
  "outfit": {
    "style": "{argument name="outfit style" default="black saree with modern blouse"}",
    "blouse": "{argument name="blouse" default="black sleeveless blouse with subtle shimmer embroidery"}",
    "saree": "{argument name="saree" default="black draped saree with soft fabric folds and realistic fabric physics"}",
    "accessories": [
      "{argument name="accessory 1" default="delicate waist chain"}",
      "{argument name="accessory 2" default="minimal jewelry"}"
    ]
  },
  "environment": {
    "location": "{argument name="location" default="indoor modern bedroom or dressing area"}",
    "background": "{argument name="background" default="clean white wardrobe cabinets"}",
    "lighting": {
      "type": "{argument name="lighting type" default="soft indoor lighting"}",
      "source": "{argument name="lighting source" default="overhead ceiling light"}",
      "effect": "{argument name="lighting effect" default="natural shadows, balanced highlights"}"
    }
  },
  "camera": {
    "device": "{argument name="device" default="smartphone"}",
    "lens": "{argument name="lens" default="natural portrait lens"}",
    "angle": "{argument name="angle" default="slightly above eye level"}",
    "focus": "{argument name="focus" default="sharp focus on subject, mild background softness"}",
    "depth_of_field": "{argument name="depth of field" default="realistic"}"
  },
  "rendering_rules": {
    "no_cartoon": true,
    "no_ai_artifacts": true,
    "no_over_smoothing": true,
    "no_extra_limbs": true,
    "no_distorted_hands": true,
    "no_text_or_watermark": true
  },
  "final_look": "{argument name="final look" default="looks like a real candid photo, ultra-realistic, editorial yet natural"}"
}

### 837. 趣味剃须膏镜面自拍提示

**作者**: [Sharon Riley](https://x.com/Just_sharon7/status/2001890468888736008)  **日期**: 2025-12-19  **语言**: en

> 一个为 Google Gemini Nano Banana Pro 3.0 设计的详细图像生成提示，旨在创作一张高对比度、有趣的镜面自拍，画面中一对情侣身上涂满了白色剃须膏。该提示详细说明了构图、灯光（情绪化、低调），以及真实的社交媒体美学，并包含一个负面提示列表以确保图像质量。

![趣味剃须膏镜面自拍提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766238154675_ma5rjk_G8gkxALakAA07cT.jpg)
![趣味剃须膏镜面自拍提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766238155934_f3odyk_G8gkw_vaIAA42Qu.jpg)

```
{
  "subject": {
    "description": "A playful, high-contrast mirror selfie of a young couple completely covered in thick, white shaving cream.",
    "individuals": [
      {
        "gender": "male",
        "position": "background, looking toward the camera with a deadpan, slightly skeptical expression",
        "features": "sculpted shaving cream forming 'horns' or ears on his head"
      },
      {
        "gender": "female",
        "position": "foreground, holding a smartphone and pouting her lips in a 'duck face'",
        "features": "visible eyeliner, manicured nails with a french tip style, looking up toward the other person"
      }
    ],
    "texture": "heavy, whipped, peaks of foam, matte white lather"
  },
  "composition": {
    "type": "close-up mirror selfie",
    "framing": "medium shot, waist-up",
    "focal_point": "the texture of the shaving cream and the interaction between the two faces",
    "elements": "a black smartphone with a white MagSafe ring and a small rectangular sticker is held in the foreground"
  },
  "lighting_and_color": {
    "lighting": "moody, low-key lighting with a strong directional light source creating deep shadows",
    "color_palette": "dominant cool blues in the background, stark white foam, natural skin tones peeking through",
    "contrast": "high contrast between the bright white foam and the dark, navy blue background"
  },
  "technical_details": {
    "style": "authentic social media aesthetic, candid photography",
    "camera_feel": "mobile phone camera quality, slight grain, shallow depth of field",
    "atmosphere": "playful, chaotic, artistic, youthful"
  },
  "negative_prompt": "clean skin, professional studio lighting, bright background, blurry, distorted hands, messy hair"
}
```

### 838. 现代魅力镜面自拍肖像

**作者**: [Sharon Riley](https://x.com/Just_sharon7/status/2001838573746844097)  **日期**: 2025-12-19  **语言**: en

> 一个用于 Google Gemini Nano Banana Pro 3.0 的图像生成提示，详细描述了一张具有现代魅力美学的镜面自拍肖像。该提示明确了拍摄对象的特征（乌黑的头发、榛棕色的眼睛）、浓烈的妆容（锐利的飞翼眼线、赤陶色腮红、砖红色哑光唇）以及极简的服装（黑色圆领上衣），背景为一面纯灰色摄影棚墙。

![现代魅力镜面自拍肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766238172060_4we8y6_G8f1kTCakAEwHhu.jpg)
![现代魅力镜面自拍肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766238172142_pp1fqs_G8f1kVLbAAEWPxm.jpg)

```
{
  "subject": {
    "gender": "female",
    "features": {
      "hair": "long, jet-black, wavy texture, styled in a high half-up ponytail with loose face-framing strands",
      "eyes": "hazel-brown, almond-shaped",
      "skin": "fair complexion, smooth matte finish"
    },
    "makeup": {
      "eyes": "sharp winged black eyeliner, warm terracotta and burnt orange eyeshadow gradient, voluminous lashes",
      "brows": "thick, arched, dark brown, well-defined",
      "cheeks": "prominent peach-terracotta blush applied to cheekbones and nose bridge",
      "lips": "matte overlined lips in a deep {argument name="lip color" default="brick-red or terracotta"} shade"
    },
    "attire": {
      "clothing": "minimalist black long-sleeve crewneck top",
      "accessories": "thin silver chain necklace with a small circular pendant"
    }
  },
  "composition": {
    "shot_type": "mirror selfie",
    "framing": "waist-up portrait",
    "pose": "holding a black smartphone with a textured square-pattern case, looking slightly away from the camera",
    "background": "plain, neutral light grey studio wall"
  },
  "technical_specs": {
    "lighting": "soft directional lighting, diffused shadows, high clarity",
    "color_palette": ["#000000 (Black)", "#E2E2E2 (Light Grey)", "#A0522D (Sienna)", "#CD5C5C (Indian Red)"],
    "aesthetic": "modern glam, edgy, clean-cut, minimalist"
  }
}

### 839. 超逼真运动后镜面自拍提示词

**作者**: [Zara](https://x.com/ZaraIrahh/status/2001827350892417119)  **日期**: 2025-12-19  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的 JSON 提示，专为 Gemini Nano Banana Pro 设计，用于图像到图像的生成，重点是保持从上传的参考图像中 100% 的面部身份锁定。场景是一位年轻女性在现代健身房的瑜伽垫上盘腿而坐，拍摄镜子自拍，强调超现实主义、自然的皮肤纹理（包括泛红和汗水），以及中性的健身摄影色调。

![超逼真运动后镜面自拍提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766407409290_dcjg6p_G8frW1Ra0AArvA1.jpg)

```
{
  "image_prompt": {
    "reference": {
      "face_identity": "uploaded reference image",
      "identity_lock": true,
      "face_preservation": "100% identical facial structure, proportions, skin texture, freckles, redness from workout, eye shape, lips, nose, brows, and natural expression"
    },
    "subject": {
      "type": "young woman",
      "expression": "relaxed, slightly tired but satisfied post-workout smile",
      "gaze": "looking into mirror selfie",
      "pose": {
        "position": "sitting cross-legged on a blue yoga mat",
        "hands": [
          "right hand holding a smartphone for a mirror selfie",
          "left hand holding a small workout towel near her neck"
        ],
        "posture": "casual, grounded, post-exercise rest"
      }
    },
    "hair": {
      "color": "dark brown",
      "style": "high messy ponytail with loose strands, slightly damp from workout"
    },
    "makeup": {
      "style": "no makeup / natural",
      "details": [
        "natural flushed skin from exercise",
        "visible skin texture and pores",
        "slight sweat sheen"
      ]
    },
    "outfit": {
      "top": "dark gray top(belly covered)",
      "bottom": "black high-waisted leggings",
      "accessories": [
        "fitness watch on wrist"
      ]
    },
    "environment": {
      "location": "minimal modern gym",
      "background_elements": [
        "power rack",
        "dumbbells",
        "cable machine",
        "large mirror wall"
      ],
      "foreground": [
        "stainless steel water bottle",
        "detached bottle cap on mat"
      ],
      "floor": "light gym flooring with black yoga mat"
    },
    "lighting": {
      "type": "bright natural indoor lighting",
      "characteristics": [
        "even illumination",
        "soft shadows",
        "clean neutral tones"
      ]
    },
    "photography_style": {
      "style": "authentic gym mirror selfie",
      "camera_look": "smartphone photography",
      "depth_of_field": "moderate depth of field",
      "mood": "healthy, real, candid, athletic"
    },
    "render_quality": {
      "realism": "ultra-photorealistic",
      "detail_level": "high",
      "skin_texture": "fully realistic with natural redness and sweat",
      "resolution": "high resolution",
      "color_grading": "neutral fitness photography tones"
    }
  }
}
```

### 840. 四格拼贴画：严格的身份和姿态匹配

**作者**: [Melis✨](https://x.com/miilesus/status/2001777991924249032)  **日期**: 2025-12-18  **语言**: en

> 一个极其详细的 JSON 提示，旨在生成一个 2x2 的图像拼贴画，要求与上传的参考图像在面部结构、姿势、角度和表情上 100% 一致。该提示指定了不同的视角（正面、背面、镜面自拍、侧面肖像），并详细描述了拍摄对象的亚洲人种、服装（复古蓝色碎花连衣裙）、配饰以及浪漫复古的生活方式美学。

![四格拼贴画：严格的身份和姿态匹配](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766237904198_ac5lvt_G8e-eF2WQAEkIp1.jpg)

```
{
  "image_prompt": {
    "reference": {
      "face_identity": "uploaded reference image",
      "identity_lock": true,
      "pose_lock": true,
      "camera_angle_lock": true,
      "expression_lock": true,
      "face_preservation": "100% identical facial structure, proportions, eyes, lips, nose, brows, skin texture"
    },

    "composition": {
      "layout": "2x2 collage",
      "aspect_ratio": "1:1",
      "pose_matching": "exactly match reference image poses, angles, framing, and body orientation",
      "no_variation_allowed": true
    },

    "panel_1": {
      "view": "front-facing portrait",
      "pose": "head slightly tilted, eyes toward camera, soft lips",
      "framing": "chest-up selfie angle",
      "expression": "calm, elegant",
      "match_reference": true
    },

    "panel_2": {
      "view": "back view",
      "pose": "standing facing mirror, arms raised slightly",
      "focus": "back of head and bow hairstyle",
      "framing": "upper-body rear shot",
      "match_reference": true
    },

    "panel_3": {
      "view": "mirror selfie",
      "pose": "phone covering part of face, body angled sideways",
      "framing": "waist-up",
      "match_reference": true
    },

    "panel_4": {
      "view": "side portrait",
      "pose": "head turned over shoulder looking into camera, holding bouquet close to chest",
      "expression": "soft romantic gaze",
      "framing": "upper torso",
      "match_reference": true
    },

    "subject": {
      "gender": "female",
      "ethnicity": "Asian",
      "skin_tone": "fair with soft blush"
    },

    "hair": {
      "style": "long straight hair, half-up",
      "accessory": "large cream ribbon bow",
      "placement": "exact position as reference image"
    },

    "outfit": {
      "dress": {
        "color": "white",
        "pattern": "blue floral print",
        "style": "vintage puff-sleeve dress",
        "neckline": "square neckline"
      },
      "jewelry": [
        "pearl necklace",
        "delicate gold pendant"
      ]
    },

    "environment": {
      "location": "vintage-style indoor room",
      "background": [
        "ornate mirror",
        "cream walls",
        "soft floral decor",
        "classic furniture"
      ],
      "match_reference_background": true
    },

    "lighting": {
      "type": "soft indoor daylight",
      "quality": "even, gentle, warm",
      "shadow": "minimal",
      "match_reference": true
    },

    "photography_style": {
      "style": "romantic vintage lifestyle",
      "lens": "DSLR portrait lens",
      "depth_of_field": "shallow",
      "color_grading": "soft pastel"
    },

    "render_quality": {
      "realism": "photorealistic",
      "resolution": "high",
      "texture_detail": "natural skin and fabric detail",
      "no_cartoon": true
    }
  }
}
```

{
  "scene_type": "Instagram Story – Night Out",

      ],

    }
  },
  "subject": {

    "description": "Extremely elegant and stylish brunette woman enjoying a special night out",

    "expression": "soft_confident_night_out_look",
    "appearance": {

      "makeup": "subtle_glam_evening_style_with_warm_highlights",

### 844. 魅力网红生日拼贴画（2x2 网格）

**作者**: [Lore](https://x.com/l_w_lorenzen/status/2001642452604850528)  **日期**: 2025-12-18  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成一个 2x2 网格拼贴画，其中包含同一位女性主题的四张不同魅力、网红风格的照片，捕捉了不同的场景，如夜间庆祝活动、城市街道、镜子自拍和黄金时段特写，适用于奢华生活方式内容。

![魅力网红生日拼贴画（2x2 网格）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766237859381_hyv177_G8dDK2YakAEJPjV.jpg)

```
{  
 "image_layout": "2x2 grid collage featuring four distinct photographs of the same female subject.",   "subject_general": 
{     
"gender": "Female",     "hair_color": "Dark brown/black",     "hair_style": "Long, styled in loose waves in three panels; sleek high ponytail in one panel",     "aesthetic": "Glamorous, influencer, trendy, luxury lifestyle"   },   "panels": [     
{       
"position": "top_left",       "setting": "Outdoors at night, dark background with illuminated green foliage",       "action": "Subject is holding a cake with one hand and licking frosting off the index finger of the other hand",       "outfit": 
{        
 "top": "Black halter-neck sleeveless top",         "jewelry": "Gold wristwatch, gold bangle bracelet, ring, small hoop earrings"       },       "props": 
{         
"item": "Round white frosted cake",         "details": [           "Red cherries on top",           "Decorative white piping along edges",           "Black icing text reading 'bad bitch energy'"         ]       }     },     
{       
"position": "top_right",       "setting": "Daytime city street, likely an upscale shopping district (e.g., Rodeo Drive) with palm trees and storefronts visible",       "action": "Subject is leaning out of the open door of a black luxury car, looking at the camera",       "outfit": 
{         
"top": "White sleeveless ribbed crop top",         "bottom": "Blue denim jeans",         "accessories": "Shoulder bag (strap visible), gold hoop earrings"       },       "lighting": "Bright natural sunlight casting shadows"     },     
{      
 "position": "bottom_left",       "setting": "Indoor hallway, beige walls, wooden floor",       "action": "Full-body mirror selfie",       "outfit": 
{

> 一个高度结构化的提示，旨在生成一个 2x2 的拼贴画，其中包含同一位女性主角的四张独特、迷人的生活方式照片。每个面板都指定了不同的场景、动作、服装和光照条件，模仿了网红的社交媒体动态。

![奢华生活方式照片的 2x2 网格拼贴](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766237968063_azmvfk_G8cj0DcWoAAJUtG.jpg)

{
  "image_layout": "2x2 grid collage featuring four distinct photographs of the same female subject.",

    "gender": "Female",
    "hair_color": "Dark brown/black",
    "hair_style": "Long, styled in loose waves in three panels; sleek high ponytail in one panel",

  },

    {

        "top": "Black halter-neck sleeveless top",
        "jewelry": "Gold wristwatch, gold bangle bracelet, ring, small hoop earrings"
      },
      "props": {
        "item": "Round white frosted cake",
        "details": [
          "Red cherries on top",
          "Decorative white piping along edges",
          "Black icing text reading '{argument name="cake text" default="bad bitch energy"}'"
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "position": "top_right",
      "setting": "Daytime city street, likely an upscale shopping district (e.g., Rodeo Drive) with palm trees and storefronts visible",
      "action": "Subject is leaning out of the open door of a black luxury car, looking at the camera",
      "outfit": {
        "top": "White sleeveless ribbed crop top",
        "bottom": "Blue denim jeans",
        "accessories": "Shoulder bag (strap visible), gold hoop earrings"
      },
      "lighting": "Bright natural sunlight casting shadows"
    },
    {
      "position": "bottom_left",
      "setting": "Indoor hallway, beige walls, wooden floor",
      "action": "Full-body mirror selfie",
      "outfit": {
        "style": "Matching two-piece set",
        "color": "Dark brown/chocolate",
        "top": "Velvet/suede corset-style bustier top",
        "bottom": "Mini skirt",
        "accessories": "Patterned designer handbag (resembling Dior Saddle bag), stack of gold bracelets"
      },
      "background_details": [
        "Large rectangular mirror with gold frame leaning against wall",
        "Vase with pampas grass in the corner",
        "Doorway visible in reflection"

    },
    {
      "position": "bottom_right",

      "outfit": {

        "outerwear": "Beige fuzzy/sherpa jacket worn off-the-shoulder",
        "jewelry": "Layered gold necklaces with pendants, hoop earrings"
      },
      "hair_styling": "Sleeked back high ponytail",

}

### 846. 温馨圣诞自拍肖像

**作者**: [D. Humann](https://x.com/dhumann/status/2001527814953275557)  **日期**: 2025-12-18  **语言**: en

> 生成一张高角度、温馨的冬季自拍肖像的详细提示：一位年轻女性身穿绞花针织连衣裙，置身于光线昏暗、高档的客厅中，壁炉旁有一棵闪烁的圣诞树，采用 2000 年代初期的数码相机美学和闪光摄影效果。

![温馨圣诞自拍肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766237854592_qfpuek_G8baVVmbUAA9r6k.jpg)

```
A high-angle selfie perspective captures a young woman with a light skin tone and a subtle tan, sitting on a dark hardwood floor partially covered by a plush white faux fur rug, with one arm extended toward the lens holding the camera. Her legs are bent and tucked to the side. She wears a chunky cream-colored cable-knit sweater dress with a thick, textured knit pattern and an off-the-shoulder neckline that exposes her shoulders and collarbone, finished with long, oversized sleeves. Her long, voluminous blonde hair falls in loose waves with a side part. Her makeup features defined eyebrows, striking winged eyeliner, glossy nude lips, and soft contouring. She holds a soft, alluring gaze, her head tilted slightly to the right.

The setting is a richly cozy, dimly lit living room interior designed for warmth and comfort. Behind her is a substantial, rough-cut natural stone fireplace constructed with professional masonry, its uneven stone surface catching the firelight as bright orange flames burn steadily within. The surrounding space features dark, polished hardwood floors and well-appointed, comfortable furniture with a lived-in, upscale lodge-like feel. In the background, a decorated Christmas tree glows softly, strung with warm white lights that fall into gentle bokeh blur in the distance, adding depth and seasonal atmosphere without distracting from the subject. Christmas presents with colorful wrapping surround the base of the Christmas tree. The overall interior feels intimate, inviting, and quietly luxurious.

Lighting is dominated by a direct on-camera flash, producing crisp highlights on the subject and pronounced shadows cast behind her, while the fireplace provides a secondary warm ambient glow that subtly fills the room. The image aesthetic evokes early-2000s digital camera photography blended with influencer lifestyle imagery, capturing a cozy winter evening mood through a palette of warm neutrals, creamy whites, amber firelight, and deep brown shadows.
```

**Related**: [[手绘素描]]、[[室内设计]]、[[综合建筑]]

![K-Pop 偶像在化妆间自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766042085762_13i6eq_G8Y6ckja4AABvyl.jpg)

```
"Young Asian female (K-pop idol aesthetic), pale porcelain skin, long straight dark cherry-red (burgundy) hair reaching waist length.",
      "apparel": {
        "top": "White strapless corset-style crop top with a central vertical zipper detail.",
        "bottom": "Matching white high-waisted mini skirt with vertical silver seam lines.",
        "sleeves": "Detached white opera-length arm warmers/gloves covering palms.",
        "jewelry": "Layered diamond choker necklaces with a pendant, dangling silver earrings, multiple silver rings."
      },
      "appearance": {
        "makeup": "Soft coral lip tint, subtle eyeliner, straight eyebrows.",
        "reflection": "The subject's back and long red hair are clearly visible in the large mirror behind her."
      }
    },
    "exact_pose_anatomical": {
      "type": "Standing Mirror Selfie.",
      "body_orientation": "Torso angled 45 degrees towards the mirror plane, hips shifted to the subject's right (creating a slight curve at the waist).",
      "head": "Turned to face the mirror directly, slight tilt to her left.",
      "right_arm": "Elbow bent, forearm raised, hand holding a white smartphone (iPhone Pro) up to shoulder height to capture the reflection.",
      "left_arm": "Extended downwards naturally by the side, hand relaxed.",
      "gaze": "Looking at the phone screen in the mirror."
    },
    "camera_technical_values": {
      "viewpoint": "Mirror reflection view (shot from the phone's perspective within the mirror).",
      "lens_focal_length": "26mm equivalent (Standard smartphone wide lens).",
      "aperture": "f/1.8 (Bright, sharp focus on the subject, slight fall-off in the deep background).",
      "shutter_speed": "1/100s (Indoor artificial light setting).",
      "iso": "ISO 200 (Clean image with minimal grain).",
      "framing": "Medium shot (Thighs up), capturing the subject and her reflection in the mirror."
    },
    "lighting_and_environment": {
      "environment": "Brightly lit backstage dressing room / makeup room.",
      "background_elements": "Large wall mirror, white countertop with black makeup cases, hair styling tools, cables, and a blurry reflection of chairs and white walls.",
      "lighting_type": "Cool White Artificial Fluorescence / Vanity Mirror Lighting.",
      "quality": "Flat, even illumination (high key), minimizing facial shadows, creating a clean and polished look.",
      "reflections": "Light glare on the phone case and glossy hair."

### 850. 身份锁定的 Coquette 镜面自拍

**作者**: [Özge Döner](https://x.com/astronomerozge1/status/2001292137724367011)  **日期**: 2025-12-17  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细、结构化的 Nano Banana Pro 提示词，侧重于严格的身份锁定，以生成一张年轻女性的镜面自拍，她面带温暖真诚的微笑，拥有娇媚的审美风格，手捧一束红色郁金香。

![身份锁定的 Coquette 镜面自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766042045362_03m1yv_G8YEgALXsAAOWJu.jpg)
![身份锁定的 Coquette 镜面自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766042045552_aqqwmi_G8YDlhmWYAAA3rm.jpg)

```
{
  "reference": {
    "source_image": "uploaded_reference_image",
    "identity_lock": true,
    "strict_face_match": true,
    "face_preservation": "100% identical to the uploaded reference: no changes to facial structure, eyes, nose, lips, brows, skin tone, skin texture, proportions",
    "keep_unique_features": true,
    "no_identity_drift": true
  },

  "subject": {
    "type": "young_adult_woman",
    "ethnicity": "same_as_reference",
    "age": "adult_same_as_reference",
    "eye_color": "same_as_reference",
    "skin_texture": "same_as_reference_natural_with_visible_pores_and_imperfections_no_blur_or_smoothing",
    "expression": "warm_genuine_smile_with_soft_coquette_vibe",

    "makeup": {
      "finish": "matte",
      "blush": "light_pink",
      "eyeshadow": "soft_pink",
      "eyeliner": "thin_black",
      "lashes": "defined",
      "lip_color": "matte_dusty_pink",
      "lip_shape": "same_as_reference"
    },

    "hair": {
      "color": "same_as_reference",
      "length": "same_as_reference",
      "texture": "voluminous_defined_curls_glossy",
      "bangs": "same_as_reference_or_keep_visible_match",
      "crown_style": "natural_curl_volume_at_crown_no_braided_crown",
      "side_sections": "curly_face_framing_sections",
      "accessories": []
    },

    "nails": {
      "style": "short_coquette",
      "color": "pastel_pink"
    },

    "pose": {
      "type": "mirror_selfie",
      "camera_angle": "slight_downward_diagonal",
      "head_angle": "very_subtle_tilt",
      "body_position": "leaning_forward_slightly",
      "right_arm": "holding_phone",
      "left_arm": "holding_red_tulip_bouquet_close_to_torso"
    }
  },

  "apparel": {
    "top": {
      "type": "red_crop_top",
      "pattern": "solid",
      "fit": "tight_and_form_fitting",
      "closure": "secure_no_gapping",
      "neckline": "tasteful_covered_no_cleavage_focus",
      "sleeves": "optional_short_or_long_sleeves",
      "integrity": "top_stays_in_place_no_sliding_no_opening",
      "opacity": "fully_opaque_non_see_through"
    },

    "undershirt": {
      "type": "none",
      "material": "n/a",
      "coverage": "top_is_opaque_non_see_through"
    },

    "necklace": {
      "type": "minimalist_silver_chain",
      "pendant": "tiny_simple_shape"
    },

    "bottoms": {
      "type": "red_mini_skirt",
      "details": "opaque_non_see_through_clean_seams"
    }
  },

  "phone": {
    "model": "iPhone_15_Pro_Max",
    "held_in": "right_hand",
    "case": {
      "design": "solid_red_case",
      "details": {
        "finish": "matte_or_soft_gloss",
        "edges": "clean_minimal"
      },
      "inserted_photo": "none"
    }
  },

  "environment": {
    "setting": "modern_warm_cozy_home_interior",
    "walls": {
      "color": "warm_neutral_tone",
      "decor": {
        "posters": [],
        "garlands": "none_or_subtle"
      }
    },

}

### 851. 2x2 严格身份和姿态匹配拼贴

**作者**: [Mahnoor Fatima](https://x.com/MahnoorAi12/status/2001261891256230370)  **日期**: 2025-12-17  **语言**: en

> 一个复杂且结构化的 JSON 提示，专为 Gemini Nano Banana Pro 设计，用于生成一个女性主体的 2x2 拼贴画，要求严格保留基于上传参考图像的面部身份、姿势、相机角度和表情。它详细说明了特定的视角（正面、背面、镜面自拍、侧面肖像）和环境设置（复古风格的室内房间），同时锁定主体身份并精确匹配参考图像。

![2x2 严格身份和姿态匹配拼贴](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766042020790_shqyy9_G8XpCZ0bkAAvgdZ.jpg)

```
{
  "image_prompt": {
    "reference": {
      "face_identity": "uploaded reference image",
      "identity_lock": true,
      "pose_lock": true,
      "camera_angle_lock": true,
      "expression_lock": true,
      "face_preservation": "100% identical facial structure, proportions, eyes, lips, nose, brows, skin texture"
    },

    "composition": {
      "layout": "2x2 collage",
      "aspect_ratio": "1:1",
      "pose_matching": "exactly match reference image poses, angles, framing, and body orientation",
      "no_variation_allowed": true
    },

    "panel_1": {
      "view": "front-facing portrait",
      "pose": "head slightly tilted, eyes toward camera, soft lips",
      "framing": "chest-up selfie angle",
      "expression": "calm, elegant",
      "match_reference": true
    },

    "panel_2": {
      "view": "back view",
      "pose": "standing facing mirror, arms raised slightly",
      "focus": "back of head and bow hairstyle",
      "framing": "upper-body rear shot",
      "match_reference": true
    },

    "panel_3": {
      "view": "mirror selfie",
      "pose": "phone covering part of face, body angled sideways",
      "framing": "waist-up",
      "match_reference": true
    },

    "panel_4": {
      "view": "side portrait",
      "pose": "head turned over shoulder looking into camera, holding bouquet close to chest",
      "expression": "soft romantic gaze",
      "framing": "upper torso",
      "match_reference": true
    },

    "subject": {
      "gender": "female",
      "ethnicity": "Asian",
      "skin_tone": "fair with soft blush"
    },

    "hair": {
      "style": "long straight hair, half-up",
      "accessory": "large cream ribbon bow",
      "placement": "exact position as reference image"
    },

    "outfit": {
      "dress": {
        "color": "white",
        "pattern": "blue floral print",
        "style": "vintage puff-sleeve dress",
        "neckline": "square neckline"
      },
      "jewelry": [
        "pearl necklace",
        "delicate gold pendant"
      ]
    },

    "environment": {
      "location": "vintage-style indoor room",
      "background": [
        "ornate mirror",
        "cream walls",
        "soft floral decor",
        "classic furniture"
      ],
      "match_reference_background": true
    },

    "lighting": {
      "type": "soft indoor daylight",
      "quality": "even, gentle, warm",
      "shadow": "minimal",
      "match_reference": true
    },

    "photography_style": {
      "style": "romantic vintage lifestyle",
      "lens": "DSLR portrait lens",
      "depth_of_field": "shallow",
      "color_grading": "soft pastel"
    },

    "render_quality": {
      "realism": "photorealistic",
      "resolution": "high",
      "texture_detail": "natural skin and fabric detail",
      "no_cartoon": true
    }
}

> 这是一个为 Nano Banana Pro 设计的高度结构化 JSON 提示，旨在生成一张真实、坦率的后台镜子自拍。该提示包含丰富的元数据、构图规则、详细的色彩配置文件分析、特定的照明参数（硬光、高对比度、化妆灯）、技术规格（数字噪点、深景深）以及艺术元素（K-pop 偶像美学、Y2K 时尚）。

],

"balance": "asymmetric - heavy black negative space on left, cluttered details on right, subject centered"
},
"color_profile": {

{

},

},

},
{

}
],

},
"lighting": {

"direction": "front",

},

},

},

### 853. 充满活力的水上摩托艇自拍，带严格身份锁定

**作者**: [𝗦𝗮𝗻𝗶𝗮](https://x.com/saniaspeaks_/status/2001231145808384322)  **日期**: 2025-12-17  **语言**: en

> ```json
> {
>   "prompt": "为 Gemini Nano Banana Pro 设计的详细 JSON 提示，旨在生成一张充满活力、逼真的女性驾驶水上摩托车的动作肖像。该提示基于参考图像强制执行严格的身份锁定，确保面部特征、皮肤纹理和发型 100% 忠实于源图像，同时将主体置于开放的海洋环境中，沐浴在明亮的自然阳光下。"
> }
> ```

![充满活力的水上摩托艇自拍，带严格身份锁定](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766042035606_brrtzb_G8XNG68bAAAOKdb.jpg)

```
{
  "type": "image_generation_prompt",
  "style": "realistic, vibrant, photorealistic action portrait",
  "identity_preservation": {
    "use_reference_image": true,
    "alter_face": false,
    "strict_identity_lock": true,
    "notes": "Use the attached reference image as a strict source. Keep the woman’s facial features, facial structure, skin texture, hair type, and accessories exactly the same with 100% fidelity."
  },
  "subject": {
    "gender": "female",
    "pose": {
      "activity": "riding a jet ski",
      "camera_angle": "selfie angle",
      "framing": "head and chest visible",
      "expression": "natural, relaxed, adventurous"
    },
    "appearance": {
      "hair": {
        "color": "dark",
        "style": "natural",
        "notes": "No long hair, no sunglasses"
      }
    },
    "wardrobe": {
      "life_jacket": "black life jacket"
    }
  },
  "environment": {
    "location": "open ocean",
    "water": "slightly rippled ocean surface",
    "sky": {
      "condition": "clear blue sky",
      "lighting": "bright natural sunlight"
    },
    "background": {
      "elements": [
        "other people riding jet skis in the distance"
      ],
      "focus": "softly blurred to create depth and motion"
    }
  },
  "lighting": {
    "type": "natural daylight",
    "quality": "bright, clean, and realistic",
    "effects": [
      "natural highlights on skin and water",
      "sense of motion and energy"
    ]
  },
  "camera": {
    "look": "selfie action shot",
    "focus": "sharp focus on face and upper body",
    "movement": "slight motion feel from riding",
    "quality": "high clarity and sharpness"
  },
  "mood": {
    "atmosphere": "lively, adventurous, energetic",
    "tone": "fresh, fun, and dynamic"
  },
  "quality": {
    "realism": "highly photorealistic",
    "detail_level": "sharp details in face, water, and lighting",
    "color_accuracy": "natural colors, no artificial tones"
  },
  "negative_prompt": [
    "blurry face",
    "distorted proportions",
    "unrealistic lighting",
    "deformed hands",
    "wrong facial structure",
    "incorrect accessories",
    "extra people in the foreground",
    "disfigured body",
    "cartoon style",
    "painting",
    "artificial colors",
    "low quality",
    "watermark",
    "text",
    "long hair"
  ],
  "output_goal": "Create a realistic, vibrant, and energetic selfie-style ocean portrait of a woman riding a jet ski, preserving her exact facial identity while conveying motion, sunlight, and adventure."
}

### 854. 可爱游戏玩家角色扮演镜面自拍提示词

**作者**: [Key Alves](https://x.com/key_alvesl/status/2001230893315203406)  **日期**: 2025-12-17  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的 JSON 提示，包含元数据和引擎配置，用于生成一张年轻女性在卧室中拍摄的镜面自拍照，她身穿可爱游戏玩家风格的 Cosplay 服装（牛耳朵、奶牛纹上衣），并配有 RGB 灯光。

![可爱游戏玩家角色扮演镜面自拍提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766042121484_1ua5dm_G8UZyF-a4AU2QMZ.jpg)

```
{
  "meta": {
    "project": "Kawaii_Gamer_Public_Demo",
    "target_engine": "Flux.1 [dev]",
    "version": "4.2.0",
    "created_at": "2025-12-16"
  },
  "engine_configuration": {
    "model": {
      "base": "flux1-dev.safetensors",
      "quantization": "fp8",
      "vae": "default"
    },
    "sampling": {
      "sampler_name": "euler",
      "scheduler": "simple",
      "steps": 28,
      "guidance_scale": 2.5
    },
    "dimensions": {
      "width": 1024,
      "height": 1536,
      "aspect_ratio": "2:3"
    },
    "seed": -1
  },
  "prompt_construction": {
    "narrative_layer": {
      "style": "Gamer Cosplay Aesthetic",
      "instruction": "Capture a mirror selfie.",
      "subject_flow": "A pale young woman with black hair and cow ears taking a mirror selfie in a gamer bedroom."
    },
    "texture_layer": {
      "skin_physics": "pale skin, soft makeup",
      "fabric_physics": "cow-print top, black skirt, white socks",
      "environment_physics": "gaming setup, rgb lights"
    },
    "camera_physics": {
      "lens_style": "Phone Camera",
      "focus": "Focus on subject",
      "settings": "Mixed Lighting, Auto Settings"
    },
    "color_grading": {
      "white_balance": "Cool White",
      "shadows": "Soft shadows",
      "highlights": "RGB glow"
    }
  },
  "final_prompt_string": "A mirror selfie photograph shot on Smartphone. A young woman with pale porcelain skin and long black hair with bangs wearing cute cow ears. She sits on a bed wearing a cow-print crop top, a black skirt, and white thigh-high socks. She holds a purple phone case. Background of gaming setup with pink chair, PC with RGB lights (blue/purple), and shelves. Mixed natural window light and neon RGB glow. Kawaii gamer aesthetic.",
  "negative_prompt_string": "",
  "note_on_negative": "Flux ignores explicit negative prompts.",
  "post_processing": {
    "upscale": {
      "enabled": true,
      "method": "Latent",
      "strength": 0.5
    },
    "face_restoration": {
      "enabled": false
    }
  }
}
```

### 858. 波西米亚风格卧室中坦率的镜子自拍结构化 JSON 提示

**作者**: [ChromeRuby](https://x.com/chromerubbdx/status/2001106458197266913)  **日期**: 2025-12-17  **语言**: en

> 一个为 Gemini Nano Banana Pro 设计的详细 JSON 提示，用于生成一张年轻女性在昏暗、杂乱、波西米亚风格卧室中拍摄的坦率镜面自拍照。该提示根据参考图像指定了拍摄对象的身份、发型、服装、姿势（盘腿坐着，手持智能手机）、环境细节（复古梳妆台、白色金属凳），以及具有颗粒感和柔和色彩的电影般摄影风格。

![波西米亚风格卧室中坦率的镜子自拍结构化 JSON 提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766042195234_aj4oo4_G8Va__kXoAMZGNM.jpg)

```
{
  "detailed_prompts": {
    "subject_identity": [
      "A young woman, whose specific appearance and reddish-orange hair color are based on the reference image_19.png."
    ],
    "hair_style": [
      "Her reddish-orange hair is tied up into a messy, casual bun, similar to the style in image_19.png but less neat, with stray strands framing her face."
    ],
    "clothing": [
      "She is wearing a simple, light grey or faded blue t-shirt, similar in style to the one in image_22.png."
    ],
    "pose_and_action": [
      "She is sitting cross-legged on a bed, similar to the pose in image_19.png and image_22.png.",
      "She is holding a smartphone in front of her face with one hand, taking a mirror selfie, obscuring most of her face.",
      "Her other hand is resting on a crumpled white duvet."
    ],
    "environment_main": [
      "The setting is a dimly lit, bohemian-style bedroom, similar to the one in image_22.png.",
      "The room has a lived-in, cluttered, and cozy feel."
    ],
    "environment_furniture_and_objects": [
      "In the background, there is a vintage green-painted dresser with open drawers.",
      "On top of the dresser, there are various items like bottles, a small mirror, and personal objects.",
      "A white metal stool is visible near the dresser.",
      "A large mirror on the wall reflects the scene.",
      "A crumpled white duvet and blankets are on the bed."
    ],
    "lighting_details": [
      "The room is dimly lit with natural, soft light coming from a window (off-camera), creating a moody and intimate atmosphere, similar to the lighting in image_22.png.",
      "The lighting is not harsh but creates soft shadows."
    ],
    "Photography_style": [
      "A candid mirror selfie photograph.",
      "The photo has a film-like quality with visible grain, muted colors, and a slightly desaturated, warm tone, similar to the aesthetic of image.png."
    ]
  }
}
```

### 859. 带姿势和身份锁定的 2x2 拼贴提示

**作者**: [Zara](https://x.com/ZaraIrahh/status/2001099339557728610)  **日期**: 2025-12-17  **语言**: en

> 一个高度受限的 JSON 提示，用于生成 2x2 拼贴画，要求与上传的参考图像在面部识别、姿势、角度和构图上 100% 匹配，图像中是一位亚洲女性，身穿复古白色碎花连衣裙，头发上系着一个大大的蝴蝶结，置身于浪漫的复古室内环境中。

![带姿势和身份锁定的 2x2 拼贴提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766936012315_gz5i5d_G8VVPk3a4AI6fGV.jpg)

```
{
  "image_prompt": {
    "reference": {
      "face_identity": "uploaded reference image",
      "identity_lock": true,
      "pose_lock": true,
      "camera_angle_lock": true,
      "expression_lock": true,
      "face_preservation": "100% identical facial structure, proportions, eyes, lips, nose, brows, skin texture"
    },

    "composition": {
      "layout": "2x2 collage",
      "aspect_ratio": "1:1",
      "pose_matching": "exactly match reference image poses, angles, framing, and body orientation",
      "no_variation_allowed": true
    },

    "panel_1": {
      "view": "front-facing portrait",
      "pose": "head slightly tilted, eyes toward camera, soft lips",
      "framing": "chest-up selfie angle",
      "expression": "calm, elegant",
      "match_reference": true
    },

    "panel_2": {
      "view": "back view",
      "pose": "standing facing mirror, arms raised slightly",
      "focus": "back of head and bow hairstyle",
      "framing": "upper-body rear shot",
      "match_reference": true
    },

    "panel_3": {
      "view": "mirror selfie",
      "pose": "phone covering part of face, body angled sideways",
      "framing": "waist-up",
      "match_reference": true
    },

    "panel_4": {
      "view": "side portrait",
      "pose": "head turned over shoulder looking into camera, holding bouquet close to chest",
      "expression": "soft romantic gaze",
      "framing": "upper torso",
      "match_reference": true
    },

    "subject": {
      "gender": "female",
      "ethnicity": "Asian",
      "skin_tone": "fair with soft blush"
    },

    "hair": {
      "style": "long straight hair, half-up",
      "accessory": "{argument name=\"hair accessory\" default=\"large cream ribbon bow\"}",
      "placement": "exact position as reference image"
    },

    "outfit": {
      "dress": {
        "color": "white",
        "pattern": "{argument name=\"dress pattern\" default=\"blue floral print\"}",
        "style": "vintage puff-sleeve dress",
        "neckline": "square neckline"
      },
      "jewelry": [
        "pearl necklace",
        "delicate gold pendant"
      ]
    },

    "environment": {
      "location": "vintage-style indoor room",
      "background": [
        "ornate mirror",
        "cream walls",
        "soft floral decor",
        "classic furniture"
      ],
      "match_reference_background": true
    },

    "lighting": {
      "type": "soft indoor daylight",
      "quality": "even, gentle, warm",
      "shadow": "minimal",
      "match_reference": true
    },

    "photography_style": {
      "style": "romantic vintage lifestyle",
      "lens": "DSLR portrait lens",
      "depth_of_field": "shallow",
      "color_grading": "soft pastel"
    },

    "render_quality": {
      "realism": "photorealistic",
      "resolution": "high",
      "texture_detail": "natural skin and fabric detail",
      "no_cartoon": true
    }
  }
}
```

```
{
  "image_parameters": {
    "aspect_ratio": "{argument name="aspect ratio" default="9:16"}",
    "style": "Ultra-realistic, high detail, candid mirror selfie",
    "lighting": "Soft, even indoor lighting, natural bathroom illumination, no flash"
  },
  "subject_details": {
    "appearance": "Young woman, flat toned abdomen, natural skin texture",
    "hair": "{argument name="hair color" default="Soft lavender / pastel purple"}",
    "nails": "Long light-colored French-style manicure"
  },
  "pose_and_expression": {
    "posture": "Sitting on the edge of a white sink, one leg hanging down naturally, legs slightly apart",
    "hands": "Right hand holding smartphone at face level; left hand supporting head with cheek resting on palm",
    "facial_expression": "Subtle duck face, slightly pursed lips, direct eye contact, playful and flirtatious"
  },
  "outfit": {
    "top": "Black short sleeveless crop top with orange shoulder straps and white graphic/text print on chest",
    "bottoms": "Very short black sport/pajama style shorts",
    "accessories": "iPhone in transparent case with pink MagSafe ring"
  },

    "location": "Modern bathroom interior",
    "background": "White marble walls with soft gray veining, toilet, bathtub/shower area visible",
    "props": "Shelf with assorted bottles/toiletries, black towel on hook"
  },
  "final_prompt_string": "An ultra-realistic mirror selfie of a young woman with soft lavender hair sitting on the edge of a white marble bathroom sink. She wears a black crop top with orange straps and short black shorts. She holds a smartphone with a pink MagSafe ring, resting her cheek on her left hand which features a French manicure. Her expression is playful with a subtle duck face and direct eye contact. Background includes a toilet, shower, and shelves with toiletries. Soft, even indoor lighting. --ar 3:4"
}

> 一个提示，旨在创建一张超现实、高分辨率的照片，内容是用户在现代机场与莱昂内尔·梅西随意摆姿势合影，重点突出偶遇名人的抓拍感和清晰的摄影细节。

![超逼真名人偶遇自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765991174963_9nndlz_G8GVvy6X0AQhnIF.jpg)

```
A realistic high-resolution photograph of me standing beside world-famous footballer {argument name="celebrity name" default="Lionel Messi"} at an international airport in {argument name="location" default="Dubai"}. Both of us are smiling naturally and posing for a casual photo. I am a young girl, dark brown messy hairs wearing {argument name="user attire" default="beige pants, a light cream shirt, rectangular black sunglasses, and a backpack"}. {argument name="celebrity name" default="Lionel Messi"} is wearing {argument name="celebrity attire" default="a white t-shirt, black coat, black jeans, and sneakers"}. The background shows a modern glass airport terminal with people around. Natural daylight, candid celebrity encounter vibe, ultra-realistic, sharp focus, professional photography, 4K quality, realistic skin tones.

**作者**: [Zara](https://x.com/ZaraIrahh/status/2000015286192517246)  **日期**: 2025-12-14  **语言**: en

> 一个用于生成高角度特写自拍的提示，要求具有复古胶片美学，特别是模仿 90 年代一次性相机风格，带有刺眼的直射闪光和明显的颗粒感。它详细描述了一对情侣（男士穿米色毛衣，女士化“抖音”妆并穿粗花呢夹克）的外观，并指定了金色手镯等道具，旨在营造浪漫、亲密、高对比度的氛围。

![复古胶片自拍，带直射闪光灯](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765991253259_gy7i8q_G8F7SoXawAAC0o5.jpg)

Create and don't change their faces! 
"A high-angle close-up selfie shot using direct flash photography with a vintage film aesthetic. In the immediate foreground on the left, a handsome young man looks softly into the camera. He wears a beige sweater. Behind him, a beautiful young woman with long dark hair leans her chin on his shoulder, gazing alluringly at the lens. She has fair skin, soft 'douyin' style makeup and reddish lips, wearing a brown tweed jacket. Several gold bangles (Cartier style) are visible on the wrist in the foreground. The lighting is warm and high-contrast, typical of 90s disposable camera style, with visible film grain and a romantic, intimate mood."
Lighting: Direct flash, harsh flash, warm lighting.
Style: Vintage film, 90s aesthetic, disposable camera, Polaroid style.
Subject Details: Messy wavy hair, pearl necklace on man, dangling earring, tweed fabric, rosy cheeks.
Angle: Selfie angle, high angle, extreme close-up.

        "hands": [

          "left hand resting on knee"
        ],
        "expression": "soft, calm expression"
      },

        "style": "long dark brown hair in a half-up ponytail with a small clip",
        "texture": "smooth and straight"
      },
      "attire": {
        "dress": {
          "type": "emerald green silk maxi dress with spaghetti straps",
          "pattern": "plain with subtle drape",
          "details": "side slit exposing leg, low back design"
        },
        "shoes": "green velvet heels",

          "emerald pendant",
          "silk scarf",
          "rings on fingers"
        ]
      }
    },
    "environment": {

      "lighting": {
        "type": "soft warm indoor light",
        "effect": "even illumination on face and dress"
      }

    },

      "framing": "full body squatting pose, centered",
      "angle": "eye-level mirror perspective",
      "focus": "sharp focus on face and outfit",
      "aspect_ratio": "4:5"
    },
    "output": {

**作者**: [Sharon Riley](https://x.com/Just_sharon7/status/1999520540634296612)  **日期**: 2025-12-12  **语言**: en

> 一个针对 Google Gemini Nano Banana Pro 3.0 的高度具体的图像生成提示，要求生成一张超细节、超逼真的特写自拍，描绘一位美丽的年轻东亚女性，风格为韩国/中国网红（ulzzang 和抖音网红），详细描述其妆容、发型、服装（复古乐队 T 恤），以及相机设置（智能手机前置摄像头，自然光）。

![网红脸/抖音自拍肖像提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765990988916_plbi3g_G7-5U9TagAIm0t7.jpg)
![网红脸/抖音自拍肖像提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765990989484_8sfw23_G7-5U9SagAApRMO.jpg)

```
{
  "subject": "a very beautiful young woman taking a close-up selfie",
  "age": "19-22 years old",
  "ethnicity": "East Asian with slight Western mix, fair porcelain skin",
  "face": "perfect symmetrical heart-shaped face, small straight nose, high cheekbones, soft jawline, flawless smooth skin with no blemishes",
  "eyes": "large almond-shaped doe eyes, dark brown irises, long thick natural eyelashes, sharp winged eyeliner, subtle smoky lower eyeliner",
  "eyebrows": "thick straight Korean-style brows, perfectly groomed and filled",
  "makeup": "dewy glowing skin, soft pink blush on cheeks, matte rosy-nude lipstick, slight lip overlining for pouty look, subtle highlight on nose bridge and cupid's bow",
  "lips": "full pouty lips in a slight duck-face expression",
  "hair": "jet-black straight hair, shoulder-length with soft layers, center-parted, slightly messy front strands framing the face, glossy and healthy",
  "pose": "selfie taken with phone in right hand (arm visible at bottom right), head slightly tilted, looking directly at camera with soft seductive expression",
  "hand_gesture": "left hand raised doing a small peace sign (V sign) near her face, long clear acrylic nails with natural french tips",
  "clothing": "vintage black band T-shirt, slightly cropped/fitted, yellow and black graphic print on chest with distorted '{argument name="band name" default="ROADRUNNER"}' text in bold retro font and faded band photo underneath, soft worn cotton texture",
  "accessories": "large thin silver hoop earrings, oversized black rectangular sunglasses resting on top of her head",
  "background": "modern minimalist indoor setting, soft natural daylight, blurred white walls and ceiling, hint of a kitchen or hallway in the background",
  "lighting": "soft diffused natural window light from the front-left, gentle shadows, bright but not harsh, slight glow on skin",
  "camera": "front-facing smartphone camera, slight wide-angle selfie distortion, high resolution, sharp focus on face",
  "aesthetic": "Korean/Chinese ulzzang + douyin + soft e-girl, clean beauty, 2020s Instagram influencer vibe",
  "mood": "cute but slightly edgy, playful, confident, effortlessly cool",
  "quality_tags": "ultra-detailed, photorealistic, 8k, sharp focus, beautiful lighting, cinematic, highly detailed skin texture, realistic eyes reflection",
  "negative_prompt": "blurry, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, overexposed, plastic skin, doll-like, text artifacts, watermark, logo"
}
```

  "prompt": "a beautiful young woman with long straight blonde hair with subtle highlights, fair skin, large hazel-green eyes with thick eyelashes, perfectly arched eyebrows, small nose piercing, full glossy pink lips slightly parted with tongue touching lower lip in a playful teasing expression, wearing a thin white spaghetti strap tank top with deep cleavage, delicate gold necklace with a small black sunburst pendant, lying on a bed on her side, relaxed pose with one arm under her head, soft cinematic indoor lighting with cool blue tones, slight shadow across face, bedroom background heavily blurred, close-up portrait selfie style, highly detailed realistic skin texture, sharp focus on eyes and lips, photorealistic, 8k resolution, shot on Canon EOS R5 with 85mm lens, f/1.8, natural beauty, seductive and playful mood",

    }
  },

### 879. 凌乱卧室镜子自拍的结构化提示词（Alev 角色，原始闪光）

**作者**: [Alev Kaya](https://x.com/alevkayai/status/1999401336534647254)  **日期**: 2025-12-12  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的 JSON 提示，用于使用 Gemini Nano Banana Pro 生成一致的人物图像（Alev）。此版本侧重于原始、生活化的美学，采用刺眼的闪光摄影，强调面部保留，同时明确排除雀斑和痣等特征，以打造“完美无瑕”的外观，背景设置为一个非常凌乱的卧室环境。

![凌乱卧室镜子自拍的结构化提示词（Alev 角色，原始闪光）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765991026003_ou6vj2_G78_EQeWYAEwhq9.jpg)

```
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "task_type": "text_to_image_consistent_character",
      "project_name": "Project_Alev",
      "priority": "critical",
      "version": "v3.2_messy_room_flash"
    },
    "technical_constraints": {
      "face_preservation": {
        "enabled": true,
        "reference_mode": "strict",
        "parameters": {
          "character_anchor": "alev_master_face",
          "preserve_original_features": true,
          "preservation_strength": 1.0,
          "excluded_features": ["freckles", "moles", "scars"]
        }
      },
      "output_settings": {
        "aspect_ratio": "{argument name="aspect ratio" default="9:16"}",
        "orientation": "portrait",
        "resolution_target": "ultra_high_res",
        "render_engine_style": "raw_smartphone_flash_photography"
      }
    },
    "creative_prompt": {
      "subject_profile": {
        "identity": {"name": "{argument name="character name" default="Alev"}", "archetype": "chaotic_attractive"},
        "appearance": {
          "hair": {"color": "vibrant copper orange", "style": "messy bun with loose strands falling everywhere", "texture": "natural, slightly frizzy"},
          "face_features": {"eyes": "large emerald green", "skin": "flawless smooth skin (no freckles) but realistic lighting", "nose": "small button nose"},
          "expression": {"type": "bored and alluring", "gaze": "looking at reflection in mirror", "micro_expression": "pouty lips, relaxed posture"}
        },
        "styling": {
          "top": "tight cropped tank top (white)",
          "bottom": "micro plaid mini skirt",
          "legwear": "one sock slouching down, one pulled up",
          "makeup": "smudged eyeliner from last night, still looking good"
        }
      },
      "scene_context": {
        "location": "very messy bedroom",
        "furniture": "unmade bed with tangled sheets, chair piled with clothes",
        "atmosphere": {"vibe": "chaotic, lived-in, real", "elements": ["clothes thrown on floor", "open pizza box in background", "tangled phone charger cables", "makeup products scattered on dresser"]},
        "lighting_setup": {"primary": "camera flash reflection in mirror", "secondary": "dim room light", "specifics": "harsh flash creating hard shadows and highlighting the clutter"}
      },
      "photography_style": {
        "camera_angle": "mirror selfie angle",
        "framing": "knee_up reflection",
        "lens_character": "smartphone camera lens",
        "depth_of_field": "deep (everything in focus including the mess)"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

### 889. 赛博朋克屋顶自拍，眼神冷峻

**作者**: [Olde Grieze](https://x.com/MarioSchijf/status/1999190790774620232)  **日期**: 2025-12-11  **语言**: en

> 一个用于生成 9:16 垂直肖像的详细图像生成提示，模拟全屏智能手机自拍。主体（其面部必须保持与参考图像一致）正在一个霓虹灯闪烁的夜间屋顶上进行 POV 自拍，表情为“冷酷凝视”，采用荷兰式倾斜构图，并具有赛博朋克风格的特定服装和配饰。

![赛博朋克屋顶自拍，眼神冷峻](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765967650874_ffthkk_G76NbGhXwAASJRH.jpg)

```
Use the uploaded image as the reference for the subject's face and likeness. Do not alter facial features; maintain 100% feature consistency. Generate the image in a Vertical 9:16 aspect ratio. The image must be strictly taller than it is wide (portrait orientation) to simulate a full-screen smartphone photo.
The subject is taking a POV selfie with one arm visibly stretched out towards the camera lens. The camera device itself is not visible. She is looking directly into the lens with a 'Cold Stare' expression—sharp direct eye contact, lips closed, icy and powerful. The camera angle is a dynamic Dutch Angle (tilted).
The setting is a 'Rooftop Night' with a glass railing behind her and a bokeh city skyline in the distance. The atmosphere is a 'Neon Night,' with {argument name="neon colors" default="blue and pink"} light casting a cyberpunk glow on her skin. In the background, blurred by deep bokeh, there is a hint of 'Nightlife' activity with people standing in line.
She is wearing a rich {argument name="top color" default="burgundy"} 'Velvet Off-Shoulder Bustier' paired with a high-waisted black 'Leather Mini' skirt. Her hair is styled in a severe 'Slicked-Back Bun.' Her makeup focuses on 'Siren Eyes' with elongated eyeliner.
Her free hand is holding a 'Takeaway Cocktail' in a clear plastic cup with a neon straw and glowing ice cubes. On the wrist of the stretched arm, she wears a 'Thick Silver Curb Chain' bracelet. Her nails are long 'Vampy Stiletto' style in deep black. She wears a 'Statement Silver' cuban link chain. The image has a sharp modern smartphone aesthetic.
```

    "face_preservation": {
      "use_reference_face": true,

        "face shape",
        "eyebrows and eye structure",
        "natural makeup style",
        "lip shape and color",
        "hairline and hairstyle"
      ]

      "pose": {
        "body_position": "squatting low with one knee forward, leaning slightly toward mirror",
        "head": "tilted slightly downward while looking at phone screen",
        "hands": [
          "right hand holding phone in front of face",
          "left hand resting on knee"
        ],
        "expression": "soft, calm expression"
      },
      "hair": {
        "style": "long dark brown hair in a half-up ponytail with a small clip",
        "texture": "smooth and straight"
      },
      "attire": {
        "dress": {
          "type": "black leather micro-skirt with fitted top",
          "pattern": "plain with metallic accents",
          "details": "slit exposing leg, edgy structured flow"
        },
        "shoes": "black ankle boots",
        "accessories": [
          "choker necklace",
          "stud earrings",
          "leather bracelet"
        ]
      }
    },
    "environment": {
      "setting": "indoor room with soft lighting",
      "background": "exposed brick wall with urban art posters",
      "floor": "smooth, reflective surface",
      "lighting": {
        "type": "soft warm indoor light",
        "effect": "even illumination on face and dress"
      }
    },
    "props": {
      "phone": {
        "type": "smartphone",
        "case": "glitter silver phone case",
        "position": "held vertically towards the mirror"
      }

    "style": {
      "photography": "mirror selfie, social media aesthetic",

      "sharpness": "medium-high clarity",
      "mood": "feminine, elegant, gentle"
    },
    "composition": {
      "framing": "full body squatting pose, centered",
      "angle": "eye-level mirror perspective",
      "focus": "sharp focus on face and outfit",
      "aspect_ratio": "4:5"
    },
    "output": {
      "resolution": "8K high quality",
      "negative_prompt": [
        "incorrect face",
        "wrong hairstyle",
        "extra limbs",
        "different dress pattern",
        "distorted proportions",
        "text or watermark"
      ]
    }
  }
}

**作者**: [𝐌𝐢𝐧𝐝𝐒𝐩𝐚𝐫𝐤](https://x.com/Strength04_X/status/1999117521568596137)  **日期**: 2025-12-11  **语言**: en

> 一个用于生成 8K 超逼真镜面自拍的复杂 JSON 提示。它要求精确保留参考图像中的面部，并详细说明了拍摄对象的姿势（低蹲）、服装（黑色罗纹紧身迷你连衣裙、高跟鞋）和环境（带暖色照明的现代房间）。它还包含特定的负面提示，以确保高质量。
