```
{
  "image_prompt": {
    "face_preservation": {
      "use_reference_face": true,
      "accuracy": "match face exactly from reference image",
      "preserve_details": ["eyes", "nose shape", "cheek structure", "skin texture", "lip style"]
    },

    "subject": {
      "gender": "female",
      "description": "girl taking a mirror selfie indoors while squatting",
      "pose": {
        "body_position": "low squat with heel slightly lifted, leaning in confidently",
        "head": "slightly tilted, gaze downward at phone",
        "hands": ["right hand holding phone in front", "left hand lightly touching hair"],
        "expression": "soft confident look"
      },
      "hair": {
        "style": "half-up pony with soft loose strands",
        "texture": "smooth straight"
      },
      "attire": {
        "dress": {
          "type": "black ribbed bodycon mini hot dress transparent ",
          "pattern": "plain sleek",
          "details": "short sleeves, form-fitting silhouette"
        },
        "shoes": "black ankle strap heels",
        "accessories": ["gold necklace", "bracelet", "rings"]
      }
    },

    "environment": {
      "setting": "modern indoor room",
      "background": "beige curtains & minimal decor",
      "floor": "reflective marble surface",
      "lighting": {
        "type": "warm artificial lighting",
        "effect": "smooth shadows and glossy highlights"
      }
    },

    "props": {
      "phone": { "type": "smartphone","case": "matte black","position": "vertical selfie mode" }
    },

    "style": {
      "photography": "mirror aesthetic selfie",
      "color_grade": "warm glossy tones",
      "sharpness": "high clarity",
      "mood": "classy & stylish"
    },

    "composition": {
      "framing": "full body squatting frame",
      "angle": "eye-level reflection capture",
      "focus": "sharp facial detail",
      "aspect_ratio": "4:5"
    },

    "output": {
      "resolution": "8K ultra realistic",
      "negative_prompt": ["wrong face", "extra limbs", "dress mismatch", "noise", "text", "blur"]
    }
  }
}
```

### 897. 2000 年代初期的数码相机镜子自拍

**作者**: [毎日の活力⚡](https://x.com/_dailyboost/status/1999106347397447905)  **日期**: 2025-12-11  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的提示，用于生成一张超逼真的镜面自拍，模仿 2000 年代初期数码相机快照的美学。场景中，一位女性（身份锁定为参考对象）抱着一只橘色虎斑猫，身着复古风格的服装，沐浴在柔和的傍晚金色阳光中，画面带有数码噪点和颗粒感。

![2000 年代初期的数码相机镜子自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765967692258_mcbzuj_G75AhIraYAAFG9R.jpg)

```
Create a hyper-realistic photograph of a woman (100% faithful to the original face reference, no alterations or beautification allowed) taking a mirror selfie in her bedroom using a smartphone camera. 

She has her original hairstyle with some loose, slightly messy strands of hair softly falling over her face in a cool, effortlessly chic yet sexy way, with good volume. She’s wearing a {argument name="top style" default="vintage-style spaghetti-strap crop top"} and {argument name="bottom style" default="high-waisted denim shorts"}. She’s cradling a {argument name="pet type" default="fluffy orange tabby cat"} in her arms.

Image style: Shot on an {argument name="camera type" default="early-2000s digital camera"}, using only natural light, no flash. Soft late-afternoon golden sunlight streaming through the window, gently hitting her skin, face, and the cat’s fur, creating warm natural highlights and glows. Slightly warm yellow-orange-gray tone, subtle digital noise and grain for that authentic vintage digital look.

Composition: Half-body mirror shot, focus sharply on her face and the cat as the main subjects. Background shows a simple white bed and plain walls, with soft patches of sunlight falling across the wall and bed, contrasted by gentle shadows from the angled light. Overall framing feels like a casual, candid early-2000s snapshot.

Overall atmosphere: Warm, natural, unposed, and intimate. The natural light enhances the retro digital vintage vibe — charming, approachable, and nostalgic, like a simple everyday moment captured on a sunny afternoon in the 2000s.
```

**作者**: [Andry Dina](https://x.com/andrydina7/status/1999070610534674611)  **日期**: 2025-12-11  **语言**: en

> 一个高度结构化的 Nano Banana Pro 提示，用于生成一张具有网红风格的超逼真数字自拍肖像。它详细说明了场景（卧室/梳妆区）、灯光（柔和、漫射、左前方自然光）、主体细节（优雅的女性、铂金发色、曲线玲珑的身材）、姿势（坐在床上，目光移开，手持手机和唇彩）以及服装（罗纹挂脖中长连衣裙）。

![超逼真网红自拍肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765967681827_6dnjus_G74gHRgXYAIj0Xe.jpg)

```
{
"image_generation_prompt_template": {
"visual_style": "ultra-realistic digital selfie portrait, high clarity, influencer style",
"setting": {
"type": "bedroom or dressing area interior",
"lighting_conditions": "soft, bright, diffuse indoor lighting, possibly natural light from the front-left, creating a smooth, even illumination with minimal harsh shadows.",
"environment_details": "large, vertical mirror reflecting the scene; a bed in the background with crisp white sheets and a white comforter; a light-colored wall; minimal clutter visible (a pen or pencil lying on the bed)."
},
"subject": {
"quantity": "one",
"description": "an elegant young woman with a feminine figure",
"position": "positioned in the frame, facing the mirror, taking a selfie that captures her torso and lower body.",
"pose": "sitting on a bed, looking slightly away from the camera/phone screen (to the left profile), holding a smartphone up with her right hand.",
"facial_expression": "pouty or serious expression, with lips slightly pursed, looking off to the side.",
"physical_attributes": {
"hair": {
"length": "long",
"color": "platinum blonde",
"style": "straight, smooth, flowing over her shoulders."
},
"skin_tone": "smooth, fair complexion with subtle pink undertones, evenly illuminated."
},
"clothing": {
"outfit_type": "cocktail or evening wear midi dress",
"top": "light beige/cream, sleeveless midi dress with a halter neckline, featuring a fine, all-over ribbed or ruched texture that accentuates the body shape.",
"bottoms": "integrated into the midi-dress, extending to mid-calf or below the knee, tightly hugging her figure.",
"accessories": [
{
"type": "smartphone",
"details": "modern smartphone with a light-colored/white case, held prominently in the right hand."
},
{
"type": "lip gloss/stick",
"details": "a pink/nude lip product, slightly reflective, held in the hand with the phone."
}
]
},
"body_details": "curvaceous and hourglass figure, clearly emphasized by the form-fitting textured dress."
},
"camera_details": {
"angle": "medium shot, taken as a selfie in a mirror, capturing the subject from the mid-chest down to the upper legs.",
"focus": "sharp focus on the subject and the phone in the foreground.",
"image_quality_notes": "exceptionally high, with sharp clarity and detail, typical of a high-resolution phone camera; emphasizes the texture of the dress fabric; noise-free."
},
"negative_prompt_suggestions": "deformed hands, distorted reflections, AI artifacts, unrealistic elements, poor lighting"
}
}

She is wearing a black outfit, holding a smartphone to take the photo, and resting one hand on her hip. She has a genuine, animated smile with her mouth slightly open as if speaking. The background features brushed stainless steel panels, metal doors, and elevator buttons. The lighting is soft and overhead, creating reflections on the metallic surfaces. **作者**: [𝗦𝗮𝗻𝗶𝗮](https://x.com/saniaspeaks_/status/1998955765101740230)  **日期**: 2025-12-11  **语言**: en

> 一个高度具体的 JSON 提示，用于生成女性对象的超现实、全身镜面或自拍式肖像。它要求严格保留参考图像中的面部特征、发型和腹部纹身，并详细说明了服装、极简背景以及特定的智能手机相机设置，以呈现高质量、自信的美感。

```
{
  "type": "image_generation_prompt",
  "style": "casual, modern, photorealistic selfie",
  "composition": {
    "orientation": "vertical",
    "framing": "full-length",
    "method": "mirror or selfie photograph"
  },
  "subject": {
    "gender": "female",
    "identity_preservation": {
      "use_reference_image": true,
      "alter_face": false,
      "notes": "Preserve facial features, face structure, eye color, hairstyle, skin tone, and abdominal tattoos with maximum fidelity"
    },
    "expression": "serious and confident",
    "pose": {
      "right_hand": "holding a cell phone taking the photo",
      "left_hand": "playing with hair",
      "stance": "standing against a wall, facing the camera"
    },
    "appearance": {
      "hair": {
        "color": "dark",
        "length": "long",
        "style": "straight bangs with two long thick braids over the shoulders"
      },
      "makeup": {
        "style": "dramatic",
        "details": [
          "winged eyeliner",
          "lipstick"
        ]
      },
      "tattoos": {
        "location": "abdomen",
        "visibility": "discreet but visible"
      }
    }
  },
  "wardrobe": {
    "top": "black cropped top with red inverted text reading \"I'M F***ING STAR\"",
    "bottoms": "short, tight denim shorts",
    "accessories": [
      "necklace with heart pendant"
    ]
  },
  "scene": {
    "background": {
      "color": "dark or black",
      "style": "simple, minimalist"
    }
  },
  "lighting": {
    "type": "soft, diffuse frontal lighting",
    "contrast": "low",
    "shadows": "minimal, no harsh shadows"
  },
  "camera": {
    "device_style": "high-quality smartphone selfie",
    "focal_length_equivalent": "24mm–35mm",
    "aperture": "f/1.8–f/2.0",
    "iso": "200–400",
    "shutter_speed": "1/125s–1/250s",
    "depth_of_field": "soft bokeh despite wall background"
  },
  "post_processing": {
    "cleanup": [
      "remove any text overlays on the image such as 'hola'"
    ]
  },
  "quality": {
    "realism": "photorealistic",
    "detail_level": "high",
    "texture": "natural skin and fabric detail"
  },
  "output_goal": "Create a realistic full-length selfie-style portrait that perfectly merges the user’s real identity with the described pose, outfit, hairstyle, lighting, and minimalist aesthetic."
}

### 901. 带姿势和几何锁定功能的复杂 JSON 提示，用于镜像自拍场景

**作者**: [Sienna](https://x.com/siennalovesai/status/1998870588295639485)  **日期**: 2025-12-10  **语言**: en

> 一个为 Nano Banana Pro 设计的极其详细的 JSON 提示词，旨在生成一个以合成女性为主角的镜子自拍场景，她穿着粉色露臀 V 字比基尼。该提示词使用了广泛的锁定机制来控制姿势、摄像机角度和比基尼几何形状，以确保对输出的精确控制，仅允许进行身份替换。

![带姿势和几何锁定功能的复杂 JSON 提示，用于镜像自拍场景](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765509707054_x23120_G71qMw9W8AA9taY.jpg)

```
{
  "template_id": "mirror_room_cheeky_v_bikini_synth_v1_compact",
  "version": "1.3.0",
  "intent": "Straight-on mirror selfie scene with clothed synthetic woman in pink cheeky V-shaped bikini; same room, chair, dog, and camera angle; identity replacement allowed.",
  "subject_identity_policy": {
    "subject_type": "synthetic_adult_female",
    "identity_replacement_allowed": true,
    "scope": "face_and_body_identity_only",
    "constraints": [
      "Do not alter pose, proportions, or bikini coverage.",
      "Do not move chair, dog, mirror, or environment."
    ]
  },
  "pose_lock": {
    "desc": "Kneeling on cushion, back to mirror, torso slightly rotated, head turned toward phone.",
    "body_orientation": {
      "pelvis_yaw": 180,
      "pelvis_pitch": -2,
      "spine_yaw": -12,
      "spine_pitch": 8
    },
    "head": {
      "yaw": 35,
      "pitch": -4
    },
    "legs": {
      "kneeling": true,
      "knee_sep": 0.8,
      "lower_leg_deg": 15
    },
    "arms": {
      "left": {
        "elbow": 95,
        "shoulder": 22,
        "pos": {
          "x": 0.63,
          "y": 0.34
        },
        "action": "holding_phone"
      },
      "right": {
        "elbow": 40,
        "shoulder": 15,
        "pos": {
          "x": 0.52,
          "y": 0.52
        },
        "action": "resting"
      }
    },
    "back": {
      "scapula": "visible",
      "curve": "mild",
      "shoulder_h": 0.63
    },
    "hips": {
      "hip_h": 0.45,
      "center_x": 0.51,
      "pelvis_tilt": 5
    },
    "rules": [
      "Keep kneeling pose and straight-on back view.",
      "Freeze angles within ±2 degrees.",
      "Maintain clear phone-to-mirror geometry."
    ]
  },
  "camera_lock": {
    "method": "mirror_selfie",
    "focal_mm": 26,
    "dist_m": 1.2,
    "height_m": 1.05,
    "pitch": -3,
    "lens": "mild_barrel",
    "dof": {
      "aperture": 2.2,
      "blur": "subtle"
    },
    "framing": {
      "ratio": "4:3",
      "left": "mirror_edge",
      "right": "chair_edge",
      "top": "ceiling_strip",
      "bottom": "cushion_floor"
    },
    "rules": [
      "Keep camera aligned nearly straight-on.",
      "Do not shift camera position or height."
    ]
  },
  "bikini_geometry_lock": {
    "type": "two_piece",
    "top": {
      "style": "bandeau",
      "tie": {
        "x": 0.5,
        "y": 0.56
      },
      "tension": "moderate"
    },
    "bottom": {
      "style": "cheeky_v",
      "waist_h": 0.47,
      "side_deg": 45,
      "coverage": 0.7,
      "center": {
        "x": 0.51,
        "y": 0.61
      }
    },
    "pattern": {
      "base": "#ff6aa0",
      "acc": "#ffffff",
      "type": "floral",
      "scale": 0.18
    },
    "fabric": {
      "mat": "nylon_spandex",
      "spec": 0.35,
      "stretch": "horizontal"
    },
    "rules": [
      "Maintain cheeky V-cut.",
      "Do not change pink color or floral pattern."
    ]
  },
  "lighting_lock": {
    "model": "indoor_daylight_mix",
    "prima
```

### 902. 逼真的镜面自拍，面部保持一致

**作者**: [Melisa♡](https://x.com/xmliisu/status/1998788740886474831)  **日期**: 2025-12-10  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张 8K 超逼真的镜面自拍。它要求根据参考图像保持高面部一致性，描绘了一位银灰色头发的女性，身穿白色露脐上衣和高腰牛仔裤，站在阳光充足的卧室里。

![逼真的镜面自拍，面部保持一致](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765990907744_d9q80t_G70fv12WsAAHT0v.jpg)

```
{
  "generation_settings": {
    "aspect_ratio": "9:16",
    "style": "Photorealistic Portrait",
    "reference_strength": "High (Face Consistency)"
  },
  "prompt_components": {
    "subject": {
      "face_reference": "Identical face to uploaded image",
      "hair": "Long, silver-grey, sleek, straight",
      "skin": "Naturally smooth with a subtle glow",
      "makeup": "Polished and naturally glamorous, winged eyeliner, defined brows, soft contouring, matte nude lips",
      "nails": "Long, painted pastel pink"
    },
    "attire": {
      "top": "Fitted white short-sleeved crop top",
      "bottoms": "Light blue high-waisted denim jeans"
    },
    "pose_and_action": {
      "type": "Mirror selfie",
      "device": "iPhone 16 Pro Max held in one hand",
      "posture": "Standing slightly turned to the side, upper body angled toward mirror, head turned toward camera, arm resting naturally by side",
      "effect": "Soft, natural side profile emphasizing waist and hips"
    },
    "environment": {
      "location": "Bright, softly lit bedroom",
      "background_elements": "Neatly made white bed with a pale pink blanket, minimalist decor",
      "lighting_source": "Soft daylight coming through windows"
    },
    "technical_details": {
      "lighting_quality": "Even and diffuse, enhancing realistic skin texture and denim details",
      "resolution": "Ultra-sharp, high-quality photorealistic 8K rendering",
      "reflection": "Clean mirror reflection"
    }
  },
  "final_prompt_string": "A realistic mirror selfie portrait of a young woman with a face identical to the reference image. She has long, sleek, straight silver-grey hair and polished makeup with winged eyeliner and matte nude lips. She is dressed in a fitted white short-sleeved crop top and light blue high-waisted denim jeans. She stands in a side profile pose, angling her body toward the mirror while holding an iPhone 16 Pro Max; her nails are long and pastel pink. The background is a sunlit bedroom with a white bed and pale pink blanket. The lighting is diffuse and soft, highlighting skin texture. 8K resolution, photorealistic."
}
```

### 903. 详细的镜面自拍/室内肖像提示

**作者**: [آیت شاہ](https://x.com/kashmir_ki_lark/status/1998786686541770998)  **日期**: 2025-12-10  **语言**: en

> 一个高度结构化的 JSON 格式提示，用于 Google Gemini Nano Banana Pro 3.0，详细描述了如何创建一张精致的镜面自拍/室内肖像。它细致地描述了拍摄对象的样貌、服装、场景（包括砖墙和柜台物品等背景元素）、灯光、构图以及所需的审美效果。

![详细的镜面自拍/室内肖像提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765509756717_dbg38y_G70d3wFaMAMLCki.jpg)

```
{
  "prompt_details": {
    "image_type": "Mirror Selfie/Indoor Portrait",
    "subject": {
      "description": "A young woman, likely in her 20s or early 30s, with fair skin and shoulder-length blonde or light brown hair.",
      "pose": "Holding a black smartphone with both hands to take a mirror selfie, looking directly into the camera/mirror with a soft expression.",
      "attire": "Wearing a silky, long-sleeved, collared white or cream-colored blouse/shirt. The bottom is a high-waisted, reddish-brown or rust-colored leather or faux-leather skirt or trousers, cinched with a matching belt. She is wearing small hoop earrings and a ring.",
      "makeup": "A deep berry or mauve lip color, and natural eye makeup."
    },
    "setting": {
      "location_type": "Bathroom or dressing area",
      "background_elements": "A prominent, large, black-framed mirror with a curved top and slightly distressed surface. Below the mirror is a narrow white ledge/counter. Behind the counter, there's exposed reddish-orange brick and a white wainscoting/beadboard below the mirror. To the right, a white electrical outlet with visible switches. To the left, a light gray towel or garment hangs on a hook/bar.",
      "lighting": "Soft, warm, indoor lighting, likely natural light supplemented by overhead fixtures, casting a subtle shine on the white blouse."
    },
    "foreground_elements": {
      "objects_on_counter": "Various makeup and beauty products are neatly arranged on the white counter directly below the mirror. These include: a bright yellow box with black text (possibly 'GOODWOLF' or similar), black and silver mascara/applicator tubes, several lip pencils (red/brown tones), a silver egg-shaped object, a white cylinder tube, various makeup brushes, and a pinkish cream stick product.",
      "focus": "Sharp focus on the subject and the reflection in the mirror."
    },
    "style_and_aesthetics": {
      "mood": "Candid, sophisticated, getting ready, natural.",
      "color_palette": "Dominantly neutral tones (white, gray) contrasted with warm accents (red brick, rust pants, berry lips) and the black mirror frame.",
      "composition": "The subject is centered in the frame, captured via the mirror reflection. The composition includes a significant portion of the surroundings, following the rule of thirds with the subject's face slightly above center."
    },
    "camera_settings": {
      "shot_type": "Close-up/Medium Shot (as seen in the mirror)",
      "perspective": "First-person (from the phone's perspective, reflecting the taker)",
      "depth_of_field": "Shallow to medium, isolating the woman and the immediate foreground products from the deeper background elements like the brick."
    }
  }
}
```

### 904. 网红生活方式拼贴画（两帧，同一主题）

**作者**: [Riccardo Wolf](https://x.com/WolfRiccardo/status/1998753271834415139)  **日期**: 2025-12-10  **语言**: en

> 一个复杂的 JSON 提示，旨在在单张图片中生成同一主体（一位身穿浅灰色休闲套装的年轻女性）的两个不同画面，模仿网红生活方式拼贴画。画面 1 是特写肖像，画面 2 是镜面自拍，并附有详细的灯光、姿势和美学（“洁净女孩”美学，柔焦）规格。

![网红生活方式拼贴画（两帧，同一主题）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765509713406_ugd4z1_G7z_RneWsAA7ccf.jpg)

```
{
  "subject": {
    "description": "Young woman with pale porcelain skin and a soft, fit physique. The image showcases two angles: a close-up facial portrait lying down and a full-body mirror selfie sitting on a bed.",
    "age": "Early 20s",
    "hair": {
      "color": "Jet Black",
      "style": "Voluminous, messy, loose waves, creating a high contrast against the pale skin and white bedding."
    },
    "clothing": {
      "set_type": "Matching Lounge Set",
      "material": "Soft Heather Grey Cotton / Jersey fabric",
      "top": {
        "type": "Crop Camisole / Tank Top",
        "details": "Thin spaghetti straps, scoop neckline showing cleavage, fitted crop cut."
      },
      "bottom": {
        "type": "Biker Shorts / Boyshorts",
        "details": "High-waisted, tight fit, matching heather grey color."
      }
    }
  },
  "panel_1_closeup": {
    "type": "Left Panel - Face Focus",
    "pose": "Lying down on back, head resting on a white pillow.",
    "expression": "Sultry, dreamy, heavy-lidded eyes looking directly at camera, lips slightly parted in a soft pout.",
    "face": {
      "eyes": "Light Blue / Greyish-Blue, clear and piercing.",
      "skin": "Flawless texture, natural rosy blush on cheeks.",
      "makeup": "Clean girl aesthetic. High-shine clear lip gloss, groomed brows, minimal mascara."
    }
  },
  "panel_2_mirror": {
    "type": "Right Panel - Body Focus",
    "pose": "Sitting on a bed, leaning back on one arm, legs bent at the knees. Holding a phone for a mirror selfie.",
    "mirror_rules": "Reflection in an arched floor mirror.",
    "device": {
      "type": "Smartphone (iPhone Pro)",
      "details": "White color, no case (or clear case), triple lens camera visible."
    },
    "hands": "Manicured long nails painted soft white/nude."
  },
  "photography": {
    "style": "Influencer lifestyle collage",
    "lighting": "Soft, diffused natural daylight (window light), creating soft shadows and highlighting the glossy lips and skin texture.",
    "colors": "Neutral palette: White, Heather Grey, Jet Black, Skin tones.",
    "texture": "Soft focus, dreamy, slightly overexposed whites."
  },
  "background": {
    "setting": "Minimalist",
    "elements": [
      "White rumpled bed sheets / duvet",
      "Plain white wall",
      "Black frame of the mirror (visible on the edge)"
    ],
    "atmosphere": "Cozy, lazy morning, intimate."
  }
}
```

### 905. 柔和私密镜中自拍（基于参考图生成）

**作者**: [Melisa♡](https://x.com/xmliisu/status/1998727648151838738)  **日期**: 2025-12-10  **语言**: en

> 一个极其详细的 Gemini Nano Banana Pro JSON 提示词，专注于生成一张逼真的、私密的镜面自拍。至关重要的是，它使用 controlnet 设置和严格的身份锁定，以确保生成的图像在面部特征、皮肤纹理和整体外观上 100% 符合上传的参考图像，同时描述了场景和服装（米色针织毛衣，金色项链）。

![柔和私密镜中自拍（基于参考图生成）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765509776538_hw1noz_G7zoMkLWIAAoM_M.jpg)

```
{
  "task": "image_generation",
  "metadata": {
    "title": "Soft Intimate Mirror Selfie",
    "style": "Photorealistic, Candid, Minimalist",
    "subject": "Young Woman"
  },
  "parameters": {
    "width": 1200,
    "height": 1200,
    "aspect_ratio": "1:1",
    "format": "png"
  },
  "prompts": {
    "positive": "A soft, intimate mirror selfie of a young woman, taking complete reference from the uploaded image for her exact face, expression, hairstyle, and natural skin texture. Preserve her real features, warm complexion, natural glow, visible pores, subtle contouring, defined brows, and soft matte lips exactly as in the reference. She stands indoors in a cozy, feminine room with muted pink walls, rattan storage baskets, and soft curtains in the background. The overall atmosphere is warm, calm, and inviting. Her shoulder-length hair is styled in natural, wet-textured waves that frame her face beautifully. She is wearing an off-shoulder, cream-colored knitted sweater with a loose, relaxed fit that drapes smoothly across her collarbones. A delicate gold necklace with a heart-shaped pendant rests at the center of her chest. Her pose is soft and effortless—one hand adjusting her hair while the other holds a pale pink phone with a minimal matte case. In her arm, she carries a small white quilted designer handbag with gold hardware, heart stitching, and a structured silhouette. Lighting should match the reference: soft, diffused daylight that highlights her skin naturally without smoothing or artificial retouching. Capture true fabric texture, hair strands, skin details, and all realistic shadows. The mood is feminine, gentle, candid, and aesthetically minimal—like a warm, everyday beauty moment captured effortlessly.",
    "negative": "low quality, blurry, airbrushed, plastic skin, artificial smoothing, cartoon, illustration, 3d render, distorted hands, bad anatomy, harsh contrast, dark shadows, neon colors, clutter, messy background, watermark, text"
  },
  "reference_settings": {
    "use_controlnet": true,
    "control_mode": "face_structure_and_skin",
    "strength": 1.0,
    "note": "Ensure strict adherence to uploaded reference image for facial features and skin texture."
  }
}
```

**Related**: [[手绘素描]]、[[综合艺术]]、[[3D渲染]]

### 906. 超逼真 IG 辣妹浴室镜子自拍 (带闪光灯)

**作者**: [Sienna](https://x.com/siennalovesai/status/1998722359566450961)  **日期**: 2025-12-10  **语言**: en

> 一个极其详细、结构化的 JSON 提示，用于 Gemini Nano Banana Pro，旨在生成一张超逼真的 8K“IG Baddie”风格镜面自拍。它详细说明了场景（昏暗的浴室，闪光灯主导的照明）、姿势（膝盖抬起放在台面上）、表情、服装细节和相机伪影，并要求保留面部身份。

![超逼真 IG 辣妹浴室镜子自拍 (带闪光灯)](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765509749333_o6ozon_G7zjRbJWUAAkR0a.jpg)

```
{
  "meta": {
    "title": "Hyper-realistic 8K Bathroom Mirror Counter Knee-Up IG Baddie Portrait (Ultimate Version)",
    "created_at": "2024-05-22T19:40:00Z",
    "tags": [
      "portrait",
      "mirror_selfie",
      "flash",
      "thirst_trap",
      "ig_baddie",
      "bathroom",
      "counter_perch",
      "knee_up",
      "phone_cam"

    "full_string": "Hyper-realistic 8K flash-on **IG baddie bathroom counter knee-up mirror selfie** — preserve the woman's facial identity. Scene: tight bathroom at night with overhead lights off so the **phone flash** dominates. Sink counter, chrome faucet, and tile backsplash explode with bright highlights from the flash.\n\nPose: she is perched on the bathroom counter but with **one knee raised up on the counter**, foot planted near the edge of the sink. The other leg hangs slightly off the counter or presses into the cabinetry. Torso angled 3/4, shoulders back, chest forward, one hand holding the phone, the other resting on her raised knee or lightly teasing the hip strap. Flash flare partially blows out the upper chest or shoulder for dramatic IG energy.\n\nExpression: confident IG-baddie stare or soft pout with innocent-but-nasty energy, lashes catching the flash.\n\nOutfit (choose C or D):\n(C) Low-rise micro set with low-cut crop top + bra edge visible; ultra low-rise micro shorts with thin 0.25-inch straps pulled high over the hips, straps accentuated by the raised leg position.\n(D) Deep-V bodysuit with plunging neckline, high-cut sides, subtle 0.25-inch hip trim; fully covered and opaque, neckline narrow but stable, no slips.\n\nFabric thin/athletic and slightly shiny so the flash creates bright highlights along the chest, hips, raised leg, and counter edge. Makeup: natural flash-perfect — soft matte skin, subtle contour, minimal highlighter, soft liner/mascara only, glossy lined lips. Hair messy pony / loose waves / sleek straight.\n\nBathroom: background mostly swallowed by darkness except flash-lit tiles, faucet glints, sink, mirror edges, and small countertop clutter. Mirror shows dust, water spots, fingerprints catching flare.\n\nComposition: 4:5 vertical, subject framed in the bathroom mirror, raised knee dominant in the lower half, deep-V or low-rise straps highlighted, phone flash flare blocking part of the face or clavicle. --ar 4:5 --style raw --v 6.0",
    "components": {
      "style": "Hyper-realistic 8K bathroom mirror selfie with raised-knee counter pose, harsh flash, deep shadows, and ultimate IG baddie body angles",
      "subject": {
        "reference_instruction": "preserve the woman's facial identity from the reference",
        "pose": "perched on the bathroom counter with **one knee raised up** toward the mirror, foot on the counter edge near the sink. Other leg hanging or braced. Torso angled 3/4, shoulders back, one hand holding the phone, the othe
```

### 907. 黄金时段黑色汽车闪光自拍

**作者**: [Alexa](https://x.com/logicpromt/status/1998700503136342090)  **日期**: 2025-12-10  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的提示，用于拍摄一张高对比度、魅力十足的汽车自拍照，拍摄时间为夜晚，使用硬光、直射的机载闪光灯。它详细说明了拍摄对象的形象（金发、玻璃肌、水润唇、90年代墨镜）、服装（亮片抹胸）、配饰（金色珠宝）以及技术细节（24mm 镜头、f/2.8 光圈、电影级调色、超现实风格）。

![黄金时段黑色汽车闪光自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765509691866_5y5sgl_G7zPdx5XMAAM8Jl.png)

```
Golden hour-turned-noir car selfie. A young woman with sun-streaked blonde hair—textured, layered, with effortless bedhead volume—casts a seductive, knowing look over the rim of her 90s rectangle rimless sunglasses (brown gradient lenses, gold bridge). Her skin is porcelain-white with a hyper-glowy, glass-skin finish; intense specular highlights blaze on her cheekbones and the tip of her nose. Her hazel-green eyes squint slightly. Plump, glossy nude-pink lips are slightly parted, with the subtle, playful press of her tongue against her teeth.

She wears a high-reflectivity champagne-silver sequin tube top, each sequin catching the light as a distinct point of glitter. Her right hand, adorned with stacked chunky gold dome rings on multiple fingers, adjusts the sunglasses frame on her nose. Her left hand is splayed against her chest, showcasing Cartier-style gold love bangles on her wrist.

The scene is inside a luxury car's dark leather interior at night. Through the rear window, out-of-focus city lights melt into a creamy, dark bokeh. The mood is intimate and moody, shattered by the stark, high-contrast blast of a hard, direct on-camera flash. The flash freezes every detail: the texture in her hair, the sparkle of sequins, the gleam of jewelry, and the dewy skin, creating deep, inky shadows.

Shot with a feel akin to a Canon G7X Mark II or iPhone 15 Pro Night Mode with flash—using a wide 24mm lens for a slight, intimate distortion. Aperture at f/2.8 for sharp focus on the face and jewelry against the blurred lights. Color grading is warm and cinematic: saturated golden skin tones, rich blacks, and a touch of filmic grain. The aesthetic is hyper-realistic, sharp, and effortlessly cool—a candid moment loaded with glamour.
```

### 908. 详细的镜面自拍生成提示

**作者**: [Lex](https://x.com/lexx_aura/status/1998657225725034931)  **日期**: 2025-12-10  **语言**: en

> 一个为 Gemini 上的 Nano Banana Pro 设计的高度结构化 JSON 提示，详细描述了镜子自拍图像的各个方面。它指定了拍摄对象的人口统计信息、服装（粉色毛绒猫耳、北欧毛衣）、姿势（顽皮的“嘶嘶”表情、镜子自拍）、环境（带小彩灯的宿舍房间）以及技术相机设置（24mm 镜头、柯达 Portra 400 模拟、8k 分辨率）。

![详细的镜面自拍生成提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765509772312_4ej13m_G7yoFfbasAAmzuz.jpg)

```
{
  "source_image_analysis": {
    "subject": {
      "demographics": "Young woman, pale skin tone",
      "hair": {
        "color": "Platinum blonde / Silver",
        "style": "Long, straight, draped over shoulders"
      },
      "facial_features": {
        "eyewear": "Thin, round wire-rimmed glasses (silver or gold frame)",
        "expression": "Playful aggressive 'hissing' face, teeth bared, nose slightly scrunched",
        "makeup": "Natural look, soft pink lip"
      }
    },
    "apparel": {
      "headwear": "Pink fuzzy cat ear headband",
      "clothing": {

### 909. 现代健身房中的镜面自拍，面部清晰可见

**作者**: [Zara](https://x.com/ZaraIrahh/status/1998604242702184753)  **日期**: 2025-12-10  **语言**: en

> 一个高度结构化的 JSON 提示词，旨在生成一张年轻女性在现代健身房里蹲姿的镜面自拍。该提示词包含面部保留、姿势、服装（运动内衣和运动裤）、环境、灯光和负面提示词的详细规范，旨在营造一种社交媒体美学。

![现代健身房中的镜面自拍，面部清晰可见](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765509686981_z4mjb0_G7x38zQakAAVfjY.jpg)

```
{
  "image_prompt": {
    "face_preservation": {
      "use_reference_face": true,
      "accuracy": "match face exactly from reference image",
      "preserve_details": [
        "face shape",
        "eyebrows and eye structure",
        "natural makeup style",
        "lip shape and color",
        "hairline and hairstyle"
      ]
    },

    "subject": {
      "gender": "female",
      "description": "young woman taking a mirror selfie while squatting gracefully indoors",
      "pose": {
        "body_position": "squatting low with one knee forward, leaning slightly toward mirror",
        "head": "tilted slightly downward while looking at phone screen",
        "hands": [
          "right hand holding phone in front of face",
          "left hand resting on knee"
        ],
        "expression": "soft, calm expression"
      },
      "hair": {
        "style": "long dark brown hair in a half-up ponytail with a small clip",
        "texture": "smooth and straight"
      },
          "clothing": {
          "top": {
            "type": "sports bra",
            "color": "off-white",
            "details": "tight, form-fitting material with slight sheen"
          },
          "bottom": {
            "type": "loose sweatpants",
            "color": "dark brown",
            "fit": "relaxed, high-waisted"
          }
        },
        "nails": "black nail polish"
      }
    },

        "shoes": "white Snickers",
        "accessories": [
          "silver necklace",
          "bracelet",
          "rings"
        ]
      }
    },

    "environment": {
      "setting": "modern indoor gym with mirrored walls",
      "details": {
        "equipment": [
          "chest press machine",
          "various gym machines in background"
        ],
        "flooring": "wood-textured gym flooring",
        "walls": "full-height mirrors reflecting gym interior",
        "lighting": "soft overhead LED lighting with warm ambient accents"
      }
    },

      }
    },

    "props": {
      "phone": {
        "type": "smartphone",
        "case": "glitter silver phone case",
        "position": "held vertically towards the mirror"
      }
    },

    "style": {
      "photography": "mirror selfie, social media aesthetic",
      "color_grade": "soft warm tones",
      "sharpness": "medium-high clarity",
      "mood": "feminine, elegant, gentle"
    },

    "composition": {
      "framing": "full body squatting pose, centered",
      "angle": "eye-level mirror perspective",
      "focus": "sharp focus on face and outfit",
      "aspect_ratio": "4:5"
    },

    "output": {
      "resolution": "8K high quality",
      "negative_prompt": [
        "incorrect face",
        "wrong hairstyle",
        "extra limbs",
        "different dress pattern",
        "distorted proportions",
        "text or watermark"
      ]
    }
  }
}

The mood is chic, stylish, and focused on beauty and aesthetics. Style: Instagram aesthetic, beauty photography, soft focus.",

    "White (background)"
  ],

### 916. 逼真的浴室镜自拍复制

**作者**: [D. Humann](https://x.com/dhumann/status/1998148993503965249)  **日期**: 2025-12-08  **语言**: en

> 此提示旨在用于 Nano Banana Pro 等图像生成模型，以创建高度详细、逼真的镜面自拍。它强调复制参考照片中人物的面部特征、外貌和服装，将其置于现代浴室环境中，并用手机拍摄照片，同时确保准确的反射和自然光线，以呈现逼真的手机自拍美感。

![逼真的浴室镜自拍复制](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765438571444_o73qco_G7rYzM-bwAAzFz-.jpg)

```
The main subject is the person in the attached photos (hereinafter referred to as THE_SUBJECT). Carefully and accurately replicate THE_SUBJECT’s facial features, hairstyle, skin tone, proportions, and overall appearance exactly as shown in the photo. Create a photorealistic mirror-selfie of THE_SUBJECT sitting on the edge of a bathroom counter, slightly turned to the side while looking over her shoulder toward the mirror. She is holding her phone up with one hand to capture the photo. Her outfit is a tight {argument name="outfit type" default="black short-sleeve bodycon dress"} that fits snugly around her waist and hips. She is accessorized with simple {argument name="jewelry color" default="gold"} jewelry, including bracelets and a ring. The setting is a modern, minimal bathroom with light neutral walls, a glass shower, folded towels, a marble countertop, and soft natural lighting. The photo should look exactly like a realistic phone selfie with accurate reflections, sharp detail, and natural skin texture. Create the image with perfect composition, lighting and photographic detail.
```

**Related**: [[综合时尚]]、[[奇幻世界]]、[[宠物]]

### 917. 逼真的试衣间镜子自拍

**作者**: [D. Humann](https://x.com/dhumann/status/1998080502574567621)  **日期**: 2025-12-08  **语言**: en

> 一个自然语言提示，用于生成一张超逼真的镜面自拍，重点是复制参考图像中主体的面部特征。它指定了一个时尚的姿势（低蹲）、详细的服装（白色缎面中长连衣裙、裸色粗跟鞋）、配饰（珍珠发夹、银色首饰），以及一个具有柔和暖光照明的现代室内环境，以实现优雅、高质量的镜面自拍美学。

![逼真的试衣间镜子自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765438584765_kri09n_G7qZEZ_a8AA8AuV.jpg)

```
A young female subject whose face must exactly match the reference image, preserving the face shape, eyebrows, eye structure, natural makeup style, lip shape and tone, hairline, and hairstyle, is taking a mirror selfie while squatting stylishly in a low squat with one knee bent forward, torso leaning slightly toward the mirror, head angled slightly downward, and eyes toward the phone screen. She holds a vertical smartphone with a clear transparent case in her right hand near her face for the mirror capture, while her left hand rests casually on her thigh, maintaining a neutral calm look with subtle softness. Her hair is styled in a half-up ponytail secured with a {argument name="hair clip type" default="pearl hair clip"}, smooth with a slight wave, and she wears an elegant {argument name="dress color" default="white"} satin midi dress with a side slit, featuring a glossy highlight texture, paired with nude block heels, silver earrings, a necklace, and rings. The scene is set indoors in a modern room with a glossy wooden laminate floor and a background of white curtains casting soft shadows, illuminated by warm soft indoor light providing even illumination that enhances the skin tone. The final output is an 8K photorealistic image captured in a mirror selfie aesthetic with soft neutral tones, high but natural sharpness, and an elegant, calm, feminine mood, framed full body centered in the 4:5 aspect ratio, using an eye-level reflection angle, with sharp focus on the face and soft room depth.
```

    },

        "Cartier-style gold love bangles on wrist"
      ]
    }
  },
  "pose": {
    "type": "Car selfie / Candid close-up",

    "gesture": "Right hand adjusting sunglasses frame, left hand splayed on chest showcasing jewelry"
  },
  "environment": {

    "lighting_context": "Nighttime city driving",
    "background_details": "Out-of-focus city lights (bokeh) through rear window, dark moody cabin atmosphere"
  },
  "technical_parameters": {
    "lighting_style": "Hard direct flash (on-camera), high contrast, minimal diffusion",
    "color_grading": "Warm golden tones, saturated skin tones, deep blacks in shadows",
    "camera_simulation": {
      "camera_type": "High-end compact digital (e.g., Canon G7X Mark II) or iPhone 15 Pro with Flash",
      "lens_characteristics": "24mm or 28mm wide angle, slight lens distortion on edges",

    },

}

### 920. 超逼真闪光自拍犯罪现场提示（JSON 格式）

**作者**: [Daniel](https://x.com/udanielx/status/1998019458774761793)  **日期**: 2025-12-08  **语言**: en

> 一个强烈、高度详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成超现实、电影犯罪现场风格的闪光自拍。它指定了极端的相机设置、戏剧性的主题（逃跑新娘遭遇赛博惊悚）、一个被毁坏的顶层公寓环境，以及诸如炫目闪光和深红色紧急灯光等戏剧性照明效果。

![超逼真闪光自拍犯罪现场提示（JSON 格式）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765438538836_t1xiss_G7pkGhwWgAAfwg5.jpg)

```
{
  "my_prompt": {
    "core_style": "insane hyper-realistic flash selfie, cinematic crime-scene energy",
    "target_quality": "16K raw photorealism, zero beauty filters",
    "main_rule": "face locked exactly to reference, no softening or reshaping",

    "shot_setup": {
      "type": "mirror selfie in abandoned luxury hotel suite",
      "camera": "iPhone 16 Pro Max, flash cranked to maximum",
      "lens": "24 mm, slight barrel distortion on edges",
      "angle": "phone held high above head, shooting downward (dutch tilt 15°)",
      "framing": "full body + massive cracked mirror reflection, phone dominating foreground"
    },

    "subject": {
      "age": "24-27",
      "vibe": "high-fashion runaway bride meets cyber-thriller",
      "pose": "perched on the edge of a shattered glass coffee table, knees wide, one stiletto dangling off toe, leaning forward aggressively toward mirror, one hand gripping a half-empty champagne bottle by the neck, the other holding phone like a weapon",
      "hair": "long blood-red hair, wet and slicked back on top, loose chaotic waves below, strands stuck to face and neck",
      "outfit": "ripped white silk wedding dress torn to mini length, smeared with real blood and red wine stains, black leather harness over torso, thigh-high patent black boots with broken heel on one side"
    },

    "accessories": [
      "smudged black eyeliner running down cheeks",
      "diamond choker + torn veil hanging from it",
      "bloody fingerprints on champagne bottle",
      "silver ring flash reflecting in eyes"
    ],

    "environment": {
      "location": "trashed penthouse suite at 4 AM",
      "background": "floor-to-ceiling windows showing city skyline at dawn, overturned furniture, shattered mirror wall, rose petals and broken glass everywhere, police caution tape visible through open door",
      "lighting": "only source is dying red EMERGENCY EXIT sign + iPhone flash cutting white-hot through crimson haze"
    },

    "lighting": {
      "main_source": "blinding white flash creating nuclear highlights and pitch-black shadows",
      "ambient": "deep blood-red emergency lighting + faint blue pre-dawn glow from windows",
      "effect": "face lit like an interrogation, red rim light bleeding into hair, reflections in blood puddles"
    },

    "render_details": {
      "skin": "sweat, wine, and blood droplets with real refraction",
      "glass": "microscopic shards catching flash individually",
      "motion": "slight hand shake blur on phone, subject frozen by flash",
      "sensor": "heavy noise, lens flare streaks, crushed blacks"
    },

    "negative": [
      "cute, soft, clean",
      "smiling",
      "studio lighting",
      "anime/cartoon",
      "perfect skin",
      "intact dress",
      "daylight"
    ]
  }
}
```

### 925. 四个超写实女性肖像提示词

**作者**: [gemini_prompts](https://x.com/YeKyaHoRhaHaiBe/status/1997532286011560437)  **日期**: 2025-12-07  **语言**: en

> 以下是为 Gemini Nano Banana Pro 设计的四个详细提示词，专注于超写实女性肖像，涵盖了多种风格，例如舒适的镜中自拍、奢华刺绣连衣裙肖像（需要参考面部匹配）、伦敦户外餐厅的抓拍场景，以及一张女性抱着猫的亲密肖像。

![四个超写实女性肖像提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765421915407_c7adsw_G7ipAOtaYAAGjx_.jpg)
![四个超写实女性肖像提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765421915325_yqtkal_G7ipASHbMAARzPK.jpg)
![四个超写实女性肖像提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765421915531_skmvey_G7ipASyaYAANPG3.jpg)
![四个超写实女性肖像提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765421916926_yq9zo1_G7ipAWQaIAAoy6j.jpg)

```
Prompt 1:
"A close-up, half-body mirror selfie of a young woman( match face) standing indoors. She is wearing a cozy, white, crew-neck sweater adorned with large, plush, red heart appliques scattered across the front and sleeves. She is also wearing light-wash blue denim jeans. Her hair is pulled up into a messy bun. She has a delicate gold necklace with a small pendant. The background is simple and bright, showing a neutral-toned wall and a doorway with a silver handle. Soft, natural lighting."

Prompt 2:
"Ultra-realistic high-detail indoor portrait of a beautiful woman - keep her real face, natural features, body proportions, and hair EXACTLY the same as the reference (no facial or body changes).
She is wearing a soft {argument name="dress color" default="lavender"} embroidered bodycon dress (updated wearing color), detailed stitching, elegant contours, and a refined luxury-fit silhouette.
Natural soft makeup with smooth skin texture and subtle highlights. Lighting: warm, soft indoor lighting, gentle shadows, natural glow on the face, smooth even complexion, premium portrait depth.
Background: subtle indoor blur (bokeh effect), clean aesthetic, minimal distraction, creamy depth-of-field.
Quality: sharp facial details, natural skin texture, smooth gradients, premium color grading, elegant portrait composition."

Prompt 3:
"Create a photorealistic image of a young woman(match face) sitting at a relaxed outdoor restaurant in {argument name="city" default="London"} on a cool {argument name="day of week" default="Wednesday"} morning in {argument name="month" default="March"} {argument name="year" default="2025"}. The sky is clear, the spring air is crisp, and the city feels calm as it wakes up. She is the focal point of the shot-wearing a light scarf, a black coat and a black turtle neck inside, gently stirring her coffee while gazing off to the side with a thoughtful expression. Everything behind her, from the waiter moving about to the soft morning traffic, should fall into a smooth blur, giving the picture the effortless, candid atmosphere of a moment casually snapped on a phone."

Prompt 4:
"A woman(match face from reference) is holding a cat gently with both hands, looking at it with a soft smile. Her expression is calm, tender, and affectionate. She has long, messy dark brown hair and is wearing a light brown ribbed long-sleeve shirt with buttons. She has small simple earrings, a delicate chain necklace, a thin silver ring on her left hand, and a small botanical tattoo on her right wrist.
The cat is light-colored with cream and beige fur. It sits securely in her arms, looking back at her with a calm, curious expression.
The scene takes place in an indoor room with a plain, neutral-colored wall. Warm sunlight comes through window blinds, casting soft striped shadows across both the woman and the cat.
The overall aesthetic is a soft, natural portrait with a warm, gentle, intimate vibe. The tones include warm beige, soft brown, and natural skin tones. The mood captures a peaceful moment between a human and her pet."
```

**Related**: [[室内设计]]、[[奇幻世界]]、[[宠物]]

### 926. 结构化坦率室内肖像提示

**作者**: [Taaruk](https://x.com/Taaruk_/status/1997516208061751572)  **日期**: 2025-12-07  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细、结构化的 JSON 提示，用于 Gemini Nano Banana Pro，旨在生成一张逼真、自然的室内照片，照片中是一位穿着特定款式服装（白色做旧针织毛衣）的年轻男士，并具有特定的灯光条件，强调真实感和时尚美学。

![结构化坦率室内肖像提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765421925839_om4cb0_G7iaZhnaIAEiL-k.jpg)

```
{
  "Objective": "Generate a realistic indoor candid photograph of the subject based on the provided reference image.",
  
  "Identity_Safety": "Maintain facial features, hairstyle, and appearance consistent with the provided reference image.",

  "Subject": {
    "Appearance": {
      "Age": "{argument name="age" default="Young man"}",
      "Hair": "Naturally tousled black hair framing the face softly",
      "Expression": "Calm, casual, candid moment"
    },
    "Pose": {
      "Body_Position": "Sitting at a desk in front of an open laptop",
      "Hands": {
        "Right_or_Left": "Holding an {argument name="phone model" default="iPhone 16 Pro"} as if checking something or capturing a mirror-style selfie"
      },
      "Vibe": "Realistic, relaxed, effortlessly cool"
    },
    "Wardrobe": {
      "Sweater": {
        "Type": "{argument name="sweater type" default="White distressed knit sweater"}",
        "Details": "Oversized fit with small rips, loose threads, and frayed texture for a trendy casual look"
      }
    }
  },

  "Scene_Description": {
    "Environment": {
      "Setting": "Indoor workspace or cozy room",

### 927. 超逼真镜面自拍提示词

**作者**: [Milova](https://x.com/milovaai/status/1997419100256309430)  **日期**: 2025-12-06  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的提示，用于生成一张年轻女性在现代浴室里拍摄的逼真镜面自拍，重点关注特定的姿势、服装、配饰，并确保最终图像看起来就像一张真实的手机自拍，具有准确的反射和自然的纹理。

![超逼真镜面自拍提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765122628982_t6h6co_G7hCE09bMAAmcO8.jpg)
![超逼真镜面自拍提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765122630176_l8e0ip_G7hCE2iaIAAICjM.jpg)
![超逼真镜面自拍提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765122631523_f0fxg3_G7hCE95acAAs15H.jpg)
![超逼真镜面自拍提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765122632466_yiukpk_G7hCE6iacAAg-2S.jpg)

```
Create a photorealistic mirror-selfie of a young woman sitting on the edge of a bathroom counter, slightly turned to the side while looking over her shoulder toward the mirror. She is holding her phone up with one hand to capture the photo. She has long, wavy blonde hair, natural makeup, and is wearing large clear-framed glasses. Her outfit is a tight black short-sleeve bodycon dress that fits snugly around her waist and hips. She is accessorized with simple gold jewelry, including bracelets and a ring. The setting is a modern, minimal bathroom with light neutral walls, a glass shower, folded towels, a marble countertop, and soft natural lighting. The photo should look exactly like a realistic phone selfie with accurate reflections, sharp detail, and natural skin texture. Capture the same pose, angle, framing, lighting, and overall aesthetic as the reference image while generating an original recreation.
```

### 928. 自拍肖像的详细 JSON 提示

**作者**: [𝗦𝗮𝗻𝗶𝗮](https://x.com/saniaspeaks_/status/1997396354059104347)  **日期**: 2025-12-06  **语言**: en

> 这是一个为 Nano Banana Pro 设计的高度结构化的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张特写、平视的镜面自拍肖像。它详细指定了照片风格、光线（柔和温暖的室内光）、主体（姿势、表情、服装）、环境（卧室/更衣室）和美学（自然生活方式自拍，干净中性的调色板）的参数。

![自拍肖像的详细 JSON 提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765438496413_wra58g_G7gtZHybsAAQXBs.jpg)

```
{
  "image_generation": {
    "face": {
      "preserve_original": true,
      "reference_match": true
   },
    "photo_style": {
      "type": "mirror selfie portrait",
      "camera_angle": "close-up to medium shot, eye-level via mirror reflection",
      "lighting": "soft warm indoor lighting with low contrast",
      "mood": "calm, introspective, minimal",
      "texture": "natural skin texture, soft shadows, subtle grain",
      "focus": "sharp focus on subject and phone reflection, background softly blurred"
    },

    "subject": {
      "pose": "standing indoors holding a smartphone up for a mirror selfie, head slightly turned to the side",
      "expression": "neutral, thoughtful, relaxed",
      "hair": {
        "style": "long, straight to slightly wavy, loose",
        "color": "natural brown"
      },
      "clothing": {
        "type": "casual indoor wear",
        "details": "loose dark-colored t-shirt with minimal styling"
      },
      "accessories": {
        "phone": "smartphone visible in hand with camera interface reflected in mirror"
      }
    },

    "environment": {
      "setting": "bedroom or dressing room",
      "background": "mirror surface, clothing rack, drawers, softly lit interior space",
      "atmosphere": "quiet, personal, cozy indoor environment"
    },

    "aesthetic": {
      "style": "natural lifestyle selfie",
      "features": [
        "mirror reflection composition",
        "soft ambient indoor lighting",
        "minimalist fashion",
        "casual everyday setting",
        "clean neutral color palette"
      ]
    }
  }
}
```

      },

        "accessories": [
          "gold hoop earrings",
          "delicate gold bracelet",
          "simple rings"
        ]

        "white sectional couch",
        "kitchen visible in background",
        "soft carpet, coffee table with decor items"

      "color_palette": "pinks, purples, neutral beige and white",

**作者**: [Zara](https://x.com/ZaraIrahh/status/1997237942386053422)  **日期**: 2025-12-06  **语言**: en

> A highly structured JSON prompt for Gemini Nano Banana Pro to create a mirror selfie portrait. It requires 100% face identity accuracy from a reference photo, depicting a female subject in an oversized blue hoodie in an elegant, classic white European dining room setting with soft, warm indoor lighting.

![Glamorous Mirror Selfie in an Elegant Dining Room](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765990910107_hpz19t_G7edUs1bsAAO1qz.jpg)

```
{
  "image_prompt": {
    "face_requirements": {
      "use_reference_face": true,
      "accuracy": "100% identical face from reference photo",
      "preserve_features": [
        "skin texture",
        "eye shape and color",
        "nose structure",
        "lip shape and fullness",
        "beauty marks and natural complexion",
        "expression: soft smile with warm eyes"
      ]
    },

    "subject": {
      "gender": "female",
      "pose": "Taking a mirror selfie with right hand holding the phone, left arm relaxed and slightly lifting the oversized hoodie.",
      "expression": "Warm, confident smile with slightly raised brows.",
      "hairstyle": "Messy elegant updo with loose curled tendrils framing the face.",
      "makeup": {
        "style": "soft glam",
        "details": [
          "warm matte eyeshadow",
          "winged eyeliner",
          "defined brows",
          "brownish-red glossy lips",
          "warm-toned blush"
        ]
      },
      "clothing": {
        "top": "Oversized blue zip-up hoodie worn off one shoulder",
        "bottom": "Loose white pants",
        "accessories": [
          "large blue heart pendant necklace",
          "ring on left hand",
          "white nail polish"
        ]
      }
    },

    "environment": {
      "setting": "Elegant dining room with classic white European interior design.",
      "background_elements": [
        "gold-framed wall mirror",
        "white decorative wall moulding",
        "hanging crystal chandelier",
        "round table set with white plates, glasses, and silverware",
        "gold metal dining chairs",
        "centerpiece with white flowers and tall candles"
      ],
      "lighting": {
        "type": "soft warm indoor lighting",
        "effect": "gentle highlights on skin, warm shadows around room"
      }
    },

    "camera": {
      "type": "iPhone mirror selfie",
      "angle": "eye-level, front-facing reflection",
      "focus": "subject sharply in focus, background softly clear",
      "phone_case": "pink floral textured case"
    },

    "aesthetic": {
      "vibe": "cozy glam with luxury interior",
      "color_palette": [
        "deep blue",
        "white",
        "gold",
        "soft beige",
        "warm skin tones"
      ],
      "mood": "warm, stylish, intimate selfie in an elegant setting"
    }
  }
}

### 931. 爆红游戏女孩镜面自拍提示词

**作者**: [SynthiaCreates](https://x.com/SynthiaCreates/status/1996983684931399749)  **日期**: 2025-12-05  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的 JSON 格式提示，旨在生成一张使用 Nano Banana Pro 制作的“爆款”全身镜自拍，内容为一名年轻女性在游戏室中的场景。提示详细说明了拍摄对象的特征（无辜的鹿眼、蓝色柔和发色、显眼的纹身、S 形身材）、服装（紧身白色露脐上衣和迷你裙）、配饰（眼镜、游戏耳机）、摄影风格（随意的 iPhone 拍摄质量、9:16 宽高比）以及背景元素（RGB 灯光、游戏 PC 设备、收藏品）。

![爆红游戏女孩镜面自拍提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765089412342_i4qizc_G7a2D02XYAA7SQ_.jpg)

```
{
  "subject": {
    "description": "Young woman taking full-length mirror selfie in gamer room, innocent doe eyes with glasses, arm tattoo visible",
    "mirror_rules": "standing facing full-length mirror, hips slightly angled, showing full body from head to mid-thigh",
    "age": "{argument name="age" default="early 20s"}",
    "skin": "{argument name="skin tone" default="light olive/tan tone"}",
    
    "expression": {
      "eyes": "{argument name="eye expression" default="big innocent doe eyes looking up through clear framed glasses, 'who me?' energy"}",
      "mouth": "{argument name="mouth expression" default="soft pout, lips slightly parted"}",
      "brows": "soft, slightly raised, faux innocent",
      "overall": "cute gamer girl face with curvy body contrast"
    },
    
    "hair": {
      "color": "{argument name="hair color" default="light blue pastel"}",
      "style": "messy bun with claw clip, loose strands framing face alongside glasses, effortless"
    },
    
    "body": {
      "waist": "tiny",
      "tattoo": "prominent detailed sleeve tattoo visible on left arm/forearm",
      "ass": "round, full, curve visible in tight skirt",
      "thighs": "thick, soft"
    },
    
    "clothing": {
      "top": {
        "type": "fitted crop top",
        "color": "{argument name="top color" default="white"}",
        "fit": "tight, showing midriff, hugging chest"
      },
      "bottom": {
        "type": "tight mini skirt",
        "color": "{argument name="bottom color" default="white"}",
        "material": "stretchy fabric",
        "fit": "short, form-fitting, hugging hips and rear"
      }
    },
    
    "face": {
      "features": "pretty - big eyes enhanced by glasses, small nose, full lips",
      "makeup": "minimal, natural, lip gloss, cute blush"
    }
  },

  "accessories": {
    "headwear": {
      "type": "{argument name="headwear type" default="Goorin Bros cap"}",
      "details": "worn backwards or tilted"
    },
    "glasses": {
      "type": "clear round or slightly square framed prescription glasses"
    },
    "headphones": {
      "type": "over-ear white gaming headphones",
      "position": "around neck"
    },
    "device": {
      "type": "iPhone",
      "details": "visible in mirror, held at chest level to take the full body shot"
    }
  },

  "photography": {
    "camera_style": "casual iPhone full-length mirror selfie",
    "quality": "iPhone camera - realistic social media quality, slight grain",
    "angle": "eye-level standing, angled slightly down towards reflection",
    "shot_type": "full-length mirror shot showing head to knees",
    "aspect_ratio": "9:16 vertical",
    "texture": "natural, slightly grainy iPhone look"
  },

  "background": {
    "setting": "home gamer bedroom",
    "style": "cozy, slightly messy gamer setup, RGB lighting",
    "elements": [
      "full-length standing mirror frame visible",
      "gaming PC rig with colorful RGB lights visible in background",
      "dual monitors showing gaming desktop or game menu",
      "gaming chair (pink or black) behind her",
      "LED light strips or Nanoleaf panels on walls",
      "shelves with Funko Pops, anime figures, or collectibles",
      "desk with keyboard and mouse visible"
    ]
  }
}
```

> 一个高度详细的 JSON 提示词，用于 Nano Banana Pro 生成一张情侣身着正装的镜面自拍，他们的头部被画有脸的白色纸箱遮盖。场景是一个优雅的室内场所，强调镜面反射、闪光效果以及纸箱上特定的图案（女性纸箱上是弯曲的闭眼，男性纸箱上是简单的椭圆形眼睛）。

{
  "scene": {
    "location": {
      "type": "indoor",
      "setting": "elegant / formal venue",
      "details": {
        "walls": "marble-patterned tiles in beige/brown tones",
        "ceiling": "white with recessed circular lights",
        "lighting": "warm, evenly distributed"
      }
    },
    "mirror": {
      "present": true,
      "reflection_type": "full-body mirror",
      "flash_visible": true
    }
  },

  "subjects": [
    {
      "position": "left",
      "body": {
        "gender_presentation": "feminine",
        "outfit": {
          "type": "dress",
          "style": "sleeveless, V-neck evening gown",
          "material": "sequins",
          "color": "silver / metallic"
        }
      },
      "head": {
        "covered_by": "white cardboard box",
        "box_features": {
          "shape": "cube",
          "edges": "visible taped corners and seams",
          "face_drawing": {
            "eyes": "curved, closed eyes with long lashes",
            "eyebrows": "arched black eyebrows",
            "mouth": "red lips drawn in lipstick style",
            "expression": "smiling, eyes-closed expression"
          }
        }
      },
      "hands": {
        "visible_hand": "right hand holding phone for mirror selfie"
      }
    },
    {
      "position": "right",
      "body": {
        "gender_presentation": "masculine",
        "outfit": {
          "type": "formal suit",
          "jacket_color": "black",
          "shirt_color": "white",
          "tie": "not visible"
        }
      },
      "head": {
        "covered_by": "white cardboard box",
        "box_features": {
          "shape": "cube",
          "edges": "taped corners, slightly open flap at top",
          "face_drawing": {
            "eyes": "two simple oval eyes",
            "eyebrows": "slightly curved upward",
            "mouth": "simple curved smile",
            "expression": "friendly neutral smile"
          }
        }
      }
    }
  ],

  "phone": {
    "type": "smartphone",
    "color": "dark/black",
    "position": "held in the left subject’s right hand",
    "flash": "on (bright reflection in mirror)"
  },

  "composition": {
    "photo_type": "mirror selfie",
    "framing": "upper body, centered on both subjects",
    "lighting_effects": {
      "lens_flares": true,
      "flash_reflection": true
    }
  },

  "additional_details": {
    "background_people": "partially visible, blurred, wearing formal attire",
    "atmosphere": "party / event / celebration"
  }
}

### 933. 使用 Nano Banana Pro 与电影角色拍摄鱼眼自拍

**作者**: [ΛRMIN | AI](https://x.com/Arminn_Ai/status/1996285140893622391)  **日期**: 2025-12-03  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的图像提示，用于生成超逼真的鱼眼风格团体自拍，将上传的人物与选定的电影角色结合起来，模仿复古 35mm 闪光摄影。

![使用 Nano Banana Pro 与电影角色拍摄鱼眼自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1764909308186_uwe1k5_G7Q6stnXIAAe7Vz.jpg)
![使用 Nano Banana Pro 与电影角色拍摄鱼眼自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1764909310826_gtjbuj_G7Q6s9zWYAATJc4.jpg)
![使用 Nano Banana Pro 与电影角色拍摄鱼眼自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1764909313174_1wfjpp_G7Q6s7mWsAE_FvH.jpg)
![使用 Nano Banana Pro 与电影角色拍摄鱼眼自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1764909315401_k8u49z_G7Q6tBXWQAAAVNI.jpg)

```
A film-like fisheye wide-angle 360-degree selfie without any camera or phone visible in the subject’s hands. A real and exaggerated selfie of {argument name="person from uploaded image" default="person from uploaded image"} with {argument name="characters" default="their favorite movie characters"}. They are making faces at the camera.

A hyper-realistic fisheye wide-angle selfie, captured with a vintage 35mm fisheye lens creating heavy barrel distortion. without any camera or phone visible in the subject’s hands.
Subject & Action: A close-up, distorted group photo featuring {argument name="person from uploaded image" default="person from uploaded image"} taking selfie with {argument name="characters" default="their favorite movie characters"}. Everyone is making wild, exaggerated faces, squinting slightly from the flash.
Lighting & Texture: Harsh, direct on-camera flash lighting that creates hard shadows behind the subjects. Authentic film grain, slight motion blur on the edges, and chromatic aberration. It looks like a candid, amateur snapshot as if captured during a chaotic behind-the-scenes moment, not a studio photo.
```

```
{
"subject": {
"description": "A young woman taking a mirror selfie, playfully biting the straw of an iced green drink",
"mirror_rules": "ignore mirror physics for text on clothing, display text forward and legible to viewer, no extra characters",
"age": "young adult",
"expression": "playful, nose scrunched, biting straw",
"hair": {
"color": {argument name="hair color" default="brown"},
"style": "long straight hair falling over shoulders"
},
"clothing": {
"top": {
"type": "ribbed knit cami top",
"color": {argument name="top color" default="white"},
"details": "cropped fit, thin straps, small dainty bow at neckline"
},
"bottom": {
"type": "denim jeans",
"color": "light wash blue",
"details": "relaxed fit, visible button fly"
}
},
"face": {
"preserve_original": true,
"makeup": "natural sunkissed look, glowing skin, nude glossy lips"
}
},
"accessories": {
"headwear": {
"type": "olive green baseball cap",
"details": "white NY logo embroidery, silver over-ear headphones worn over the cap"
},
"jewelry": {
"earrings": "large gold hoop earrings",
"necklace": "thin gold chain with cross pendant",

"rings": "multiple gold rings"
},

"type": "smartphone",
"details": "white case with pink floral pattern"
},
"prop": {
"type": "iced beverage",
"details": "plastic cup with iced matcha latte and green straw"
}
},
"photography": {
"camera_style": "smartphone mirror selfie aesthetic",
"angle": "eye-level mirror reflection",
"shot_type": "waist-up composition, subject positioned on the right side of the frame",
"aspect_ratio": "9:16 vertical",
"texture": "sharp focus, natural indoor lighting, social media realism, clean details"
},
"background": {
"setting": "bright casual bedroom",
"wall_color": "plain white",
"elements": [
"bed with white textured duvet",
"black woven shoulder bag lying on bed",
"leopard print throw pillow",
"distressed white vintage nightstand",
"modern bedside lamp with white shade"
],
"atmosphere": "casual lifestyle, cozy, spontaneous",

}
}

### 936. 毯子上一个白日梦女孩的超逼真 16K 自拍编辑

**作者**: [Edward Lu](https://x.com/lujunneng/status/1995901350350090723)  **日期**: 2025-12-02  **语言**: en

> 一个针对 Nano Banana Pro 的详细编辑提示，将一个躺在毯子上的小女孩的自拍照，转换为超逼真的 16K iPhone 风格照片，同时指定她的发型、服装、妆容、姿势、光线和背景，并保留她的脸部特征。

![毯子上一个白日梦女孩的超逼真 16K 自拍编辑](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1764909316855_ztow9x_G7LdsTXXwAA0yoK.jpg)

```
Edit the photo in ultra-realistic 16K resolution. A young girl is taking a selfie inside a room. Her hair is long, layered ash brown, slightly messy at the top, falling forward naturally. She is wearing a black curly-strapped floral dress. Pose: She is lying face down on a blanket, with her right hand touching her lips, head tilted sideways, looking forward, appearing to be daydreaming. Her makeup is flawless, Korean-inspired with a modern touch: neatly shaped eyebrows, soft peach eyeshadow, thin eyeliner emphasizing her eyes, and soft gray contact lenses giving a captivating gaze. Her cheeks have a natural peach blush, and her lips are glossy, with a nude base lip color ombre'd into red, creating a soft yet striking contrast. The background is a cream marble wall. Photo is taken up-close at eye-level. Lighting: Cinematic and editorial, dim and dark to make the selfie look realistic. Retro purple contrast enhances skin glow. Photo captured with an iPhone 17 Pro Max. Do not alter her face in any way.
```

### 937. 用于超逼真 iPhone 风格 AI 影响者的系统 JSON 提示模板

**作者**: [Machina](https://x.com/EXM7777/status/1995877647579316545)  **日期**: 2025-12-02  **语言**: en

> 一个长篇的系统风格提示，定义了角色、认知原则、视觉美学和 JSON 模式，用于使用 Nano Banana Pro 生成超逼真的手机摄影网红图片。

![用于超逼真 iPhone 风格 AI 影响者的系统 JSON 提示模板](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1764909326383_8imgjp_G7LIIPgaEAAe5zr.jpg)
![用于超逼真 iPhone 风格 AI 影响者的系统 JSON 提示模板](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1764909328610_93l1ke_G7LIIbtbkAA1Q0O.jpg)
![用于超逼真 iPhone 风格 AI 影响者的系统 JSON 提示模板](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1764909330737_mwwqn3_G7LIIpDbgAcybU2.jpg)
![用于超逼真 iPhone 风格 AI 影响者的系统 JSON 提示模板](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1764909332854_8p02z2_G7LII5oasAEQl5u.jpg)

```
<role>
You're specialized in computational photography, specifically the optical characteristics of the {argument name="phone model" default="iPhone 16/17 Pro Max"} sensor system. You translate human concepts into mathematically precise image generation prompts.
</role>

<cognitive_framework>
<principle name="Context Hunger">
If the user provides a vague concept (e.g., "{argument name="example vague concept" default="girl at a cafe"}"), you must explicitly invent the missing environmental, lighting, and styling details to ensure a complete image.
</principle>
<principle name="The iPhone Aesthetic">
All outputs must strictly simulate high-end mobile photography.
- Focal Lengths: {argument name="main focal length" default="24mm"} (Main), {argument name="ultra wide focal length" default="13mm"} (Ultra Wide), or {argument name="telephoto focal length" default="77mm"} (Telephoto).
- Characteristics: "Apple ProRAW" color science, sharp details (Deep Fusion), computational bokeh (Portrait Mode), and Smart HDR dynamic range.
- Avoid: Anamorphic lens flares, exaggerated "cinema" bokeh, or vintage film grain (unless specified as a filter).
</principle>
<principle name="Imperfection is Realism">
To achieve "ultra-realism," you must inject terms describing unpolished reality: digital noise (not film grain), skin texture, slightly blown-out highlights (common in mobile), and natural "snapshot" framing.
</principle>
<principle name="JSON Precision">
Your output is a strict JSON object designed for programmatic use.
</principle>
</cognitive_framework>

<visual_analysis_reference>
The "Influencer Aesthetic" is defined by:
- Vibe: "Plandid" (planned candid), effortlessness, aspirational lifestyle.
- Lighting: Natural window light, golden hour, or "flash photography" (hard flash) for night shots.
- Framing: Vertical (9:16) native mobile aspect ratio, often selfies or point-of-view (POV).
</visual_analysis_reference>

<instructions>
1. Analyze the user's request for subject and mood.
2. Enrich the request using "iPhone Photography" constraints.
3. Format the output strictly as a JSON object with the following schema.
</instructions>

<json_schema>
{
  "meta_data": {
    "style": "iPhone Pro Max Photography",
    "aspect_ratio": "9:16"
  },
  "prompt_components": {
    "subject": "Detailed description of person, styling, pose (mirror selfie, 0.5x angle, etc.)",
    "environment": "Detailed background, location, social setting",
    "lighting": "Smart HDR lighting, natural source, or direct flash",
    "camera_gear": "iPhone 16 Pro Max, Main Camera 24mm f/1.78, or Ultra Wide 13mm",
    "processing": "Apple ProRAW, Deep Fusion, Shot on iPhone",
    "imperfections": "Digital noise, motion blur, authentic skin texture, screen reflection (if mirror)"
  },
  "full_prompt_string": "The combined, comma-separated string optimized for realistic mobile generation",
  "negative_prompt": "Standard negatives + 'professional camera, DSLR, bokeh balls, anamorphic, cinema lighting, studio lighting'"
}
</json_schema>

<task>
Await user description of the scene. Generate the JSON output immediately.
</task>
```

**Related**: [[奇幻世界]]、[[超现实]]、[[综合生活]]

### 938. Nano Banana Pro 的 JSON 车内自拍镜提示

**作者**: [Mahnoor Fatima](https://x.com/MahnoorAi12/status/1995401401011491178)  **日期**: 2025-12-01  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的 JSON 格式提示，用于生成一张年轻女性在汽车侧后视镜中反射的超逼真自拍，包括主体、服装、道具、环境、光照、风格和负面提示。

![Nano Banana Pro 的 JSON 车内自拍镜提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1764909145173_pjujk9_G7EWFgra4AE2L-5.jpg)

```
{
  "image_generation_prompt": {
    "subject": {
      "description": "Young woman with long brown hair",
      "pose": "Leaning gently on car window, resting head on one hand, relaxed and confident",
      "action": "Taking a selfie in the side mirror reflection"
    },
    "clothing": {
      "top": "Simple red turtleneck long-sleeve top",
      "accessories": "Minimalist stud earrings"
    },
    "props": {
      "item": "iPhone 17 Pro Max",
      "details": "Realistic proportions, accurate lens design, held in hand"
    },
    "environment": {
      "location": "Outdoors, reflected in the side mirror of a black Toyota Land Cruiser",
      "background": "Trees and orange-blue evening sky",
      "depth_of_field": "Subtly blurred background for depth (bokeh)"
    },
    "lighting": {
      "type": "Golden hour",
      "characteristics": "Warm sunlight, soft natural glow, evening light, realistic shadows"
    },
    "style": {
      "aesthetic": "Natural, ultra-realistic, minimalist, Instagram style",
      "quality": "8k resolution, highly detailed, sharp focus, cinematic photography"
    },
    "technical_constraints": {
      "perspective": "Accurate mirror reflection, correct optical orientation",
      "distortion_control": "No exaggeration or distortion of features or phone"
    }
  },
  "negative_prompt": "cartoon, illustration, painting, drawing, bad anatomy, disfigured, deformed, blurry face, low quality, pixelated, unnatural lighting, distorted phone, wrong reflection angle, extra fingers, messy hair, heavy makeup, text, watermark"
}
```

### 939. Nano Banana Pro 的九宫格日式相册布局提示词

**作者**: [松果先森](https://x.com/songguoxiansen/status/1995309373854466136)  **日期**: 2025-12-01  **语言**: en

> 一个非常详细的提示，用于创建包含 9 张照片的日式相册页面，其中包含从白天到夜晚的叙事、一致的角色、风格化的服装以及底边距的排版标题。

![Nano Banana Pro 的九宫格日式相册布局提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1764577209404_hmqbpb_G7BB7E1akAAkpBe.jpg)
![Nano Banana Pro 的九宫格日式相册布局提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1764577213960_4a4eyu_G7AvvcUbcAA1kjl.jpg)
![Nano Banana Pro 的九宫格日式相册布局提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1764577217235_wsrq6c_G7Av2fjagAESr9Z.jpg)
![Nano Banana Pro 的九宫格日式相册布局提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1764577220441_txpuuj_G7AwKHVbsAAisIt.jpg)

```
**[Type]:** A scanned page from a high-end Japanese photobook (Shashin-shu). **A 9-grid photo layout printed on textured matte art paper.** **[Layout Design]:** The 9 photos are arranged in a clean grid with **wide white margins** at the bottom to accommodate typography.  **[Subject Consistency - STRICT]:** * **Source:** Based strictly on the uploaded reference image. **[SAME CHARACTER IN ALL PANELS]**. * **Styling Strategy:** **[RANDOMLY SELECT ONE]:**     1.  **{Classic}:** {argument name="经典造型" default="Loose white shirt + shorts"}.     2.  **{Soft}:** {argument name="柔和造型" default="Beige knit cardigan + camisole"}.     3.  **{Pure}:** {argument name="纯净造型" default="White lace-trimmed slip dress"} (Best for bath transitions).     * **Note:** In Row 3 (Bath), outfit creates a "wet look" or shows skin.  **[Typography & Japanese Elements - THE ARTISTIC TOUCH]:** *(AI must render a title text in the bottom white margin)* **[RANDOMLY SELECT ONE Title Theme]:** 1.  **{Theme: Summer}:** Large Japanese text **"{argument name="夏主题标题日文" default="青い夏"}"** with small English text **"{argument name="夏主题标题英文" default="BLUE SUMMER"}"** below it. 2.  **{Theme: Private}:** Large Japanese text **"{argument name="私主题标题日文" default="私小説"}"** with small English text **"{argument name="私主题标题英文" default="PRIVATE NOVEL"}"** below it. 3.  **{Theme: Air}:** Large Japanese text **"{argument name="空气主题标题日文" default="空気感"}"** with small English text **"{argument name="空气主题标题英文" default="AIRY MOMENTS"}"** below it. * **Signature:** The handwritten text **"{argument name="签名文本" default="By : Berryxia"}"** is placed artistically next to the title or in the corner like a watermark.  **[Grid Narrative - The "Day to Night" Journey]:**  **Row 1: Outdoor Breath (Wind & Light)** 1.  **Top-Left (Wide):** Subject standing in wind, hair blowing, **backlit by sun**. 2.  **Top-Middle (Detail):** Close-up of **hand holding a glass bottle of soda** or blocking the sun. 3.  **Top-Right (Motion):** Blurry candid shot of subject **walking away on a street**.  **Row 2: Indoor Play (Props & "Hiding")** 4.  **Center-Left (Hiding):** Subject sitting on tatami, **using a dried flower to cover one eye**. 5.  **Center (Candid):** Subject **lying upside down on a sofa**, reading a book, face partially hidden. 6.  **Center-Right (Fetish):** Focus on **bare feet curled on the rug** or fingers touching hair.  **Row 3: Private/Wet (Steam & Skin)** 7.  **Bottom-Left (Steamy Back):** **Back view in a steamy bathroom**. Wet hair sticking to nape of neck. Soft focus. 8.  **Bottom-Middle (Immersion):** Subject **submerged in bathtub**, water up to chin. Dreamy high-key lighting. 9.  **Bottom-Right (End):** Detail of **steam on a mirror**.  **[Aesthetic Style]:** * **Film Stock:** Fujifilm Pro 400H (Cyan shadows, airy highlights). * **Texture:** **Visible paper texture**, slight vignetting, layout design style.  **[Parameters]:** --ar 2:3 --style raw --v 6.0 --stylize 200 --cref [URL] --cw 80 --no commercial smile, stiff posing, studio lighting 使用室内旅馆内风格B输出
```

**Related**: [[综合时尚]]、[[浮世绘与日本传统]]、[[综合艺术]]
